<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { LayoutGrid } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { GridReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/GridReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type SerializedGridContainerNode = Spread<
    21→  {
    22→    cols: number
    23→    gap?: string
    24→    cells: SerializedEditorState[]
    25→  },
    26→  SerializedLexicalNode
    27→>
    28→
    29→interface LegacySerializedGridNode {
    30→  type?: string
    31→  version?: number
    32→  cols?: number
    33→  gap?: string | number
    34→  cells?: SerializedEditorState[]
    35→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    36→}
    37→
    38→function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    39→  return createEditor({
    40→    namespace: 'GridCell',
    41→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    42→    theme: editorTheme,
    43→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    44→      console.error('[GridCell]', error)
    45→    },
    46→  })
    47→}
    48→
    49→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    50→  __cols: number
    51→  __gap: string
    52→  __cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    53→
    54→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    55→    {
    56→      title: 'Grid',
    57→      icon: createElement(LayoutGrid, { size: 20 }),
    58→      description: 'Grid layout container',
    59→      keywords: ['grid', 'columns', 'layout'],
    60→      section: 'LAYOUT',
    61→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    62→        editor.update(() => {
    63→          $insertNodes([$createGridContainerNode(2)])
    64→        })
    65→      },
    66→    },
    67→  ]
    68→
    69→  static getType(): string {
    70→    return 'grid-container'
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
    74→    return new GridContainerNode(
    75→      node.__cols,
    76→      node.__gap,
    77→      [...node.__cellEditors],
    78→      node.__key,
    79→    )
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  constructor(
    83→    cols = 2,
    84→    gap?: string,
    85→    cellEditors?: LexicalEditor[],
    86→    key?: NodeKey,
    87→  ) {
    88→    super(key)
    89→    this.__cols = cols
    90→    this.__gap = gap || '16px'
    91→    if (cellEditors) {
    92→      this.__cellEditors = cellEditors
    93→    } else {
    94→      this.__cellEditors = Array.from({ length: cols }, () =>
    95→        createCellEditor(),
    96→      )
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   101→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   102→    div.className = 'rich-grid-container'
   103→    return div
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   107→    return false
   108→  }
   109→
   110→  isInline(): boolean {
   111→    return false
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getCols(): number {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__cols
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setCols(cols: number): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    const prev = writable.__cellEditors.length
   121→    writable.__cols = cols
   122→    if (cols > prev) {
   123→      for (let i = prev; i < cols; i++) {
   124→        writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  getGap(): string {
   130→    return this.getLatest().__gap
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  setGap(gap: string): void {
   134→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   135→    writable.__gap = gap
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  getCellEditors(): LexicalEditor[] {
   139→    return this.getLatest().__cellEditors
   140→  }
   141→
   142→  addCells(count: number): void {
   143→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   144→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   145→      writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   146→    }
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  removeCells(count: number): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    const editors = writable.__cellEditors
   152→    const toRemove = Math.min(count, editors.length)
   153→    for (let i = 0; i < toRemove; i++) {
   154→      const editor = editors.at(-1)
   155→      if (!editor) break
   156→      const isEmpty = editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   157→        return $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0
   158→      })
   159→      if (!isEmpty) break
   160→      editors.pop()
   161→    }
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  getTextContent(): string {
   165→    return this.__cellEditors
   166→      .map((editor) =>
   167→        editor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContent()),
   168→      )
   169→      .join('\n')
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  static importJSON(
   173→    serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode,
   174→  ): GridContainerNode {
   175→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridNode
   176→    const cols = legacy.cols || 2
   177→    const rawGap = legacy.gap
   178→    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
   179→    const node = new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   180→
   181→    if (legacy.cells && legacy.cells.length > 0) {
   182→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = legacy.cells.map((cellState) => {
   183→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   184→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
   185→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   186→        return editor
   187→      })
   188→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   189→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   190→      // Legacy ElementNode format: each child becomes a cell
   191→      const { children } = legacy
   192→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
   193→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   194→        const content = {
   195→          root: {
   196→            children: [child],
   197→            direction: null,
   198→            format: '',
   199→            indent: 0,
   200→            type: 'root',
   201→            version: 1,
   202→          },
   203→        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   204→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(content)
   205→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   206→        return editor
   207→      })
   208→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    return node
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  exportJSON(): SerializedGridContainerNode {
   215→    return {
   216→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   217→      type: 'grid-container',
   218→      cols: this.__cols,
   219→      gap: this.__gap,
   220→      cells: this.__cellEditors.map((editor) =>
   221→        editor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   222→      ),
   223→      version: 1,
   224→    }
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   228→    return createElement(GridReadOnlyDecorator, {
   229→      cols: this.__cols,
   230→      gap: this.__gap,
   231→      cellEditors: this.__cellEditors,
   232→    })
   233→  }
   234→}
   235→
   236→export function $createGridContainerNode(
   237→  cols = 2,
   238→  gap?: string,
   239→): GridContainerNode {
   240→  return new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   241→}
   242→
   243→export function $isGridContainerNode(
   244→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   245→): node is GridContainerNode {
   246→  return node instanceof GridContainerNode
   247→}
   248→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown-editor/MarkdownEditor.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import './MarkdownEditor.css'
     4→
     5→import { CodeNode } from '@lexical/code'
     6→import { AutoLinkNode, LinkNode } from '@lexical/link'
     7→import { ListItemNode, ListNode } from '@lexical/list'
     8→import {
     9→  $convertFromMarkdownString,
    10→  $convertToMarkdownString,
    11→  TRANSFORMERS,
    12→} from '@lexical/markdown'
    13→import { LexicalComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposer'
    14→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
    15→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
    16→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
    17→import { HistoryPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalHistoryPlugin'
    18→import { LinkPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalLinkPlugin'
    19→import { ListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalListPlugin'
    20→import { MarkdownShortcutPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalMarkdownShortcutPlugin'
    21→import { OnChangePlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalOnChangePlugin'
    22→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
    23→import { HeadingNode, QuoteNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
    24→import type { EditorState, LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
    25→import { $getRoot, COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH, KEY_ENTER_COMMAND } from 'lexical'
    26→import type { MutableRefObject, ReactNode } from 'react'
    27→import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react'
    28→
    29→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    30→
    31→type MarkdownEditorProps = {
    32→  value: string
    33→  onChange: (value: string) => void
    34→  placeholder?: string
    35→  onSubmit?: () => void
    36→  autoFocus?: boolean
    37→  scrollIntoView?: boolean
    38→  className?: string
    39→  contentClassName?: string
    40→  actions?: ReactNode
    41→  onEditorReady?: (editor: LexicalEditor | null) => void
    42→}
    43→
    44→const editorNodes = [
    45→  HeadingNode,
    46→  QuoteNode,
    47→  ListNode,
    48→  ListItemNode,
    49→  LinkNode,
    50→  AutoLinkNode,
    51→  CodeNode,
    52→]
    53→
    54→export const MarkdownEditor = ({
    55→  value,
    56→  onChange,
    57→  placeholder,
    58→  onSubmit,
    59→  autoFocus,
    60→  scrollIntoView,
    61→  className,
    62→  contentClassName,
    63→  actions,
    64→  onEditorReady,
    65→}: MarkdownEditorProps) => {
    66→  const initialValueRef = useRef(value)
    67→  const lastMarkdownRef = useRef(value)
    68→
    69→  const initialConfig = useMemo(
    70→    () => ({
    71→      namespace: 'markdown-editor',
    72→      nodes: editorNodes,
    73→      onError(error: Error) {
    74→        throw error
    75→      },
    76→      editorState: () => {
    77→        if (!initialValueRef.current) return
    78→        $convertFromMarkdownString(
    79→          initialValueRef.current,
    80→          TRANSFORMERS,
    81→          undefined,
    82→          true,
    83→        )
    84→      },
    85→    }),
    86→    [],
    87→  )
    88→
    89→  return (
    90→    <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    91→      <div className={clsxm('markdown-editor', className)}>
    92→        <RichTextPlugin
    93→          contentEditable={
    94→            <ContentEditable
    95→              className={clsxm('markdown-editor__content', contentClassName)}
    96→              aria-label="Markdown editor"
    97→              spellCheck
    98→            />
    99→          }
   100→          placeholder={
   101→            placeholder ? (
   102→              <span className="markdown-editor__placeholder">
   103→                {placeholder}
   104→              </span>
   105→            ) : null
   106→          }
   107→          ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
   108→        />
   109→
   110→        <HistoryPlugin />
   111→        <ListPlugin />
   112→        <LinkPlugin />
   113→        <MarkdownShortcutPlugin transformers={TRANSFORMERS} />
   114→        <OnChangePlugin
   115→          onChange={(editorState: EditorState) => {
   116→            editorState.read(() => {
   117→              const markdown = $convertToMarkdownString(
   118→                TRANSFORMERS,
   119→                undefined,
   120→                true,
   121→              )
   122→              if (markdown === lastMarkdownRef.current) return
   123→              lastMarkdownRef.current = markdown
   124→              onChange(markdown)
   125→            })
   126→          }}
   127→        />
   128→        <EditorRefPlugin
   129→          onEditorReady={(editor) => {
   130→            onEditorReady?.(editor)
   131→          }}
   132→        />
   133→        <MarkdownSyncPlugin value={value} lastMarkdownRef={lastMarkdownRef} />
   134→        {!!onSubmit && <SubmitShortcutPlugin onSubmit={onSubmit} />}
   135→        {!!autoFocus && (
   136→          <AutoFocusPlugin
   137→            autoFocus={autoFocus}
   138→            scrollIntoView={scrollIntoView}
   139→          />
   140→        )}
   141→
   142→        {actions}
   143→      </div>
   144→    </LexicalComposer>
   145→  )
   146→}
   147→
   148→const EditorRefPlugin = ({
   149→  onEditorReady,
   150→}: {
   151→  onEditorReady?: (editor: LexicalEditor | null) => void
   152→}) => {
   153→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   154→  useEffect(() => {
   155→    onEditorReady?.(editor)
   156→    return () => {
   157→      onEditorReady?.(null)
   158→    }
   159→  }, [editor, onEditorReady])
   160→  return null
   161→}
   162→
   163→const SubmitShortcutPlugin = ({ onSubmit }: { onSubmit: () => void }) => {
   164→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   165→  useEffect(
   166→    () =>
   167→      editor.registerCommand<KeyboardEvent>(
   168→        KEY_ENTER_COMMAND,
   169→        (event) => {
   170→          if (!(event.metaKey || event.ctrlKey)) return false
   171→          event.preventDefault()
   172→          onSubmit()
   173→          return true
   174→        },
   175→        COMMAND_PRIORITY_HIGH,
   176→      ),
   177→    [editor, onSubmit],
   178→  )
   179→  return null
   180→}
   181→
   182→const MarkdownSyncPlugin = ({
   183→  value,
   184→  lastMarkdownRef,
   185→}: {
   186→  value: string
   187→  lastMarkdownRef: MutableRefObject<string>
   188→}) => {
   189→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   190→  useEffect(() => {
   191→    if (value === lastMarkdownRef.current) return
   192→    lastMarkdownRef.current = value
   193→    editor.update(() => {
   194→      const root = $getRoot()
   195→      root.clear()
   196→      if (!value) return
   197→      $convertFromMarkdownString(value, TRANSFORMERS, undefined, true)
   198→    })
   199→  }, [editor, lastMarkdownRef, value])
   200→  return null
   201→}
   202→
   203→const AutoFocusPlugin = ({
   204→  autoFocus,
   205→  scrollIntoView,
   206→}: {
   207→  autoFocus: boolean
   208→  scrollIntoView?: boolean
   209→}) => {
   210→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
   211→  useEffect(() => {
   212→    if (!autoFocus) return
   213→    editor.focus()
   214→    if (scrollIntoView) {
   215→      const rootElement = editor.getRootElement()
   216→      rootElement?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
   217→    }
   218→  }, [editor, autoFocus, scrollIntoView])
   219→  return null
   220→}
   221→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/FootnoteSectionNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     7→  Spread,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    11→
    12→import { FootnoteSectionRenderer } from '../components/renderers/FootnoteSectionRenderer'
    13→import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'
    14→
    15→export type SerializedFootnoteSectionNode = Spread<
    16→  {
    17→    definitions: Record<string, string>
    18→  },
    19→  SerializedLexicalNode
    20→>
    21→
    22→export class FootnoteSectionNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    23→  __definitions: Record<string, string>
    24→
    25→  static getType(): string {
    26→    return 'footnote-section'
    27→  }
    28→
    29→  static clone(node: FootnoteSectionNode): FootnoteSectionNode {
    30→    return new FootnoteSectionNode({ ...node.__definitions }, node.__key)
    31→  }
    32→
    33→  constructor(definitions: Record<string, string>, key?: NodeKey) {
    34→    super(key)
    35→    this.__definitions = definitions
    36→  }
    37→
    38→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    39→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    40→    div.className = 'rich-footnote-section'
    41→    return div
    42→  }
    43→
    44→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    45→    return false
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  isInline(): boolean {
    49→    return false
    50→  }
    51→
    52→  static importJSON(
    53→    serializedNode: SerializedFootnoteSectionNode,
    54→  ): FootnoteSectionNode {
    55→    return $createFootnoteSectionNode(serializedNode.definitions)
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  exportJSON(): SerializedFootnoteSectionNode {
    59→    return {
    60→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    61→      type: 'footnote-section',
    62→      definitions: this.__definitions,
    63→      version: 1,
    64→    }
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  getDefinitions(): Record<string, string> {
    68→    return this.getLatest().__definitions
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  setDefinitions(definitions: Record<string, string>): void {
    72→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    73→    writable.__definitions = definitions
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  getDefinition(identifier: string): string | undefined {
    77→    return this.getLatest().__definitions[identifier]
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  setDefinition(identifier: string, content: string): void {
    81→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    82→    writable.__definitions = {
    83→      ...writable.__definitions,
    84→      [identifier]: content,
    85→    }
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  removeDefinition(identifier: string): void {
    89→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    90→    const { [identifier]: _, ...rest } = writable.__definitions
    91→    writable.__definitions = rest
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    95→    return createRendererDecoration(
    96→      'FootnoteSection',
    97→      FootnoteSectionRenderer,
    98→      {
    99→        definitions: this.__definitions,
   100→        nodeKey: this.__key,
   101→      },
   102→    )
   103→  }
   104→}
   105→
   106→export function $createFootnoteSectionNode(
   107→  definitions: Record<string, string> = {},
   108→): FootnoteSectionNode {
   109→  return new FootnoteSectionNode(definitions)
   110→}
   111→
   112→export function $isFootnoteSectionNode(
   113→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   114→): node is FootnoteSectionNode {
   115→  return node instanceof FootnoteSectionNode
   116→}
   117→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/HorizontalRuleNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalNode,
     4→  NodeKey,
     5→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
     8→
     9→export type SerializedHorizontalRuleNode = SerializedLexicalNode
    10→
    11→/**
    12→ * Horizontal rule node. Replaces deprecated @lexical/react LexicalHorizontalRuleNode.
    13→ * Renders <hr> with class "rich-hr" for styling.
    14→ */
    15→export class HorizontalRuleNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
    16→  static getType(): string {
    17→    return 'horizontalrule'
    18→  }
    19→
    20→  static clone(node: HorizontalRuleNode): HorizontalRuleNode {
    21→    return new HorizontalRuleNode(node.__key)
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
    25→    super(key)
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    29→    const hr = document.createElement('hr')
    30→    hr.className = 'rich-hr'
    31→    hr.dataset.lexicalDecorator = 'true'
    32→    hr.setAttribute('contenteditable', 'false')
    33→    return hr
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    37→    return false
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  static importJSON(
    41→    _serializedNode: SerializedHorizontalRuleNode,
    42→  ): HorizontalRuleNode {
    43→    return $createHorizontalRuleNode()
    44→  }
    45→
    46→  exportJSON(): SerializedHorizontalRuleNode {
    47→    return {
    48→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    49→      type: 'horizontalrule',
    50→      version: 1,
    51→    }
    52→  }
    53→
    54→  decorate(): null {
    55→    return null
    56→  }
    57→}
    58→
    59→export function $createHorizontalRuleNode(): HorizontalRuleNode {
    60→  return new HorizontalRuleNode()
    61→}
    62→
    63→export function $isHorizontalRuleNode(
    64→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    65→): node is HorizontalRuleNode {
    66→  return node instanceof HorizontalRuleNode
    67→}
    68→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import type { RichEditorVariant } from '../types'
     5→import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6→
     7→export type RendererMode = 'editor' | 'renderer'
     8→
     9→interface RendererConfigContextValue {
    10→  config?: RendererConfig
    11→  mode: RendererMode
    12→  variant: RichEditorVariant
    13→}
    14→
    15→const RendererConfigContext = createContext<RendererConfigContextValue>({
    16→  config: undefined,
    17→  mode: 'renderer',
    18→  variant: 'article',
    19→})
    20→
    21→export interface RendererConfigProviderProps {
    22→  config?: RendererConfig
    23→  mode: RendererMode
    24→  variant: RichEditorVariant
    25→  children: ReactNode
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function RendererConfigProvider({
    29→  config,
    30→  mode,
    31→  variant,
    32→  children,
    33→}: RendererConfigProviderProps) {
    34→  const value = useMemo(
    35→    () => ({ config, mode, variant }),
    36→    [config, mode, variant],
    37→  )
    38→  return (
    39→    <RendererConfigContext.Provider value={value}>
    40→      {children}
    41→    </RendererConfigContext.Provider>
    42→  )
    43→}
    44→
    45→export function useRendererConfig(): RendererConfig | undefined {
    46→  return use(RendererConfigContext).config
    47→}
    48→
    49→export function useRendererMode(): RendererMode {
    50→  return use(RendererConfigContext).mode
    51→}
    52→
    53→export function useVariant(): RichEditorVariant {
    54→  return use(RendererConfigContext).variant
    55→}
    56→
```

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export interface FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue {
     5→  definitions: Record<string, string>
     6→  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
     7→}
     8→
     9→const FootnoteDefinitionsContext =
    10→  createContext<FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue>({
    11→    definitions: {},
    12→    displayNumberMap: {},
    13→  })
    14→
    15→export function FootnoteDefinitionsProvider({
    16→  definitions,
    17→  displayNumberMap,
    18→  children,
    19→}: FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue & { children: ReactNode }) {
    20→  const value = useMemo(
    21→    () => ({ definitions, displayNumberMap }),
    22→    [definitions, displayNumberMap],
    23→  )
    24→  return (
    25→    <FootnoteDefinitionsContext value={value}>
    26→      {children}
    27→    </FootnoteDefinitionsContext>
    28→  )
    29→}
    30→
    31→export function useFootnoteDefinitions(): FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue {
    32→  return use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
    33→}
    34→
    35→export function useFootnoteContent(identifier: string): string | undefined {
    36→  const { definitions } = use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
    37→  return definitions[identifier]
    38→}
    39→
    40→export function useFootnoteDisplayNumber(
    41→  identifier: string,
    42→): number | undefined {
    43→  const { displayNumberMap } = use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
    44→  return displayNumberMap[identifier]
    45→}
    46→
```

```text
     1→import type {

     9→import { $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import { Sigma } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'

    14→import { KaTeXRenderer } from '../components/renderers/KaTeXRenderer'

    17→
    18→export type SerializedKaTeXBlockNode = Spread<
    19→  {
    20→    equation: string
    21→  },
    22→  SerializedLexicalNode
    23→>
    24→
    25→export class KaTeXBlockNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    26→  __equation: string
    27→
    28→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    29→    {
    30→      title: 'Math Equation',
    31→      icon: createElement(Sigma, { size: 20 }),
    32→      description: 'KaTeX block formula',
    33→      keywords: ['math', 'equation', 'latex', 'katex'],
    34→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    35→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    36→        editor.update(() => {
    37→          $insertNodes([$createKaTeXBlockNode('')])
    38→        })
    39→      },
    40→    },
    41→  ]
    42→
    43→  static getType(): string {
    44→    return 'katex-block'
    45→  }
    46→
    47→  static clone(node: KaTeXBlockNode): KaTeXBlockNode {
    48→    return new KaTeXBlockNode(node.__equation, node.__key)
    49→  }
    50→
    51→  constructor(equation: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    52→    super(key)
    53→    this.__equation = equation
    54→  }
    55→
    56→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    57→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    58→    div.className = 'rich-katex-block-wrapper'
    59→    return div
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    63→    return false
    64→  }
    65→
    66→  isInline(): boolean {
    67→    return false
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedKaTeXBlockNode): KaTeXBlockNode {
    71→    return $createKaTeXBlockNode(serializedNode.equation)
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  exportJSON(): SerializedKaTeXBlockNode {
    75→    return {
    76→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    77→      type: 'katex-block',
    78→      equation: this.__equation,
    79→      version: 1,
    80→    }
    81→  }
    82→
    83→  getEquation(): string {
    84→    return this.__equation
    85→  }
    86→
    87→  setEquation(equation: string): void {
    88→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    89→    writable.__equation = equation
    90→  }
    91→
    92→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    93→    return createRendererDecoration('KaTeX', KaTeXRenderer, {
    94→      equation: this.__equation,
    95→      displayMode: true,
    96→    })
    97→  }
    98→}
    99→

   102→}

   108→}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/FootnotePlugin.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { $getRoot, $nodesOfType } from 'lexical'
     3→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { FootnoteDefinitionsProvider } from '../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     6→import { FootnoteNode } from '../nodes/FootnoteNode'
     7→import {
     8→  $createFootnoteSectionNode,
     9→  FootnoteSectionNode,
    10→} from '../nodes/FootnoteSectionNode'
    11→
    12→export function FootnotePlugin({ children }: { children?: React.ReactNode }) {
    13→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    14→  const [definitions, setDefinitions] = useState<Record<string, string>>({})
    15→  const [displayNumberMap, setDisplayNumberMap] = useState<
    16→    Record<string, number>
    17→  >({})
    18→
    19→  useEffect(() => {
    20→    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    21→      editorState.read(() => {
    22→        const footnoteNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)
    23→        const seen = new Set<string>()
    24→        const numberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
    25→        let counter = 1
    26→        for (const node of footnoteNodes) {
    27→          const id = node.getIdentifier()
    28→          if (!seen.has(id)) {
    29→            seen.add(id)
    30→            numberMap[id] = counter++
    31→          }
    32→        }
    33→        setDisplayNumberMap(numberMap)
    34→
    35→        const sectionNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    36→
    37→        if (footnoteNodes.length === 0 && sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    38→          editor.update(() => {
    39→            const sections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    40→            for (const s of sections) s.remove()
    41→          })
    42→          setDefinitions({})
    43→          return
    44→        }
    45→
    46→        if (footnoteNodes.length > 0 && sectionNodes.length === 0) {
    47→          editor.update(() => {
    48→            const root = $getRoot()
    49→            const defs: Record<string, string> = {}
    50→            for (const id of seen) {
    51→              defs[id] = ''
    52→            }
    53→            const section = $createFootnoteSectionNode(defs)
    54→            root.append(section)
    55→          })
    56→        } else if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    57→          const existingDefs = sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions()
    58→          const missingIds = [...seen].filter((id) => !(id in existingDefs))
    59→          if (missingIds.length > 0) {
    60→            editor.update(() => {
    61→              const freshSections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    62→              if (freshSections.length > 0) {
    63→                for (const id of missingIds) {
    64→                  freshSections[0].setDefinition(id, '')
    65→                }
    66→              }
    67→            })
    68→          }
    69→        }
    70→
    71→        if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    72→          setDefinitions(sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions())
    73→        } else {
    74→          setDefinitions({})
    75→        }
    76→      })
    77→    })
    78→  }, [editor])
    79→
    80→  return (
    81→    <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
    82→      definitions={definitions}
    83→      displayNumberMap={displayNumberMap}
    84→    >
    85→      {children}
    86→    </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
    87→  )
    88→}
    89→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/SpoilerNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalNode,
     4→  NodeKey,
     5→  SerializedElementNode,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import { ElementNode } from 'lexical'
     8→
     9→export class SpoilerNode extends ElementNode {
    10→  static getType(): string {
    11→    return 'spoiler'
    12→  }
    13→
    14→  static clone(node: SpoilerNode): SpoilerNode {
    15→    return new SpoilerNode(node.__key)
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
    19→    super(key)
    20→  }
    21→
    22→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    23→    const span = document.createElement('span')
    24→    span.className = 'rich-spoiler'
    25→    span.setAttribute('role', 'button')
    26→    span.setAttribute('tabindex', '0')
    27→    span.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Spoiler (click to reveal)')
    28→
    29→    const toggle = () => {
    30→      if (span.isContentEditable) return
    31→      const revealed = span.classList.toggle('rich-spoiler-revealed')
    32→      span.setAttribute(
    33→        'aria-label',
    34→        revealed ? 'Spoiler (revealed)' : 'Spoiler (click to reveal)',
    35→      )
    36→    }
    37→
    38→    span.addEventListener('click', toggle)
    39→    span.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    40→      if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
    41→        e.preventDefault()
    42→        toggle()
    43→      }
    44→    })
    45→
    46→    return span
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    50→    return false
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  static importJSON(_serializedNode: SerializedElementNode): SpoilerNode {
    54→    return $createSpoilerNode()
    55→  }
    56→
    57→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode {
    58→    return {
    59→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    60→      type: 'spoiler',
    61→      version: 1,
    62→    }
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  canInsertTextBefore(): boolean {
    66→    return true
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  canInsertTextAfter(): boolean {
    70→    return true
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  isInline(): boolean {
    74→    return true
    75→  }
    76→}
    77→
    78→export function $createSpoilerNode(): SpoilerNode {
    79→  return new SpoilerNode()
    80→}
    81→
    82→export function $isSpoilerNode(
    83→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    84→): node is SpoilerNode {
    85→  return node instanceof SpoilerNode
    86→}
    87→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {

     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import { Video } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    12→import { createElement } from 'react'
    13→
    14→import { VideoRenderer } from '../components/renderers/VideoRenderer'
    15→import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'
    16→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    17→
    18→export type SerializedVideoNode = Spread<
    19→  {
    20→    src: string
    21→    poster?: string
    22→    width?: number
    23→    height?: number
    24→  },
    25→  SerializedLexicalNode
    26→>
    27→
    28→export interface VideoNodePayload {
    29→  src: string
    30→  poster?: string
    31→  width?: number
    32→  height?: number
    33→}
    34→
    35→export class VideoNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    36→  __src: string
    37→  __poster?: string
    38→  __width?: number
    39→  __height?: number
    40→
    41→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    42→    {
    43→      title: 'Video',
    44→      icon: createElement(Video, { size: 20 }),
    45→      description: 'Embed a video',
    46→      keywords: ['video', 'media', 'mp4'],
    47→      section: 'MEDIA',
    48→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    49→        editor.update(() => {
    50→          $insertNodes([$createVideoNode({ src: '' })])
    51→        })
    52→      },
    53→    },
    54→  ]
    55→
    56→  static getType(): string {
    57→    return 'video'
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  static clone(node: VideoNode): VideoNode {
    61→    return new VideoNode(
    62→      {
    63→        src: node.__src,
    64→        poster: node.__poster,
    65→        width: node.__width,
    66→        height: node.__height,
    67→      },
    68→      node.__key,
    69→    )
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  constructor(payload: VideoNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    73→    super(key)
    74→    this.__src = payload.src
    75→    this.__poster = payload.poster
    76→    this.__width = payload.width
    77→    this.__height = payload.height
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    81→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    82→    div.className = 'rich-video-wrapper'
    83→    return div
    84→  }
    85→
    86→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    87→    return false
    88→  }
    89→
    90→  isInline(): boolean {
    91→    return false
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedVideoNode): VideoNode {
    95→    return $createVideoNode({
    96→      src: serializedNode.src,
    97→      poster: serializedNode.poster,
    98→      width: serializedNode.width,
    99→      height: serializedNode.height,
   100→    })
   101→  }
   102→
   103→  exportJSON(): SerializedVideoNode {
   104→    return {
   105→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   106→      type: 'video',
   107→      src: this.__src,
   108→      poster: this.__poster,
   109→      width: this.__width,
   110→      height: this.__height,
   111→      version: 1,
   112→    }
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  getSrc(): string {
   116→    return this.getLatest().__src
   117→  }
   118→
   119→  setSrc(src: string): void {
   120→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   121→    writable.__src = src
   122→  }
   123→
   124→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   125→    return createRendererDecoration('Video', VideoRenderer, {
   126→      src: this.__src,
   127→      poster: this.__poster,
   128→      width: this.__width,
   129→      height: this.__height,
   130→    })
   131→  }
   132→}
   133→
   134→export function $createVideoNode(payload: VideoNodePayload): VideoNode {
   135→  return new VideoNode(payload)
   136→}
   137→
   138→export function $isVideoNode(
   139→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   140→): node is VideoNode {
   141→  return node instanceof VideoNode
   142→}
   143→
```

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,

     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     7→  Spread,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import { Workflow } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    12→import { createElement } from 'react'
    13→
    14→import { MermaidRenderer } from '../components/renderers/MermaidRenderer'
    15→import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'
    16→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    17→
    18→export type SerializedMermaidNode = Spread<
    19→  {
    20→    diagram: string
    21→  },
    22→  SerializedLexicalNode
    23→>
    24→
    25→export class MermaidNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    26→  __diagram: string
    27→
    28→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    29→    {
    30→      title: 'Mermaid Diagram',
    31→      icon: createElement(Workflow, { size: 20 }),
    32→      description: 'Flowchart, sequence diagram',
    33→      keywords: ['mermaid', 'diagram', 'chart', 'flowchart'],
    34→      section: 'MEDIA',
    35→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    36→        editor.update(() => {
    37→          $insertNodes([
    38→            $createMermaidNode('graph TD\n    A[Start] --> B[End]'),
    39→          ])
    40→        })
    41→      },
    42→    },
    43→  ]
    44→
    45→  static getType(): string {
    46→    return 'mermaid'
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  static clone(node: MermaidNode): MermaidNode {
    50→    return new MermaidNode(node.__diagram, node.__key)
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  constructor(diagram: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    54→    super(key)
    55→    this.__diagram = diagram
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    59→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    60→    div.className = 'rich-mermaid-wrapper'
    61→    return div
    62→  }
    63→
    64→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    65→    return false
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  isInline(): boolean {
    69→    return false
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedMermaidNode): MermaidNode {
    73→    return $createMermaidNode(serializedNode.diagram)
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  exportJSON(): SerializedMermaidNode {
    77→    return {
    78→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    79→      type: 'mermaid',
    80→      diagram: this.__diagram,
    81→      version: 1,
    82→    }
    83→  }
    84→
    85→  getDiagram(): string {
    86→    return this.__diagram
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  setDiagram(diagram: string): void {
    90→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    91→    writable.__diagram = diagram
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    95→    const nodeKey = this.__key
    96→    return createRendererDecoration('Mermaid', MermaidRenderer, {
    97→      content: this.__diagram,
    98→      onContentChange: (newDiagram: string) => {
    99→        editor.update(() => {
   100→          const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as MermaidNode | null
   101→          if (node) {
   102→            node.setDiagram(newDiagram)
   103→          }
   104→        })
   105→      },
   106→    })
   107→  }
   108→}
   109→
   110→export function $createMermaidNode(diagram: string): MermaidNode {
   111→  return new MermaidNode(diagram)
   112→}
   113→
   114→export function $isMermaidNode(
   115→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   116→): node is MermaidNode {
   117→  return node instanceof MermaidNode
   118→}
   119→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/RendererWrapper.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { ComponentType, ReactElement } from 'react'
     2→import { createElement } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useRendererConfig } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6→
     7→export type RendererKey = keyof RendererConfig
     8→
     9→type RendererPropsByKey = {
    10→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]> extends ComponentType<
    11→    infer P extends object
    12→  >
    13→    ? P
    14→    : never
    15→}
    16→
    17→type RendererComponentByKey = {
    18→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<
    19→    RendererConfig[K]
    20→  > extends ComponentType<any>
    21→    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    22→    : never
    23→}
    24→
    25→export type RendererWrapperProps = {
    26→  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    27→    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    28→    rendererKey: K
    29→    /** Default renderer component */
    30→    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    31→    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    32→    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
    33→  }
    34→}[RendererKey]
    35→
    36→/**
    37→ * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
    38→ * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
    39→ */
    40→export function RendererWrapper({
    41→  rendererKey,
    42→  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
    43→  props,
    44→}: RendererWrapperProps) {
    45→  const config = useRendererConfig()
    46→  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer
    47→
    48→  return <Renderer {...props} />
    49→}
    50→
    51→/**
    52→ * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
    53→ * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
    54→ */
    55→export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
    56→  rendererKey: K,
    57→  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
    58→  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
    59→): ReactElement {
    60→  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    61→    rendererKey,
    62→    defaultRenderer,
    63→    props,
    64→  } as RendererWrapperProps)
    65→}
    66→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import {
     2→  TooltipContent,
     3→  TooltipRoot,
     4→  TooltipTrigger,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     6→import type { HTMLAttributes, MouseEvent } from 'react'
     7→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import {
    10→  useFootnoteContent,
    11→  useFootnoteDisplayNumber,
    12→} from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
    13→
    14→export interface FootnoteRendererProps {
    15→  identifier: string
    16→}
    17→
    18→export function FootnoteRenderer({ identifier }: FootnoteRendererProps) {
    19→  const content = useFootnoteContent(identifier)
    20→  const displayNumber = useFootnoteDisplayNumber(identifier)
    21→
    22→  const referenceId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    23→  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    24→
    25→  const handleClick = useCallback(
    26→    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    27→      const target =
    28→        document.getElementById(targetId) ||
    29→        document.getElementById(`fn-${identifier}`)
    30→      if (!target) return
    31→
    32→      e.preventDefault()
    33→      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    34→      target.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    35→
    36→      window.setTimeout(() => {
    37→        target.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    38→      }, 1200)
    39→    },
    40→    [identifier, targetId],
    41→  )
    42→
    43→  const label = displayNumber ?? identifier
    44→
    45→  return (
    46→    <span className="rich-footnote-ref-wrapper">
    47→      <TooltipRoot>
    48→        <TooltipTrigger
    49→          render={(props: HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>) => (
    50→            <a
    51→              {...props}
    52→              className="rich-footnote-ref"
    53→              href={`#${targetId}`}
    54→              id={referenceId}
    55→              role="doc-noteref"
    56→              aria-label={
    57→                content ? `Footnote ${label}: ${content}` : `Footnote ${label}`
    58→              }
    59→              onClick={handleClick}
    60→              data-footnote-ref={identifier}
    61→            >
    62→              {label}
    63→            </a>
    64→          )}
    65→        />
    66→        {content ? <TooltipContent>{content}</TooltipContent> : null}
    67→      </TooltipRoot>
    68→    </span>
    69→  )
    70→}
    71→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     2→  platform: string
     3→  handle: string
     4→  displayName?: string
     5→}
     6→
     7→export function MentionRenderer({ handle, displayName }: MentionRendererProps) {
     8→  const normalizedHandle = handle.replace(/^@+/, '')
     9→  const label = displayName || normalizedHandle
    10→
    11→  return (
    12→    <span className="rich-mention rich-mention-plain">
    13→      <span className="rich-mention-handle">@{label}</span>
    14→    </span>
    15→  )
    16→}
    17→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/CodeBlockRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useColorScheme } from '../../context/ColorSchemeContext'
     4→import { useVariant } from '../../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { CodeToHtmlFn } from '../../utils/shiki'
     6→import { loadCodeToHtml } from '../../utils/shiki'
     7→
     8→export interface CodeBlockRendererProps {
     9→  code: string
    10→  language: string
    11→  showLineNumbers?: boolean
    12→  editable?: boolean
    13→  onCodeChange?: (code: string) => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export function CodeBlockRenderer({
    17→  code,
    18→  language,
    19→  showLineNumbers: showLineNumbersProp,
    20→}: CodeBlockRendererProps) {
    21→  const variant = useVariant()
    22→  const showLineNumbers = showLineNumbersProp ?? variant !== 'comment'
    23→  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    24→  const shikiTheme = colorScheme === 'dark' ? 'github-dark' : 'github-light'
    25→  const [highlightedHtml, setHighlightedHtml] = useState<string | null>(null)
    26→  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false)
    27→  const copyTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    28→
    29→  useEffect(() => {
    30→    let cancelled = false
    31→    setHighlightedHtml(null)
    32→
    33→    loadCodeToHtml()
    34→      .then((toHtml: CodeToHtmlFn) =>
    35→        toHtml(code, {
    36→          lang: language,
    37→          theme: shikiTheme,
    38→        }),
    39→      )
    40→      .then((html: string) => {
    41→        if (!cancelled) {
    42→          setHighlightedHtml(html)
    43→        }
    44→      })
    45→      .catch(() => {
    46→        if (!cancelled) {
    47→          setHighlightedHtml(null)
    48→        }
    49→      })
    50→
    51→    return () => {
    52→      cancelled = true
    53→    }
    54→  }, [code, language, shikiTheme])
    55→
    56→  useEffect(() => {
    57→    return () => clearTimeout(copyTimerRef.current)
    58→  }, [])
    59→
    60→  const handleCopy = useCallback(() => {
    61→    navigator.clipboard
    62→      .writeText(code)
    63→      .then(() => {
    64→        setCopied(true)
    65→        clearTimeout(copyTimerRef.current)
    66→        copyTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000)
    67→      })
    68→      .catch(() => {})
    69→  }, [code])
    70→
    71→  const header = language ? (
    72→    <div className="rich-code-block-header">
    73→      <span className="rich-code-block-lang">{language}</span>
    74→      <button
    75→        type="button"
    76→        className="rich-code-block-copy"
    77→        onClick={handleCopy}
    78→        aria-label={copied ? 'Copied to clipboard' : 'Copy code'}
    79→      >
    80→        {copied ? 'Copied' : 'Copy'}
    81→      </button>
    82→    </div>
    83→  ) : null
    84→
    85→  const wrapperClass = showLineNumbers
    86→    ? 'rich-code-block rich-code-block-numbered'
    87→    : 'rich-code-block'
    88→
    89→  if (highlightedHtml) {
    90→    return (
    91→      <div className={wrapperClass}>
    92→        {header}
    93→        <div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: highlightedHtml }} />
    94→      </div>
    95→    )
    96→  }
    97→
    98→  const lines = code.split('\n')
    99→  return (
   100→    <div className={wrapperClass}>
   101→      {header}
   102→      <pre>
   103→        <code>
   104→          {lines.map((line, i) => (
   105→            <span key={i} className="line">
   106→              {line}
   107→              {i < lines.length - 1 ? '\n' : ''}
   108→            </span>
   109→          ))}
   110→        </code>
   111→      </pre>
   112→    </div>
   113→  )
   114→}
   115→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import {
    12→  Info,
    13→  Lightbulb,
    14→  TriangleAlert as TriangleAlertIcon,
    15→} from 'lucide-react'
    16→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    17→import { createElement } from 'react'
    18→
    19→import { AlertReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/AlertReadOnlyDecorator'
    20→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    21→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    22→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    23→
    24→export type AlertType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'
    25→
    26→export const ALERT_TYPES: AlertType[] = [
    27→  'note',
    28→  'tip',
    29→  'important',
    30→  'warning',
    31→  'caution',
    32→]
    33→
    34→export const ALERT_LABELS: Record<AlertType, string> = {
    35→  note: 'Note',
    36→  tip: 'Tip',
    37→  important: 'Important',
    38→  warning: 'Warning',
    39→  caution: 'Caution',
    40→}
    41→
    42→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    43→  return createEditor({
    44→    namespace: 'AlertContent',
    45→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    46→    theme: editorTheme,
    47→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    48→      console.error('[AlertContent]', error)
    49→    },
    50→  })
    51→}
    52→
    53→export type SerializedAlertQuoteNode = Spread<
    54→  {
    55→    alertType: AlertType
    56→    content: SerializedEditorState
    57→  },
    58→  SerializedLexicalNode
    59→>
    60→
    61→export class AlertQuoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    62→  __alertType: AlertType
    63→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    64→
    65→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    66→    {
    67→      title: 'Callout',
    68→      icon: createElement(Info, { size: 20 }),
    69→      description: 'Info callout block',
    70→      keywords: ['alert', 'note', 'info', 'callout'],
    71→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    72→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    73→        editor.update(() => {
    74→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('note')])
    75→        })
    76→      },
    77→    },
    78→    {
    79→      title: 'Tip',
    80→      icon: createElement(Lightbulb, { size: 20 }),
    81→      description: 'Highlight a useful tip',
    82→      keywords: ['alert', 'tip', 'hint'],
    83→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    84→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    85→        editor.update(() => {
    86→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('tip')])
    87→        })
    88→      },
    89→    },
    90→    {
    91→      title: 'Warning',
    92→      icon: createElement(TriangleAlertIcon, { size: 20 }),
    93→      description: 'Warn about something',
    94→      keywords: ['alert', 'warning', 'caution'],
    95→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    96→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    97→        editor.update(() => {
    98→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('warning')])
    99→        })
   100→      },
   101→    },
   102→  ]
   103→
   104→  static getType(): string {
   105→    return 'alert-quote'
   106→  }
   107→
   108→  static clone(node: AlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   109→    return new AlertQuoteNode(
   110→      node.__alertType,
   111→      node.__contentEditor,
   112→      node.__key,
   113→    )
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  constructor(
   117→    alertType: AlertType,
   118→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   119→    key?: NodeKey,
   120→  ) {
   121→    super(key)
   122→    this.__alertType = alertType
   123→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   127→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   128→    div.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   129→    return div
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  updateDOM(prevNode: AlertQuoteNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   133→    if (prevNode.__alertType !== this.__alertType) {
   134→      dom.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   135→    }
   136→    return false
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  isInline(): boolean {
   140→    return false
   141→  }
   142→
   143→  getAlertType(): AlertType {
   144→    return this.__alertType
   145→  }
   146→
   147→  setAlertType(alertType: AlertType): void {
   148→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   149→    writable.__alertType = alertType
   150→  }
   151→
   152→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   153→    return this.__contentEditor
   154→  }
   155→
   156→  getTextContent(): string {
   157→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   158→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   159→    })
   160→  }
   161→
   162→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedAlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   163→    const node = new AlertQuoteNode(serializedNode.alertType)
   164→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   165→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   166→        serializedNode.content,
   167→      )
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→    return node
   171→  }
   172→
   173→  exportJSON(): SerializedAlertQuoteNode {
   174→    return {
   175→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   176→      type: 'alert-quote',
   177→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   178→      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   179→      version: 1,
   180→    }
   181→  }
   182→
   183→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   184→    return createElement(AlertReadOnlyDecorator, {
   185→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   186→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   187→    })
   188→  }
   189→}
   190→
   191→export function $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType: AlertType): AlertQuoteNode {
   192→  return new AlertQuoteNode(alertType)
   193→}
   194→
   195→export function $isAlertQuoteNode(
   196→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   197→): node is AlertQuoteNode {
   198→  return node instanceof AlertQuoteNode
   199→}
   200→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { Flag } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { BannerReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/BannerReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type BannerType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'
    21→
    22→const LEGACY_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
    23→  info: 'note',
    24→  success: 'tip',
    25→  error: 'caution',
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function normalizeBannerType(type: string): BannerType {
    29→  if (type in LEGACY_TYPE_MAP) return LEGACY_TYPE_MAP[type]
    30→  return (type as BannerType) || 'note'
    31→}
    32→
    33→export const BANNER_TYPES: BannerType[] = [
    34→  'note',
    35→  'tip',
    36→  'important',
    37→  'warning',
    38→  'caution',
    39→]
    40→
    41→export const BANNER_LABELS: Record<BannerType, string> = {
    42→  note: 'Note',
    43→  tip: 'Tip',
    44→  important: 'Important',
    45→  warning: 'Warning',
    46→  caution: 'Caution',
    47→}
    48→
    49→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    50→  return createEditor({
    51→    namespace: 'BannerContent',
    52→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    53→    theme: editorTheme,
    54→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    55→      console.error('[BannerContent]', error)
    56→    },
    57→  })
    58→}
    59→
    60→export type SerializedBannerNode = Spread<
    61→  {
    62→    bannerType: BannerType
    63→    content: SerializedEditorState
    64→  },
    65→  SerializedLexicalNode
    66→>
    67→
    68→interface LegacySerializedBannerNode extends SerializedBannerNode {
    69→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    70→}
    71→
    72→export class BannerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    73→  __bannerType: BannerType
    74→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    75→
    76→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    77→    {
    78→      title: 'Banner',
    79→      icon: createElement(Flag, { size: 20 }),
    80→      description: 'Highlighted banner block',
    81→      keywords: ['banner', 'notice', 'announcement'],
    82→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    83→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    84→        editor.update(() => {
    85→          $insertNodes([$createBannerNode('note')])
    86→        })
    87→      },
    88→    },
    89→  ]
    90→
    91→  static getType(): string {
    92→    return 'banner'
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  static clone(node: BannerNode): BannerNode {
    96→    return new BannerNode(node.__bannerType, node.__contentEditor, node.__key)
    97→  }
    98→
    99→  constructor(
   100→    bannerType: BannerType,
   101→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   102→    key?: NodeKey,
   103→  ) {
   104→    super(key)
   105→    this.__bannerType = bannerType
   106→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   110→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   111→    div.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   112→    return div
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  updateDOM(prevNode: BannerNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   116→    if (prevNode.__bannerType !== this.__bannerType) {
   117→      dom.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   118→    }
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  isInline(): boolean {
   123→    return false
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  getBannerType(): BannerType {
   127→    return this.__bannerType
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  setBannerType(bannerType: BannerType): void {
   131→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   132→    writable.__bannerType = bannerType
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   136→    return this.__contentEditor
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  getTextContent(): string {
   140→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   141→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   142→    })
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedBannerNode): BannerNode {
   146→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedBannerNode
   147→    const bannerType = normalizeBannerType(serializedNode.bannerType)
   148→    const node = new BannerNode(bannerType)
   149→
   150→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   151→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   152→        serializedNode.content,
   153→      )
   154→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   155→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   156→      // Legacy ElementNode format: wrap children into editor state
   157→      const content = {
   158→        root: {
   159→          children: legacy.children,
   160→          direction: null,
   161→          format: '',
   162→          indent: 0,
   163→          type: 'root',
   164→          version: 1,
   165→        },
   166→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   167→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(content)
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→
   171→    return node
   172→  }
   173→
   174→  exportJSON(): SerializedBannerNode {
   175→    return {
   176→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   177→      type: 'banner',
   178→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   179→      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   180→      version: 1,
   181→    }
   182→  }
   183→
   184→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   185→    return createElement(BannerReadOnlyDecorator, {
   186→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   187→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   188→    })
   189→  }
   190→}
   191→
   192→export function $createBannerNode(bannerType: BannerType): BannerNode {
   193→  return new BannerNode(bannerType)
   194→}
   195→
   196→export function $isBannerNode(
   197→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   198→): node is BannerNode {
   199→  return node instanceof BannerNode
   200→}
   201→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     7→  Spread,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import { Link } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    12→import { createElement } from 'react'
    13→
    14→import { LinkCardRenderer } from '../components/renderers/LinkCardRenderer'
    15→import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'
    16→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    17→
    18→export type SerializedLinkCardNode = Spread<
    19→  {
    20→    url: string
    21→    source?: string
    22→    id?: string
    23→    title?: string
    24→    description?: string
    25→    favicon?: string
    26→    image?: string
    27→  },
    28→  SerializedLexicalNode
    29→>
    30→
    31→export interface LinkCardNodePayload {
    32→  url: string
    33→  source?: string
    34→  id?: string
    35→  title?: string
    36→  description?: string
    37→  favicon?: string
    38→  image?: string
    39→}
    40→
    41→export class LinkCardNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    42→  __url: string
    43→  __source?: string
    44→  __id?: string
    45→  __title?: string
    46→  __description?: string
    47→  __favicon?: string
    48→  __image?: string
    49→
    50→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    51→    {
    52→      title: 'Link Card',
    53→      icon: createElement(Link, { size: 20 }),
    54→      description: 'Link preview card',
    55→      keywords: ['link', 'card', 'bookmark', 'embed'],
    56→      section: 'MEDIA',
    57→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    58→        editor.update(() => {
    59→          $insertNodes([$createLinkCardNode({ url: '' })])
    60→        })
    61→      },
    62→    },
    63→  ]
    64→
    65→  static getType(): string {
    66→    return 'link-card'
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  static clone(node: LinkCardNode): LinkCardNode {
    70→    return new LinkCardNode(
    71→      {
    72→        url: node.__url,
    73→        source: node.__source,
    74→        id: node.__id,
    75→        title: node.__title,
    76→        description: node.__description,
    77→        favicon: node.__favicon,
    78→        image: node.__image,
    79→      },
    80→      node.__key,
    81→    )
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  constructor(payload: LinkCardNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    85→    super(key)
    86→    this.__url = payload.url
    87→    this.__source = payload.source
    88→    this.__id = payload.id
    89→    this.__title = payload.title
    90→    this.__description = payload.description
    91→    this.__favicon = payload.favicon
    92→    this.__image = payload.image
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    96→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    97→    div.className = 'rich-link-card-wrapper'
    98→    return div
    99→  }
   100→
   101→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   102→    return false
   103→  }
   104→
   105→  isInline(): boolean {
   106→    return false
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedLinkCardNode): LinkCardNode {
   110→    return $createLinkCardNode({
   111→      url: serializedNode.url,
   112→      source: serializedNode.source,
   113→      id: serializedNode.id,
   114→      title: serializedNode.title,
   115→      description: serializedNode.description,
   116→      favicon: serializedNode.favicon,
   117→      image: serializedNode.image,
   118→    })
   119→  }
   120→
   121→  exportJSON(): SerializedLinkCardNode {
   122→    return {
   123→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   124→      type: 'link-card',
   125→      url: this.__url,
   126→      source: this.__source,
   127→      id: this.__id,
   128→      title: this.__title,
   129→      description: this.__description,
   130→      favicon: this.__favicon,
   131→      image: this.__image,
   132→      version: 1,
   133→    }
   134→  }
   135→
   136→  getUrl(): string {
   137→    return this.getLatest().__url
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  setUrl(url: string): void {
   141→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   142→    writable.__url = url
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  getSource(): string | undefined {
   146→    return this.getLatest().__source
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  setSource(source: string | undefined): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    writable.__source = source
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  getId(): string | undefined {
   155→    return this.getLatest().__id
   156→  }
   157→
   158→  setId(id: string | undefined): void {
   159→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   160→    writable.__id = id
   161→  }
   162→
   163→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   164→    return createRendererDecoration('LinkCard', LinkCardRenderer, {
   165→      url: this.__url,
   166→      source: this.__source,
   167→      id: this.__id,
   168→      title: this.__title,
   169→      description: this.__description,
   170→      favicon: this.__favicon,
   171→      image: this.__image,
   172→    })
   173→  }
   174→}
   175→
   176→export function $createLinkCardNode(
   177→  payload: LinkCardNodePayload,
   178→): LinkCardNode {
   179→  return new LinkCardNode(payload)
   180→}
   181→
   182→export function $isLinkCardNode(
   183→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   184→): node is LinkCardNode {
   185→  return node instanceof LinkCardNode
   186→}
   187→
```

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { RichRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     3→import {
     4→  codeSnippetNodes,
     5→  embedNodes,
     6→  enhancedRendererConfig,
     7→  galleryNodes,
     8→  TldrawNode,
     9→} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
    10→import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { useMemo } from 'react'
    12→
    13→const defaultExtraNodes = [
    14→  TldrawNode,
    15→  ...embedNodes,
    16→  ...galleryNodes,
    17→  ...codeSnippetNodes,
    18→]
    19→
    20→export interface ShiroRendererProps extends Omit<
    21→  RichRendererProps,
    22→  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
    23→> {
    24→  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function ShiroRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroRendererProps) {
    28→  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    29→    () =>
    30→      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    31→    [extraNodes],
    32→  )
    33→
    34→  return (
    35→    <RichRenderer
    36→      {...props}
    37→      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    38→      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    39→    />
    40→  )
    41→}
    42→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

```text
     1→import root from 'react-shadow'
     2→
     3→import type { ShiroRendererProps } from './ShiroRenderer'
     4→import { ShiroRenderer } from './ShiroRenderer'
     5→// @ts-expect-error -- vite ?inline returns processed CSS as string
     6→import cssText from './style.css?inline'
     7→
     8→const resolvedCss = (cssText as string).replaceAll(':root {', ':root, :host {')
     9→
    10→export type IsolateRendererProps = ShiroRendererProps & {
    11→  extraCss?: string
    12→}
    13→
    14→export function IsolateRenderer({
    15→  theme = 'light',
    16→  className,
    17→  extraCss,
    18→  ...props
    19→}: IsolateRendererProps) {
    20→  return (
    21→    <root.div className={className}>
    22→      <div id="shadow-html" data-theme={theme}>
    23→        <style
    24→          dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
    25→            __html: extraCss ? resolvedCss + extraCss : resolvedCss,
    26→          }}
    27→        />
    28→        <ShiroRenderer {...props} theme={theme} />
    29→      </div>
    30→    </root.div>
    31→  )
    32→}
    33→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/api.tsx`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  ModelWithLiked,
     3→  ModelWithTranslation,
     4→  PostModel,
     5→} from '@mx-space/api-client'
     6→
     7→import { attachServerFetch } from '~/lib/attach-fetch'
     8→import { getQueryClient } from '~/lib/query-client.server'
     9→import { requestErrorHandler } from '~/lib/request.server'
    10→import { queries } from '~/queries/definition'
    11→
    12→export interface PageParams extends LocaleParams {
    13→  category: string
    14→  slug: string
    15→  lang?: string
    16→}
    17→
    18→export type PostWithTranslation = ModelWithLiked<
    19→  ModelWithTranslation<PostModel>
    20→>
    21→
    22→export interface PostDataResult {
    23→  post: PostWithTranslation
    24→}
    25→
    26→const getPostData = async (
    27→  params: Pick<PageParams, 'category' | 'slug'>,
    28→  lang?: string,
    29→) => {
    30→  const { category, slug } = params
    31→  await attachServerFetch()
    32→  const data = await getQueryClient()
    33→    .fetchQuery(queries.post.bySlug(category, slug, lang))
    34→    .catch(requestErrorHandler)
    35→  return data as PostWithTranslation
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const getData = async (params: PageParams): Promise<PostDataResult> => {
    39→  // 如果指定了 lang=original，不传 lang 参数
    40→  if (params.lang === 'original') {
    41→    const post = await getPostData(params, 'original')
    42→    return { post }
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  const preferredLang = params.lang || params.locale
    46→
    47→  const post = await getPostData(params, preferredLang)
    48→
    49→  return { post }
    50→}
    51→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client'

     3→import { MainLexicalContent } from '~/components/ui/rich-content/MainLexicalContent'
     4→import { useCurrentNoteDataSelector } from '~/providers/note/CurrentNoteDataProvider'
     5→
     6→export const NoteLexicalRenderer = () => {
     7→  const content = useCurrentNoteDataSelector((data) => data?.data.content)
     8→  if (!content) return null
     9→  return (
    10→    <MainLexicalContent content={content} variant="note" className="mt-10" />
    11→  )
    12→}
    13→
```
