 `./packages/rich-headless/src/transformers.ts`

```text
     1→/**
     2→ * Headless Markdown transformers — export-only (Lexical → Markdown).
     3→ * Import stubs are no-ops; used only for $convertToMarkdownString.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import {
     7→  $convertToMarkdownString,
     8→  CHECK_LIST,
     9→  type ElementTransformer,
    10→  type TextFormatTransformer,
    11→  type TextMatchTransformer,
    12→  TRANSFORMERS,
    13→} from '@lexical/markdown'
    14→import { $isTableCellNode, $isTableNode, $isTableRowNode } from '@lexical/table'
    15→
    16→// ── Helpers ──
    17→
    18→const NEVER = /a^/
    19→const NOOP = () => {}
    20→
    21→function qA(v: string): string {
    22→  return v.replaceAll('"', '\\"')
    23→}
    24→
    25→function escCell(v: string): string {
    26→  return v.replaceAll('|', '\\|').replaceAll('\n', '<br/>')
    27→}
    28→
    29→function fence(content: string): string {
    30→  const m = content.match(/`+/g)
    31→  const max = m?.reduce((a, r) => Math.max(a, r.length), 0) ?? 0
    32→  return '`'.repeat(Math.max(3, max + 1))
    33→}
    34→
    35→function walkText(node: Record<string, unknown>): string {
    36→  const children = node.children as Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined
    37→  if (!children) return (node.text as string) ?? ''
    38→  return children.map(walkText).join('\n')
    39→}
    40→
    41→function stateText(state: unknown): string {
    42→  if (!state || typeof state !== 'object') return ''
    43→  const root = (state as Record<string, unknown>).root as
    44→    | Record<string, unknown>
    45→    | undefined
    46→  return root ? walkText(root) : ''
    47→}
    48→
    49→// ── TextMatch (inline) ──
    50→
    51→export const SPOILER_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
    52→  dependencies: [],
    53→  export: (node) =>
    54→    node.getType() === 'spoiler' ? `||${node.getTextContent()}||` : null,
    55→  importRegExp: /\|\|(.+?)\|\|/,
    56→  regExp: /\|\|(.+?)\|\|$/,
    57→  replace: NOOP as any,
    58→  trigger: '|',
    59→  type: 'text-match',
    60→}
    61→
    62→export const MENTION_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
    63→  dependencies: [],
    64→  export: (node) => {
    65→    if (node.getType() !== 'mention') return null
    66→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
    67→    const base = `{${j.platform}@${j.handle}}`
    68→    return j.displayName ? `[${j.displayName}]${base}` : base
    69→  },
    70→  importRegExp: /(?:\[([^\]]+)\])?\{(\w+)@(\w[\w.-]*)\}/,
    71→  regExp: /(?:\[([^\]]+)\])?\{(\w+)@(\w[\w.-]*)\}$/,
    72→  replace: NOOP as any,
    73→  trigger: '}',
    74→  type: 'text-match',
    75→}
    76→
    77→export const FOOTNOTE_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
    78→  dependencies: [],
    79→  export: (node) =>
    80→    node.getType() === 'footnote'
    81→      ? `[^${(node as any).__identifier ?? ''}]`
    82→      : null,
    83→  importRegExp: /\[\^(\w+)\]/,
    84→  regExp: /\[\^(\w+)\]$/,
    85→  replace: NOOP as any,
    86→  trigger: ']',
    87→  type: 'text-match',
    88→}
    89→
    90→export const KATEX_INLINE_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
    91→  dependencies: [],
    92→  export: (node) =>
    93→    node.getType() === 'katex-inline'
    94→      ? `$${(node as any).__equation ?? ''}$`
    95→      : null,
    96→  importRegExp: /\$([^$\n]+)\$/,
    97→  regExp: /\$([^$\n]+)\$$/,
    98→  replace: NOOP as any,
    99→  trigger: '$',
   100→  type: 'text-match',
   101→}
   102→
   103→// ── TextFormat ──
   104→
   105→export const INSERT_TRANSFORMER: TextFormatTransformer = {
   106→  format: ['underline'],
   107→  tag: '++',
   108→  type: 'text-format',
   109→}
   110→
   111→export const SUPERSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER: TextFormatTransformer = {
   112→  format: ['superscript'],
   113→  tag: '^',
   114→  type: 'text-format',
   115→}
   116→
   117→export const SUBSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER: TextFormatTransformer = {
   118→  format: ['subscript'],
   119→  tag: '~',
   120→  type: 'text-format',
   121→}
   122→
   123→// ── Element (block) ──
   124→
   125→export const FOOTNOTE_SECTION_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   126→  dependencies: [],
   127→  export: (node) => {
   128→    if (node.getType() !== 'footnote-section') return null
   129→    const defs = (node as any).__definitions ?? {}
   130→    return Object.entries(defs)
   131→      .map(([id, content]) => `[^${id}]: ${content}`)
   132→      .join('\n')
   133→  },
   134→  regExp: NEVER,
   135→  replace: NOOP,
   136→  type: 'element',
   137→}
   138→
   139→export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   140→  dependencies: [],
   141→  export: (node) => {
   142→    const t = node.getType()
   143→    if (t === 'banner') {
   144→      const type = (node as any).__bannerType ?? 'note'
   145→      return `::: ${type}\n${node.getTextContent()}\n:::`
   146→    }
   147→    if (t === 'details') {
   148→      const summary = (node as any).__summary ?? ''
   149→      return `::: details{summary="${qA(summary)}"}\n${node.getTextContent()}\n:::`
   150→    }
   151→    return null
   152→  },
   153→  regExp: NEVER,
   154→  replace: NOOP,
   155→  type: 'element',
   156→}
   157→
   158→const ALERT_KEY: Record<string, string> = {
   159→  note: 'NOTE',
   160→  tip: 'TIP',
   161→  important: 'IMPORTANT',
   162→  warning: 'WARNING',
   163→  caution: 'CAUTION',
   164→}
   165→
   166→export const GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   167→  dependencies: [],
   168→  export: (node) => {
   169→    if (node.getType() !== 'alert-quote') return null
   170→    const key = ALERT_KEY[(node as any).__alertType ?? 'note'] ?? 'NOTE'
   171→    const lines = node.getTextContent().split('\n')
   172→    return [`> [!${key}]`, ...lines.map((l) => `> ${l}`)].join('\n')
   173→  },
   174→  regExp: NEVER,
   175→  replace: NOOP,
   176→  type: 'element',
   177→}
   178→
   179→export const KATEX_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: TextMatchTransformer = {
   180→  dependencies: [],
   181→  export: (node) =>
   182→    node.getType() === 'katex-block'
   183→      ? `$$${(node as any).__equation ?? ''}$$`
   184→      : null,
   185→  importRegExp: /\$\$([^$]+)\$\$/,
   186→  regExp: /\$\$([^$]+)\$\$$/,
   187→  replace: NOOP as any,
   188→  trigger: '$',
   189→  type: 'text-match',
   190→}
   191→
   192→export const IMAGE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   193→  dependencies: [],
   194→  export: (node) => {
   195→    if (node.getType() !== 'image') return null
   196→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   197→    const title = j.caption ? ` "${qA(j.caption)}"` : ''
   198→    return `![${j.altText || ''}](${j.src}${title})`
   199→  },
   200→  regExp: NEVER,
   201→  replace: NOOP,
   202→  type: 'element',
   203→}
   204→
   205→export const VIDEO_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   206→  dependencies: [],
   207→  export: (node) => {
   208→    if (node.getType() !== 'video') return null
   209→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   210→    const attrs = [`src="${qA(j.src)}"`]
   211→    if (j.poster) attrs.push(`poster="${qA(j.poster)}"`)
   212→    if (j.width) attrs.push(`width=${j.width}`)
   213→    if (j.height) attrs.push(`height=${j.height}`)
   214→    return `<video ${attrs.join(' ')} controls></video>`
   215→  },
   216→  regExp: NEVER,
   217→  replace: NOOP,
   218→  type: 'element',
   219→}
   220→
   221→export const CODE_BLOCK_NODE_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   222→  dependencies: [],
   223→  export: (node) => {
   224→    if (node.getType() !== 'code-block') return null
   225→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   226→    const f = fence(j.code || '')
   227→    return `${f}${j.language || ''}\n${j.code || ''}\n${f}`
   228→  },
   229→  regExp: NEVER,
   230→  replace: NOOP,
   231→  type: 'element',
   232→}
   233→
   234→export const LINK_CARD_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   235→  dependencies: [],
   236→  export: (node) => {
   237→    if (node.getType() !== 'link-card') return null
   238→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   239→    return j.title ? `[${j.title}](${j.url})` : `<${j.url}>`
   240→  },
   241→  regExp: NEVER,
   242→  replace: NOOP,
   243→  type: 'element',
   244→}
   245→
   246→export const MERMAID_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   247→  dependencies: [],
   248→  export: (node) => {
   249→    if (node.getType() !== 'mermaid') return null
   250→    const d = (node as any).__diagram ?? ''
   251→    const f = fence(d)
   252→    return `${f}mermaid\n${d}\n${f}`
   253→  },
   254→  regExp: NEVER,
   255→  replace: NOOP,
   256→  type: 'element',
   257→}
   258→
   259→export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   260→  dependencies: [],
   261→  export: (node) => {
   262→    if (node.getType() !== 'grid-container') return null
   263→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   264→    const cells = (j.cells ?? [])
   265→      .map((c: unknown) => `::: cell\n${stateText(c)}\n:::`)
   266→      .join('\n')
   267→    return `::: grid{cols=${j.cols ?? 2} gap="${qA(String(j.gap ?? '16px'))}"}\n${cells}\n:::`
   268→  },
   269→  regExp: NEVER,
   270→  replace: NOOP,
   271→  type: 'element',
   272→}
   273→
   274→export const HORIZONTAL_RULE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   275→  dependencies: [],
   276→  export: (node) => (node.getType() === 'horizontalrule' ? '---' : null),
   277→  regExp: NEVER,
   278→  replace: NOOP,
   279→  type: 'element',
   280→}
   281→
   282→export const TABLE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   283→  dependencies: [],
   284→  export: (node) => {
   285→    if (!$isTableNode(node)) return null
   286→    const rows = node.getChildren().filter($isTableRowNode)
   287→    if (rows.length === 0) return '|  |\n| --- |'
   288→    const data = rows.map((row) =>
   289→      row
   290→        .getChildren()
   291→        .filter($isTableCellNode)
   292→        .map((c) => escCell(c.getTextContent())),
   293→    )
   294→    const hdr = data[0]
   295→    const sep = hdr.map(() => '---')
   296→    return [
   297→      `| ${hdr.join(' | ')} |`,
   298→      `| ${sep.join(' | ')} |`,
   299→      ...data.slice(1).map((r) => `| ${r.join(' | ')} |`),
   300→    ].join('\n')
   301→  },
   302→  regExp: NEVER,
   303→  replace: NOOP,
   304→  type: 'element',
   305→}
   306→
   307→// ── Extension block transformers ──
   308→
   309→export const CODE_SNIPPET_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   310→  dependencies: [],
   311→  export: (node) => {
   312→    if (node.getType() !== 'code-snippet') return null
   313→    const j = node.exportJSON() as any
   314→    const body = (j.files ?? [])
   315→      .map((f: any) => {
   316→        const fc = fence(f.code || '')
   317→        return [
   318→          `::: file{name="${qA(f.filename || 'untitled')}" lang="${qA(f.language || '')}"}`,
   319→          `${fc}${f.language || ''}`,
   320→          f.code || '',
   321→          fc,
   322→          ':::',
   323→        ].join('\n')
   324→      })
   325→      .join('\n')
   326→    return `::: code-snippet\n${body}\n:::`
   327→  },
   328→  regExp: NEVER,
   329→  replace: NOOP,
   330→  type: 'element',
   331→}
   332→
   333→export const EMBED_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   334→  dependencies: [],
   335→  export: (node) =>
   336→    node.getType() === 'embed' ? `<${(node as any).__url || ''}>` : null,
   337→  regExp: NEVER,
   338→  replace: NOOP,
   339→  type: 'element',
   340→}
   341→
   342→export const GALLERY_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   343→  dependencies: [],
   344→  export: (node) => {
   345→    if (node.getType() !== 'gallery') return null
   346→    const imgs = (node.exportJSON() as any).images ?? []
   347→    return imgs.map((i: any) => `![${i.alt || ''}](${i.src || ''})`).join('\n')
   348→  },
   349→  regExp: NEVER,
   350→  replace: NOOP,
   351→  type: 'element',
   352→}
   353→
   354→export const TLDRAW_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
   355→  dependencies: [],
   356→  export: (node) =>
   357→    node.getType() === 'tldraw'
   358→      ? `<tldraw>\n${(node as any).__snapshot || ''}\n</tldraw>`
   359→      : null,
   360→  regExp: NEVER,
   361→  replace: NOOP,
   362→  type: 'element',
   363→}
   364→
   365→// ── Aggregate ──
   366→
   367→export const allHeadlessTransformers = [
   368→  // Inline
   369→  SPOILER_TRANSFORMER,
   370→  MENTION_TRANSFORMER,
   371→  FOOTNOTE_TRANSFORMER,
   372→  INSERT_TRANSFORMER,
   373→  SUPERSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER,
   374→  SUBSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER,
   375→  KATEX_INLINE_TRANSFORMER,
   376→  // Block (specific first)
   377→  FOOTNOTE_SECTION_TRANSFORMER,
   378→  CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER,
   379→  GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER,
   380→  CHECK_LIST,
   381→  KATEX_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   382→  IMAGE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   383→  VIDEO_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   384→  CODE_BLOCK_NODE_TRANSFORMER,
   385→  LINK_CARD_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   386→  MERMAID_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   387→  GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   388→  HORIZONTAL_RULE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   389→  TABLE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   390→  CODE_SNIPPET_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   391→  EMBED_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   392→  GALLERY_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   393→  TLDRAW_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER,
   394→  // Standard (heading, quote, list, code, bold, italic, strikethrough, link…)
   395→  ...TRANSFORMERS,
   396→]
   397→
   398→/** Call inside editor.read() to convert current state to Markdown. */
   399→export function $toMarkdown(): string {
   400→  return $convertToMarkdownString(allHeadlessTransformers)
   401→}
   402→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    12→
    13→export interface AlertRendererProps {
    14→  type: AlertType
    15→  editable?: boolean
    16→  onTypeChange?: (type: AlertType) => void
    17→}
    18→
    19→const InfoIcon = () => <Info size={16} />
    20→const LightbulbIcon = () => <Lightbulb size={16} />
    21→const MessageWarningIcon = () => <MessageSquareWarning size={16} />
    22→const TriangleAlertIcon = () => <TriangleAlert size={16} />
    23→const OctagonAlertIcon = () => <OctagonAlert size={16} />
    24→
    25→const ALERT_ICONS: Record<AlertType, FC> = {
    26→  note: InfoIcon,
    27→  tip: LightbulbIcon,
    28→  important: MessageWarningIcon,
    29→  warning: TriangleAlertIcon,
    30→  caution: OctagonAlertIcon,
    31→}
    32→
    33→export const AlertRenderer: FC<AlertRendererProps> = ({ type }) => {
    34→  const Icon = ALERT_ICONS[type]
    35→
    36→  return (
    37→    <div className={`rich-alert-header rich-alert-header-${type}`}>
    38→      <span className="rich-alert-icon">
    39→        <Icon />
    40→      </span>
    41→      <span className="rich-alert-label">{ALERT_LABELS[type]}</span>
    42→    </div>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/ImageRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { decodeThumbHash } from '../../utils/thumbhash'
     4→
     5→export interface ImageRendererProps {
     6→  src: string
     7→  altText: string
     8→  width?: number
     9→  height?: number
    10→  caption?: string
    11→  thumbhash?: string
    12→  accent?: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export function ImageRenderer({
    16→  src,
    17→  altText,
    18→  width,
    19→  height,
    20→  caption,
    21→  thumbhash,
    22→  accent,
    23→}: ImageRendererProps) {
    24→  const [loaded, setLoaded] = useState(false)
    25→  const [zoomed, setZoomed] = useState(false)
    26→
    27→  const handleLoad = useCallback(() => setLoaded(true), [])
    28→
    29→  const handleZoomOpen = useCallback(() => {
    30→    if (!loaded) return
    31→    setZoomed(true)
    32→  }, [loaded])
    33→
    34→  const handleZoomClose = useCallback(() => setZoomed(false), [])
    35→
    36→  useEffect(() => {
    37→    if (!zoomed) return
    38→    const onKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
    39→      if (e.key === 'Escape') setZoomed(false)
    40→    }
    41→    document.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    42→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    43→  }, [zoomed])
    44→
    45→  useEffect(() => {
    46→    if (!zoomed) return
    47→    const prev = document.body.style.overflow
    48→    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'
    49→    return () => {
    50→      document.body.style.overflow = prev
    51→    }
    52→  }, [zoomed])
    53→
    54→  const handleContainerKeyDown = useCallback(
    55→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    56→      if ((e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') && loaded) {
    57→        e.preventDefault()
    58→        setZoomed(true)
    59→      }
    60→    },
    61→    [loaded],
    62→  )
    63→
    64→  const placeholderUrl = useMemo(
    65→    () => (thumbhash ? decodeThumbHash(thumbhash) : undefined),
    66→    [thumbhash],
    67→  )
    68→
    69→  const aspectStyle: React.CSSProperties =
    70→    width && height
    71→      ? { aspectRatio: `${width} / ${height}`, maxWidth: '100%', width }
    72→      : { maxWidth: '100%' }
    73→
    74→  return (
    75→    <figure className="rich-image">
    76→      <div
    77→        className={`rich-image-container${loaded ? ' rich-image-loaded' : ''}`}
    78→        style={{
    79→          ...aspectStyle,
    80→          backgroundColor: !loaded && !placeholderUrl ? accent : undefined,
    81→          backgroundImage:
    82→            !loaded && placeholderUrl ? `url(${placeholderUrl})` : undefined,
    83→          backgroundSize: 'cover',
    84→          cursor: loaded ? 'zoom-in' : undefined,
    85→        }}
    86→        onClick={handleZoomOpen}
    87→        onKeyDown={handleContainerKeyDown}
    88→        role="button"
    89→        tabIndex={loaded ? 0 : -1}
    90→        aria-label={loaded ? `Zoom image: ${altText}` : undefined}
    91→      >
    92→        <img
    93→          src={src}
    94→          alt={altText}
    95→          width={width}
    96→          height={height}
    97→          loading="lazy"
    98→          onLoad={handleLoad}
    99→          style={{ maxWidth: '100%', height: 'auto' }}
   100→          className={loaded ? 'rich-image-visible' : 'rich-image-hidden'}
   101→        />
   102→      </div>
   103→      {caption && <figcaption>{caption}</figcaption>}
   104→
   105→      {zoomed && (
   106→        <div
   107→          className="rich-image-zoom-overlay"
   108→          onClick={handleZoomClose}
   109→          role="dialog"
   110→          aria-modal="true"
   111→          aria-label={`Zoomed image: ${altText}`}
   112→          tabIndex={0}
   113→        >
   114→          <img src={src} alt={altText} className="rich-image-zoom-img" />
   115→        </div>
   116→      )}
   117→    </figure>
   118→  )
   119→}
   120→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client'

     3→import type { NoteWrappedWithLikedAndTranslationPayload } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import { createModelDataProvider } from 'jojoo/react'
     6→import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'
     7→import { useLocale } from 'next-intl'
     8→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     9→
    10→import { queries } from '~/queries/definition'
    11→
    12→const {
    13→  ModelDataProvider,
    14→  ModelDataAtomProvider,
    15→  getGlobalModelData: getModelData,
    16→  setGlobalModelData: setModelData,
    17→  useModelDataSelector,
    18→  useSetModelData,
    19→} = createModelDataProvider<NoteWrappedWithLikedAndTranslationPayload>()
    20→
    21→export {
    22→  ModelDataAtomProvider as CurrentNoteDataAtomProvider,
    23→  ModelDataProvider as CurrentNoteDataProvider,
    24→  getModelData as getCurrentNoteData,
    25→  setModelData as setCurrentNoteData,
    26→  useModelDataSelector as useCurrentNoteDataSelector,
    27→  useSetModelData as useSetCurrentNoteData,
    28→}
    29→
    30→export const SyncNoteDataAfterLoggedIn = () => {
    31→  const nid = useModelDataSelector((data) => data?.data.nid)
    32→  const password = useSearchParams().get('password')
    33→  const locale = useLocale()
    34→  const { data } = useQuery({
    35→    ...queries.note.byNid(nid?.toString() || '', password, locale),
    36→    enabled: !!nid,
    37→  })
    38→
    39→  useEffect(() => {
    40→    if (data) {
    41→      const noteData = data as NoteWrappedWithLikedAndTranslationPayload
    42→      setModelData((draft) => {
    43→        draft.data = noteData.data
    44→      })
    45→    }
    46→  }, [data])
    47→
    48→  return null
    49→}
    50→
```

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  ModelWithLiked,
     3→  ModelWithTranslation,
     4→  PaginateResult,
     5→  PostModel,
     6→  TagModel,
     7→} from '@mx-space/api-client'
     8→import { useMutation } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     9→
    10→import { useResetAutoSaverData } from '~/components/modules/dashboard/writing/BaseWritingProvider'
    11→import { cloneDeep } from '~/lib/lodash'
    12→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    13→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    14→import type { PostDto } from '~/models/writing'
    15→
    16→import { defineQuery } from '../helper'
    17→
    18→export type PostWithTranslation = ModelWithLiked<
    19→  ModelWithTranslation<PostModel>
    20→>
    21→
    22→export const post = {
    23→  bySlug: (category: string, slug: string, lang?: string) =>
    24→    defineQuery({
    25→      queryKey: ['post', category, slug, lang],
    26→
    27→      queryFn: async ({ queryKey }) => {
    28→        const [, category, slug, lang] = queryKey as [
    29→          string,
    30→          string,
    31→          string,
    32→          string | undefined,
    33→        ]
    34→
    35→        const data = await apiClient.post.getPost(category, slug, {
    36→          lang: lang || undefined,
    37→          prefer: 'lexical',
    38→        })
    39→
    40→        return data.$serialized as PostWithTranslation
    41→      },
    42→    }),
    43→}
    44→
    45→export const postAdmin = {
    46→  paginate: (page?: number) =>
    47→    defineQuery({
    48→      queryKey: ['postAdmin', 'paginate', page],
    49→      queryFn: async ({ pageParam }: any) => {
    50→        const data = await apiClient.post.getList(pageParam ?? page)
    51→
    52→        return data.$serialized
    53→      },
    54→    }),
    55→
    56→  allCategories: () =>
    57→    defineQuery({
    58→      queryKey: ['postAdmin', 'allCategories'],
    59→      queryFn: async () => {
    60→        const data = await apiClient.category.getAllCategories()
    61→
    62→        return data.$serialized
    63→      },
    64→    }),
    65→
    66→  getPost: (id: string) =>
    67→    defineQuery({
    68→      queryKey: ['postAdmin', 'getPost', id],
    69→      queryFn: async () => {
    70→        const data = await apiClient.post.getPost(id)
    71→
    72→        const dto = {
    73→          ...data.$serialized,
    74→          relatedId: data.related?.map((i) => i.id) || [],
    75→        } as PostDto
    76→
    77→        return dto
    78→      },
    79→    }),
    80→
    81→  getAllTags: () =>
    82→    defineQuery({
    83→      queryKey: ['postAdmin', 'getAllTags'],
    84→      queryFn: async () => {
    85→        const { data } = await apiClient.proxy.categories.get<{
    86→          data: TagModel[]
    87→        }>({
    88→          params: { type: 'Tag' },
    89→        })
    90→        return data.map((i) => ({
    91→          label: `${i.name} (${i.count})`,
    92→          value: i.name,
    93→          key: i.name,
    94→        }))
    95→      },
    96→    }),
    97→
    98→  getRelatedList: () =>
    99→    defineQuery({
   100→      queryKey: ['postAdmin', 'getRelatedList'],
   101→
   102→      queryFn: async ({ pageParam }: any) =>
   103→        apiClient.proxy.posts.get({
   104→          params: {
   105→            page: pageParam || 1,
   106→            size: 50,
   107→            select: 'id title _id slug category categoryId',
   108→          },
   109→        }) as Promise<
   110→          PaginateResult<
   111→            Pick<PostModel, 'id' | 'title' | 'slug' | 'category' | 'categoryId'>
   112→          >
   113→        >,
   114→    }),
   115→}
   116→
   117→export const useCreatePost = () => {
   118→  const resetAutoSaver = useResetAutoSaverData()
   119→  return useMutation({
   120→    mutationFn: (data: PostDto) => {
   121→      const readonlyKeys = [
   122→        'id',
   123→        'related',
   124→        'modified',
   125→        'category',
   126→      ] as (keyof PostModel)[]
   127→      const nextData = cloneDeep(data) as any
   128→      for (const key of readonlyKeys) {
   129→        delete nextData[key]
   130→      }
   131→      return apiClient.post.proxy.post<{
   132→        id: string
   133→      }>({
   134→        data: nextData,
   135→      })
   136→    },
   137→    onSuccess: () => {
   138→      toast.success('创建成功')
   139→      resetAutoSaver('post')
   140→    },
   141→  })
   142→}
   143→
   144→export const useUpdatePost = () => {
   145→  const resetAutoSaver = useResetAutoSaverData()
   146→  return useMutation({
   147→    mutationFn: (data: PostDto) => {
   148→      const { id } = data
   149→      const readonlyKeys = [
   150→        'id',
   151→        'related',
   152→        'modified',
   153→        'category',
   154→      ] as (keyof PostModel)[]
   155→      const nextData = cloneDeep(data) as any
   156→      for (const key of readonlyKeys) {
   157→        delete nextData[key]
   158→      }
   159→      return apiClient.post.proxy(id).put<{
   160→        id: string
   161→      }>({
   162→        data: nextData,
   163→      })
   164→    },
   165→    onSuccess: ({ id }) => {
   166→      toast.success('更新成功')
   167→      resetAutoSaver('post', id)
   168→    },
   169→  })
   170→}
   171→
```
</details></tool-use>

Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the rich-editor package. Let me compile my detailed findings:

## COMPREHENSIVE EXPLORATION REPORT: Rich-Editor Custom Nodes & SSR Mapping

### CUSTOM NODE DEFINITIONS

All nodes extend from Lexical's `DecoratorNode` or `ElementNode` with serialization patterns. Here's the complete inventory:

---

### **NODE TYPE MAPPING & SERIALIZED PROPERTIES**

| Node Class | Type String | Serialized Properties | Inline | Browser Code |
|------------|-------------|----------------------|--------|--------------|
| **SpoilerNode** | `'spoiler'` | (none - ElementNode) | ✓ | `document.createElement('span')`, event listeners (click, keydown) |
| **MentionNode** | `'mention'` | `platform`, `handle`, `displayName?` | ✓ | `document.createElement('span')` |
| **FootnoteNode** | `'footnote'` | `identifier` | ✓ | `document.createElement('sup')` |
| **KaTeXInlineNode** | `'katex-inline'` | `equation` | ✓ | `document.createElement('span')` |
| **KaTeXBlockNode** | `'katex-block'` | `equation` | ✗ | `document.createElement('div')` |
| **ImageNode** | `'image'` | `src`, `altText`, `width?`, `height?`, `caption?`, `thumbhash?`, `accent?` | ✗ | Sanitizes `src` (rejects `javascript:`, `vbscript:`, `data:` except images); sanitizes color |
| **VideoNode** | `'video'` | `src`, `poster?`, `width?`, `height?` | ✗ | `document.createElement('div')` |
| **CodeBlockNode** | `'code-block'` | `code`, `language` | ✗ | `document.createElement('div')` |
| **AlertQuoteNode** | `'alert-quote'` | `alertType` ('note'\|'tip'\|'important'\|'warning'\|'caution'), `content` (SerializedEditorState) | ✗ | Creates nested editor, `document.createElement('div')` with class mapping |
| **BannerNode** | `'banner'` | `bannerType` (same as alert), `content` (SerializedEditorState) | ✗ | Creates nested editor, legacy support for `children` format |
| **DetailsNode** | `'details'` | `summary`, `open` | ✗ | `document.createElement('details')`, `document.createElement('summary')`, lucide SVG icon rendering (chevron) |
| **GridContainerNode** | `'grid-container'` | `cols`, `gap?`, `cells` (SerializedEditorState[]) | ✗ | Creates multiple nested editors (one per cell), legacy children support |
| **LinkCardNode** | `'link-card'` | `url`, `source?`, `id?`, `title?`, `description?`, `favicon?`, `image?` | ✗ | `document.createElement('div')` |
| **MermaidNode** | `'mermaid'` | `diagram` | ✗ | `document.createElement('div')` |
| **FootnoteSectionNode** | `'footnote-section'` | `definitions` (Record<string, string>) | ✗ | `document.createElement('div')` |
| **HorizontalRuleNode** | `'horizontalrule'` | (none - DecoratorNode<null>) | ✗ | `document.createElement('hr')`, sets `data-lexicalDecorator='true'` |

---

### **BROWSER-DEPENDENT CODE (Critical for SSR)**

All nodes contain browser-dependent code. Key patterns:

#### **1. DOM Creation (All nodes)**
```typescript
document.createElement('span|div|sup|details|summary|hr|pre|code')
```

#### **2. Event Listeners (SpoilerNode)**
- Click/keydown handlers for reveal/hide toggle
- `classList.toggle()`, `classList.add()`, `classList.remove()`
- Window timer: `window.setTimeout()`

#### **3. Browser APIs (ImageRenderer)**
- `document.getElementById()`, `document.addEventListener()`, `document.body.style.overflow`
- `KeyboardEvent` handling
- Zoom dialog with overlay

#### **4. Clipboard Access (CodeBlockRenderer)**
- `navigator.clipboard.writeText()`

#### **5. Lucide SVG Rendering (DetailsNode, AlertRenderer)**
- Icon rendering via `createLucideSvg()` utility
- Generates `<svg>` DOM elements

#### **6. Window/Global References (FootnoteRenderer)**
- `document.getElementById(targetId)` for link targeting
- `scrollIntoView()` with smooth behavior
- Hash-based anchor navigation (`#${targetId}`)

---

### **CLASS NAMES USED FOR RENDERING**

#### **Block Element Classes**
- `rich-spoiler`, `rich-spoiler-revealed` (toggle state)
- `rich-mention`, `rich-mention-plain`, `rich-mention-handle`
- `rich-footnote` (inline), `rich-footnote-ref`, `rich-footnote-ref-wrapper`, `rich-footnote-highlight`, `rich-footnote-section`
- `rich-katex-block-wrapper`, (inline spans - no specific class)
- `rich-image-wrapper`, `rich-image`, `rich-image-container`, `rich-image-loaded`, `rich-image-visible`, `rich-image-zoom-overlay`, `rich-image-zoom-img`
- `rich-video-wrapper`
- `rich-code-block-wrapper`, `rich-code-block`, `rich-code-block-numbered`, `rich-code-block-header`, `rich-code-block-lang`, `rich-code-block-copy`
- `rich-alert`, `rich-alert-${type}`, `rich-alert-header-${type}`, `rich-alert-icon`, `rich-alert-label`
- `rich-banner`, `rich-banner-${type}`
- `rich-details`, `rich-details-summary`, `rich-details-summary-text`, `rich-details-chevron`, `rich-details-content`
- `rich-grid-container`
- `rich-link-card-wrapper`
- `rich-mermaid-wrapper`
- `rich-footnote-section`
- `rich-hr`

#### **Typography & Format Classes** (from theme.ts)
- `rich-text-bold`, `rich-text-italic`, `rich-text-underline`, `rich-text-strikethrough`
- `rich-text-superscript`, `rich-text-subscript`, `rich-text-code`, `rich-text-highlight`
- `rich-heading-h1` through `rich-heading-h6`, `rich-heading-anchor`
- `rich-list-ol`, `rich-list-ul`, `rich-list-item`, `rich-list-item-checked`, `rich-list-item-unchecked`, `rich-checklist`
- `rich-quote`, `rich-link`, `rich-paragraph`
- `rich-table`, `rich-table-cell`, `rich-table-cell-header`, `rich-table-scrollable-wrapper`
- `rich-code-block` (Lexical standard)

---

### **PLUGINS (Key Behavior Injection)**

**FootnotePlugin** (`src/plugins/FootnotePlugin.tsx`):
- Monitors `FootnoteNode` instances in editor state
- Builds `displayNumberMap` (identifier → display number)
- Auto-creates `FootnoteSectionNode` when first footnote added
- Auto-removes section when all footnotes deleted
- Syncs footnote definitions via `FootnoteDefinitionsProvider` context
- Uses `$nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)` for traversal

**Other Plugins:**
- `MarkdownShortcutsPlugin` - transforms markdown input
- `HorizontalRulePlugin` - inserts horizontal rules
- `AutoLinkPlugin` - detects URL patterns
- `ImageUploadPlugin` - handles image uploads
- `DragDropPlugin` - enables drag-and-drop reordering
- `FloatingToolbarPlugin` - displays formatting toolbar
- `KaTeXPlugin` - renders KaTeX equations
- `MermaidPlugin` - renders Mermaid diagrams
- `AlertPlugin` - handles alert blocks
- `HeadingAnchorPlugin` - adds anchor links to headings

---

### **RENDERER COMPONENTS**

All renderers export `Props` interfaces for type-safe rendering:

| Renderer | Props | Browser Usage |
|----------|-------|---------------|
| **FootnoteRenderer** | `identifier` | `document.getElementById()`, `scrollIntoView()`, `window.setTimeout()`, `navigator.clipboard` context |
| **MentionRenderer** | `platform`, `handle`, `displayName?` | Uses tooltip from `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` |
| **CodeBlockRenderer** | `code`, `language`, `showLineNumbers?`, `editable?` | `navigator.clipboard.writeText()`, Shiki syntax highlighting (lazy loaded) |
| **ImageRenderer** | `src`, `altText`, `width?`, `height?`, `caption?`, `thumbhash?`, `accent?` | `document.addEventListener()`, `document.body.style.overflow`, zoom state management |
| **AlertRenderer** | `type: AlertType` | Icon rendering via lucide-react |
| **KaTeXRenderer** | `equation`, `displayMode: boolean` | KaTeX rendering library (lazy loaded) |
| **VideoRenderer** | `src`, `poster?`, `width?`, `height?` | Basic video element |
| **LinkCardRenderer** | `url`, `source?`, `id?`, `title?`, `description?`, `favicon?`, `image?` | Image and favicon rendering |
| **MermaidRenderer** | `content`, `onContentChange?` | Mermaid diagram rendering (lazy loaded) |

---

### **MARKDOWN TRANSFORMERS (Export Patterns)**

Located in `packages/rich-headless/src/transformers.ts`:

| Node Type | Export Format | Regex Pattern |
|-----------|---------------|---------------|
| `spoiler` | `\|\|content\|\|` | `/\|\|(.+?)\|\|/` |
| `mention` | `[displayName]{platform@handle}` or `{platform@handle}` | `/(?:\[([^\]]+)\])?\{(\w+)@(\w[\w.-]*)\}/` |
| `footnote` | `[^identifier]` | `/\[\^(\w+)\]/` |
| `katex-inline` | `$equation$` | `/\$([^$\n]+)\$/` |
| `katex-block` | `$$equation$$` | `/\$\$([^$]+)\$\$/` |
| `code-block` | `` ```lang\ncode\n``` `` | Fence logic with backtick escaping |
| `image` | `![altText](src "caption")` | Markdown image syntax |
| `video` | `<video src="..." poster="..." width=... height=... controls></video>` | HTML video tag |
| `link-card` | `[title](url)` or `<url>` | Simplified markdown or angle-bracket URL |
| `mermaid` | `` ```mermaid\ndiagram\n``` `` | Fenced code block with mermaid language |
| `alert-quote` | `> [!NOTE]\n> content` | GitHub alerts syntax |
| `banner` | `::: bannerType\ncontent\n:::` | Container directive syntax |
| `details` | `::: details{summary="..."}\ncontent\n:::` | Container directive with summary attr |
| `grid-container` | `::: grid{cols=2 gap="16px"}\n::: cell\n...\n:::\n:::` | Nested container directives |
| `footnote-section` | `[^id]: definition` per line | Standard Markdown footnote format |
| `horizontalrule` | `---` | Markdown horizontal rule |

---

### **STYLES ARCHITECTURE (Vanilla Extract CSS-in-TS)**

**Theme Variables** (`styles/vars.css.ts`):
- Typography: `fontFamily`, `fontSizeBase`, `fontSizeSmall`, `lineHeight`, `lineHeightTight`, `fontMono`
- Colors: `text`, `textSecondary`, `accent`, `accentLight`, `codeBg`, `codeText`, `border`, `quoteBorder`, `quoteBg`, `link`, `bgSecondary`
- Spacing: `xs`, `sm`, `md`, `lg`
- Border radius: `sm`, `md`

**Content Root Class** (`richContent`):
- Applied to editor/renderer wrapper
- Sets base font, line-height, color, overflow behavior

**Variant-specific Styling** (`article.css.ts`, `note.css.ts`, `comment.css.ts`):
- Tailored typography and sizing per variant
- Color scheme variations

---

### **NESTED EDITOR NODES** (for container elements)

Defined in `nodes/shared.ts - NESTED_EDITOR_NODES`:
```typescript
[HeadingNode, QuoteNode, ListNode, ListItemNode, LinkNode, AutoLinkNode, 
 HorizontalRuleNode, CodeNode, TableNode, TableCellNode, TableRowNode,
 SpoilerNode, MentionNode, FootnoteNode, KaTeXInlineNode]
```

Used by:
- `AlertQuoteNode` → nested editor for content
- `BannerNode` → nested editor for content
- `GridContainerNode` → per-cell editors
- (Details doesn't use nested editor - uses ElementNode for DOM structure)

---

### **KEY SERIALIZATION PATTERN**

All nodes follow this pattern:

```typescript
exportJSON(): SerializedNodeType {
  return {
    ...super.exportJSON(),
    type: 'node-type',
    field1: this.__field1,
    field2: this.__field2,
    version: 1,
  }
}

static importJSON(serialized): NodeType {
  return $createNodeType(serialized.field1, serialized.field2)
}
```

Legacy format support:
- `BannerNode`: supports old `children` array → wraps to editor state
- `GridContainerNode`: supports old `children` array → creates per-cell editor states

---

### **CRITICAL FOR SSR NODE MAPPING**

**What must NOT access browser APIs during SSR:**
1. ✗ `document.createElement()` - use element creation functions
2. ✗ `window` object references - check `typeof window !== 'undefined'`
3. ✗ Event listeners - attach only in browser context
4. ✗ `navigator.clipboard` - only in browser
5. ✗ `document.getElementById()` - only after hydration
6. ✗ Lucide SVG rendering - requires React in browser

**SSR-safe operations:**
- ✓ JSON serialization/deserialization (all nodes export/import JSON)
- ✓ Type checking and property access
- ✓ Markdown transformer exports (create Markdown from AST)
- ✓ Static HTML generation from props (can pre-render to string)

**Renderer Props are SSR-friendly:**
- Primitive values: `string`, `number`, `boolean`
- No callbacks (except `onContentChange` in edit mode - not used in renderer)
- No event handlers
- No DOM references

---

### **FILE LOCATIONS SUMMARY**

- **Nodes:** `/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/*.ts` (23 files including edit variants)
- **Plugins:** `/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/*.tsx` (16 plugins)
- **Renderers:** `/packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/*.tsx` (14 renderers)
- **RendererWrapper:** `/packages/rich-editor/src/components/RendererWrapper.tsx` (custom renderer injection)
- **Styles:** `/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/*.css.ts` (Vanilla Extract)
- **Theme:** `/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/theme.ts` (class name mappings)
- **Transformers:** `/packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/*.ts` (import/export patterns)
- **Headless Transformers:** `/packages/rich-headless/src/transformers.ts` (export-only for Markdown)

This comprehensive mapping provides everything needed to design the SSR node mapping layer that serializes/deserializes Lexical nodes to server-safe formats, generates static HTML, and handles nested editors correctly in a server context.

### 2. **RichRenderer.tsx - How It Works**

The renderer is a **read-only** Lexical editor wrapper:

```typescript
export function RichRenderer({
  value,                    // SerializedEditorState (JSON)
  variant = 'article',      // 'article' | 'note' | 'comment'
  theme = 'light',          // 'light' | 'dark'
  className,
  style,
  as: Component = 'div',    // Root element type
  rendererConfig,           // Custom RendererConfig
  extraNodes,               // Additional node classes
}) {
  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes

  const initialConfig = {
    namespace: 'RichRenderer',
    theme: editorTheme,
    nodes,
    editable: false,        // KEY: Read-only mode
    editorState: JSON.stringify(value),
    onError: (error) => console.error('[RichRenderer]', error),
  }

  return (
    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
        <RendererConfigProvider config={rendererConfig} mode="renderer" variant={variant}>
          <Component className={clsx('rich-content', variantClass, className)} ...>
            <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
              <FootnotePlugin>           {/* Collects footnote definitions */}
                <RichTextPlugin contentEditable={<ContentEditable />} />
                <HeadingAnchorPlugin />   {/* Adds #anchors to headings */}
              </FootnotePlugin>
            </LexicalComposer>
          </Component>
        </RendererConfigProvider>
      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    </PortalThemeProvider>
  )
}
```

**Key Architecture:**
- Uses **LexicalComposer** (requires browser DOM/React runtime)
- Sets `editable: false` for read-only mode
- Deserializes `SerializedEditorState` JSON into Lexical nodes
- Wraps with 3 context providers: ColorScheme, RendererConfig, PortalTheme
- **SSR Issue**: LexicalComposer cannot render on server (browser-only)

### 3. **Node Types (17 Custom Nodes)**

All custom nodes extend `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>` and implement:
- `static getType()` → node type string
- `static clone()` → clone instance
- `static importJSON()` → deserialize from JSON
- `exportJSON()` → serialize to JSON
- `createDOM()` → DOM element placeholder (minimal)
- `updateDOM()` → DOM updates
- `isInline()` → true/false
- `decorate()` → returns React element (or RendererWrapper for customization)

**The 17 Custom Nodes:**

| Node Type | Type | Key Properties | Serialization |
|-----------|------|-----------------|---------------|
| **SpoilerNode** | Inline Element | N/A | No extra props |
| **MentionNode** | Inline Decorator | `username: string` | Simple |
| **KaTeXInlineNode** | Inline Decorator | `equation: string` | Simple |
| **KaTeXBlockNode** | Block Decorator | `equation: string` | Simple |
| **ImageNode** | Block Decorator | `src, altText, width?, height?, caption?, thumbhash?, accent?` | Full props saved |
| **AlertQuoteNode** | Block Decorator | `alertType: AlertType, content: SerializedEditorState` | **Nested editor state** |
| **CodeBlockNode** | Block Decorator | `code: string, language: string` | Simple |
| **FootnoteNode** | Inline Decorator | `identifier: string` | ID only |
| **FootnoteSectionNode** | Block Decorator | `definitions: Record<string, string>` | Full definitions dict |
| **VideoNode** | Block Decorator | `src, poster?, width?, height?` | Full props |
| **LinkCardNode** | Block Decorator | `url, source?, id?, title?, description?, favicon?, image?` | Full props |
| **DetailsNode** | Block Decorator | `summary: string` (maybe) | TBD |
| **GridContainerNode** | Block Decorator | Grid layout props | TBD |
| **BannerNode** | Block Decorator | `bannerType: BannerType, content: SerializedEditorState` | **Nested editor state** |
| **MermaidNode** | Block Decorator | `diagram: string` | Simple |
| **HorizontalRuleNode** | Block Decorator | N/A (from Lexical) | N/A |

**Important**: AlertQuoteNode and BannerNode contain **nested LexicalEditor instances** with their own SerializedEditorState. These are not simple nodes.

### 4. **FootnotePlugin.tsx - Complete Implementation**

```typescript
export function FootnotePlugin({ children }: { children?: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  const [definitions, setDefinitions] = useState<Record<string, string>>({})
  const [displayNumberMap, setDisplayNumberMap] = useState<Record<string, number>>({})

  useEffect(() => {
    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
      editorState.read(() => {
        // 1. COLLECT footnote nodes and assign display numbers
        const footnoteNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)
        const seen = new Set<string>()
        const numberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
        let counter = 1
        for (const node of footnoteNodes) {
          const id = node.getIdentifier()
          if (!seen.has(id)) {
            seen.add(id)
            numberMap[id] = counter++
          }
        }
        setDisplayNumberMap(numberMap)

        // 2. AUTO-CREATE/DELETE footnote section
        const sectionNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)

        if (footnoteNodes.length === 0 && sectionNodes.length > 0) {
          // No more footnotes → delete section
          editor.update(() => {
            for (const s of sectionNodes) s.remove()
          })
          setDefinitions({})
          return
        }

        if (footnoteNodes.length > 0 && sectionNodes.length === 0) {
          // Found footnotes but no section → create section with empty defs
          editor.update(() => {
            const root = $getRoot()
            const defs: Record<string, string> = {}
            for (const id of seen) {
              defs[id] = ''
            }
            const section = $createFootnoteSectionNode(defs)
            root.append(section)
          })
        } else if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
          // Section exists → add missing footnote IDs to section
          const existingDefs = sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions()
          const missingIds = [...seen].filter((id) => !(id in existingDefs))
          if (missingIds.length > 0) {
            editor.update(() => {
              const freshSections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
              if (freshSections.length > 0) {
                for (const id of missingIds) {
                  freshSections[0].setDefinition(id, '')
                }
              }
            })
          }
        }

        // 3. SYNC context with current definitions
        if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
          setDefinitions(sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions())
        } else {
          setDefinitions({})
        }
      })
    })
  }, [editor])

  // Provide definitions + displayNumberMap to renderers via context
  return (
    <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
      definitions={definitions}
      displayNumberMap={displayNumberMap}
    >
      {children}
    </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
  )
}
```

**How it works:**
1. Listens to editor state updates via `registerUpdateListener`
2. Collects all `FootnoteNode` instances and assigns **sequential display numbers**
3. Auto-creates `FootnoteSectionNode` when footnotes are added
4. Auto-deletes section when all footnotes are removed
5. Syncs new footnote IDs into existing section definitions
6. Provides `definitions` + `displayNumberMap` via context for renderers

### 5. **Transformers - Content Conversion**

Each transformer converts markdown patterns → Lexical nodes:

| Transformer | Pattern | Creates | Order |
|-------------|---------|---------|-------|
| `SPOILER_TRANSFORMER` | `\|\|...\|\|` | SpoilerNode | Inline #1 |
| `MENTION_TRANSFORMER` | `@username` | MentionNode | Inline #2 |
| `FOOTNOTE_TRANSFORMER` | `[^id]` | FootnoteNode | Inline #3 |
| `INSERT_TRANSFORMER` | `~~...~~` | Insert node | Inline |
| `SUPERSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER` | `^...^` | Superscript mark | Inline |
| `SUBSCRIPT_TRANSFORMER` | `~...~` | Subscript mark | Inline |
| `KATEX_INLINE_TRANSFORMER` | `$...$` | KaTeXInlineNode | Inline |
| `FOOTNOTE_SECTION_TRANSFORMER` | `[^id]: content` | FootnoteSectionNode | Block #1 |
| `CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER` | Grid syntax | GridContainerNode | Block |
| `GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER` | `>[!NOTE]\ncontent` | AlertQuoteNode | Block |
| `CHECK_LIST` (Lexical) | `- [x] item` | Checklist | Block |
| `KATEX_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER` | ` $$\nequation\n$$ ` | KaTeXBlockNode | Block |
| `IMAGE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER` | `![alt](url)` | ImageNode | Block |
| `VIDEO_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER` | `[video](url)` | VideoNode | Block |
| `CODE_BLOCK_NODE_TRANSFORMER` | ` ``` `lang` ` | CodeBlockNode | Block |
| `LINK_CARD_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER` | `[link](url)` | LinkCardNode | Block |
| `MERMAID_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER` | ` ``` `mermaid` ` | MermaidNode | Block |
| `GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER` | Grid syntax | GridContainerNode | Block |
| `HORIZONTAL_RULE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER` | `---` | HorizontalRuleNode | Block |
| `TABLE_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER` | Table markdown | TableNode | Block |

**Order matters:** Inline transformers are applied first, then block transformers (footnote section before git-alert before katex before images, etc.).

### 6. **Types Exported - SerializedEditorState Structure**

From `renderer-config.ts`:

```typescript
export interface RendererConfig {
  Alert?: ComponentType<AlertRendererProps>
  Banner?: ComponentType<BannerRendererProps>
  CodeBlock?: ComponentType<CodeBlockRendererProps>
  CodeSnippet?: ComponentType<CodeSnippetRendererProps>
  Footnote?: ComponentType<FootnoteRendererProps>
  FootnoteSection?: ComponentType<FootnoteSectionRendererProps>
  Gallery?: ComponentType<GalleryRendererProps>
  Image?: ComponentType<ImageRendererProps>
  KaTeX?: ComponentType<KaTeXRendererProps>
  LinkCard?: ComponentType<LinkCardRendererProps>
  Mermaid?: ComponentType<MermaidRendererProps>
  Mention?: ComponentType<MentionRendererProps>
  Video?: ComponentType<VideoRendererProps>
}
```

Each node serializes to `SerializedLexicalNode`:

```typescript
export type SerializedFootnoteNode = Spread<
  { identifier: string },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

export type SerializedImageNode = Spread<
  {
    src: string
    altText: string
    width?: number
    height?: number
    caption?: string
    thumbhash?: string
    accent?: string
  },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>

export type SerializedAlertQuoteNode = Spread<
  {
    alertType: AlertType
    content: SerializedEditorState  // NESTED EDITOR STATE
  },
  SerializedLexicalNode
>
```

`SerializedEditorState` from Lexical is:
```typescript
{
  root: {
    children: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    direction: 'ltr' | 'rtl' | null
    format: string
    indent: number
    type: 'root'
    version: 1
  }
}
```

### 7. **RendererConfig Type & Injection**

Context-based renderer injection via `RendererWrapper`:

```typescript
export function RendererWrapper({
  rendererKey,           // 'Image', 'CodeBlock', etc.
  defaultRenderer,       // ImageRenderer, CodeBlockRenderer, etc.
  props,                 // Renderer props
}: RendererWrapperProps) {
  const config = useRendererConfig()
  const Renderer = config?.[rendererKey] ?? defaultRenderer
  return <Renderer {...props} />
}

export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
  rendererKey: K,
  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
): ReactElement {
  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    rendererKey,
    defaultRenderer,
    props,
  } as RendererWrapperProps)
}
```

Each node's `decorate()` method calls `createRendererDecoration()` with the appropriate renderer key and props. The wrapper checks context for a custom renderer override before falling back to the default.

### 8. **Package.json - Build & Dependencies**

```json
{
  "name": "@haklex/rich-editor",
  "version": "0.0.31",
  "type": "module",
  "exports": {
    ".": "./src/index.ts",                    // Full export
    "./editor": "./src/editor.ts",            // RichEditor only
    "./renderer": "./src/renderer.ts",        // RichRenderer only
    "./style.css": "./dist/rich-editor.css"
  },

    "@lexical/code": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/react": "^0.40.0",
    "lexical": "^0.40.0",
    "react": ">=19",
    "react-dom": ">=19",
    "shiki": "^3.0.0",
    "katex": ">=0.16.0"
  }
}
```

All Lexical packages and React are peer dependencies (not bundled).

### 9. **Vite Build Configuration**

```typescript
import { createViteConfig } from '../vite.shared'

export default createViteConfig({
  esbuild: { jsx: 'automatic', jsxImportSource: 'react' },
  entry: {
    index: 'src/index.ts',
    editor: 'src/editor.ts',
    renderer: 'src/renderer.ts',
  },
})
```

**Three entry points:**
- `index` → full exports
- `editor` → RichEditor only
- `renderer` → RichRenderer only

### 10. **CSS/Style Files - Class Names & System**

All styles use **Vanilla Extract** (CSS-in-TS) with theme variables. Key class names:

**Block containers:**
- `.rich-content` — root wrapper
- `.rich-content__body` — ContentEditable area
- `.rich-paragraph` — `<p>` element

**Text formatting:**
- `.rich-text-bold`, `.rich-text-italic`, `.rich-text-underline`, `.rich-text-strikethrough`
- `.rich-text-superscript`, `.rich-text-subscript`
- `.rich-text-code` — inline code
- `.rich-text-highlight` — marked/highlighted text

**Headings & links:**
- `.rich-heading-h1` through `.rich-heading-h6`
- `.rich-heading-anchor` — hidden `#` anchor links
- `.rich-link` — hyperlinks

**Lists:**
- `.rich-list-ol`, `.rich-list-ul`, `.rich-list-item`
- `.rich-list-nested-item`
- `.rich-checklist`, `.rich-list-item-checked`, `.rich-list-item-unchecked`

**Tables:**
- `.rich-table`, `.rich-table-cell`, `.rich-table-cell-header`
- `.rich-table-scrollable-wrapper`

**Block content:**
- `.rich-quote` — blockquote
- `.rich-hr` — horizontal rule
- `.rich-code-block`, `.rich-code-block-header`, `.rich-code-block-lang`, `.rich-code-block-copy`
- `.rich-image-wrapper`, `.rich-video-wrapper`, `.rich-link-card-wrapper`
- `.rich-alert`, `.rich-alert-{type}` (note, tip, warning, important, caution)
- `.rich-banner`, `.rich-banner-{type}`
- `.rich-spoiler`, `.rich-spoiler-revealed`

**Footnotes:**
- `.rich-footnote` — superscript wrapper
- `.rich-footnote-ref`, `.rich-footnote-ref-wrapper` — inline reference link
- `.rich-footnote-section` — entire section
- `.rich-footnote-section-list`, `.rich-footnote-section-item`
- `.rich-footnote-section-divider` — `<hr>` separator
- `.rich-footnote-back-ref` — backlink in definition

**Drag/drop:**
- `.rich-drag-handle` — drag indicator icon
- `.rich-drop-indicator` — drop target line

**Theme colors (via CSS variables):**
- `--a` — accent color (OKLCH dynamic)
- `--rc-text`, `--rc-text-secondary`, `--rc-bg`, `--rc-bg-secondary`
- `--rc-border`, `--rc-code-bg`, `--rc-code-text`
- `--rc-link`, `--rc-quote-border`, `--rc-quote-bg`

**Variants (3 templates × 2 themes = 6 classes):**
- `.rich-article`, `.rich-note`, `.rich-comment`
- Each has light/dark theme CSS

### **SSR Issue Summary**

**The Core Problem:**
`RichRenderer` uses `<LexicalComposer>` which:
1. Initializes browser DOM (`document`, `window`)
2. Creates editor state listeners
3. Requires React context providers with browser APIs
4. Cannot serialize to HTML on the server

**To solve this for SSR:**
- Create a **static HTML renderer** that:
  - Takes `SerializedEditorState` JSON as input
  - Walks the node tree directly (no Lexical instantiation)
  - Renders each node type to HTML/JSX
  - Handles nested editor states (AlertQuoteNode, BannerNode)
  - Supports custom renderer injection (via a config object, not React context)
  - Uses the same CSS class names for styling consistency
  - Manages footnote numbering during traversal

This would be a **pure function** with no browser dependencies, perfect for SSR.

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-25 08:39:19Z)**_

Perfect. Now I have comprehensive knowledge. Let me compile the findings:

## Summary Report

Based on thorough exploration of the Shiroi codebase (读取全部相关文件的完整架构），吾已完全理解此工程之 rich text 体系。列述如下：

### 一、核心架构体系

**工作区结构**（pnpm workspaces + Turborepo）：
- `/apps/web/` — Next.js 16 前端应用，Server Components + Client Components 混合
- `/packages/rich-editor/` — 核心编辑器库（Lexical 基础）
- `/packages/rich-headless/` — **无React零依赖** SSR 渲染库，仅Lexical + 标准转换器
- `/packages/rich-kit-shiro/` — 集成产品包（带所有渲染器、插件、扩展）
- `/packages/types/` — 全局类型与全局组件注册（沙箱隔离）
- 30+ renderer 与 extension 子包（modular 设计）

---

### 二、Rich Text 数据流

**序列化格式**：`SerializedEditorState`（Lexical 标准格式）
```typescript
// 存储与传输格式
content: string  // JSON 字符串化的 SerializedEditorState
prefer: 'lexical'  // API 参数，明确返回 Lexical 格式而非 markdown
```

**数据源**：MX-Space API
- 获取时：`apiClient.post.getPost(category, slug, { prefer: 'lexical' })`
- 返回：`PostModel | NoteModel | PageModel` 包含 `content: SerializedEditorState`

**客户端流水线**：
1. Server Component 通过 `/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/api.tsx` 获取数据
2. `useQuery()` 或 Server 侧 `getQueryClient()` 解析数据
3. 数据通过 Provider（`CurrentPostDataProvider`、`CurrentNoteDataProvider`）传入
4. 页面组件（`PostLexicalRenderer` 等）提取 `content` 字段
5. `<MainLexicalContent content={content} />` 渲染

---

### 三、@haklex/rich-headless 包详解

**目的**：无 React、无 DOM 的 Lexical 节点 + 转换器，用于 **SSR/headless 场景**

**文件结构**：
- `/src/index.ts` — 18 个自定义节点类定义（DecoratorNode 与 ElementNode）
- `/src/transformers.ts` — Lexical → Markdown 转换器（仅导出，无导入逻辑）
- `/dist/` — Vite 编译产物（ESM）

**节点类型**（48 行以上完整注释）：

| 节点 | 类型 | 用途 |
|-----|------|------|
| `SpoilerNode` | ElementNode (inline) | `\|\|text\|\|` 隐藏文本 |
| `DetailsNode` | ElementNode (block) | `<details>` 可折叠容器 |
| `ImageNode` | DecoratorNode | 图片（含 thumbhash、accent 色） |
| `VideoNode` | DecoratorNode | 视频播放器 |
| `LinkCardNode` | DecoratorNode | 链接卡片预览 |
| `KaTeXInlineNode` / `KaTeXBlockNode` | DecoratorNode | 公式 `$...$` / `$$...$$` |
| `MermaidNode` | DecoratorNode | Mermaid 图表 |
| `MentionNode` | DecoratorNode | `{platform@handle}` 提及 |
| `CodeBlockNode` | DecoratorNode | 代码块 |
| `FootnoteNode` / `FootnoteSectionNode` | DecoratorNode | 脚注 `[^id]` |
| `EmbedNode` | DecoratorNode | 嵌入（GitHub、YouTube等） |
| `CodeSnippetNode` | DecoratorNode | 多文件代码片段 |
| `GalleryNode` | DecoratorNode | 图库网格 |
| `TldrawNode` | DecoratorNode | 白板画布 |
| `BannerNode` / `AlertQuoteNode` | DecoratorNode | 注意框/警告框 |
| `GridContainerNode` | DecoratorNode | 栅栏布局 |

**导出清单**（包.json 导出字段）：
```json
{
  ".": "./src/index.ts",  // allHeadlessNodes, builtinNodes, customHeadlessNodes
  "./transformers": "./src/transformers.ts"  // allHeadlessTransformers, $toMarkdown()
}
```

**关键函数**（行 50-67）：
```typescript
extractText(state)    // 递归提取 Lexical state 中的纯文本
stateText(state)      // 从 root 节点开始提取
```

**转换器列表**（26 个 export）：
- 文本匹配（TextMatchTransformer）：SPOILER、MENTION、FOOTNOTE、KATEX_INLINE
- 文本格式（TextFormatTransformer）：SUPERSCRIPT、SUBSCRIPT、INSERT（下划线）
- 元素（ElementTransformer）：图片、视频、代码块、表格、Mermaid、Banner、Grid 等

---

### 四、渲染架构（Static/Edit 分离策略）

**@haklex/rich-editor 三入口**：
```javascript
import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-editor'              // 只读渲染
import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-editor/editor'        // 全功能编辑
```

**节点配置分离**（树摇优化）：
- `config.ts` → `customNodes` / `allNodes`（渲染用）
- `config-edit.ts` → `customEditNodes` / `allEditNodes`（编辑用）

Edit 节点对应类：`AlertQuoteEditNode`、`CodeBlockEditNode` 等，覆盖 `decorate()` 以引入编辑 UI（Popover、DropdownMenu）。

**@haklex/rich-kit-shiro** 集成包：
- `./renderer` 导出 `ShiroRenderer`（只读，`enhancedRendererConfig` 内嵌）
- `./editor` 导出 `ShiroEditor`（编辑，`enhancedEditRendererConfig`）
- 默认节点集：`TldrawNode` + embed + gallery + codeSnippet
- `IsolateRenderer` 包装：React Shadow DOM 隔离 CSS（防止样式污染）

---

### 五、Web 应用集成实现

**消费方**：`/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.tsx`

```typescript
// 主要流程：
1. 接收 content 字符串（JSON）
2. JSON.parse() → SerializedEditorState
3. 配置 LinkCardFetchProvider（GitHub/TMDB/Bangumi/LeetCode/QQ音乐 API 适配器）
4. 调用 <IsolateRenderer value={editorState} />（Shadow DOM）
5. 注入自定义主题样式（accent 色、字体、排版）
```

**包装层级**：
- `LexicalContent` → `MainLexicalContent`（Jotai 原子读写）→ `PostLexicalRenderer` / `NoteLexicalRenderer` / `PageLexicalRenderer`

**数据提供者**（使用 `jojoo/react` ModelDataProvider）：
- `CurrentPostDataProvider` — `PostModel & liked & translation`
- `CurrentNoteDataProvider` — `NoteModel & liked & translation`
- `CurrentPageDataProvider` — `PageModel`

所有数据通过 Selector hook 提取：`useCurrentPostDataSelector(d => d?.content)`

---

### 六、SSR 与构建配置

**SSR 支持**：
- Rich headless 库 **零 React**，纯 Node.js 可用（@lexical/headless 支持）
- Next.js 服务端数据获取：`getQueryClient().fetchQuery()` 在 Server Component 中执行
- 页面级缓存：`revalidate` 时间戳（见 `pageExtra.tsx`）

**Turborepo 任务流**（turbo.json）：
```json
{
  "build": { "dependsOn": ["^build"] },  // 依赖优先
  "dev": { "cache": false, "persistent": true }
}
```

**打包产物**：
- ESM `.mjs` + `.d.ts` 声明
- CSS 分离（Vanilla Extract）
- Tree-shake 友好（条件导出）

---

### 七、类型系统

**主要类型** (`@haklex/rich-editor/types.ts`)：

```typescript
type RichEditorVariant = 'article' | 'comment' | 'note'

interface RichEditorProps {
  initialValue?: SerializedEditorState
  onChange?: (value: SerializedEditorState) => void
  variant?: RichEditorVariant
  theme?: 'light' | 'dark'
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
  rendererConfig?: RendererConfig  // 自定义渲染器注入
}

interface RichRendererProps {
  value: SerializedEditorState
  variant?: RichEditorVariant
  theme?: ColorScheme
  rendererConfig?: RendererConfig
}
```

**颜色与主题**：
- Accent 色通过 CSS 变量 `--color-accent` 动态注入
- 两种主题：light / dark（完整调色板）
- 三种排版变体：article（sans-serif）/ note（serif）/ comment（14px sans）

---

### 八、文件位置速查表

| 组件 | 路径 |
|------|------|
| 富文本渲染入口 | `/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.tsx` |
| 帖子渲染器 | `/apps/web/src/app/.../posts/.../PostLexicalRenderer.tsx` |
| 笔记渲染器 | `/apps/web/src/app/.../notes/.../NoteLexicalRenderer.tsx` |
| 页面渲染器 | `/apps/web/src/app/.../pages/.../PageLexicalRenderer.tsx` |
| 数据查询定义 | `/apps/web/src/queries/definition/post.ts` 等 |
| 核心编辑器 | `/packages/rich-editor/src/` |
| **Headless 库** | `/packages/rich-headless/src/index.ts` / `transformers.ts` |
| 集成包 | `/packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/` |

---

### 九、关键发现

1. **@haklex/rich-headless 使命**：为 SSR 与无 React 环境提供节点+转换器（当前**未被 web 应用直接导入**，仅通过 @haklex/rich-editor 间接使用）

2. **Markdown 导出路径**：通过 `$toMarkdown()` 函数（26 个转换器组合），可将 SerializedEditorState 转为 Markdown

3. **Shadow DOM 隔离**：`IsolateRenderer` 防止编辑器样式全局污染（重要的生产优化）

4. **Provider 沙箱**：`shiro-types` 包定义全局组件沙箱，支持动态加载自定义 UI（Button、Input、Modal 等）

5. **多语言支持**：Post/Note/Page 通过 `prefer: 'lexical' & lang` 参数控制版本选择（自动翻译或原文）

---

Complete architectual comprehension established. Codebase thoroughly mapped across all five requested areas.

 `./packages/rich-headless/src/index.ts`

```text
     1→/**
     2→ * @haklex/rich-headless
     3→ *
     4→ * Headless-compatible Lexical node registry for server-side parsing.
     5→ * Zero React dependency — only lexical + standard @lexical/* packages.
     6→ *
     7→ * Usage with @lexical/headless:
     8→ *   import { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
     9→ *   import { allHeadlessNodes } from '@haklex/rich-headless'
    10→ *   const editor = createHeadlessEditor({ nodes: allHeadlessNodes })
    11→ */
    12→
    13→import { CodeHighlightNode, CodeNode } from '@lexical/code'
    14→import { HorizontalRuleNode } from '@lexical/extension'
    15→import { AutoLinkNode, LinkNode } from '@lexical/link'
    16→import { ListItemNode, ListNode } from '@lexical/list'
    17→import { HeadingNode, QuoteNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
    18→import { TableCellNode, TableNode, TableRowNode } from '@lexical/table'
    19→import {
    20→  DecoratorNode,
    21→  type EditorConfig,
    22→  ElementNode,
    23→  type Klass,
    24→  type LexicalEditor,
    25→  type LexicalNode,
    26→  type NodeKey,
    27→  type SerializedElementNode,
    28→  type SerializedLexicalNode,
    29→} from 'lexical'
    30→
    31→// ── Builtin nodes ──
    32→
    33→export const builtinNodes: Klass<LexicalNode>[] = [
    34→  HeadingNode,
    35→  QuoteNode,
    36→  ListNode,
    37→  ListItemNode,
    38→  LinkNode,
    39→  AutoLinkNode,
    40→  HorizontalRuleNode,
    41→  TableNode,
    42→  TableCellNode,
    43→  TableRowNode,
    44→  CodeNode,
    45→  CodeHighlightNode,
    46→]
    47→
    48→// ── Helpers ──
    49→
    50→function stubDOM(): HTMLElement {
    51→  return document.createElement('span')
    52→}
    53→
    54→function extractText(state: unknown): string {
    55→  if (!state || typeof state !== 'object') return ''
    56→  const root = (state as Record<string, unknown>).root as
    57→    | Record<string, unknown>
    58→    | undefined
    59→  if (!root) return ''
    60→  return walkChildren(root)
    61→}
    62→
    63→function walkChildren(node: Record<string, unknown>): string {
    64→  const children = node.children as Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined
    65→  if (!children) return (node.text as string) ?? ''
    66→  return children.map(walkChildren).join('\n')
    67→}
    68→
    69→// ── SpoilerNode (ElementNode, inline) ──
    70→
    71→export class SpoilerNode extends ElementNode {
    72→  static getType(): string {
    73→    return 'spoiler'
    74→  }
    75→  static clone(node: SpoilerNode): SpoilerNode {
    76→    return new SpoilerNode((node as any).__key)
    77→  }
    78→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
    79→    super(key)
    80→  }
    81→  static importJSON(_json: SerializedElementNode): SpoilerNode {
    82→    return new SpoilerNode()
    83→  }
    84→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode {
    85→    return { ...super.exportJSON(), type: 'spoiler', version: 1 }
    86→  }
    87→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
    88→    return stubDOM()
    89→  }
    90→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    91→    return false
    92→  }
    93→  isInline(): boolean {
    94→    return true
    95→  }
    96→}
    97→
    98→// ── DetailsNode (ElementNode, block) ──
    99→
   100→export class DetailsNode extends ElementNode {
   101→  __summary = ''
   102→  __open = false
   103→
   104→  static getType(): string {
   105→    return 'details'
   106→  }
   107→  static clone(node: DetailsNode): DetailsNode {
   108→    const n = new DetailsNode((node as any).__key)
   109→    n.__summary = node.__summary
   110→    n.__open = node.__open
   111→    return n
   112→  }
   113→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   114→    super(key)
   115→  }
   116→  static importJSON(
   117→    json: SerializedElementNode & { summary?: string; open?: boolean },
   118→  ): DetailsNode {
   119→    const node = new DetailsNode()
   120→    node.__summary = json.summary ?? ''
   121→    node.__open = json.open ?? false
   122→    return node
   123→  }
   124→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode & { summary: string; open: boolean } {
   125→    return {
   126→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   127→      type: 'details',
   128→      summary: this.__summary,
   129→      open: this.__open,
   130→    }
   131→  }
   132→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   133→    return stubDOM()
   134→  }
   135→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   136→    return false
   137→  }
   138→}
   139→
   140→// ── Generic headless DecoratorNode ──
   141→
   142→type Props = Record<string, unknown>
   143→
   144→function headlessDecorator(
   145→  type: string,
   146→  propKeys: string[],
   147→  defaults: Props,
   148→  inline = false,
   149→) {
   150→  class Node extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   151→    constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   152→      super(key)
   153→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   154→        ;(this as any)[`__${k}`] = defaults[k]
   155→      }
   156→    }
   157→    static getType(): string {
   158→      return type
   159→    }
   160→    static clone(node: Node): Node {
   161→      const n = new Node((node as any).__key)
   162→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   163→        ;(n as any)[`__${k}`] = (node as any)[`__${k}`]
   164→      }
   165→      return n
   166→    }
   167→    static importJSON(json: SerializedLexicalNode & Props): Node {
   168→      const node = new Node()
   169→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   170→        ;(node as any)[`__${k}`] = json[k] ?? defaults[k]
   171→      }
   172→      return node
   173→    }
   174→    exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode & Props {
   175→      const out: Props = { type, version: 1 }
   176→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   177→        out[k] = (this as any)[`__${k}`]
   178→      }
   179→      return out as SerializedLexicalNode & Props
   180→    }
   181→    createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   182→      return stubDOM()
   183→    }
   184→    updateDOM(): boolean {
   185→      return false
   186→    }
   187→    decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): null {
   188→      return null
   189→    }
   190→    isInline(): boolean {
   191→      return inline
   192→    }
   193→  }
   194→  return Node as unknown as Klass<LexicalNode>
   195→}
   196→
   197→// ── Simple property-based nodes ──
   198→
   199→export const ImageNode = headlessDecorator(
   200→  'image',
   201→  ['src', 'altText', 'width', 'height', 'caption', 'thumbhash', 'accent'],
   202→  {
   203→    src: '',
   204→    altText: '',
   205→    width: undefined,
   206→    height: undefined,
   207→    caption: undefined,
   208→    thumbhash: undefined,
   209→    accent: undefined,
   210→  },
   211→)
   212→
   213→export const VideoNode = headlessDecorator(
   214→  'video',
   215→  ['src', 'poster', 'width', 'height'],
   216→  { src: '', poster: undefined, width: undefined, height: undefined },
   217→)
   218→
   219→export const LinkCardNode = headlessDecorator(
   220→  'link-card',
   221→  ['url', 'source', 'id', 'title', 'description', 'favicon', 'image'],
   222→  {
   223→    url: '',
   224→    source: undefined,
   225→    id: undefined,
   226→    title: undefined,
   227→    description: undefined,
   228→    favicon: undefined,
   229→    image: undefined,
   230→  },
   231→)
   232→
   233→export const KaTeXInlineNode = headlessDecorator(
   234→  'katex-inline',
   235→  ['equation'],
   236→  { equation: '' },
   237→  true,
   238→)
   239→
   240→export const KaTeXBlockNode = headlessDecorator('katex-block', ['equation'], {
   241→  equation: '',
   242→})
   243→
   244→export const MermaidNode = headlessDecorator('mermaid', ['diagram'], {
   245→  diagram: '',
   246→})
   247→
   248→export const MentionNode = headlessDecorator(
   249→  'mention',
   250→  ['platform', 'handle', 'displayName'],
   251→  { platform: '', handle: '', displayName: undefined },
   252→  true,
   253→)
   254→
   255→export const CodeBlockNode = headlessDecorator(
   256→  'code-block',
   257→  ['code', 'language'],
   258→  { code: '', language: '' },
   259→)
   260→
   261→export const FootnoteNode = headlessDecorator(
   262→  'footnote',
   263→  ['identifier'],
   264→  { identifier: '' },
   265→  true,
   266→)
   267→
   268→export const FootnoteSectionNode = headlessDecorator(
   269→  'footnote-section',
   270→  ['definitions'],
   271→  { definitions: {} },
   272→)
   273→
   274→export const EmbedNode = headlessDecorator('embed', ['url', 'source'], {
   275→  url: '',
   276→  source: null,
   277→})
   278→
   279→export const CodeSnippetNode = headlessDecorator('code-snippet', ['files'], {
   280→  files: [],
   281→})
   282→
   283→export const GalleryNode = headlessDecorator('gallery', ['images', 'layout'], {
   284→  images: [],
   285→  layout: 'grid',
   286→})
   287→
   288→export const TldrawNode = headlessDecorator('tldraw', ['snapshot'], {
   289→  snapshot: '',
   290→})
   291→
   292→// ── Nested content nodes ──
   293→
   294→export class BannerNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   295→  __bannerType = 'note'
   296→  __contentState: unknown = null
   297→
   298→  static getType(): string {
   299→    return 'banner'
   300→  }
   301→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   302→    super(key)
   303→  }
   304→  static clone(node: BannerNode): BannerNode {
   305→    const n = new BannerNode((node as any).__key)
   306→    n.__bannerType = node.__bannerType
   307→    n.__contentState = node.__contentState
   308→    return n
   309→  }
   310→  static importJSON(
   311→    json: SerializedLexicalNode & {
   312→      bannerType?: string
   313→      content?: unknown
   314→    },
   315→  ): BannerNode {
   316→    const node = new BannerNode()
   317→    node.__bannerType = json.bannerType ?? 'note'
   318→    node.__contentState = json.content ?? null
   319→    return node
   320→  }
   321→  exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode {
   322→    return {
   323→      type: 'banner',
   324→      version: 1,
   325→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   326→      content: this.__contentState,
   327→    } as SerializedLexicalNode
   328→  }
   329→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   330→    return stubDOM()
   331→  }
   332→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   333→    return false
   334→  }
   335→  decorate(): null {
   336→    return null
   337→  }
   338→  getTextContent(): string {
   339→    return extractText(this.__contentState)
   340→  }
   341→}
   342→
   343→export class AlertQuoteNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   344→  __alertType = 'note'
   345→  __contentState: unknown = null
   346→
   347→  static getType(): string {
   348→    return 'alert-quote'
   349→  }
   350→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   351→    super(key)
   352→  }
   353→  static clone(node: AlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   354→    const n = new AlertQuoteNode((node as any).__key)
   355→    n.__alertType = node.__alertType
   356→    n.__contentState = node.__contentState
   357→    return n
   358→  }
   359→  static importJSON(
   360→    json: SerializedLexicalNode & {
   361→      alertType?: string
   362→      content?: unknown
   363→    },
   364→  ): AlertQuoteNode {
   365→    const node = new AlertQuoteNode()
   366→    node.__alertType = json.alertType ?? 'note'
   367→    node.__contentState = json.content ?? null
   368→    return node
   369→  }
   370→  exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode {
   371→    return {
   372→      type: 'alert-quote',
   373→      version: 1,
   374→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   375→      content: this.__contentState,
   376→    } as SerializedLexicalNode
   377→  }
   378→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   379→    return stubDOM()
   380→  }
   381→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   382→    return false
   383→  }
   384→  decorate(): null {
   385→    return null
   386→  }
   387→  getTextContent(): string {
   388→    return extractText(this.__contentState)
   389→  }
   390→}
   391→
   392→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   393→  __cols = 2
   394→  __gap = '16px'
   395→  __cells: unknown[] = []
   396→
   397→  static getType(): string {
   398→    return 'grid-container'
   399→  }
   400→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   401→    super(key)
   402→  }
   403→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
   404→    const n = new GridContainerNode((node as any).__key)
   405→    n.__cols = node.__cols
   406→    n.__gap = node.__gap
   407→    n.__cells = node.__cells
   408→    return n
   409→  }
   410→  static importJSON(
   411→    json: SerializedLexicalNode & {
   412→      cols?: number
   413→      gap?: string | number
   414→      cells?: unknown[]
   415→    },
   416→  ): GridContainerNode {
   417→    const node = new GridContainerNode()
   418→    node.__cols = json.cols ?? 2
   419→    const rawGap = json.gap
   420→    node.__gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : (rawGap ?? '16px')
   421→    node.__cells = json.cells ?? []
   422→    return node
   423→  }
   424→  exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode {
   425→    return {
   426→      type: 'grid-container',
   427→      version: 1,
   428→      cols: this.__cols,
   429→      gap: this.__gap,
   430→      cells: this.__cells,
   431→    } as SerializedLexicalNode
   432→  }
   433→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   434→    return stubDOM()
   435→  }
   436→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   437→    return false
   438→  }
   439→  decorate(): null {
   440→    return null
   441→  }
   442→  getTextContent(): string {
   443→    return this.__cells.map((cell) => extractText(cell)).join('\n')
   444→  }
   445→}
   446→
   447→// ── Aggregate ──
   448→
   449→export const customHeadlessNodes: Klass<LexicalNode>[] = [
   450→  SpoilerNode,
   451→  DetailsNode,
   452→  ImageNode,
   453→  VideoNode,
   454→  LinkCardNode,
   455→  KaTeXInlineNode,
   456→  KaTeXBlockNode,
   457→  MermaidNode,
   458→  MentionNode,
   459→  CodeBlockNode,
   460→  FootnoteNode,
   461→  FootnoteSectionNode,
   462→  EmbedNode,
   463→  CodeSnippetNode,
   464→  GalleryNode,
   465→  TldrawNode,
   466→  BannerNode,
   467→  AlertQuoteNode,
   468→  GridContainerNode,
   469→]
   470→
   471→export const allHeadlessNodes: Klass<LexicalNode>[] = [
   472→  ...builtinNodes,
   473→  ...customHeadlessNodes,
   474→]
   475→
   476→// ── Transformers (Lexical → Markdown) ──
   477→
   478→export { $toMarkdown,allHeadlessTransformers } from './transformers'
   479→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 08:39:37Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/vite.shared.ts`

```text
     1→import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'
     2→import { resolve } from 'node:path'
     3→
     4→import type { UserConfig } from 'vite'
     5→
     6→export interface SharedViteOptions {
     7→  entry?: string | Record<string, string>
     8→  vanillaExtract?: boolean
     9→  esbuild?: { jsx: string; jsxImportSource: string }
    10→}
    11→
    12→const BASE_EXTERNALS = ['react', 'react-dom', 'react/jsx-runtime']
    13→
    14→export async function createViteConfig(
    15→  options: SharedViteOptions = {},
    16→): Promise<UserConfig> {
    17→  const { entry = 'src/index.ts', vanillaExtract = true, esbuild } = options
    18→
    19→  const dts = (await import('vite-plugin-dts')).default
    20→  const plugins: UserConfig['plugins'] = []
    21→
    22→  if (vanillaExtract) {
    23→    const { vanillaExtractPlugin } =
    24→      await import('@vanilla-extract/vite-plugin')
    25→    plugins.push(vanillaExtractPlugin())
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  plugins.push(
    29→    dts({ entryRoot: 'src', outDir: 'dist', tsconfigPath: './tsconfig.json' }),
    30→  )
    31→
    32→  const cwd = process.cwd()
    33→  const isMap = typeof entry !== 'string'
    34→  const libEntry = isMap
    35→    ? Object.fromEntries(
    36→        Object.entries(entry).map(([k, v]) => [k, resolve(cwd, v)]),
    37→      )
    38→    : resolve(cwd, entry)
    39→
    40→  const fileName = isMap
    41→    ? (_: string, name: string) => `${name}.mjs`
    42→    : () => 'index.mjs'
    43→
    44→  const pkg = JSON.parse(readFileSync(resolve(cwd, 'package.json'), 'utf-8'))
    45→  const depNames = new Set([
    46→    ...BASE_EXTERNALS,
    47→    ...Object.keys(pkg.dependencies || {}),
    48→    ...Object.keys(pkg.peerDependencies || {}),
    49→  ])
    50→
    51→  const rollupExternal = (id: string) => {
    52→    if (id[0] === '.' || id[0] === '/' || id[0] === '\0') return false
    53→    if (depNames.has(id)) return true
    54→    const slashIdx = id.indexOf('/')
    55→    if (slashIdx > 0) {
    56→      const pkgName =
    57→        id[0] === '@'
    58→          ? id.slice(0, id.indexOf('/', slashIdx + 1))
    59→          : id.slice(0, slashIdx)
    60→      return pkgName ? depNames.has(pkgName) : false
    61→    }
    62→    return false
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  return {
    66→    plugins,
    67→    ...(esbuild && { esbuild }),
    68→    build: {
    69→      lib: { entry: libEntry, formats: ['es'], fileName },
    70→      rollupOptions: {
    71→        external: rollupExternal,
    72→        output: { preserveModules: false },
    73→      },
    74→      cssCodeSplit: false,
    75→      minify: false,
    76→      cssMinify: true,
    77→      target: 'es2020',
    78→    },
    79→  }
    80→}
    81→
```
</details></tool-use>
