_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 08:42:02Z)**_

Now let me explore the FootnotePlugin (the client-side footnote processing), the RichRenderer component, and the existing renderers.

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 08:42:02Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/FootnotePlugin.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { $getRoot, $nodesOfType } from 'lexical'
     3→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { FootnoteDefinitionsProvider } from '../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     6→import { FootnoteNode } from '../nodes/FootnoteNode'
     7→import {
     8→  $createFootnoteSectionNode,
     9→  FootnoteSectionNode,
    10→} from '../nodes/FootnoteSectionNode'
    11→
    12→export function FootnotePlugin({ children }: { children?: React.ReactNode }) {
    13→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    14→  const [definitions, setDefinitions] = useState<Record<string, string>>({})
    15→  const [displayNumberMap, setDisplayNumberMap] = useState<
    16→    Record<string, number>
    17→  >({})
    18→
    19→  useEffect(() => {
    20→    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    21→      editorState.read(() => {
    22→        const footnoteNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)
    23→        const seen = new Set<string>()
    24→        const numberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
    25→        let counter = 1
    26→        for (const node of footnoteNodes) {
    27→          const id = node.getIdentifier()
    28→          if (!seen.has(id)) {
    29→            seen.add(id)
    30→            numberMap[id] = counter++
    31→          }
    32→        }
    33→        setDisplayNumberMap(numberMap)
    34→
    35→        const sectionNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    36→
    37→        if (footnoteNodes.length === 0 && sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    38→          editor.update(() => {
    39→            const sections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    40→            for (const s of sections) s.remove()
    41→          })
    42→          setDefinitions({})
    43→          return
    44→        }
    45→
    46→        if (footnoteNodes.length > 0 && sectionNodes.length === 0) {
    47→          editor.update(() => {
    48→            const root = $getRoot()
    49→            const defs: Record<string, string> = {}
    50→            for (const id of seen) {
    51→              defs[id] = ''
    52→            }
    53→            const section = $createFootnoteSectionNode(defs)
    54→            root.append(section)
    55→          })
    56→        } else if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    57→          const existingDefs = sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions()
    58→          const missingIds = [...seen].filter((id) => !(id in existingDefs))
    59→          if (missingIds.length > 0) {
    60→            editor.update(() => {
    61→              const freshSections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    62→              if (freshSections.length > 0) {
    63→                for (const id of missingIds) {
    64→                  freshSections[0].setDefinition(id, '')
    65→                }
    66→              }
    67→            })
    68→          }
    69→        }
    70→
    71→        if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    72→          setDefinitions(sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions())
    73→        } else {
    74→          setDefinitions({})
    75→        }
    76→      })
    77→    })
    78→  }, [editor])
    79→
    80→  return (
    81→    <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
    82→      definitions={definitions}
    83→      displayNumberMap={displayNumberMap}
    84→    >
    85→      {children}
    86→    </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
    87→  )
    88→}
    89→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 08:42:03Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="search" data-tool-name="Glob"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Glob**</summary>
 path `./packages/rich-editor` pattern `**/components/RichRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→import { LexicalComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposer'
     3→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     4→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     5→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     6→
     7→import { allNodes } from '../config'
     8→import { ColorSchemeProvider } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
     9→import { RendererConfigProvider } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
    10→import { FootnotePlugin } from '../plugins/FootnotePlugin'
    11→import { HeadingAnchorPlugin } from '../plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin'
    12→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    13→import type { RichRendererProps } from '../types'
    14→import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'
    15→
    16→export function RichRenderer({
    17→  value,
    18→  variant = 'article',
    19→  theme = 'light',
    20→  className,
    21→  style,
    22→  as: Component = 'div',
    23→  rendererConfig,
    24→  extraNodes,
    25→}: RichRendererProps) {
    26→  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
    27→
    28→  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
    29→
    30→  const initialConfig = {
    31→    namespace: 'RichRenderer',
    32→    theme: editorTheme,
    33→    nodes,
    34→    editable: false,
    35→    editorState: JSON.stringify(value),
    36→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    37→      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
    38→    },
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  return (
    42→    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
    43→      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
    44→        <RendererConfigProvider
    45→          config={rendererConfig}
    46→          mode="renderer"
    47→          variant={variant}
    48→        >
    49→          <Component
    50→            className={clsx('rich-content', variantClass, className)}
    51→            style={style}
    52→            data-theme={theme}
    53→          >
    54→            <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    55→              <FootnotePlugin>
    56→                <RichTextPlugin
    57→                  contentEditable={
    58→                    <ContentEditable
    59→                      className="rich-content__body"
    60→                      style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    61→                      aria-placeholder=""
    62→                      placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    63→                    />
    64→                  }
    65→                  ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    66→                />
    67→                <HeadingAnchorPlugin />
    68→              </FootnotePlugin>
    69→            </LexicalComposer>
    70→          </Component>
    71→        </RendererConfigProvider>
    72→      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    73→    </PortalThemeProvider>
    74→  )
    75→}
    76→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import {
     2→  TooltipContent,
     3→  TooltipRoot,
     4→  TooltipTrigger,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     6→import type { HTMLAttributes, MouseEvent } from 'react'
     7→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import {
    10→  useFootnoteContent,
    11→  useFootnoteDisplayNumber,
    12→} from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
    13→
    14→export interface FootnoteRendererProps {
    15→  identifier: string
    16→}
    17→
    18→export function FootnoteRenderer({ identifier }: FootnoteRendererProps) {
    19→  const content = useFootnoteContent(identifier)
    20→  const displayNumber = useFootnoteDisplayNumber(identifier)
    21→
    22→  const referenceId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    23→  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    24→
    25→  const handleClick = useCallback(
    26→    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    27→      const target =
    28→        document.getElementById(targetId) ||
    29→        document.getElementById(`fn-${identifier}`)
    30→      if (!target) return
    31→
    32→      e.preventDefault()
    33→      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    34→      target.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    35→
    36→      window.setTimeout(() => {
    37→        target.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    38→      }, 1200)
    39→    },
    40→    [identifier, targetId],
    41→  )
    42→
    43→  const label = displayNumber ?? identifier
    44→
    45→  return (
    46→    <span className="rich-footnote-ref-wrapper">
    47→      <TooltipRoot>
    48→        <TooltipTrigger
    49→          render={(props: HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>) => (
    50→            <a
    51→              {...props}
    52→              className="rich-footnote-ref"
    53→              href={`#${targetId}`}
    54→              id={referenceId}
    55→              role="doc-noteref"
    56→              aria-label={
    57→                content ? `Footnote ${label}: ${content}` : `Footnote ${label}`
    58→              }
    59→              onClick={handleClick}
    60→              data-footnote-ref={identifier}
    61→            >
    62→              {label}
    63→            </a>
    64→          )}
    65→        />
    66→        {content ? <TooltipContent>{content}</TooltipContent> : null}
    67→      </TooltipRoot>
    68→    </span>
    69→  )
    70→}
    71→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteSectionRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { MouseEvent } from 'react'
     2→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useFootnoteDefinitions } from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     5→
     6→export interface FootnoteSectionRendererProps {
     7→  definitions: Record<string, string>
     8→  nodeKey: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function FootnoteSectionRenderer({
    12→  definitions,
    13→}: FootnoteSectionRendererProps) {
    14→  const { displayNumberMap } = useFootnoteDefinitions()
    15→
    16→  const sortedEntries = Object.entries(definitions).sort(
    17→    ([a], [b]) => (displayNumberMap[a] ?? 0) - (displayNumberMap[b] ?? 0),
    18→  )
    19→
    20→  if (sortedEntries.length === 0) return null
    21→
    22→  return (
    23→    <div className="rich-footnote-section-content" role="doc-endnotes">
    24→      <hr className="rich-footnote-section-divider" />
    25→      <ol className="rich-footnote-section-list">
    26→        {sortedEntries.map(([identifier, content]) => {
    27→          const displayNum = displayNumberMap[identifier] ?? identifier
    28→          return (
    29→            <FootnoteSectionItem
    30→              key={identifier}
    31→              identifier={identifier}
    32→              content={content}
    33→              displayNum={displayNum}
    34→            />
    35→          )
    36→        })}
    37→      </ol>
    38→    </div>
    39→  )
    40→}
    41→
    42→function FootnoteSectionItem({
    43→  identifier,
    44→  content,
    45→  displayNum,
    46→}: {
    47→  identifier: string
    48→  content: string
    49→  displayNum: number | string
    50→}) {
    51→  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    52→  const refId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    53→
    54→  const handleBackClick = useCallback(
    55→    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    56→      e.preventDefault()
    57→      const refElement = document.getElementById(refId)
    58→      if (!refElement) return
    59→      refElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    60→      refElement.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    61→      window.setTimeout(() => {
    62→        refElement.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    63→      }, 1200)
    64→    },
    65→    [refId],
    66→  )
    67→
    68→  return (
    69→    <li
    70→      id={targetId}
    71→      className="rich-footnote-section-item"
    72→      value={typeof displayNum === 'number' ? displayNum : undefined}
    73→    >
    74→      <span className="rich-footnote-section-item-content">{content}</span>
    75→      <a
    76→        href={`#${refId}`}
    77→        onClick={handleBackClick}
    78→        className="rich-footnote-back-ref"
    79→        role="doc-backlink"
    80→        aria-label={`Back to reference ${displayNum}`}
    81→      >
    82→        ↩
    83→      </a>
    84→    </li>
    85→  )
    86→}
    87→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import {
     2→  Info,
     3→  Lightbulb,
     4→  MessageSquareWarning,
     5→  OctagonAlert,
     6→  TriangleAlert,
     7→} from 'lucide-react'
     8→import type { FC } from 'react'
     9→
    10→import type { AlertType } from '../../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    11→import { ALERT_LABELS } from '../../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    12→
    13→export interface AlertRendererProps {
    14→  type: AlertType
    15→  editable?: boolean
    16→  onTypeChange?: (type: AlertType) => void
    17→}
    18→
    19→const InfoIcon = () => <Info size={16} />
    20→const LightbulbIcon = () => <Lightbulb size={16} />
    21→const MessageWarningIcon = () => <MessageSquareWarning size={16} />
    22→const TriangleAlertIcon = () => <TriangleAlert size={16} />
    23→const OctagonAlertIcon = () => <OctagonAlert size={16} />
    24→
    25→const ALERT_ICONS: Record<AlertType, FC> = {
    26→  note: InfoIcon,
    27→  tip: LightbulbIcon,
    28→  important: MessageWarningIcon,
    29→  warning: TriangleAlertIcon,
    30→  caution: OctagonAlertIcon,
    31→}
    32→
    33→export const AlertRenderer: FC<AlertRendererProps> = ({ type }) => {
    34→  const Icon = ALERT_ICONS[type]
    35→
    36→  return (
    37→    <div className={`rich-alert-header rich-alert-header-${type}`}>
    38→      <span className="rich-alert-icon">
    39→        <Icon />
    40→      </span>
    41→      <span className="rich-alert-label">{ALERT_LABELS[type]}</span>
    42→    </div>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/ImageRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { decodeThumbHash } from '../../utils/thumbhash'
     4→
     5→export interface ImageRendererProps {
     6→  src: string
     7→  altText: string
     8→  width?: number
     9→  height?: number
    10→  caption?: string
    11→  thumbhash?: string
    12→  accent?: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export function ImageRenderer({
    16→  src,
    17→  altText,
    18→  width,
    19→  height,
    20→  caption,
    21→  thumbhash,
    22→  accent,
    23→}: ImageRendererProps) {
    24→  const [loaded, setLoaded] = useState(false)
    25→  const [zoomed, setZoomed] = useState(false)
    26→
    27→  const handleLoad = useCallback(() => setLoaded(true), [])
    28→
    29→  const handleZoomOpen = useCallback(() => {
    30→    if (!loaded) return
    31→    setZoomed(true)
    32→  }, [loaded])
    33→
    34→  const handleZoomClose = useCallback(() => setZoomed(false), [])
    35→
    36→  useEffect(() => {
    37→    if (!zoomed) return
    38→    const onKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
    39→      if (e.key === 'Escape') setZoomed(false)
    40→    }
    41→    document.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    42→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    43→  }, [zoomed])
    44→
    45→  useEffect(() => {
    46→    if (!zoomed) return
    47→    const prev = document.body.style.overflow
    48→    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'
    49→    return () => {
    50→      document.body.style.overflow = prev
    51→    }
    52→  }, [zoomed])
    53→
    54→  const handleContainerKeyDown = useCallback(
    55→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    56→      if ((e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') && loaded) {
    57→        e.preventDefault()
    58→        setZoomed(true)
    59→      }
    60→    },
    61→    [loaded],
    62→  )
    63→
    64→  const placeholderUrl = useMemo(
    65→    () => (thumbhash ? decodeThumbHash(thumbhash) : undefined),
    66→    [thumbhash],
    67→  )
    68→
    69→  const aspectStyle: React.CSSProperties =
    70→    width && height
    71→      ? { aspectRatio: `${width} / ${height}`, maxWidth: '100%', width }
    72→      : { maxWidth: '100%' }
    73→
    74→  return (
    75→    <figure className="rich-image">
    76→      <div
    77→        className={`rich-image-container${loaded ? ' rich-image-loaded' : ''}`}
    78→        style={{
    79→          ...aspectStyle,
    80→          backgroundColor: !loaded && !placeholderUrl ? accent : undefined,
    81→          backgroundImage:
    82→            !loaded && placeholderUrl ? `url(${placeholderUrl})` : undefined,
    83→          backgroundSize: 'cover',
    84→          cursor: loaded ? 'zoom-in' : undefined,
    85→        }}
    86→        onClick={handleZoomOpen}
    87→        onKeyDown={handleContainerKeyDown}
    88→        role="button"
    89→        tabIndex={loaded ? 0 : -1}
    90→        aria-label={loaded ? `Zoom image: ${altText}` : undefined}
    91→      >
    92→        <img
    93→          src={src}
    94→          alt={altText}
    95→          width={width}
    96→          height={height}
    97→          loading="lazy"
    98→          onLoad={handleLoad}
    99→          style={{ maxWidth: '100%', height: 'auto' }}
   100→          className={loaded ? 'rich-image-visible' : 'rich-image-hidden'}
   101→        />
   102→      </div>
   103→      {caption && <figcaption>{caption}</figcaption>}
   104→
   105→      {zoomed && (
   106→        <div
   107→          className="rich-image-zoom-overlay"
   108→          onClick={handleZoomClose}
   109→          role="dialog"
   110→          aria-modal="true"
   111→          aria-label={`Zoomed image: ${altText}`}
   112→          tabIndex={0}
   113→        >
   114→          <img src={src} alt={altText} className="rich-image-zoom-img" />
   115→        </div>
   116→      )}
   117→    </figure>
   118→  )
   119→}
   120→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/RendererWrapper.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { ComponentType, ReactElement } from 'react'
     2→import { createElement } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useRendererConfig } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6→
     7→export type RendererKey = keyof RendererConfig
     8→
     9→type RendererPropsByKey = {
    10→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]> extends ComponentType<
    11→    infer P extends object
    12→  >
    13→    ? P
    14→    : never
    15→}
    16→
    17→type RendererComponentByKey = {
    18→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<
    19→    RendererConfig[K]
    20→  > extends ComponentType<any>
    21→    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    22→    : never
    23→}
    24→
    25→export type RendererWrapperProps = {
    26→  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    27→    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    28→    rendererKey: K
    29→    /** Default renderer component */
    30→    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    31→    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    32→    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
    33→  }
    34→}[RendererKey]
    35→
    36→/**
    37→ * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
    38→ * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
    39→ */
    40→export function RendererWrapper({
    41→  rendererKey,
    42→  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
    43→  props,
    44→}: RendererWrapperProps) {
    45→  const config = useRendererConfig()
    46→  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer
    47→
    48→  return <Renderer {...props} />
    49→}
    50→
    51→/**
    52→ * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
    53→ * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
    54→ */
    55→export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
    56→  rendererKey: K,
    57→  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
    58→  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
    59→): ReactElement {
    60→  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    61→    rendererKey,
    62→    defaultRenderer,
    63→    props,
    64→  } as RendererWrapperProps)
    65→}
    66→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    14→}
    15→
    16→export function BannerReadOnlyDecorator({
    17→  bannerType,
    18→  contentEditor,
    19→}: BannerReadOnlyDecoratorProps) {
    20→  return (
    21→    <div className="rich-banner-inner">
    22→      <RendererWrapper
    23→        rendererKey="Banner"
    24→        defaultRenderer={BannerRenderer}
    25→        props={{ type: bannerType }}
    26→      />
    27→      <div className="rich-banner-content">
    28→        <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={contentEditor}>
    29→          <RichTextPlugin
    30→            contentEditable={
    31→              <ContentEditable
    32→                className="rich-banner-content-editable"
    33→                style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    34→                aria-placeholder=""
    35→                placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    36→              />
    37→            }
    38→            ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    39→          />
    40→        </LexicalNestedComposer>
    41→      </div>
    42→    </div>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     2→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     3→import { LexicalNestedComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalNestedComposer'
     4→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     5→import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     6→
     7→interface GridReadOnlyDecoratorProps {
     8→  cols: number
     9→  gap: string
    10→  cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    11→}
    12→
    13→export function GridReadOnlyDecorator({
    14→  cols,
    15→  gap,
    16→  cellEditors,
    17→}: GridReadOnlyDecoratorProps) {
    18→  return (
    19→    <div
    20→      className="rich-grid-inner"
    21→      style={{
    22→        display: 'grid',
    23→        gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)`,
    24→        gap,
    25→      }}
    26→    >
    27→      {cellEditors.map((editor, i) => (
    28→        <div key={i} className="rich-grid-cell">
    29→          <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={editor}>
    30→            <RichTextPlugin
    31→              contentEditable={
    32→                <ContentEditable
    33→                  className="rich-grid-cell-editable"
    34→                  style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    35→                  aria-placeholder=""
    36→                  placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    37→                />
    38→              }
    39→              ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    40→            />
    41→          </LexicalNestedComposer>
    42→        </div>
    43→      ))}
    44→    </div>
    45→  )
    46→}
    47→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { RichRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     3→import {
     4→  codeSnippetNodes,
     5→  embedNodes,
     6→  enhancedRendererConfig,
     7→  galleryNodes,
     8→  TldrawNode,
     9→} from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
    10→import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { useMemo } from 'react'
    12→
    13→const defaultExtraNodes = [
    14→  TldrawNode,
    15→  ...embedNodes,
    16→  ...galleryNodes,
    17→  ...codeSnippetNodes,
    18→]
    19→
    20→export interface ShiroRendererProps extends Omit<
    21→  RichRendererProps,
    22→  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
    23→> {
    24→  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function ShiroRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroRendererProps) {
    28→  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    29→    () =>
    30→      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    31→    [extraNodes],
    32→  )
    33→
    34→  return (
    35→    <RichRenderer
    36→      {...props}
    37→      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    38→      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    39→    />
    40→  )
    41→}
    42→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 08:42:51Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/CodeBlockRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useColorScheme } from '../../context/ColorSchemeContext'
     4→import { useVariant } from '../../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { CodeToHtmlFn } from '../../utils/shiki'
     6→import { loadCodeToHtml } from '../../utils/shiki'
     7→
     8→export interface CodeBlockRendererProps {
     9→  code: string
    10→  language: string
    11→  showLineNumbers?: boolean
    12→  editable?: boolean
    13→  onCodeChange?: (code: string) => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export function CodeBlockRenderer({
    17→  code,
    18→  language,
    19→  showLineNumbers: showLineNumbersProp,
    20→}: CodeBlockRendererProps) {
    21→  const variant = useVariant()
    22→  const showLineNumbers = showLineNumbersProp ?? variant !== 'comment'
    23→  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    24→  const shikiTheme = colorScheme === 'dark' ? 'github-dark' : 'github-light'
    25→  const [highlightedHtml, setHighlightedHtml] = useState<string | null>(null)
    26→  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false)
    27→  const copyTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    28→
    29→  useEffect(() => {
    30→    let cancelled = false
    31→    setHighlightedHtml(null)
    32→
    33→    loadCodeToHtml()
    34→      .then((toHtml: CodeToHtmlFn) =>
    35→        toHtml(code, {
    36→          lang: language,
    37→          theme: shikiTheme,
    38→        }),
    39→      )
    40→      .then((html: string) => {
    41→        if (!cancelled) {
    42→          setHighlightedHtml(html)
    43→        }
    44→      })
    45→      .catch(() => {
    46→        if (!cancelled) {
    47→          setHighlightedHtml(null)
    48→        }
    49→      })
    50→
    51→    return () => {
    52→      cancelled = true
    53→    }
    54→  }, [code, language, shikiTheme])
    55→
    56→  useEffect(() => {
    57→    return () => clearTimeout(copyTimerRef.current)
    58→  }, [])
    59→
    60→  const handleCopy = useCallback(() => {
    61→    navigator.clipboard
    62→      .writeText(code)
    63→      .then(() => {
    64→        setCopied(true)
    65→        clearTimeout(copyTimerRef.current)
    66→        copyTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000)
    67→      })
    68→      .catch(() => {})
    69→  }, [code])
    70→
    71→  const header = language ? (
    72→    <div className="rich-code-block-header">
    73→      <span className="rich-code-block-lang">{language}</span>
    74→      <button
    75→        type="button"
    76→        className="rich-code-block-copy"
    77→        onClick={handleCopy}
    78→        aria-label={copied ? 'Copied to clipboard' : 'Copy code'}
    79→      >
    80→        {copied ? 'Copied' : 'Copy'}
    81→      </button>
    82→    </div>
    83→  ) : null
    84→
    85→  const wrapperClass = showLineNumbers
    86→    ? 'rich-code-block rich-code-block-numbered'
    87→    : 'rich-code-block'
    88→
    89→  if (highlightedHtml) {
    90→    return (
    91→      <div className={wrapperClass}>
    92→        {header}
    93→        <div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: highlightedHtml }} />
    94→      </div>
    95→    )
    96→  }
    97→
    98→  const lines = code.split('\n')
    99→  return (
   100→    <div className={wrapperClass}>
   101→      {header}
   102→      <pre>
   103→        <code>
   104→          {lines.map((line, i) => (
   105→            <span key={i} className="line">
   106→              {line}
   107→              {i < lines.length - 1 ? '\n' : ''}
   108→            </span>
   109→          ))}
   110→        </code>
   111→      </pre>
   112→    </div>
   113→  )
   114→}
   115→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 08:42:51Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/KaTeXRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export interface KaTeXRendererProps {
     4→  equation: string
     5→  displayMode: boolean
     6→}
     7→
     8→type KaTeXModule = {
     9→  default: {
    10→    renderToString: (
    11→      eq: string,
    12→      opts: { displayMode: boolean; throwOnError: boolean },
    13→    ) => string
    14→  }
    15→}
    16→let katexModule: KaTeXModule | null = null
    17→let katexLoadPromise: Promise<KaTeXModule> | null = null
    18→
    19→function loadKaTeX(): Promise<KaTeXModule> {
    20→  if (katexModule) return Promise.resolve(katexModule)
    21→  if (!katexLoadPromise) {
    22→    katexLoadPromise = import('katex').then((mod) => {
    23→      katexModule = mod as unknown as KaTeXModule
    24→      return katexModule
    25→    })
    26→  }
    27→  return katexLoadPromise
    28→}
    29→
    30→export function KaTeXRenderer({ equation, displayMode }: KaTeXRendererProps) {
    31→  const [html, setHtml] = useState<string | null>(null)
    32→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
    33→
    34→  useEffect(() => {
    35→    let cancelled = false
    36→
    37→    loadKaTeX()
    38→      .then((katex) => {
    39→        if (cancelled) return
    40→        const rendered = katex.default.renderToString(equation, {
    41→          displayMode,
    42→          throwOnError: false,
    43→        })
    44→        setHtml(rendered)
    45→        setError(null)
    46→      })
    47→      .catch(() => {
    48→        if (cancelled) return
    49→        setHtml(null)
    50→        setError('KaTeX is not available')
    51→      })
    52→
    53→    return () => {
    54→      cancelled = true
    55→    }
    56→  }, [equation, displayMode])
    57→
    58→  if (error) {
    59→    return <code className="rich-katex-fallback">{equation}</code>
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  if (html) {
    63→    return (
    64→      <span
    65→        className={displayMode ? 'rich-katex-block' : 'rich-katex-inline'}
    66→        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: html }}
    67→      />
    68→    )
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  return <code className="rich-katex-fallback">{equation}</code>
    72→}
    73→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    11→export function LinkCardRenderer({
    12→  url,
    13→  title,
    14→  description,
    15→  favicon,
    16→  image,
    17→}: LinkCardRendererProps) {

    19→
    20→  return (

    25→      rel="noopener noreferrer"
    26→    >

    28→        <span className="rich-link-card-image">
    29→          <img src={image} alt="" loading="lazy" />
    30→        </span>

    34→          {favicon && (

    37→              src={favicon}
    38→              alt=""
    39→              width={16}
    40→              height={16}
    41→              onError={(e) => {
    42→                ;(e.target as HTMLImageElement).style.display = 'none'
    43→              }}
    44→            />
    45→          )}
    46→          {displayTitle}
    47→        </span>
    48→        {description && (
    49→          <span className="rich-link-card-description">{description}</span>
    50→        )}
    51→        <span className="rich-link-card-url">{url}</span>
    52→      </span>
    53→    </a>
    54→  )
    55→}
    56→
```

```text
    18→  },

    20→>
    21→
    22→export class FootnoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {

    24→
    25→  static getType(): string {
    26→    return 'footnote'

    28→

    32→

    35→    this.__identifier = identifier
    36→  }
    37→

    39→    const sup = document.createElement('sup')
    40→    sup.className = 'rich-footnote'

    44→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    45→    return false
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  isInline(): boolean {
    49→    return true
    50→  }

    53→    return $createFootnoteNode(serializedNode.identifier)

    55→
    56→  exportJSON(): SerializedFootnoteNode {
    57→    return {
    58→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    59→      type: 'footnote',
    60→      identifier: this.__identifier,
    61→      version: 1,
    62→    }
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  getIdentifier(): string {
    66→    return this.getLatest().__identifier
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  setIdentifier(identifier: string): void {
    70→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    71→    writable.__identifier = identifier
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    75→    return createRendererDecoration('Footnote', FootnoteRenderer, {
    76→      identifier: this.__identifier,
    77→    })
    78→  }
    79→}
    80→
    81→export function $createFootnoteNode(identifier: string): FootnoteNode {
    82→  return new FootnoteNode(identifier)
    83→}
    84→
    85→export function $isFootnoteNode(
    86→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
```

```text
    21→
    22→export class FootnoteSectionNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {

    24→
    25→  static getType(): string {

    31→  }

    35→    this.__definitions = definitions
    36→  }

    72→    const writable = this.getWritable()

    74→  }
    75→
    76→  getDefinition(identifier: string): string | undefined {
    77→    return this.getLatest().__definitions[identifier]
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  setDefinition(identifier: string, content: string): void {
    81→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    82→    writable.__definitions = {
    83→      ...writable.__definitions,
    84→      [identifier]: content,
    85→    }
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  removeDefinition(identifier: string): void {
    89→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    90→    const { [identifier]: _, ...rest } = writable.__definitions
    91→    writable.__definitions = rest
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    95→    return createRendererDecoration(

   101→      },

   103→  }
   104→}

   108→): FootnoteSectionNode {

   110→}

   112→export function $isFootnoteSectionNode(
   113→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   114→): node is FootnoteSectionNode {
   115→  return node instanceof FootnoteSectionNode
   116→}
```

 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style.css'
     4→
     5→import type {
     6→  LinkCardFetchContext,
     7→  RichEditorVariant,
     8→} from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro'
     9→import { createThemeStyle, LinkCardFetchProvider } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro'
    10→import { IsolateRenderer as ShiroRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderer'
    11→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
    12→import { useMemo } from 'react'
    13→
    14→import { useIsDark } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-dark'
    15→import { fetchGitHubApi } from '~/lib/github'
    16→
    17→// Mirror @theme inline font values into shadow root (Tailwind v4 @theme inline does not emit CSS vars)
    18→const fontVarsCss = `:host{--font-sans:var(--app-font-sans),system-ui,-apple-system,'PingFang SC','Microsoft YaHei','Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,'noto sans sc','hiragino sans gb','sans-serif',Apple Color Emoji,Segoe UI Emoji,Not Color Emoji;--font-serif:'Noto Serif CJK SC','Noto Serif SC',var(--app-font-serif),'Source Han Serif SC','Source Han Serif',source-han-serif-sc,SongTi SC,SimSum,'Hiragino Sans GB',system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,'Microsoft YaHei','WenQuanYi Micro Hei',sans-serif;--font-mono:'OperatorMonoSSmLig Nerd Font','Cascadia Code PL','FantasqueSansMono Nerd Font','operator mono',JetBrainsMono,'Fira code Retina','Fira code','Consolas',Monaco,'Hannotate SC',monospace,-apple-system}`
    19→
    20→const linkCardFetchContext: LinkCardFetchContext = {
    21→  adapters: {
    22→    github: {
    23→      request: fetchGitHubApi,
    24→    },
    25→    tmdb: {
    26→      request: (url) => {
    27→        const u = new URL(url)
    28→        const path = u.pathname.replace(/^\/3\//, '')
    29→        return fetch(`/api/tmdb/${path}${u.search}`).then((r) => r.json())
    30→      },
    31→    },
    32→    bangumi: {
    33→      request: (url) => {
    34→        const u = new URL(url)
    35→        const path = u.pathname.replace(/^\/v0\//, '')
    36→        return fetch(`/api/bangumi/${path}`).then((r) => r.json())
    37→      },
    38→    },
    39→    leetcode: {
    40→      request: (_url, init) => {
    41→        return fetch('/api/leetcode', init).then((r) => r.json())
    42→      },
    43→    },
    44→    'netease-music': {
    45→      request: (url) => {
    46→        const songId = new URL(url).pathname.split('/').pop()
    47→        return fetch('/api/music/netease', {
    48→          method: 'POST',
    49→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    50→          body: JSON.stringify({ songId }),
    51→        }).then((r) => r.json())
    52→      },
    53→    },
    54→    'qq-music': {
    55→      request: (url) => {
    56→        const songId = new URL(url).pathname.split('/').pop()
    57→        return fetch('/api/music/tencent', {
    58→          method: 'POST',
    59→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    60→          body: JSON.stringify({ songId }),
    61→        }).then((r) => r.json())
    62→      },
    63→    },
    64→    'mx-space': {
    65→      request: (path) => {
    66→        return fetch(`/api/v2/${path}`).then((r) => r.json())
    67→      },
    68→    },
    69→  },
    70→}
    71→
    72→export interface LexicalContentProps {
    73→  content: string
    74→  variant?: RichEditorVariant
    75→  className?: string
    76→}
    77→
    78→export function LexicalContent({
    79→  content,
    80→  variant,
    81→  className,
    82→}: LexicalContentProps) {
    83→  const editorState = useMemo<SerializedEditorState | null>(() => {
    84→    try {
    85→      return JSON.parse(content)
    86→    } catch {
    87→      return null
    88→    }
    89→  }, [content])
    90→
    91→  const isDark = useIsDark()
    92→
    93→  const editorOverrideStyle = useMemo(
    94→    () =>
    95→      createThemeStyle({
    96→        color: {
    97→          accent: 'var(--color-accent)',
    98→          link: 'var(--color-accent)',
    99→          accentLight:
   100→            'color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent) 20%, transparent)',
   101→          quoteBorder: 'var(--color-accent)',
   102→        },
   103→        layout: { maxWidth: '100%' },
   104→        typography: {
   105→          fontFamily:
   106→            variant === 'note'
   107→              ? 'var(--note-font-override, var(--font-serif))'
   108→              : 'var(--font-sans)',
   109→          fontFamilySerif: 'var(--font-serif)',
   110→          fontMono: 'var(--font-mono)',
   111→        },
   112→      }),
   113→    [variant],
   114→  )
   115→  if (!editorState) return null
   116→
   117→  return (
   118→    <LinkCardFetchProvider value={linkCardFetchContext}>
   119→      <ShiroRenderer
   120→        value={editorState}
   121→        variant={variant}
   122→        theme={isDark ? 'dark' : 'light'}
   123→        className={className}
   124→        style={editorOverrideStyle}
   125→        extraCss={fontVarsCss}
   126→      />
   127→    </LinkCardFetchProvider>
   128→  )
   129→}
   130→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import {
    12→  Info,
    13→  Lightbulb,
    14→  TriangleAlert as TriangleAlertIcon,
    15→} from 'lucide-react'
    16→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    17→import { createElement } from 'react'
    18→
    19→import { AlertReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/AlertReadOnlyDecorator'
    20→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    21→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    22→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    23→
    24→export type AlertType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'
    25→
    26→export const ALERT_TYPES: AlertType[] = [
    27→  'note',
    28→  'tip',
    29→  'important',
    30→  'warning',
    31→  'caution',
    32→]
    33→
    34→export const ALERT_LABELS: Record<AlertType, string> = {
    35→  note: 'Note',
    36→  tip: 'Tip',
    37→  important: 'Important',
    38→  warning: 'Warning',
    39→  caution: 'Caution',
    40→}
    41→
    42→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    43→  return createEditor({
    44→    namespace: 'AlertContent',
    45→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    46→    theme: editorTheme,
    47→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    48→      console.error('[AlertContent]', error)
    49→    },
    50→  })
    51→}
    52→
    53→export type SerializedAlertQuoteNode = Spread<
    54→  {
    55→    alertType: AlertType
    56→    content: SerializedEditorState
    57→  },
    58→  SerializedLexicalNode
    59→>
    60→
    61→export class AlertQuoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    62→  __alertType: AlertType
    63→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    64→
    65→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    66→    {
    67→      title: 'Callout',
    68→      icon: createElement(Info, { size: 20 }),
    69→      description: 'Info callout block',
    70→      keywords: ['alert', 'note', 'info', 'callout'],
    71→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    72→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    73→        editor.update(() => {
    74→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('note')])
    75→        })
    76→      },
    77→    },
    78→    {
    79→      title: 'Tip',
    80→      icon: createElement(Lightbulb, { size: 20 }),
    81→      description: 'Highlight a useful tip',
    82→      keywords: ['alert', 'tip', 'hint'],
    83→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    84→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    85→        editor.update(() => {
    86→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('tip')])
    87→        })
    88→      },
    89→    },
    90→    {
    91→      title: 'Warning',
    92→      icon: createElement(TriangleAlertIcon, { size: 20 }),
    93→      description: 'Warn about something',
    94→      keywords: ['alert', 'warning', 'caution'],
    95→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    96→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    97→        editor.update(() => {
    98→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('warning')])
    99→        })
   100→      },
   101→    },
   102→  ]
   103→
   104→  static getType(): string {
   105→    return 'alert-quote'
   106→  }
   107→
   108→  static clone(node: AlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   109→    return new AlertQuoteNode(
   110→      node.__alertType,
   111→      node.__contentEditor,
   112→      node.__key,
   113→    )
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  constructor(
   117→    alertType: AlertType,
   118→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   119→    key?: NodeKey,
   120→  ) {
   121→    super(key)
   122→    this.__alertType = alertType
   123→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   127→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   128→    div.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   129→    return div
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  updateDOM(prevNode: AlertQuoteNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   133→    if (prevNode.__alertType !== this.__alertType) {
   134→      dom.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   135→    }
   136→    return false
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  isInline(): boolean {
   140→    return false
   141→  }
   142→
   143→  getAlertType(): AlertType {
   144→    return this.__alertType
   145→  }
   146→
   147→  setAlertType(alertType: AlertType): void {
   148→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   149→    writable.__alertType = alertType
   150→  }
   151→
   152→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   153→    return this.__contentEditor
   154→  }
   155→
   156→  getTextContent(): string {
   157→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   158→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   159→    })
   160→  }
   161→
   162→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedAlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   163→    const node = new AlertQuoteNode(serializedNode.alertType)
   164→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   165→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   166→        serializedNode.content,
   167→      )
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→    return node
   171→  }
   172→
   173→  exportJSON(): SerializedAlertQuoteNode {
   174→    return {
   175→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   176→      type: 'alert-quote',
   177→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   178→      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   179→      version: 1,
   180→    }
   181→  }
   182→
   183→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   184→    return createElement(AlertReadOnlyDecorator, {
   185→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   186→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   187→    })
   188→  }
   189→}
   190→
   191→export function $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType: AlertType): AlertQuoteNode {
   192→  return new AlertQuoteNode(alertType)
   193→}
   194→
   195→export function $isAlertQuoteNode(
   196→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   197→): node is AlertQuoteNode {
   198→  return node instanceof AlertQuoteNode
   199→}
   200→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {

     9→import { ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'
    10→import { createElement } from 'react'
    11→
    12→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    13→import { createLucideSvg } from '../utils/lucide-dom'
    14→
    15→type IconNode = [string, Record<string, string>][]
    16→
    17→const ChevronDownIconNode: IconNode = [['path', { d: 'M6 8L10 12L14 8' }]]
    18→
    19→export type SerializedDetailsNode = Spread<
    20→  {
    21→    summary: string
    22→    open: boolean
    23→  },
    24→  SerializedElementNode
    25→>
    26→
    27→export class DetailsNode extends ElementNode {
    28→  __summary: string
    29→  __open: boolean
    30→
    31→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    32→    {
    33→      title: 'Details',
    34→      icon: createElement(ChevronRight, { size: 20 }),
    35→      description: 'Collapsible content block',
    36→      keywords: ['details', 'toggle', 'collapse', 'accordion'],
    37→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    38→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    39→        editor.update(() => {
    40→          $insertNodes([$createDetailsNode('Details')])
    41→        })
    42→      },
    43→    },
    44→  ]
    45→
    46→  static getType(): string {
    47→    return 'details'
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  static clone(node: DetailsNode): DetailsNode {
    51→    return new DetailsNode(node.__summary, node.__open, node.__key)
    52→  }
    53→
    54→  constructor(summary: string, open = false, key?: NodeKey) {
    55→    super(key)
    56→    this.__summary = summary
    57→    this.__open = open
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    61→    const details = document.createElement('details')
    62→    details.className = 'rich-details'
    63→    if (this.__open) {
    64→      details.open = true
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    const summary = document.createElement('summary')
    68→    summary.className = 'rich-details-summary'
    69→
    70→    const label = document.createElement('span')
    71→    label.className = 'rich-details-summary-text'
    72→    label.textContent = this.__summary
    73→    summary.append(label)
    74→
    75→    const chevron = document.createElement('span')
    76→    chevron.className = 'rich-details-chevron'
    77→    chevron.append(
    78→      createLucideSvg(ChevronDownIconNode, {
    79→        width: '20',
    80→        height: '20',
    81→        viewBox: '0 0 20 20',
    82→        'stroke-width': '1.5',
    83→      }),
    84→    )
    85→    summary.append(chevron)
    86→
    87→    const content = document.createElement('div')
    88→    content.className = 'rich-details-content'
    89→    details.append(summary, content)
    90→
    91→    return details
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  updateDOM(prevNode: DetailsNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
    95→    const details = dom as HTMLDetailsElement
    96→    if (prevNode.__open !== this.__open) {
    97→      details.open = this.__open
    98→    }
    99→    if (prevNode.__summary !== this.__summary) {
   100→      const label = dom.querySelector('.rich-details-summary-text')
   101→      if (label) {
   102→        label.textContent = this.__summary
   103→      }
   104→    }
   105→    return false
   106→  }
   107→
   108→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedDetailsNode): DetailsNode {
   109→    return $createDetailsNode(serializedNode.summary, serializedNode.open)
   110→  }
   111→
   112→  exportJSON(): SerializedDetailsNode {
   113→    return {
   114→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   115→      type: 'details',
   116→      summary: this.__summary,
   117→      open: this.__open,
   118→      version: 1,
   119→    }
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  getSummary(): string {
   123→    return this.getLatest().__summary
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  setSummary(summary: string): void {
   127→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   128→    writable.__summary = summary
   129→  }
   130→
   131→  getOpen(): boolean {
   132→    return this.getLatest().__open
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  setOpen(open: boolean): void {
   136→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   137→    writable.__open = open
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  toggleOpen(): void {
   141→    this.setOpen(!this.getOpen())
   142→  }
   143→
   144→  getDOMSlot(element: HTMLElement) {
   145→    const content = element.querySelector(
   146→      '.rich-details-content',
   147→    ) as HTMLElement
   148→    return super.getDOMSlot(element).withElement(content)
   149→  }
   150→
   151→  isInline(): boolean {
   152→    return false
   153→  }
   154→}
   155→
   156→export function $createDetailsNode(summary: string, open = false): DetailsNode {
   157→  return new DetailsNode(summary, open)
   158→}
   159→
   160→export function $isDetailsNode(
   161→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   162→): node is DetailsNode {
   163→  return node instanceof DetailsNode
   164→}
   165→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/SpoilerNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalNode,
     4→  NodeKey,
     5→  SerializedElementNode,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import { ElementNode } from 'lexical'
     8→
     9→export class SpoilerNode extends ElementNode {
    10→  static getType(): string {
    11→    return 'spoiler'
    12→  }
    13→
    14→  static clone(node: SpoilerNode): SpoilerNode {
    15→    return new SpoilerNode(node.__key)
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
    19→    super(key)
    20→  }
    21→
    22→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    23→    const span = document.createElement('span')
    24→    span.className = 'rich-spoiler'
    25→    span.setAttribute('role', 'button')
    26→    span.setAttribute('tabindex', '0')
    27→    span.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Spoiler (click to reveal)')
    28→
    29→    const toggle = () => {
    30→      if (span.isContentEditable) return
    31→      const revealed = span.classList.toggle('rich-spoiler-revealed')
    32→      span.setAttribute(
    33→        'aria-label',
    34→        revealed ? 'Spoiler (revealed)' : 'Spoiler (click to reveal)',
    35→      )
    36→    }
    37→
    38→    span.addEventListener('click', toggle)
    39→    span.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    40→      if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
    41→        e.preventDefault()
    42→        toggle()
    43→      }
    44→    })
    45→
    46→    return span
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    50→    return false
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  static importJSON(_serializedNode: SerializedElementNode): SpoilerNode {
    54→    return $createSpoilerNode()
    55→  }
    56→
    57→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode {
    58→    return {
    59→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    60→      type: 'spoiler',
    61→      version: 1,
    62→    }
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  canInsertTextBefore(): boolean {
    66→    return true
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  canInsertTextAfter(): boolean {
    70→    return true
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  isInline(): boolean {
    74→    return true
    75→  }
    76→}
    77→
    78→export function $createSpoilerNode(): SpoilerNode {
    79→  return new SpoilerNode()
    80→}
    81→
    82→export function $isSpoilerNode(
    83→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    84→): node is SpoilerNode {
    85→  return node instanceof SpoilerNode
    86→}
    87→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/IsolateRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import root from 'react-shadow'
     2→
     3→import type { ShiroRendererProps } from './ShiroRenderer'
     4→import { ShiroRenderer } from './ShiroRenderer'
     5→// @ts-expect-error -- vite ?inline returns processed CSS as string
     6→import cssText from './style.css?inline'
     7→
     8→const resolvedCss = (cssText as string).replaceAll(':root {', ':root, :host {')
     9→
    10→export type IsolateRendererProps = ShiroRendererProps & {
    11→  extraCss?: string
    12→}
    13→
    14→export function IsolateRenderer({
    15→  theme = 'light',
    16→  className,
    17→  extraCss,
    18→  ...props
    19→}: IsolateRendererProps) {
    20→  return (
    21→    <root.div className={className}>
    22→      <div id="shadow-html" data-theme={theme}>
    23→        <style
    24→          dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
    25→            __html: extraCss ? resolvedCss + extraCss : resolvedCss,
    26→          }}
    27→        />
    28→        <ShiroRenderer {...props} theme={theme} />
    29→      </div>
    30→    </root.div>
    31→  )
    32→}
    33→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { Flag } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { BannerReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/BannerReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type BannerType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'
    21→
    22→const LEGACY_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
    23→  info: 'note',
    24→  success: 'tip',
    25→  error: 'caution',
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function normalizeBannerType(type: string): BannerType {
    29→  if (type in LEGACY_TYPE_MAP) return LEGACY_TYPE_MAP[type]
    30→  return (type as BannerType) || 'note'
    31→}
    32→
    33→export const BANNER_TYPES: BannerType[] = [
    34→  'note',
    35→  'tip',
    36→  'important',
    37→  'warning',
    38→  'caution',
    39→]
    40→
    41→export const BANNER_LABELS: Record<BannerType, string> = {
    42→  note: 'Note',
    43→  tip: 'Tip',
    44→  important: 'Important',
    45→  warning: 'Warning',
    46→  caution: 'Caution',
    47→}
    48→
    49→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    50→  return createEditor({
    51→    namespace: 'BannerContent',
    52→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    53→    theme: editorTheme,
    54→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    55→      console.error('[BannerContent]', error)
    56→    },
    57→  })
    58→}
    59→
    60→export type SerializedBannerNode = Spread<
    61→  {
    62→    bannerType: BannerType
    63→    content: SerializedEditorState
    64→  },
    65→  SerializedLexicalNode
    66→>
    67→
    68→interface LegacySerializedBannerNode extends SerializedBannerNode {
    69→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    70→}
    71→
    72→export class BannerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    73→  __bannerType: BannerType
    74→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    75→
    76→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    77→    {
    78→      title: 'Banner',
    79→      icon: createElement(Flag, { size: 20 }),
    80→      description: 'Highlighted banner block',
    81→      keywords: ['banner', 'notice', 'announcement'],
    82→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    83→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    84→        editor.update(() => {
    85→          $insertNodes([$createBannerNode('note')])
    86→        })
    87→      },
    88→    },
    89→  ]
    90→
    91→  static getType(): string {
    92→    return 'banner'
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  static clone(node: BannerNode): BannerNode {
    96→    return new BannerNode(node.__bannerType, node.__contentEditor, node.__key)
    97→  }
    98→
    99→  constructor(
   100→    bannerType: BannerType,
   101→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   102→    key?: NodeKey,
   103→  ) {
   104→    super(key)
   105→    this.__bannerType = bannerType
   106→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   110→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   111→    div.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   112→    return div
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  updateDOM(prevNode: BannerNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   116→    if (prevNode.__bannerType !== this.__bannerType) {
   117→      dom.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   118→    }
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  isInline(): boolean {
   123→    return false
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  getBannerType(): BannerType {
   127→    return this.__bannerType
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  setBannerType(bannerType: BannerType): void {
   131→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   132→    writable.__bannerType = bannerType
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   136→    return this.__contentEditor
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  getTextContent(): string {
   140→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   141→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   142→    })
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedBannerNode): BannerNode {
   146→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedBannerNode
   147→    const bannerType = normalizeBannerType(serializedNode.bannerType)
   148→    const node = new BannerNode(bannerType)
   149→
   150→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   151→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   152→        serializedNode.content,
   153→      )
   154→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   155→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   156→      // Legacy ElementNode format: wrap children into editor state
   157→      const content = {
   158→        root: {
   159→          children: legacy.children,
   160→          direction: null,
   161→          format: '',
   162→          indent: 0,
   163→          type: 'root',
   164→          version: 1,
   165→        },
   166→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   167→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(content)
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→
   171→    return node
   172→  }
   173→
   174→  exportJSON(): SerializedBannerNode {
   175→    return {
   176→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   177→      type: 'banner',
   178→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   179→      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   180→      version: 1,
   181→    }
   182→  }
   183→
   184→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   185→    return createElement(BannerReadOnlyDecorator, {
   186→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   187→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   188→    })
   189→  }
   190→}
   191→
   192→export function $createBannerNode(bannerType: BannerType): BannerNode {
   193→  return new BannerNode(bannerType)
   194→}
   195→
   196→export function $isBannerNode(
   197→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   198→): node is BannerNode {
   199→  return node instanceof BannerNode
   200→}
   201→
```

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { LayoutGrid } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { GridReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/GridReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type SerializedGridContainerNode = Spread<
    21→  {
    22→    cols: number
    23→    gap?: string
    24→    cells: SerializedEditorState[]
    25→  },
    26→  SerializedLexicalNode
    27→>
    28→
    29→interface LegacySerializedGridNode {
    30→  type?: string
    31→  version?: number
    32→  cols?: number
    33→  gap?: string | number
    34→  cells?: SerializedEditorState[]
    35→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    36→}
    37→
    38→function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    39→  return createEditor({
    40→    namespace: 'GridCell',
    41→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    42→    theme: editorTheme,
    43→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    44→      console.error('[GridCell]', error)
    45→    },
    46→  })
    47→}
    48→
    49→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    50→  __cols: number
    51→  __gap: string
    52→  __cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    53→
    54→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    55→    {
    56→      title: 'Grid',
    57→      icon: createElement(LayoutGrid, { size: 20 }),
    58→      description: 'Grid layout container',
    59→      keywords: ['grid', 'columns', 'layout'],
    60→      section: 'LAYOUT',
    61→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    62→        editor.update(() => {
    63→          $insertNodes([$createGridContainerNode(2)])
    64→        })
    65→      },
    66→    },
    67→  ]
    68→
    69→  static getType(): string {
    70→    return 'grid-container'
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
    74→    return new GridContainerNode(
    75→      node.__cols,
    76→      node.__gap,
    77→      [...node.__cellEditors],
    78→      node.__key,
    79→    )
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  constructor(
    83→    cols = 2,
    84→    gap?: string,
    85→    cellEditors?: LexicalEditor[],
    86→    key?: NodeKey,
    87→  ) {
    88→    super(key)
    89→    this.__cols = cols
    90→    this.__gap = gap || '16px'
    91→    if (cellEditors) {
    92→      this.__cellEditors = cellEditors
    93→    } else {
    94→      this.__cellEditors = Array.from({ length: cols }, () =>
    95→        createCellEditor(),
    96→      )
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   101→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   102→    div.className = 'rich-grid-container'
   103→    return div
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   107→    return false
   108→  }
   109→
   110→  isInline(): boolean {
   111→    return false
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getCols(): number {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__cols
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setCols(cols: number): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    const prev = writable.__cellEditors.length
   121→    writable.__cols = cols
   122→    if (cols > prev) {
   123→      for (let i = prev; i < cols; i++) {
   124→        writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  getGap(): string {
   130→    return this.getLatest().__gap
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  setGap(gap: string): void {
   134→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   135→    writable.__gap = gap
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  getCellEditors(): LexicalEditor[] {
   139→    return this.getLatest().__cellEditors
   140→  }
   141→
   142→  addCells(count: number): void {
   143→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   144→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   145→      writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   146→    }
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  removeCells(count: number): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    const editors = writable.__cellEditors
   152→    const toRemove = Math.min(count, editors.length)
   153→    for (let i = 0; i < toRemove; i++) {
   154→      const editor = editors.at(-1)
   155→      if (!editor) break
   156→      const isEmpty = editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   157→        return $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0
   158→      })
   159→      if (!isEmpty) break
   160→      editors.pop()
   161→    }
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  getTextContent(): string {
   165→    return this.__cellEditors
   166→      .map((editor) =>
   167→        editor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContent()),
   168→      )
   169→      .join('\n')
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  static importJSON(
   173→    serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode,
   174→  ): GridContainerNode {
   175→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridNode
   176→    const cols = legacy.cols || 2
   177→    const rawGap = legacy.gap
   178→    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
   179→    const node = new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   180→
   181→    if (legacy.cells && legacy.cells.length > 0) {
   182→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = legacy.cells.map((cellState) => {
   183→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   184→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
   185→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   186→        return editor
   187→      })
   188→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   189→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   190→      // Legacy ElementNode format: each child becomes a cell
   191→      const { children } = legacy
   192→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
   193→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   194→        const content = {
   195→          root: {
   196→            children: [child],
   197→            direction: null,
   198→            format: '',
   199→            indent: 0,
   200→            type: 'root',
   201→            version: 1,
   202→          },
   203→        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   204→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(content)
   205→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   206→        return editor
   207→      })
   208→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    return node
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  exportJSON(): SerializedGridContainerNode {
   215→    return {
   216→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   217→      type: 'grid-container',
   218→      cols: this.__cols,
   219→      gap: this.__gap,
   220→      cells: this.__cellEditors.map((editor) =>
   221→        editor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   222→      ),
   223→      version: 1,
   224→    }
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   228→    return createElement(GridReadOnlyDecorator, {
   229→      cols: this.__cols,
   230→      gap: this.__gap,
   231→      cellEditors: this.__cellEditors,
   232→    })
   233→  }
   234→}
   235→
   236→export function $createGridContainerNode(
   237→  cols = 2,
   238→  gap?: string,
   239→): GridContainerNode {
   240→  return new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   241→}
   242→
   243→export function $isGridContainerNode(
   244→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   245→): node is GridContainerNode {
   246→  return node instanceof GridContainerNode
   247→}
   248→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {

     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     7→  Spread,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import { ImageIcon } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    12→import { createElement } from 'react'
    13→
    14→import { ImageRenderer } from '../components/renderers/ImageRenderer'
    15→import { createRendererDecoration } from '../components/RendererWrapper'
    16→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    17→
    18→export type SerializedImageNode = Spread<
    19→  {
    20→    src: string
    21→    altText: string
    22→    width?: number
    23→    height?: number
    24→    caption?: string
    25→    thumbhash?: string
    26→    accent?: string
    27→  },
    28→  SerializedLexicalNode
    29→>
    30→
    31→function sanitizeImageSrc(src: string): string {
    32→  const trimmed = src.trim()
    33→  if (/^(javascript\s*:|vbscript\s*:|data\s*:(?!image\/))/i.test(trimmed)) {
    34→    return ''
    35→  }
    36→  return trimmed
    37→}
    38→
    39→function sanitizeColor(value: string | undefined): string | undefined {
    40→  if (!value) return undefined
    41→  const trimmed = value.trim()
    42→  if (/^#[\da-f]{3,8}$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
    43→  if (/^(rgb|hsl)a?\([^)]+\)$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
    44→  if (/^[a-z]{3,20}$/i.test(trimmed)) return trimmed
    45→  return undefined
    46→}
    47→
    48→export interface ImageNodePayload {
    49→  src: string
    50→  altText: string
    51→  width?: number
    52→  height?: number
    53→  caption?: string
    54→  thumbhash?: string
    55→  accent?: string
    56→}
    57→
    58→export class ImageNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    59→  __src: string
    60→  __altText: string
    61→  __width?: number
    62→  __height?: number
    63→  __caption?: string
    64→  __thumbhash?: string
    65→  __accent?: string
    66→
    67→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    68→    {
    69→      title: 'Image',
    70→      icon: createElement(ImageIcon, { size: 20 }),
    71→      description: 'Upload or embed an image',
    72→      keywords: ['image', 'picture', 'photo'],
    73→      section: 'MEDIA',
    74→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    75→        editor.update(() => {
    76→          $insertNodes([$createImageNode({ src: '', altText: '' })])
    77→        })
    78→      },
    79→    },
    80→  ]
    81→
    82→  static getType(): string {
    83→    return 'image'
    84→  }
    85→
    86→  static clone(node: ImageNode): ImageNode {
    87→    return new ImageNode(
    88→      {
    89→        src: node.__src,
    90→        altText: node.__altText,
    91→        width: node.__width,
    92→        height: node.__height,
    93→        caption: node.__caption,
    94→        thumbhash: node.__thumbhash,
    95→        accent: node.__accent,
    96→      },
    97→      node.__key,
    98→    )
    99→  }
   100→
   101→  constructor(payload: ImageNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
   102→    super(key)
   103→    this.__src = sanitizeImageSrc(payload.src)
   104→    this.__altText = payload.altText
   105→    this.__width = payload.width
   106→    this.__height = payload.height
   107→    this.__caption = payload.caption
   108→    this.__thumbhash = payload.thumbhash
   109→    this.__accent = sanitizeColor(payload.accent)
   110→  }
   111→
   112→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   113→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   114→    div.className = 'rich-image-wrapper'
   115→    return div
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  isInline(): boolean {
   123→    return false
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedImageNode): ImageNode {
   127→    return $createImageNode({
   128→      src: serializedNode.src,
   129→      altText: serializedNode.altText,
   130→      width: serializedNode.width,
   131→      height: serializedNode.height,
   132→      caption: serializedNode.caption,
   133→      thumbhash: serializedNode.thumbhash,
   134→      accent: serializedNode.accent,
   135→    })
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  exportJSON(): SerializedImageNode {
   139→    return {
   140→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   141→      type: 'image',
   142→      src: this.__src,
   143→      altText: this.__altText,
   144→      width: this.__width,
   145→      height: this.__height,
   146→      caption: this.__caption,
   147→      thumbhash: this.__thumbhash,
   148→      accent: this.__accent,
   149→      version: 1,
   150→    }
   151→  }
   152→
   153→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   154→    return createRendererDecoration('Image', ImageRenderer, {
   155→      src: this.__src,
   156→      altText: this.__altText,
   157→      width: this.__width,
   158→      height: this.__height,
   159→      caption: this.__caption,
   160→      thumbhash: this.__thumbhash,
   161→      accent: this.__accent,
   162→    })
   163→  }
   164→}
   165→
   166→export function $createImageNode(payload: ImageNodePayload): ImageNode {
   167→  return new ImageNode(payload)
   168→}
   169→
   170→export function $isImageNode(
   171→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   172→): node is ImageNode {
   173→  return node instanceof ImageNode
   174→}
   175→
```

```text
     1→import type { ColorScheme } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
     2→import { articleVariant, darkArticleVariant } from '../styles/article.css'
     3→import { commentVariant, darkCommentVariant } from '../styles/comment.css'
     4→import { darkNoteVariant, noteVariant } from '../styles/note.css'
     5→import type { RichEditorVariant } from '../types'
     6→
     7→export function clsx(
     8→  ...args: Array<string | undefined | null | false>
     9→): string {
    10→  return args.filter(Boolean).join(' ')
    11→}
    12→
    13→export function getVariantClass(
    14→  variant: RichEditorVariant,
    15→  colorScheme: ColorScheme,
    16→): string {
    17→  if (variant === 'comment') {
    18→    return colorScheme === 'dark' ? darkCommentVariant : commentVariant
    19→  }
    20→  if (variant === 'note') {
    21→    return colorScheme === 'dark' ? darkNoteVariant : noteVariant
    22→  }
    23→  return colorScheme === 'dark' ? darkArticleVariant : articleVariant
    24→}
    25→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {

    12→import { KaTeXRenderer } from '../components/renderers/KaTeXRenderer'

    15→export type SerializedKaTeXInlineNode = Spread<
    16→  {
    17→    equation: string
    18→  },
    19→  SerializedLexicalNode
    20→>
    21→
    22→export class KaTeXInlineNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    23→  __equation: string
    24→
    25→  static getType(): string {
    26→    return 'katex-inline'
    27→  }
    28→
    29→  static clone(node: KaTeXInlineNode): KaTeXInlineNode {
    30→    return new KaTeXInlineNode(node.__equation, node.__key)
    31→  }
    32→
    33→  constructor(equation: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    34→    super(key)
    35→    this.__equation = equation
    36→  }
    37→
    38→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    39→    return document.createElement('span')
    40→  }
    41→
    42→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    43→    return false
    44→  }
    45→
    46→  isInline(): boolean {
    47→    return true
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  static importJSON(
    51→    serializedNode: SerializedKaTeXInlineNode,
    52→  ): KaTeXInlineNode {
    53→    return $createKaTeXInlineNode(serializedNode.equation)
    54→  }
    55→
    56→  exportJSON(): SerializedKaTeXInlineNode {
    57→    return {
    58→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    59→      type: 'katex-inline',
    60→      equation: this.__equation,
    61→      version: 1,
    62→    }
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  getEquation(): string {
    66→    return this.__equation
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  setEquation(equation: string): void {
    70→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    71→    writable.__equation = equation
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    75→    return createRendererDecoration('KaTeX', KaTeXRenderer, {
    76→      equation: this.__equation,
    77→      displayMode: false,
    78→    })
    79→  }
    80→}
```
