```text
    31→import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'
    32→
    33→import { GalleryRenderer } from './GalleryRenderer'
    34→import * as css from './styles.css'
    35→
    36→type LayoutType = 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    37→
    38→const layoutItems = [
    39→  { value: 'grid' as const, label: 'Grid' },
    40→  { value: 'masonry' as const, label: 'Masonry' },
    41→  { value: 'carousel' as const, label: 'Carousel' },
    42→]
    43→
    44→// ── ID helper ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    45→
    46→let nextId = 0
    47→function genId() {
    48→  return `img-${++nextId}`
    49→}
    50→
    51→interface ImageEntry {
    52→  id: string
    53→  image: GalleryImage
    54→}
    55→
    56→// ── SortableImageCard ────────────────────────────────────────
    57→
    58→const SortableImageCard: FC<{
    59→  id: string
    60→  image: GalleryImage
    61→  index: number
    62→  isLast: boolean
    63→  lastInputRef: React.RefObject<HTMLInputElement | null>
    64→  onUpdate: (index: number, field: keyof GalleryImage, value: string) => void
    65→  onRemove: (index: number) => void
    66→}> = ({ id, image, index, isLast, lastInputRef, onUpdate, onRemove }) => {
    67→  const {
    68→    attributes,
    69→    listeners,
    70→    setNodeRef,
    71→    transform,
    72→    transition,
    73→    isDragging,
    74→  } = useSortable({ id })
    75→
    76→  const style: CSSProperties = {
    77→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    78→    transition: isDragging ? undefined : transition,
    79→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.4 : 1,
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  return (
    83→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={css.galleryImageCard}>
    84→      <div
    85→        className={css.galleryImageDragHandle}
    86→        {...attributes}
    87→        {...listeners}
    88→      >
    89→        <GripVertical size={14} />
    90→      </div>
    91→
    92→      <div className={css.galleryImageThumb}>
    93→        {image.src ? (
    94→          <img src={image.src} alt={image.alt || ''} />
    95→        ) : (
    96→          <span className={css.galleryImageThumbPlaceholder}>
    97→            <ImageIcon size={20} />
    98→          </span>
    99→        )}
   100→      </div>
   101→
   102→      <div className={css.galleryImageFields}>
   103→        <input
   104→          ref={isLast ? lastInputRef : undefined}
   105→          className={css.galleryImageInput}
   106→          type="text"
   107→          placeholder="Image URL"
   108→          value={image.src}
   109→          onChange={(e) => onUpdate(index, 'src', e.target.value)}
   110→        />
   111→        <input
   112→          className={css.galleryImageInput}
   113→          type="text"
   114→          placeholder="Alt text (optional)"
   115→          value={image.alt || ''}
   116→          onChange={(e) => onUpdate(index, 'alt', e.target.value)}
   117→        />
   118→      </div>
   119→
   120→      <div className={css.galleryImageActions}>
   121→        <button
   122→          type="button"
   123→          className={css.galleryImageDeleteBtn}
   124→          onClick={() => onRemove(index)}
   125→          title="Remove"
   126→        >
   127→          <Trash2 size={14} />
   128→        </button>
   129→      </div>
   130→    </div>
   131→  )
   132→}
   133→
   134→// ── Drag overlay card ────────────────────────────────────────
   135→
   136→const DragOverlayCard: FC<{ image: GalleryImage }> = ({ image }) => (
   137→  <div className={css.galleryImageCard} style={{ opacity: 0.9 }}>
   138→    <div className={css.galleryImageDragHandle}>
   139→      <GripVertical size={14} />
   140→    </div>
   141→    <div className={css.galleryImageThumb}>
   142→      {image.src ? (
   143→        <img src={image.src} alt={image.alt || ''} />
   144→      ) : (
   145→        <span className={css.galleryImageThumbPlaceholder}>
   146→          <ImageIcon size={20} />
   147→        </span>
   148→      )}
   149→    </div>
   150→    <div className={css.galleryImageFields}>
   151→      <span
   152→        style={{
   153→          fontSize: vars.typography.fontSizeSm,
   154→          overflow: 'hidden',
   155→          textOverflow: 'ellipsis',
   156→          whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
   157→        }}
   158→      >
   159→        {image.src || 'No URL'}
   160→      </span>
   161→    </div>
   162→  </div>
   163→)
   164→
   165→// ── Dialog content ───────────────────────────────────────────
   166→
   167→const GalleryEditorDialogContent: FC<{
   168→  dismiss: () => void
   169→  initialImages: GalleryImage[]
   170→  initialLayout: LayoutType
   171→  onImagesChange: (images: GalleryImage[]) => void
   172→  onLayoutChange: (layout: LayoutType) => void
   173→}> = ({
   174→  dismiss,
   175→  initialImages,
   176→  initialLayout,
   177→  onImagesChange,
   178→  onLayoutChange,
   179→}) => {
   180→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   181→  const [entries, setEntries] = useState<ImageEntry[]>(() =>
   182→    initialImages.map((img) => ({ id: genId(), image: { ...img } })),
   183→  )
   184→  const [layout, setLayout] = useState<LayoutType>(initialLayout)
   185→  const newInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
   186→  const [dragActiveId, setDragActiveId] = useState<string | null>(null)
   187→
   188→  const itemIds = entries.map((e) => e.id)
   189→
   190→  const sensors = useSensors(
   191→    useSensor(PointerSensor, { activationConstraint: { distance: 5 } }),
   192→  )
   193→
   194→  const handleAddImage = useCallback(() => {
   195→    setEntries((prev) => [
   196→      ...prev,
   197→      { id: genId(), image: { src: '', alt: '' } },
   198→    ])
   199→    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   200→      newInputRef.current?.focus()
   201→    })
   202→  }, [])
   203→
   204→  const handleRemoveImage = useCallback((index: number) => {
   205→    setEntries((prev) => prev.filter((_, i) => i !== index))
   206→  }, [])
   207→
   208→  const handleUpdateImage = useCallback(
   209→    (index: number, field: keyof GalleryImage, value: string) => {
   210→      setEntries((prev) =>
   211→        prev.map((entry, i) =>
   212→          i === index
   213→            ? { ...entry, image: { ...entry.image, [field]: value } }
   214→            : entry,
   215→        ),
   216→      )
   217→    },
   218→    [],
   219→  )
   220→
   221→  const handleDragEnd = useCallback((event: DragEndEvent) => {
   222→    const { active, over } = event
   223→    setDragActiveId(null)
   224→    if (!over || active.id === over.id) return
   225→    setEntries((prev) => {
   226→      const oldIndex = prev.findIndex((e) => e.id === String(active.id))
   227→      const newIndex = prev.findIndex((e) => e.id === String(over.id))
   228→      if (oldIndex === -1 || newIndex === -1) return prev
   229→      return arrayMove(prev, oldIndex, newIndex)
   230→    })
   231→  }, [])
   232→
   233→  const handleSave = useCallback(() => {
   234→    const filtered = entries.map((e) => e.image).filter((img) => img.src.trim())
   235→    onImagesChange(filtered)
   236→    onLayoutChange(layout)
   237→    dismiss()
   238→  }, [entries, layout, onImagesChange, onLayoutChange, dismiss])
   239→
   240→  const dragActiveEntry = dragActiveId
   241→    ? entries.find((e) => e.id === dragActiveId)
   242→    : null
   243→
   244→  return (
   245→    <>
   246→      {/* Header */}
   247→      <div className={css.galleryDialogHeader}>
   248→        <div className={css.galleryDialogTitle}>
   249→          <Images size={18} />
   250→          <span>Gallery Editor</span>
   251→        </div>
   252→
   253→        <div className={css.galleryHeaderActions}>
   254→          <SegmentedControl
   255→            items={layoutItems}
   256→            value={layout}
   257→            onChange={setLayout}
   258→          />
   259→        </div>
   260→
   261→        <button
   262→          type="button"
   263→          className={css.galleryHeaderClose}
   264→          onClick={dismiss}
   265→        >
   266→          <X size={18} />
   267→        </button>
   268→      </div>
   269→
   270→      {/* Body */}
   271→      <div className={css.galleryDialogBody}>
   272→        {entries.length === 0 ? (
   273→          <div className={css.galleryDialogEmpty}>
   274→            <ImageIcon size={32} />
   275→            <span>Add your first image</span>
   276→            <button
   277→              type="button"
   278→              className={css.galleryAddBtn}
   279→              onClick={handleAddImage}
   280→              style={{ maxWidth: 200 }}
   281→            >
   282→              <Plus size={14} />
   283→              Add Image
   284→            </button>
   285→          </div>
   286→        ) : (
   287→          <div className={css.galleryImageList}>
   288→            <DndContext
   289→              sensors={sensors}
   290→              collisionDetection={closestCenter}
   291→              onDragStart={(event) => {
   292→                setDragActiveId(String(event.active.id))
   293→              }}
   294→              onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}
   295→              onDragCancel={() => setDragActiveId(null)}
   296→            >
   297→              <SortableContext
   298→                items={itemIds}
   299→                strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}
   300→              >
   301→                {entries.map((entry, index) => (
   302→                  <SortableImageCard
   303→                    key={entry.id}
   304→                    id={entry.id}
   305→                    image={entry.image}
   306→                    index={index}
   307→                    isLast={index === entries.length - 1}
   308→                    lastInputRef={newInputRef}
   309→                    onUpdate={handleUpdateImage}
   310→                    onRemove={handleRemoveImage}
   311→                  />
   312→                ))}
   313→              </SortableContext>
   314→              {typeof document !== 'undefined'
   315→                ? createPortal(
   316→                    <div className={portalClassName}>
   317→                      <DragOverlay dropAnimation={null}>
   318→                        {dragActiveEntry ? (
   319→                          <DragOverlayCard image={dragActiveEntry.image} />
   320→                        ) : null}
   321→                      </DragOverlay>
   322→                    </div>,
   323→                    document.body,
   324→                  )
   325→                : null}
   326→            </DndContext>
   327→
   328→            <button
   329→              type="button"
   330→              className={css.galleryAddBtn}
   331→              onClick={handleAddImage}
   332→            >
   333→              <Plus size={14} />
   334→              Add Image
   335→            </button>
   336→          </div>
   337→        )}
   338→      </div>
   339→
   340→      {/* Footer */}
   341→      <div className={css.galleryDialogFooter}>
   342→        <span className={css.galleryFooterInfo}>
   343→          {`${entries.filter((e) => e.image.src.trim()).length} ${entries.filter((e) => e.image.src.trim()).length !== 1 ? 'images' : 'image'}`}
   344→        </span>
   345→        <div className={css.galleryFooterActions}>
   346→          <button
   347→            type="button"
   348→            className={css.galleryFooterBtnCancel}
   349→            onClick={dismiss}
   350→          >
   351→            Cancel
   352→          </button>
   353→          <button
   354→            type="button"
   355→            className={css.galleryFooterBtnSave}
   356→            onClick={handleSave}
   357→          >
   358→            Save
   359→          </button>
   360→        </div>
   361→      </div>
   362→    </>
   363→  )
   364→}
   365→
   366→// ── Main component ───────────────────────────────────────────
   367→
   368→export const GalleryEditRenderer: FC<GalleryRendererProps> = ({
   369→  images,
   370→  layout,
   371→  onImagesChange,
   372→  onLayoutChange,
   373→}) => {
   374→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   375→
   376→  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
   377→    if (!onImagesChange || !onLayoutChange) return
   378→    presentDialog({
   379→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   380→        <GalleryEditorDialogContent
   381→          dismiss={dismiss}
   382→          initialImages={images}
   383→          initialLayout={layout}
   384→          onImagesChange={onImagesChange}
   385→          onLayoutChange={onLayoutChange}
   386→        />
   387→      ),
   388→      className: css.galleryDialogPopup,
   389→      portalClassName,
   390→      showCloseButton: false,
   391→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   392→    })
   393→  }, [images, layout, onImagesChange, onLayoutChange, portalClassName])
   394→
   395→  if (!onImagesChange) {
   396→    return <GalleryRenderer images={images} layout={layout} />
   397→  }
   398→
   399→  if (images.length === 0) {
   400→    return (
   401→      <div className={css.galleryEditContainer}>
   402→        <div className={css.galleryEmptyState}>
   403→          <ImageIcon size={32} />
   404→          <span>Empty gallery</span>
   405→        </div>
   406→        <button
   407→          type="button"
   408→          className={css.galleryEditOverlay}
   409→          onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   410→        >
   411→          <span className={css.galleryEditLabel}>
   412→            <Pencil size={16} />
   413→            Edit Gallery
   414→          </span>
   415→        </button>
   416→      </div>
   417→    )
   418→  }
   419→
   420→  return (
   421→    <div className={css.galleryEditContainer}>
   422→      <GalleryRenderer images={images} layout={layout} />
   423→      <button
   424→        type="button"
   425→        className={css.galleryEditOverlay}
   426→        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   427→      >
   428→        <span className={css.galleryEditLabel}>
   429→          <Pencil size={16} />
   430→          Edit Gallery
   431→        </span>
   432→      </button>
   433→    </div>
   434→  )
   435→}
   436→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→import { LexicalComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposer'
     3→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     4→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     5→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     6→
     7→import { allNodes } from '../config'
     8→import { ColorSchemeProvider } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
     9→import { RendererConfigProvider } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
    10→import { FootnotePlugin } from '../plugins/FootnotePlugin'
    11→import { HeadingAnchorPlugin } from '../plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin'
    12→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    13→import type { RichRendererProps } from '../types'
    14→import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'
    15→
    16→export function RichRenderer({
    17→  value,
    18→  variant = 'article',
    19→  theme = 'light',
    20→  className,
    21→  style,
    22→  as: Component = 'div',
    23→  rendererConfig,
    24→  extraNodes,
    25→}: RichRendererProps) {
    26→  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant, theme)
    27→
    28→  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
    29→
    30→  const initialConfig = {
    31→    namespace: 'RichRenderer',
    32→    theme: editorTheme,
    33→    nodes,
    34→    editable: false,
    35→    editorState: JSON.stringify(value),
    36→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    37→      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
    38→    },
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  return (
    42→    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass}>
    43→      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
    44→        <RendererConfigProvider
    45→          config={rendererConfig}
    46→          mode="renderer"
    47→          variant={variant}
    48→        >
    49→          <Component
    50→            className={clsx('rich-content', variantClass, className)}
    51→            style={style}
    52→            data-theme={theme}
    53→          >
    54→            <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    55→              <FootnotePlugin>
    56→                <RichTextPlugin
    57→                  contentEditable={
    58→                    <ContentEditable
    59→                      className="rich-content__body"
    60→                      style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    61→                      aria-placeholder=""
    62→                      placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    63→                    />
    64→                  }
    65→                  ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    66→                />
    67→                <HeadingAnchorPlugin />
    68→              </FootnotePlugin>
    69→            </LexicalComposer>
    70→          </Component>
    71→        </RendererConfigProvider>
    72→      </ColorSchemeProvider>
    73→    </PortalThemeProvider>
    74→  )
    75→}
    76→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export type ColorScheme = 'light' | 'dark'
     5→
     6→const ColorSchemeContext = createContext<ColorScheme>('light')
     7→
     8→export function ColorSchemeProvider({
     9→  colorScheme,
    10→  children,
    11→}: {
    12→  colorScheme: ColorScheme
    13→  children: ReactNode
    14→}) {
    15→  return (
    16→    <ColorSchemeContext.Provider value={colorScheme}>
    17→      {children}
    18→    </ColorSchemeContext.Provider>
    19→  )
    20→}
    21→
    22→export function useColorScheme(): ColorScheme {
    23→  return use(ColorSchemeContext)
    24→}
```

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/context/RendererConfigContext.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import type { RichEditorVariant } from '../types'
     5→import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6→
     7→export type RendererMode = 'editor' | 'renderer'
     8→
     9→interface RendererConfigContextValue {
    10→  config?: RendererConfig
    11→  mode: RendererMode
    12→  variant: RichEditorVariant
    13→}
    14→
    15→const RendererConfigContext = createContext<RendererConfigContextValue>({
    16→  config: undefined,
    17→  mode: 'renderer',
    18→  variant: 'article',
    19→})
    20→
    21→export interface RendererConfigProviderProps {
    22→  config?: RendererConfig
    23→  mode: RendererMode
    24→  variant: RichEditorVariant
    25→  children: ReactNode
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function RendererConfigProvider({
    29→  config,
    30→  mode,
    31→  variant,
    32→  children,
    33→}: RendererConfigProviderProps) {
    34→  const value = useMemo(
    35→    () => ({ config, mode, variant }),
    36→    [config, mode, variant],
    37→  )
    38→  return (
    39→    <RendererConfigContext.Provider value={value}>
    40→      {children}
    41→    </RendererConfigContext.Provider>
    42→  )
    43→}
    44→
    45→export function useRendererConfig(): RendererConfig | undefined {
    46→  return use(RendererConfigContext).config
    47→}
    48→
    49→export function useRendererMode(): RendererMode {
    50→  return use(RendererConfigContext).mode
    51→}
    52→
    53→export function useVariant(): RichEditorVariant {
    54→  return use(RendererConfigContext).variant
    55→}
    56→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-renderer-mermaid/src/MermaidEditRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import {
     2→  type ColorScheme,
     3→  type MermaidRendererProps,
     4→  useColorScheme,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     6→import { presentDialog, usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     7→import {
     8→  CircleAlert,
     9→  Code2,
    10→  Columns2,
    11→  Copy,
    12→  Download,
    13→  Eye,
    14→  FishSymbol,
    15→  Maximize2,
    16→  RotateCcw,
    17→  X,
    18→  ZoomIn,
    19→  ZoomOut,
    20→} from 'lucide-react'
    21→import type { ElementType, FC } from 'react'
    22→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
    23→import {
    24→  TransformComponent,
    25→  TransformWrapper,
    26→  useControls,
    27→} from 'react-zoom-pan-pinch'
    28→
    29→import * as css from './styles.css'
    30→import { useMermaidRender } from './useMermaidRender'
    31→
    32→// ── Templates ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    33→
    34→const TEMPLATES: { label: string; code: string }[] = [
    35→  {
    36→    label: 'Flowchart',
    37→    code: 'graph TD\n  A[Start] --> B{Decision}\n  B -->|Yes| C[Action 1]\n  B -->|No| D[Action 2]\n  C --> E[End]\n  D --> E',
    38→  },
    39→  {
    40→    label: 'Sequence',
    41→    code: 'sequenceDiagram\n  participant A as Client\n  participant B as Server\n  A->>B: Request\n  B-->>A: Response',
    42→  },
    43→  {
    44→    label: 'Class',
    45→    code: 'classDiagram\n  class Animal {\n    +String name\n    +makeSound()\n  }\n  class Dog {\n    +bark()\n  }\n  Animal <|-- Dog',
    46→  },
    47→  {
    48→    label: 'State',
    49→    code: 'stateDiagram-v2\n  [*] --> Idle\n  Idle --> Processing: Submit\n  Processing --> Success: Complete\n  Processing --> Error: Fail\n  Error --> Idle: Retry\n  Success --> [*]',
    50→  },
    51→  {
    52→    label: 'Git',
    53→    code: 'gitGraph\n  commit\n  branch develop\n  checkout develop\n  commit\n  checkout main\n  merge develop\n  commit',
    54→  },
    55→]
    56→
    57→// ── Icons (Lucide) ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    58→
    59→// Removed inline SVGs in favor of Lucide icons
    60→
    61→// ── Preview component with debounce ─────────────────────────────
    62→
    63→const MermaidLivePreview: FC<{
    64→  code: string
    65→  svgRef: { current: string }
    66→  colorScheme: ColorScheme
    67→}> = ({ code, svgRef, colorScheme }) => {
    68→  const [debounced, setDebounced] = useState(code)
    69→
    70→  useEffect(() => {
    71→    const t = setTimeout(() => setDebounced(code), 300)
    72→    return () => clearTimeout(t)
    73→  }, [code])
    74→
    75→  const { loading, error, imgSrc, svg, width, height } = useMermaidRender(
    76→    debounced,
    77→    colorScheme,
    78→  )
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    svgRef.current = svg
    82→  }, [svg, svgRef])
    83→
    84→  if (!debounced.trim()) {
    85→    return (
    86→      <div className={css.editorPreviewWrap}>
    87→        <span className={css.editorPreviewEmpty}>
    88→          Enter Mermaid code to see the preview
    89→        </span>
    90→      </div>
    91→    )
    92→  }
    93→
    94→  if (loading && !imgSrc) {
    95→    return (
    96→      <div className={css.editorPreviewWrap}>
    97→        <div className={css.mermaidLoading}>Rendering</div>
    98→      </div>
    99→    )
   100→  }
   101→
   102→  if (error && !imgSrc) {
   103→    return (
   104→      <div className={css.editorPreviewWrap}>
   105→        <div className={css.editorPreviewErrorWrap}>
   106→          <span className={css.editorPreviewErrorIcon}>
   107→            <CircleAlert size={16} />
   108→          </span>
   109→          <p className={css.editorPreviewErrorTitle}>Syntax Error</p>
   110→          <p className={css.editorPreviewErrorMsg}>{error}</p>
   111→        </div>
   112→      </div>
   113→    )
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  return (
   117→    <div className={css.editorPreviewWrap}>
   118→      <TransformWrapper initialScale={1} minScale={0.3} maxScale={5}>
   119→        <ZoomControls />
   120→        <TransformComponent
   121→          wrapperStyle={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }}
   122→          contentStyle={{
   123→            width: '100%',
   124→            display: 'flex',
   125→            justifyContent: 'center',
   126→          }}
   127→        >
   128→          <img
   129→            src={imgSrc}
   130→            alt="Mermaid diagram"
   131→            width={width}
   132→            height={height}
   133→          />
   134→        </TransformComponent>
   135→      </TransformWrapper>
   136→    </div>
   137→  )
   138→}
   139→
   140→// ── Code editor with line numbers ───────────────────────────────
   141→
   142→const CodeEditor: FC<{ value: string; onChange: (v: string) => void }> = ({
   143→  value,
   144→  onChange,
   145→}) => {
   146→  const textareaRef = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null)
   147→  const gutterRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   148→  const lineCount = value.split('\n').length
   149→
   150→  const syncScroll = useCallback(() => {
   151→    if (textareaRef.current && gutterRef.current) {
   152→      gutterRef.current.scrollTop = textareaRef.current.scrollTop
   153→    }
   154→  }, [])
   155→
   156→  useEffect(() => {
   157→    const el = textareaRef.current
   158→    if (!el) return
   159→    el.addEventListener('scroll', syncScroll)
   160→    return () => el.removeEventListener('scroll', syncScroll)
   161→  }, [syncScroll])
   162→
   163→  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
   164→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) => {
   165→      if (e.key === 'Tab') {
   166→        e.preventDefault()
   167→        const ta = e.currentTarget
   168→        const start = ta.selectionStart
   169→        const end = ta.selectionEnd
   170→        onChange(`${value.substring(0, start)}  ${value.substring(end)}`)
   171→        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   172→          ta.selectionStart = ta.selectionEnd = start + 2
   173→        })
   174→      }
   175→    },
   176→    [value, onChange],
   177→  )
   178→
   179→  return (
   180→    <div className={css.codeEditor}>
   181→      <div ref={gutterRef} className={css.codeGutter} aria-hidden="true">
   182→        {Array.from({ length: lineCount }, (_, i) => (
   183→          <div key={i} className={css.codeGutterLine}>
   184→            {i + 1}
   185→          </div>
   186→        ))}
   187→      </div>
   188→      <textarea
   189→        ref={textareaRef}
   190→        className={css.codeArea}
   191→        value={value}
   192→        onChange={(e) => onChange(e.target.value)}
   193→        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   194→        spellCheck={false}
   195→        placeholder="Enter Mermaid code..."
   196→      />
   197→    </div>
   198→  )
   199→}
   200→
   201→// ── Editor modal content ────────────────────────────────────────
   202→
   203→type ViewMode = 'split' | 'code' | 'preview'
   204→
   205→const MermaidEditorContent: FC<{
   206→  initialContent: string
   207→  onSave: (content: string) => void
   208→  dismiss: () => void
   209→  colorScheme: ColorScheme
   210→}> = ({ initialContent, onSave, dismiss, colorScheme }) => {
   211→  const [code, setCode] = useState(initialContent)
   212→  const [activeView, setActiveView] = useState<ViewMode>('split')
   213→  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false)
   214→  const svgRef = useRef('')
   215→
   216→  const handleCopy = useCallback(async () => {
   217→    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(code)
   218→    setCopied(true)
   219→    setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000)
   220→  }, [code])
   221→
   222→  const handleDownload = useCallback(() => {
   223→    const raw = svgRef.current
   224→    if (!raw) return
   225→    const blob = new Blob([raw], { type: 'image/svg+xml' })
   226→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   227→    const a = document.createElement('a')
   228→    a.href = url
   229→    a.download = 'mermaid-diagram.svg'
   230→    a.click()
   231→    URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   232→  }, [])
   233→
   234→  const handleReset = useCallback(
   235→    () => setCode(initialContent),
   236→    [initialContent],
   237→  )
   238→  const handleSave = useCallback(() => {
   239→    onSave(code)
   240→    dismiss()
   241→  }, [code, onSave, dismiss])
   242→
   243→  const viewBtn = (mode: ViewMode, Icon: ElementType) => (
   244→    <button
   245→      type="button"
   246→      className={`${css.editorViewItem}${activeView === mode ? ` ${css.editorViewItemActive}` : ''}`}
   247→      onClick={() => setActiveView(mode)}
   248→    >
   249→      <Icon size={14} />
   250→    </button>
   251→  )
   252→
   253→  return (
   254→    <>
   255→      {/* Header */}
   256→      <div className={css.editorHeader}>
   257→        <div className={css.editorHeaderLeft}>
   258→          <div className={css.editorTitle}>
   259→            <FishSymbol size={18} />
   260→            <span>Mermaid Editor</span>
   261→          </div>
   262→          <div className={css.editorSep} />
   263→          {TEMPLATES.map((tpl) => (
   264→            <button
   265→              key={tpl.label}
   266→              type="button"
   267→              className={css.editorTplBtn}
   268→              onClick={() => setCode(tpl.code)}
   269→            >
   270→              {tpl.label}
   271→            </button>
   272→          ))}
   273→        </div>
   274→
   275→        <div className={css.editorHeaderRight}>
   276→          <div className={css.editorViewToggle}>
   277→            {viewBtn('code', Code2)}
   278→            {viewBtn('split', Columns2)}
   279→            {viewBtn('preview', Eye)}
   280→          </div>
   281→          <div className={css.editorSep} />
   282→          <button
   283→            type="button"
   284→            className={css.editorIconBtn}
   285→            onClick={handleCopy}
   286→            title={copied ? 'Copied!' : 'Copy code'}
   287→          >
   288→            <Copy size={14} />
   289→          </button>
   290→          <button
   291→            type="button"
   292→            className={css.editorIconBtn}
   293→            onClick={handleDownload}
   294→            title="Download SVG"
   295→          >
   296→            <Download size={14} />
   297→          </button>
   298→          <button
   299→            type="button"
   300→            className={css.editorIconBtn}
   301→            onClick={handleReset}
   302→            title="Reset"
   303→          >
   304→            <RotateCcw size={14} />
   305→          </button>
   306→          <div className={css.editorSep} />
   307→          <button
   308→            type="button"
   309→            className={css.editorIconBtn}
   310→            onClick={dismiss}
   311→            title="Close"
   312→          >
   313→            <X size={14} />
   314→          </button>
   315→        </div>
   316→      </div>
   317→
   318→      {/* Body */}
   319→      <div className={css.editorBody}>
   320→        {activeView !== 'preview' && (
   321→          <div
   322→            className={`${css.editorPane} ${activeView === 'code' ? css.editorPaneFull : css.editorPaneHalf}`}
   323→          >
   324→            <div className={css.editorPaneLabel}>Editor</div>
   325→            <CodeEditor value={code} onChange={setCode} />
   326→          </div>
   327→        )}
   328→        {activeView !== 'code' && (
   329→          <div className={css.editorPreviewPane}>
   330→            <div className={css.editorPaneLabel}>Preview</div>
   331→            <MermaidLivePreview
   332→              code={code}
   333→              svgRef={svgRef}
   334→              colorScheme={colorScheme}
   335→            />
   336→          </div>
   337→        )}
   338→      </div>
   339→
   340→      {/* Footer */}
   341→      <div className={css.editorFooter}>
   342→        <div className={css.footerActions}>
   343→          <button
   344→            type="button"
   345→            className={css.footerBtnCancel}
   346→            onClick={dismiss}
   347→          >
   348→            Cancel
   349→          </button>
   350→          <button
   351→            type="button"
   352→            className={css.footerBtnSave}
   353→            onClick={handleSave}
   354→          >
   355→            Save
   356→          </button>
   357→        </div>
   358→      </div>
   359→    </>
   360→  )
   361→}
   362→
   363→// ── Zoom controls ───────────────────────────────────────────────
   364→
   365→const ZoomControls: FC = () => {
   366→  const { zoomIn, zoomOut, resetTransform } = useControls()
   367→  return (
   368→    <div className={css.zoomControls}>
   369→      <button type="button" className={css.zoomBtn} onClick={() => zoomIn()}>
   370→        <ZoomIn size={14} />
   371→      </button>
   372→      <button type="button" className={css.zoomBtn} onClick={() => zoomOut()}>
   373→        <ZoomOut size={14} />
   374→      </button>
   375→      <button
   376→        type="button"
   377→        className={css.zoomBtn}
   378→        onClick={() => resetTransform()}
   379→      >
   380→        <Maximize2 size={14} />
   381→      </button>
   382→    </div>
   383→  )
   384→}
   385→
   386→// ── Main renderer ───────────────────────────────────────────────
   387→
   388→export const MermaidEditRenderer: FC<MermaidRendererProps> = ({
   389→  content,
   390→  onContentChange,
   391→}) => {
   392→  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
   393→  const { loading, error, imgSrc, width, height } = useMermaidRender(content)
   394→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   395→
   396→  const handleClick = useCallback(() => {
   397→    if (!onContentChange) return
   398→    presentDialog({
   399→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   400→        <MermaidEditorContent
   401→          initialContent={content}
   402→          onSave={onContentChange}
   403→          dismiss={dismiss}
   404→          colorScheme={colorScheme}
   405→        />
   406→      ),
   407→      className: css.editorPopup,
   408→      portalClassName,
   409→      showCloseButton: false,
   410→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   411→    })
   412→  }, [onContentChange, content, portalClassName, colorScheme])
   413→
   414→  if (loading) {
   415→    return <div className={css.mermaidLoading}>Mermaid Loading</div>
   416→  }
   417→
   418→  if (!imgSrc) {
   419→    return <div className={css.mermaidError}>{error || 'Render failed'}</div>
   420→  }
   421→
   422→  return (
   423→    <div className={css.mermaidContainer}>
   424→      {onContentChange && (
   425→        <span className={css.mermaidEditHint} onClick={handleClick}>
   426→          Edit
   427→        </span>
   428→      )}
   429→      <TransformWrapper initialScale={1} minScale={0.5} maxScale={4}>
   430→        <ZoomControls />
   431→        <TransformComponent
   432→          wrapperStyle={{ width: '100%' }}
   433→          contentStyle={{
   434→            width: '100%',
   435→            display: 'flex',
   436→            justifyContent: 'center',
   437→          }}
   438→        >
   439→          <img
   440→            src={imgSrc}
   441→            alt="Mermaid diagram"
   442→            width={width}
   443→            height={height}
   444→          />
   445→        </TransformComponent>
   446→      </TransformWrapper>
   447→    </div>
   448→  )
   449→}
   450→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export interface FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue {
     5→  definitions: Record<string, string>
     6→  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
     7→}
     8→
     9→const FootnoteDefinitionsContext =
    10→  createContext<FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue>({
    11→    definitions: {},
    12→    displayNumberMap: {},
    13→  })
    14→
    15→export function FootnoteDefinitionsProvider({
    16→  definitions,
    17→  displayNumberMap,
    18→  children,
    19→}: FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue & { children: ReactNode }) {
    20→  const value = useMemo(
    21→    () => ({ definitions, displayNumberMap }),
    22→    [definitions, displayNumberMap],
    23→  )
    24→  return (
    25→    <FootnoteDefinitionsContext value={value}>
    26→      {children}
    27→    </FootnoteDefinitionsContext>
    28→  )
    29→}
    30→
    31→export function useFootnoteDefinitions(): FootnoteDefinitionsContextValue {
    32→  return use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
    33→}
    34→
    35→export function useFootnoteContent(identifier: string): string | undefined {
    36→  const { definitions } = use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
    37→  return definitions[identifier]
    38→}
    39→
    40→export function useFootnoteDisplayNumber(
    41→  identifier: string,
    42→): number | undefined {
    43→  const { displayNumberMap } = use(FootnoteDefinitionsContext)
    44→  return displayNumberMap[identifier]
    45→}
    46→
```

Now let me check the GridContainerNode to see how it handles nested editors:

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-25 10:10:10Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { LayoutGrid } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { GridReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/GridReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type SerializedGridContainerNode = Spread<
    21→  {
    22→    cols: number
    23→    gap?: string
    24→    cells: SerializedEditorState[]
    25→  },
    26→  SerializedLexicalNode
    27→>
    28→
    29→interface LegacySerializedGridNode {
    30→  type?: string
    31→  version?: number
    32→  cols?: number
    33→  gap?: string | number
    34→  cells?: SerializedEditorState[]
    35→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    36→}
    37→
    38→function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    39→  return createEditor({
    40→    namespace: 'GridCell',
    41→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    42→    theme: editorTheme,
    43→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    44→      console.error('[GridCell]', error)
    45→    },
    46→  })
    47→}
    48→
    49→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    50→  __cols: number
    51→  __gap: string
    52→  __cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    53→
    54→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    55→    {
    56→      title: 'Grid',
    57→      icon: createElement(LayoutGrid, { size: 20 }),
    58→      description: 'Grid layout container',
    59→      keywords: ['grid', 'columns', 'layout'],
    60→      section: 'LAYOUT',
    61→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    62→        editor.update(() => {
    63→          $insertNodes([$createGridContainerNode(2)])
    64→        })
    65→      },
    66→    },
    67→  ]
    68→
    69→  static getType(): string {
    70→    return 'grid-container'
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
    74→    return new GridContainerNode(
    75→      node.__cols,
    76→      node.__gap,
    77→      [...node.__cellEditors],
    78→      node.__key,
    79→    )
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  constructor(
    83→    cols = 2,
    84→    gap?: string,
    85→    cellEditors?: LexicalEditor[],
    86→    key?: NodeKey,
    87→  ) {
    88→    super(key)
    89→    this.__cols = cols
    90→    this.__gap = gap || '16px'
    91→    if (cellEditors) {
    92→      this.__cellEditors = cellEditors
    93→    } else {
    94→      this.__cellEditors = Array.from({ length: cols }, () =>
    95→        createCellEditor(),
    96→      )
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   101→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   102→    div.className = 'rich-grid-container'
   103→    return div
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   107→    return false
   108→  }
   109→
   110→  isInline(): boolean {
   111→    return false
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getCols(): number {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__cols
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setCols(cols: number): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    const prev = writable.__cellEditors.length
   121→    writable.__cols = cols
   122→    if (cols > prev) {
   123→      for (let i = prev; i < cols; i++) {
   124→        writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  getGap(): string {
   130→    return this.getLatest().__gap
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  setGap(gap: string): void {
   134→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   135→    writable.__gap = gap
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  getCellEditors(): LexicalEditor[] {
   139→    return this.getLatest().__cellEditors
   140→  }
   141→
   142→  addCells(count: number): void {
   143→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   144→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   145→      writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   146→    }
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  removeCells(count: number): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    const editors = writable.__cellEditors
   152→    const toRemove = Math.min(count, editors.length)
   153→    for (let i = 0; i < toRemove; i++) {
   154→      const editor = editors.at(-1)
   155→      if (!editor) break
   156→      const isEmpty = editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   157→        return $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0
   158→      })
   159→      if (!isEmpty) break
   160→      editors.pop()
   161→    }
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  getTextContent(): string {
   165→    return this.__cellEditors
   166→      .map((editor) =>
   167→        editor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContent()),
   168→      )
   169→      .join('\n')
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  static importJSON(
   173→    serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode,
   174→  ): GridContainerNode {
   175→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridNode
   176→    const cols = legacy.cols || 2
   177→    const rawGap = legacy.gap
   178→    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
   179→    const node = new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   180→
   181→    if (legacy.cells && legacy.cells.length > 0) {
   182→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = legacy.cells.map((cellState) => {
   183→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   184→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
   185→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   186→        return editor
   187→      })
   188→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   189→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   190→      // Legacy ElementNode format: each child becomes a cell
   191→      const { children } = legacy
   192→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
   193→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   194→        const content = {
   195→          root: {
   196→            children: [child],
   197→            direction: null,
   198→            format: '',
   199→            indent: 0,
   200→            type: 'root',
   201→            version: 1,
   202→          },
   203→        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   204→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(content)
   205→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   206→        return editor
   207→      })
   208→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    return node
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  exportJSON(): SerializedGridContainerNode {
   215→    return {
   216→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   217→      type: 'grid-container',
   218→      cols: this.__cols,
   219→      gap: this.__gap,
   220→      cells: this.__cellEditors.map((editor) =>
   221→        editor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   222→      ),
   223→      version: 1,
   224→    }
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   228→    return createElement(GridReadOnlyDecorator, {
   229→      cols: this.__cols,
   230→      gap: this.__gap,
   231→      cellEditors: this.__cellEditors,
   232→    })
   233→  }
   234→}
   235→
   236→export function $createGridContainerNode(
   237→  cols = 2,
   238→  gap?: string,
   239→): GridContainerNode {
   240→  return new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   241→}
   242→
   243→export function $isGridContainerNode(
   244→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   245→): node is GridContainerNode {
   246→  return node instanceof GridContainerNode
   247→}
   248→
```
</details></tool-use>

Let me check one more file to understand the tldraw rendering better:

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-25 10:10:12Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/useTldrawData.ts`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
     4→
     5→interface TldrawDataState {
     6→  snapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
     7→  loading: boolean
     8→  error: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function useTldrawData(data: string): TldrawDataState {
    12→  const { apiUrl } = useTldrawConfig()
    13→
    14→  const parsed = useMemo(() => {
    15→    if (!data) return { type: 'empty' as const }
    16→
    17→    try {
    18→      const json = JSON.parse(data)
    19→      if (json && typeof json === 'object') {
    20→        return {
    21→          type: 'inline' as const,
    22→          snapshot: json as Record<string, any>,
    23→        }
    24→      }
    25→    } catch {
    26→      // not JSON
    27→    }
    28→
    29→    const firstLine = data.split('\n')[0].trim()
    30→    let fetchUrl: string | undefined
    31→
    32→    if (firstLine.startsWith('http')) {
    33→      fetchUrl = firstLine
    34→    } else if (firstLine.startsWith('ref:') && apiUrl) {
    35→      fetchUrl = `${apiUrl}/objects/${firstLine.slice(4)}`
    36→    }
    37→
    38→    if (fetchUrl) {
    39→      return { type: 'remote' as const, fetchUrl }
    40→    }
    41→
    42→    return {
    43→      type: 'error' as const,
    44→      error: firstLine.startsWith('ref:')
    45→        ? 'Missing apiUrl for ref resolution'
    46→        : 'Unrecognized snapshot format',
    47→    }
    48→  }, [data, apiUrl])
    49→
    50→  const fetchUrl = parsed.type === 'remote' ? parsed.fetchUrl : undefined
    51→
    52→  const [remoteSnapshot, setRemoteSnapshot] = useState<
    53→    Record<string, any> | undefined
    54→  >()
    55→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(!!fetchUrl)
    56→  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    57→
    58→  useEffect(() => {
    59→    if (!fetchUrl) return
    60→
    61→    let cancelled = false
    62→    setLoading(true)
    63→    setError('')
    64→
    65→    fetch(fetchUrl)
    66→      .then((res) => {
    67→        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    68→        return res.json()
    69→      })
    70→      .then((json) => {
    71→        if (!cancelled) {
    72→          setRemoteSnapshot(json)
    73→          setLoading(false)
    74→        }
    75→      })
    76→      .catch((err) => {
    77→        if (!cancelled) {
    78→          setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load')
    79→          setLoading(false)
    80→        }
    81→      })
    82→
    83→    return () => {
    84→      cancelled = true
    85→    }
    86→  }, [fetchUrl])
    87→
    88→  if (parsed.type === 'inline') {
    89→    return { snapshot: parsed.snapshot, loading: false, error: '' }
    90→  }
    91→
    92→  if (parsed.type === 'remote') {
    93→    return { snapshot: remoteSnapshot, loading, error }
    94→  }
    95→
    96→  if (parsed.type === 'error') {
    97→    return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: parsed.error }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: '' }
   101→}
   102→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { EditorConfig, LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     2→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
     3→import { createElement } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { AlertEditDecorator } from '../components/decorators/AlertEditDecorator'
     6→import { AlertQuoteNode, type SerializedAlertQuoteNode } from './AlertQuoteNode'
     7→
     8→export class AlertQuoteEditNode extends AlertQuoteNode {
     9→  static clone(node: AlertQuoteEditNode): AlertQuoteEditNode {
    10→    return new AlertQuoteEditNode(
    11→      node.__alertType,
    12→      node.__contentEditor,
    13→      node.__key,
    14→    )
    15→  }
    16→
    17→  static importJSON(
    18→    serializedNode: SerializedAlertQuoteNode,
    19→  ): AlertQuoteEditNode {
    20→    const node = new AlertQuoteEditNode(serializedNode.alertType)
    21→    if (serializedNode.content) {
    22→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
    23→        serializedNode.content,
    24→      )
    25→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    26→    }
    27→    return node
    28→  }
    29→
    30→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    31→    return createElement(AlertEditDecorator, {
    32→      nodeKey: this.__key,
    33→      alertType: this.__alertType,
    34→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
    35→    })
    36→  }
    37→}
    38→
```

Let me check the full lexical d.ts more comprehensively:

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-25 10:10:34Z)**_

Perfect. Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create a detailed SSR analysis report.

## SSR Compatibility Analysis Report

Based on thorough examination of 9 renderer files, here is the SSR compatibility status for each component:

---

### **1. CodeBlockRenderer.tsx** — **NEEDS-FIX**

**Issues:**
- **Line 21-43**: `useEffect` fetches Shiki highlighter asynchronously. First render returns `html: null`, displaying fallback `<pre><code>` with split lines.
- **Line 40**: `window.innerHeight` accessed in `CodeBlockCard`'s `useEffect` (line 40 of CodeBlockCard.tsx) — browser-only check for overflow detection.
- **Initial output**: Fallback HTML renders server-side correctly, but markdown shortcuts and dynamic collapse features won't work until hydration.

**Risk Level**: Medium. First render is safe with fallback, but interactive features (collapse, copy) require hydration.

---

### **2. CodeBlockCard.tsx** — **NEEDS-FIX**

**Issues:**
- **Line 36-45**: `useEffect` accesses `window.innerHeight` directly without guard — will throw on server.
- **Line 40**: `requestAnimationFrame(check)` — browser API, undefined on server.
- **Line 52-59**: `navigator.clipboard.writeText()` in `handleCopy` — browser-only API, used in event handler (safe from render path but critical for interactivity).

**Risk Level**: Medium-High. `window.innerHeight` will crash if effect runs during SSR. Use `typeof window !== 'undefined'` guard.

---

### **3. LinkCardRenderer.tsx** — **NEEDS-FIX**

**Issues:**
- **Line 109-119**: `useLayoutEffect` with `getComputedStyle(el)` — browser-only. Runs synchronously before paint, will error on server.
- **Initial render**: Safe (displays fallback with favicon or globe icon), but description truncation logic won't work until hydration.
- **Line 65**: `useLinkCardFetchContext()` hook — context provider must exist in tree, handled via context consumer guard.

**Risk Level**: High. `useLayoutEffect` accessing `getComputedStyle` will crash on server. Should use `useEffect` instead (accept FOUC for description length).

---

### **4. useMermaidRender.ts** — **CRITICAL**

**Issues:**
- **Line 21-84**: `useEffect` imports `mermaid`, initializes it, and renders to SVG asynchronously. First render returns `loading: true`.
- **Line 28**: `import('mermaid')` — dynamic import works on server but mermaid itself requires browser APIs (DOM manipulation, canvas).
- **Line 58**: `document.getElementById()` — browser API, called inside effect (safe from render path but will fail if effect runs on server).
- **Line 90**: `new TextEncoder()`, `btoa()` — both work on server, but referenced after `svg` which depends on `mermaid.render()`.
- **Initial output**: Shows "Mermaid Loading" — content not available until client hydration.

**Risk Level**: Critical. Mermaid library requires browser environment. Dynamic import happens in effect (safe), but if SSR attempts mermaid.render(), it will fail. Initial "Loading" state is safe but not SEO-friendly.

---

### **5. MermaidRenderer.tsx** — **CRITICAL**

**Issues:**
- **Line 8**: Calls `useMermaidRender()` which depends on browser environment.
- **First render**: Shows "Mermaid Loading" or error state — no content until client renders.
- **Context dependency**: Uses `useColorScheme()` hook from context (requires provider in tree).

**Risk Level**: Critical. No meaningful content on first server render. Recommend server-side diagram rendering or lazy hydration.

---

### **6. TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx** — **CRITICAL**

**Issues:**
- **Line 22-38**: `useEffect` with `IntersectionObserver` — browser-only API, will throw on server.
- **Line 102-109**: Another `useEffect` dynamically imports `tldraw` library — heavy library requiring browser environment.
- **Line 27**: `new IntersectionObserver()` — throws if called on server.
- **Initial output**: Shows "Loading tldraw..." until viewport intersection detected and library loaded.

**Risk Level**: Critical. `IntersectionObserver` constructor will throw during SSR. Must guard with `typeof window !== 'undefined'`.

---

### **7. ImageRenderer.tsx** — **SAFE**

**Issues:**
- **Line 36**: `useState` for image load state — initial state is `'loading'`, safe default.
- **Line 64-87**: Renders `<img>` with `onLoad`/`onError` handlers — image element renders correctly on server, handlers execute only after hydration.
- **Line 78-87**: Uses `react-photo-view` `<PhotoProvider>` and `<PhotoView>` — wrapper components render safely server-side.
- **No `useEffect` or `useLayoutEffect`** accessing browser APIs in render path.
- **Placeholder**: Uses `thumbhash` decoded via `decodeThumbHash()` in `useMemo` — pure function, works on server.

**Risk Level**: Safe. Image loads asynchronously with proper state management. Initial render shows placeholder or loading spinner.

---

### **8. AlertRenderer.tsx** — **SAFE**

**Issues:**
- No hooks, no browser API access.
- Pure functional component rendering Lucide icons and text.
- No `useEffect`, `useLayoutEffect`, or context hooks.

**Risk Level**: Safe. Fully compatible with SSR.

---

### **9. GalleryRenderer.tsx** — **NEEDS-FIX**

**Issues:**
- **Line 58-78**: `useEffect` sets up `ResizeObserver` — browser-only API, will throw on server.
- **Line 61-74**: Observes container element for resize changes — requires `ResizeObserver` constructor.
- **Line 120-147**: `useInView` hook from `react-intersection-observer` — internally uses `IntersectionObserver`, browser-only.
- **Initial output**: Grid/masonry render correctly, but carousel with autoplay won't initialize until hydration.

**Risk Level**: High. `ResizeObserver` and `IntersectionObserver` constructors will throw on server. Must guard calls or defer to client-side.

---

### **10. GalleryEditRenderer.tsx** — **NEEDS-FIX**

**Issues:**
- **Line 314-325**: `typeof document !== 'undefined'` guard present for `createPortal()` — good defensive check.
- **Depends on GalleryRenderer** which has `ResizeObserver` issues.
- **Edit mode**: Uses `@dnd-kit/core` with `DndContext` — typically requires browser, but initial render is safe (just UI controls).

**Risk Level**: Medium. Edit-specific code is guarded, but underlying gallery has resize observer issues.

---

## Summary Table

| Component | Status | Key Risk | Fix Priority |
|-----------|--------|----------|--------------|
| CodeBlockRenderer | NEEDS-FIX | `useEffect` async highlight + window access | Medium |
| CodeBlockCard | NEEDS-FIX | `window.innerHeight`, `requestAnimationFrame` | Medium-High |
| LinkCardRenderer | NEEDS-FIX | `useLayoutEffect` + `getComputedStyle` | High |
| useMermaidRender | CRITICAL | Browser-only mermaid library in effect | Critical |
| MermaidRenderer | CRITICAL | Depends on mermaid; no initial content | Critical |
| TldrawStaticRenderer | CRITICAL | `IntersectionObserver` constructor throws | Critical |
| ImageRenderer | SAFE | No browser API in render path | N/A |
| AlertRenderer | SAFE | Pure component, no hooks | N/A |
| GalleryRenderer | NEEDS-FIX | `ResizeObserver` + `useInView` | High |
| GalleryEditRenderer | NEEDS-FIX | Depends on Gallery; edit code guarded | Medium |

---

## Recommendations

**Immediate fixes** (prevent SSR crashes):
1. **CodeBlockCard**: Add `typeof window !== 'undefined'` guard before `window.innerHeight` access
2. **LinkCardRenderer**: Replace `useLayoutEffect` with `useEffect` (accept FOUC for description truncation)
3. **GalleryRenderer**: Guard `ResizeObserver` constructor with `typeof window` check
4. **TldrawStaticRenderer**: Guard `IntersectionObserver` constructor

**Content availability improvements** (SEO-friendly):
1. **Mermaid renderers**: Consider static SVG export on server or lazy hydration
2. **Tldraw**: Show placeholder screenshot or static preview on server

All identified issues are fixable with defensive guards or hook selection (useEffect vs useLayoutEffect).

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     3→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     4→import { LinkPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalLinkPlugin'
     5→import { ListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalListPlugin'
     6→import { LexicalNestedComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalNestedComposer'
     7→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     8→import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     9→import { $getNodeByKey } from 'lexical'
    10→import { useCallback } from 'react'
    11→
    12→import type { AlertType } from '../../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    13→import { $isAlertQuoteNode } from '../../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    14→import { AlertRenderer } from '../renderers/AlertRenderer'
    15→import { RendererWrapper } from '../RendererWrapper'
    16→
    17→interface AlertEditDecoratorProps {
    18→  nodeKey: string
    19→  alertType: AlertType
    20→  contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    21→}
    22→
    23→export function AlertEditDecorator({
    24→  nodeKey,
    25→  alertType,
    26→  contentEditor,
    27→}: AlertEditDecoratorProps) {
    28→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    29→  const editable = editor.isEditable()
    30→
    31→  const handleTypeChange = useCallback(
    32→    (newType: AlertType) => {
    33→      editor.update(() => {
    34→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    35→        if ($isAlertQuoteNode(node)) {
    36→          node.setAlertType(newType)
    37→        }
    38→      })
    39→    },
    40→    [editor, nodeKey],
    41→  )
    42→
    43→  return (
    44→    <>
    45→      <RendererWrapper
    46→        rendererKey="Alert"
    47→        defaultRenderer={AlertRenderer}
    48→        props={{
    49→          type: alertType,
    50→          editable,
    51→          onTypeChange: editable ? handleTypeChange : undefined,
    52→        }}
    53→      />
    54→      <div className="rich-alert-content">
    55→        <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={contentEditor}>
    56→          <RichTextPlugin
    57→            contentEditable={
    58→              <ContentEditable
    59→                className="rich-alert-content-editable"
    60→                style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    61→                aria-placeholder=""
    62→                placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    63→              />
    64→            }
    65→            ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    66→          />
    67→          <ListPlugin />
    68→          <LinkPlugin />
    69→        </LexicalNestedComposer>
    70→      </div>
    71→    </>
    72→  )
    73→}
    74→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { LayoutGrid } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { GridReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/GridReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type SerializedGridContainerNode = Spread<
    21→  {
    22→    cols: number
    23→    gap?: string
    24→    cells: SerializedEditorState[]
    25→  },
    26→  SerializedLexicalNode
    27→>
    28→
    29→interface LegacySerializedGridNode {
    30→  type?: string
    31→  version?: number
    32→  cols?: number
    33→  gap?: string | number
    34→  cells?: SerializedEditorState[]
    35→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    36→}
    37→
    38→function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    39→  return createEditor({
    40→    namespace: 'GridCell',
    41→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    42→    theme: editorTheme,
    43→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    44→      console.error('[GridCell]', error)
    45→    },
    46→  })
    47→}
    48→
    49→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    50→  __cols: number
    51→  __gap: string
    52→  __cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    53→
    54→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    55→    {
    56→      title: 'Grid',
    57→      icon: createElement(LayoutGrid, { size: 20 }),
    58→      description: 'Grid layout container',
    59→      keywords: ['grid', 'columns', 'layout'],
    60→      section: 'LAYOUT',
    61→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    62→        editor.update(() => {
    63→          $insertNodes([$createGridContainerNode(2)])
    64→        })
    65→      },
    66→    },
    67→  ]
    68→
    69→  static getType(): string {
    70→    return 'grid-container'
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
    74→    return new GridContainerNode(
    75→      node.__cols,
    76→      node.__gap,
    77→      [...node.__cellEditors],
    78→      node.__key,
    79→    )
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  constructor(
    83→    cols = 2,
    84→    gap?: string,
    85→    cellEditors?: LexicalEditor[],
    86→    key?: NodeKey,
    87→  ) {
    88→    super(key)
    89→    this.__cols = cols
    90→    this.__gap = gap || '16px'
    91→    if (cellEditors) {
    92→      this.__cellEditors = cellEditors
    93→    } else {
    94→      this.__cellEditors = Array.from({ length: cols }, () =>
    95→        createCellEditor(),
    96→      )
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   101→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   102→    div.className = 'rich-grid-container'
   103→    return div
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   107→    return false
   108→  }
   109→
   110→  isInline(): boolean {
   111→    return false
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getCols(): number {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__cols
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setCols(cols: number): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    const prev = writable.__cellEditors.length
   121→    writable.__cols = cols
   122→    if (cols > prev) {
   123→      for (let i = prev; i < cols; i++) {
   124→        writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  getGap(): string {
   130→    return this.getLatest().__gap
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  setGap(gap: string): void {
   134→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   135→    writable.__gap = gap
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  getCellEditors(): LexicalEditor[] {
   139→    return this.getLatest().__cellEditors
   140→  }
   141→
   142→  addCells(count: number): void {
   143→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   144→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   145→      writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   146→    }
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  removeCells(count: number): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    const editors = writable.__cellEditors
   152→    const toRemove = Math.min(count, editors.length)
   153→    for (let i = 0; i < toRemove; i++) {
   154→      const editor = editors.at(-1)
   155→      if (!editor) break
   156→      const isEmpty = editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   157→        return $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0
   158→      })
   159→      if (!isEmpty) break
   160→      editors.pop()
   161→    }
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  getTextContent(): string {
   165→    return this.__cellEditors
   166→      .map((editor) =>
   167→        editor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContent()),
   168→      )
   169→      .join('\n')
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  static importJSON(
   173→    serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode,
   174→  ): GridContainerNode {
   175→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridNode
   176→    const cols = legacy.cols || 2
   177→    const rawGap = legacy.gap
   178→    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
   179→    const node = new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   180→
   181→    if (legacy.cells && legacy.cells.length > 0) {
   182→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = legacy.cells.map((cellState) => {
   183→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   184→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
   185→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   186→        return editor
   187→      })
   188→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   189→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   190→      // Legacy ElementNode format: each child becomes a cell
   191→      const { children } = legacy
   192→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
   193→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   194→        const content = {
   195→          root: {
   196→            children: [child],
   197→            direction: null,
   198→            format: '',
   199→            indent: 0,
   200→            type: 'root',
   201→            version: 1,
   202→          },
   203→        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   204→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(content)
   205→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   206→        return editor
   207→      })
   208→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    return node
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  exportJSON(): SerializedGridContainerNode {
   215→    return {
   216→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   217→      type: 'grid-container',
   218→      cols: this.__cols,
   219→      gap: this.__gap,
   220→      cells: this.__cellEditors.map((editor) =>
   221→        editor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   222→      ),
   223→      version: 1,
   224→    }
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   228→    return createElement(GridReadOnlyDecorator, {
   229→      cols: this.__cols,
   230→      gap: this.__gap,
   231→      cellEditors: this.__cellEditors,
   232→    })
   233→  }
   234→}
   235→
   236→export function $createGridContainerNode(
   237→  cols = 2,
   238→  gap?: string,
   239→): GridContainerNode {
   240→  return new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   241→}
   242→
   243→export function $isGridContainerNode(
   244→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   245→): node is GridContainerNode {
   246→  return node instanceof GridContainerNode
   247→}
   248→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/FootnotePlugin.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { $getRoot, $nodesOfType } from 'lexical'
     3→import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { FootnoteDefinitionsProvider } from '../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     6→import { FootnoteNode } from '../nodes/FootnoteNode'
     7→import {
     8→  $createFootnoteSectionNode,
     9→  FootnoteSectionNode,
    10→} from '../nodes/FootnoteSectionNode'
    11→
    12→export function FootnotePlugin({ children }: { children?: React.ReactNode }) {
    13→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    14→  const [definitions, setDefinitions] = useState<Record<string, string>>({})
    15→  const [displayNumberMap, setDisplayNumberMap] = useState<
    16→    Record<string, number>
    17→  >({})
    18→  const pendingUpdateRef = useRef(false)
    19→
    20→  useEffect(() => {
    21→    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    22→      editorState.read(() => {
    23→        const footnoteNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)
    24→        const seen = new Set<string>()
    25→        const numberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
    26→        let counter = 1
    27→        for (const node of footnoteNodes) {
    28→          const id = node.getIdentifier()
    29→          if (!seen.has(id)) {
    30→            seen.add(id)
    31→            numberMap[id] = counter++
    32→          }
    33→        }
    34→        setDisplayNumberMap(numberMap)
    35→
    36→        const sectionNodes = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    37→
    38→        if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    39→          setDefinitions(sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions())
    40→        } else {
    41→          setDefinitions({})
    42→        }
    43→
    44→        if (!editor.isEditable() || pendingUpdateRef.current) return
    45→
    46→        if (footnoteNodes.length === 0 && sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    47→          pendingUpdateRef.current = true
    48→          queueMicrotask(() => {
    49→            editor.update(() => {
    50→              const sections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    51→              for (const s of sections) s.remove()
    52→            })
    53→            pendingUpdateRef.current = false
    54→          })
    55→          return
    56→        }
    57→
    58→        if (footnoteNodes.length > 0 && sectionNodes.length === 0) {
    59→          const seenSnapshot = [...seen]
    60→          pendingUpdateRef.current = true
    61→          queueMicrotask(() => {
    62→            editor.update(() => {
    63→              const root = $getRoot()
    64→              const defs: Record<string, string> = {}
    65→              for (const id of seenSnapshot) {
    66→                defs[id] = ''
    67→              }
    68→              const section = $createFootnoteSectionNode(defs)
    69→              root.append(section)
    70→            })
    71→            pendingUpdateRef.current = false
    72→          })
    73→        } else if (sectionNodes.length > 0) {
    74→          const existingDefs = sectionNodes[0].getDefinitions()
    75→          const missingIds = [...seen].filter((id) => !(id in existingDefs))
    76→          const orphanIds = Object.keys(existingDefs).filter(
    77→            (id) => !seen.has(id),
    78→          )
    79→          if (missingIds.length > 0 || orphanIds.length > 0) {
    80→            pendingUpdateRef.current = true
    81→            queueMicrotask(() => {
    82→              editor.update(() => {
    83→                const freshSections = $nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)
    84→                if (freshSections.length > 0) {
    85→                  for (const id of missingIds) {
    86→                    freshSections[0].setDefinition(id, '')
    87→                  }
    88→                  for (const id of orphanIds) {
    89→                    freshSections[0].removeDefinition(id)
    90→                  }
    91→                }
    92→              })
    93→              pendingUpdateRef.current = false
    94→            })
    95→          }
    96→        }
    97→      })
    98→    })
    99→  }, [editor])
   100→
   101→  return (
   102→    <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
   103→      definitions={definitions}
   104→      displayNumberMap={displayNumberMap}
   105→    >
   106→      {children}
   107→    </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
   108→  )
   109→}
   110→
```
</details></tool-use>
