 `./packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { LinkCardRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { ExternalLink, Globe } from 'lucide-react'
     3→import type { ComponentType } from 'react'
     4→import { useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useLinkCardFetchContext } from './FetchContext'
     7→import { useCardFetcher } from './hooks/useCardFetcher'
     8→import { useUrlMatcher } from './hooks/useUrlMatcher'
     9→import { LinkCardSkeleton } from './LinkCardSkeleton'
    10→import { plugins as builtinPlugins } from './plugins'
    11→import * as styles from './styles.css'
    12→import type { LinkCardFetchContext, PluginRegistry } from './types'
    13→
    14→export interface EnhancedLinkCardProps extends LinkCardRendererProps {
    15→  source?: string
    16→  id?: string
    17→  className?: string
    18→  plugins?: PluginRegistry
    19→  fetchContext?: LinkCardFetchContext
    20→}
    21→
    22→function FallbackIcon({ favicon }: { favicon?: string }) {
    23→  const [faviconFailed, setFaviconFailed] = useState(false)
    24→
    25→  return (
    26→    <span className={`${styles.icon} ${styles.semanticClassNames.icon}`}>
    27→      {favicon && !faviconFailed ? (
    28→        <img src={favicon} alt="" onError={() => setFaviconFailed(true)} />
    29→      ) : (
    30→        <Globe aria-hidden="true" />
    31→      )}
    32→    </span>
    33→  )
    34→}
    35→
    36→function mapSemanticClasses(classNames?: string): string {
    37→  if (!classNames) return ''
    38→  return classNames
    39→    .split(/\s+/)
    40→    .filter(Boolean)
    41→    .map((cls) =>
    42→      styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]
    43→        ? `${styles.semanticClassToStyle[cls]} ${cls}`
    44→        : cls,
    45→    )
    46→    .join(' ')
    47→}
    48→
    49→export const LinkCardRenderer: ComponentType<EnhancedLinkCardProps> = (
    50→  props,
    51→) => {
    52→  const {
    53→    url,
    54→    title,
    55→    description,
    56→    favicon,
    57→    image,
    58→    source: explicitSource,
    59→    id: explicitId,
    60→    className,
    61→    plugins = builtinPlugins,
    62→    fetchContext: fetchContextProp,
    63→  } = props
    64→
    65→  const contextValue = useLinkCardFetchContext()
    66→  const fetchContext = fetchContextProp ?? contextValue
    67→
    68→  const pluginMap = useMemo(
    69→    () => new Map(plugins.map((plugin) => [plugin.name, plugin])),
    70→    [plugins],
    71→  )
    72→
    73→  const urlMatch = useUrlMatcher(
    74→    !explicitSource || !explicitId ? url : undefined,
    75→    plugins,
    76→  )
    77→  const source = explicitSource || urlMatch?.plugin.name
    78→  const id = explicitId || urlMatch?.match.id
    79→  const matchedFullUrl = urlMatch?.match.fullUrl
    80→
    81→  const useDynamicFetch = !!source && !!id
    82→  const selectedPlugin = source ? pluginMap.get(source) : undefined
    83→  const { loading, isError, cardInfo, fullUrl, isValid, ref } = useCardFetcher({
    84→    source,
    85→    plugin: selectedPlugin,
    86→    id: id || '',
    87→    fallbackUrl: matchedFullUrl || url,
    88→    enabled: useDynamicFetch,
    89→    context: fetchContext,
    90→  })
    91→
    92→  const typeClass = selectedPlugin?.typeClass
    93→  const typeStyleClass = typeClass ? styles.typeCardModifier[typeClass] : ''
    94→  const typeSemanticClass = typeClass
    95→    ? styles.semanticTypeClassNames[typeClass]
    96→    : ''
    97→
    98→  const finalTitle = cardInfo?.title || title || url
    99→  const finalDesc = cardInfo?.desc || description
   100→  const finalImage = cardInfo?.image || image
   101→  const finalColor = cardInfo?.color
   102→  const classNames = cardInfo?.classNames || {}
   103→  const mappedCardRootClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.cardRoot)
   104→  const mappedImageClass = mapSemanticClasses(classNames.image)
   105→
   106→  const [shortDesc, setShortDesc] = useState(false)
   107→  const descRef = useRef<HTMLSpanElement | null>(null)
   108→
   109→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
   110→    const el = descRef.current
   111→    if (!el || !finalDesc) {
   112→      setShortDesc(false)
   113→      return
   114→    }
   115→    const style = getComputedStyle(el)
   116→    const lineHeight = Number.parseFloat(style.lineHeight) || 1.5 * 14
   117→    const maxTwoLines = lineHeight * 2
   118→    setShortDesc(el.scrollHeight <= maxTwoLines + 1)
   119→  }, [finalDesc, finalTitle])
   120→
   121→  if (useDynamicFetch && !isValid) {
   122→    return null
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  if (useDynamicFetch && loading) {
   126→    return (
   127→      <a
   128→        data-hide-print
   129→        ref={ref}
   130→        href={fullUrl}
   131→        target="_blank"
   132→        rel="noopener noreferrer"
   133→      >
   134→        <LinkCardSkeleton source={source} />
   135→      </a>
   136→    )
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  const hasImage = !!finalImage
   140→  const showImagePlaceholder = useDynamicFetch && isError && !hasImage
   141→
   142→  return (
   143→    <a
   144→      data-hide-print
   145→      ref={useDynamicFetch ? ref : undefined}
   146→      className={[
   147→        styles.card,
   148→        styles.semanticClassNames.card,
   149→        typeStyleClass,
   150→        typeSemanticClass,
   151→        shortDesc && styles.cardShortDesc,
   152→        shortDesc && styles.semanticClassNames.cardShortDesc,
   153→        useDynamicFetch && (loading || isError) && styles.cardSkeleton,
   154→        useDynamicFetch &&
   155→          (loading || isError) &&
   156→          styles.semanticClassNames.cardSkeleton,
   157→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.cardError,
   158→        useDynamicFetch && isError && styles.semanticClassNames.cardError,
   159→        'not-prose',
   160→        className,
   161→        mappedCardRootClass,
   162→      ]
   163→        .filter(Boolean)
   164→        .join(' ')}
   165→      data-source={source || undefined}
   166→      href={useDynamicFetch ? fullUrl : url}
   167→      target="_blank"
   168→      rel="noopener noreferrer"
   169→      style={{
   170→        borderColor: finalColor ? `${finalColor}30` : undefined,
   171→      }}
   172→    >
   173→      {finalColor && (
   174→        <div
   175→          className={`${styles.bg} ${styles.semanticClassNames.bg}`}
   176→          style={{
   177→            backgroundColor: finalColor,
   178→            opacity: 0.04,
   179→          }}
   180→        />
   181→      )}
   182→      {hasImage || showImagePlaceholder ? (
   183→        <span
   184→          className={[
   185→            styles.image,
   186→            styles.semanticClassNames.image,
   187→            mappedImageClass,
   188→          ]
   189→            .filter(Boolean)
   190→            .join(' ')}
   191→          data-image={finalImage || ''}
   192→          style={{
   193→            backgroundImage: finalImage ? `url(${finalImage})` : undefined,
   194→          }}
   195→        />
   196→      ) : (
   197→        <FallbackIcon favicon={favicon} />
   198→      )}
   199→      <span
   200→        className={`${styles.content} ${styles.semanticClassNames.content}`}
   201→      >
   202→        <span className={`${styles.title} ${styles.semanticClassNames.title}`}>
   203→          <span
   204→            className={`${styles.titleText} ${styles.semanticClassNames.titleText}`}
   205→          >
   206→            {finalTitle}
   207→          </span>
   208→          <ExternalLink
   209→            className={`${styles.external} ${styles.semanticClassNames.external}`}
   210→            aria-hidden="true"
   211→            focusable={false}
   212→          />
   213→        </span>
   214→        {finalDesc && (
   215→          <span
   216→            ref={descRef}
   217→            className={`${styles.desc} ${styles.semanticClassNames.desc}`}
   218→          >
   219→            {finalDesc}
   220→          </span>
   221→        )}
   222→      </span>
   223→    </a>
   224→  )
   225→}
   226→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Maximize2, ScanSearch, X, ZoomIn, ZoomOut } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import { Component, type FC, type ReactNode } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    10→
    11→export interface TldrawStaticRendererProps {
    12→  snapshot: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export const TldrawStaticRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
    16→  snapshot,
    17→}) => {
    18→  const theme = useColorScheme()
    19→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    20→  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    if (hasEnteredView) return
    24→    const target = containerRef.current
    25→    if (!target) return
    26→
    27→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    28→      (entries) => {
    29→        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
    30→          setHasEnteredView(true)
    31→          observer.disconnect()
    32→        }
    33→      },
    34→      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    35→    )
    36→    observer.observe(target)
    37→    return () => observer.disconnect()
    38→  }, [hasEnteredView])
    39→
    40→  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    41→    return (
    42→      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
    43→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
    44→      </div>
    45→    )
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  return (
    49→    <div ref={containerRef}>
    50→      <TldrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    51→    </div>
    52→  )
    53→}
    54→
    55→// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---
    56→
    57→const TldrawExpandContent: FC<{
    58→  dismiss: () => void
    59→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    60→  data: Record<string, any>
    61→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    62→}> = ({ dismiss, TldrawComponent, data, theme }) => (
    63→  <>
    64→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
    65→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Whiteboard</span>
    66→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
    67→      <button type="button" className={css.tldrawHeaderClose} onClick={dismiss}>
    68→        <X size={18} />
    69→      </button>
    70→    </div>
    71→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
    72→      <TldrawComponent
    73→        snapshot={data}
    74→        hideUi
    75→        onMount={(editor: any) => {
    76→          editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
    77→          editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
    78→          editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
    79→          setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
    80→        }}
    81→      />
    82→    </div>
    83→  </>
    84→)
    85→
    86→// --- Main Canvas ---
    87→
    88→const TldrawStaticCanvas: FC<{
    89→  snapshot: string
    90→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    91→}> = ({ snapshot, theme }) => {
    92→  const {
    93→    snapshot: data,
    94→    loading: dataLoading,
    95→    error: dataError,
    96→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
    97→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
    98→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
    99→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   100→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   101→
   102→  useEffect(() => {
   103→    import('tldraw')
   104→      .then((mod) => {
   105→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   106→        setLibLoading(false)
   107→      })
   108→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   109→  }, [])
   110→
   111→  useEffect(() => {
   112→    if (editorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   113→      editorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   114→    }
   115→  }, [theme])
   116→
   117→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   118→    (editor: any) => {
   119→      editorRef.current = editor
   120→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   121→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   122→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   123→      setTimeout(() => {
   124→        editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false })
   125→      }, 100)
   126→    },
   127→    [theme],
   128→  )
   129→
   130→  const handleExpand = useCallback(() => {
   131→    if (!TldrawComponent || !data) return
   132→    presentDialog({
   133→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   134→        <TldrawExpandContent
   135→          dismiss={dismiss}
   136→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   137→          data={data}
   138→          theme={theme}
   139→        />
   140→      ),
   141→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   142→      portalClassName,
   143→      showCloseButton: false,
   144→      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
   145→    })
   146→  }, [TldrawComponent, data, theme, portalClassName])
   147→
   148→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   149→
   150→  if (loading) {
   151→    return (
   152→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   153→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
   154→      </div>
   155→    )
   156→  }
   157→
   158→  if (dataError || !data) {
   159→    return (
   160→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   161→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError || 'No data'}</div>
   162→      </div>
   163→    )
   164→  }
   165→
   166→  if (!TldrawComponent) {
   167→    return (
   168→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   169→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to load tldraw</div>
   170→      </div>
   171→    )
   172→  }
   173→
   174→  return (
   175→    <div
   176→      className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}
   177→      data-theme={theme}
   178→      data-color-scheme={theme}
   179→    >
   180→      <TldrawErrorBoundary
   181→        fallback={
   182→          <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to render tldraw</div>
   183→        }
   184→      >
   185→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={data} hideUi onMount={handleMount} />
   186→      </TldrawErrorBoundary>
   187→
   188→      <div className={css.tldrawActionGroup}>
   189→        <button
   190→          type="button"
   191→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   192→          title="Zoom In"
   193→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomIn()}
   194→        >
   195→          <ZoomIn size={20} />
   196→        </button>
   197→        <button
   198→          type="button"
   199→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   200→          title="Zoom Out"
   201→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomOut()}
   202→        >
   203→          <ZoomOut size={20} />
   204→        </button>
   205→        <button
   206→          type="button"
   207→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   208→          title="Fit to Content"
   209→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomToFit()}
   210→        >
   211→          <ScanSearch size={20} />
   212→        </button>
   213→        <button
   214→          type="button"
   215→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   216→          title="Expand"
   217→          onClick={handleExpand}
   218→        >
   219→          <Maximize2 size={20} />
   220→        </button>
   221→      </div>
   222→    </div>
   223→  )
   224→}
   225→
   226→class TldrawErrorBoundary extends Component<
   227→  { fallback: ReactNode; children: ReactNode },
   228→  { hasError: boolean }
   229→> {
   230→  state = { hasError: false }
   231→  static getDerivedStateFromError() {
   232→    return { hasError: true }
   233→  }
   234→  render() {
   235→    return this.state.hasError ? this.props.fallback : this.props.children
   236→  }
   237→}
   238→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import 'react-photo-view/dist/react-photo-view.css'
     2→
     3→import {
     4→  decodeThumbHash,
     5→  type GalleryImage,
     6→  type GalleryRendererProps,
     7→} from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     8→import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'
     9→import type { ComponentType, UIEventHandler } from 'react'
    10→import { memo, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
    11→import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'
    12→import { PhotoProvider, PhotoView } from 'react-photo-view'
    13→
    14→import * as css from './styles.css'
    15→
    16→const IMAGE_CONTAINER_MARGIN_INSET = 60
    17→const CHILD_GAP = 15
    18→const AUTOPLAY_DURATION = 5000
    19→
    20→function throttle<T extends (...args: any[]) => void>(
    21→  func: T,
    22→  wait: number,
    23→): T {
    24→  let timeout: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null
    25→  return ((...args: Parameters<T>) => {
    26→    if (!timeout) {
    27→      timeout = setTimeout(() => {
    28→        func(...args)
    29→        timeout = null
    30→      }, wait)
    31→    }
    32→  }) as T
    33→}
    34→
    35→function clsx(...classes: (string | false | undefined | null)[]): string {
    36→  return classes.filter(Boolean).join(' ')
    37→}
    38→
    39→function useThumbhashStyle(
    40→  image: GalleryImage,
    41→): React.CSSProperties | undefined {
    42→  return useMemo(() => {
    43→    if (!image.thumbhash) return
    44→    const url = decodeThumbHash(image.thumbhash)
    45→    if (!url) return
    46→    return { backgroundImage: `url(${url})`, backgroundSize: 'cover' }
    47→  }, [image.thumbhash])
    48→}
    49→
    50→export const GalleryRenderer: ComponentType<GalleryRendererProps> = ({
    51→  images,
    52→  layout,
    53→}) => {
    54→  const [containerRef, setContainerRef] = useState<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
    55→  const [, setUpdated] = useState({})
    56→  const memoedChildContainerWidthRef = useRef(0)
    57→
    58→  useEffect(() => {
    59→    if (!containerRef) return
    60→
    61→    const ob = new ResizeObserver(() => {
    62→      setUpdated({})
    63→      calChild(containerRef)
    64→    })
    65→
    66→    function calChild(containerRef: HTMLDivElement) {
    67→      const $child = containerRef.children.item(0)
    68→      if ($child) {
    69→        memoedChildContainerWidthRef.current = $child.clientWidth
    70→      }
    71→    }
    72→
    73→    calChild(containerRef)
    74→    ob.observe(containerRef)
    75→    return () => {
    76→      ob.disconnect()
    77→    }
    78→  }, [containerRef])
    79→
    80→  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0)
    81→
    82→  const handleOnScroll: UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement> = useCallback(
    83→    throttle<UIEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>>((e) => {
    84→      const $ = e.target as HTMLDivElement
    85→
    86→      const index = Math.floor(
    87→        ($.scrollLeft + IMAGE_CONTAINER_MARGIN_INSET + 15) /
    88→          memoedChildContainerWidthRef.current,
    89→      )
    90→      setCurrentIndex(index)
    91→    }, 60),
    92→    [],
    93→  )
    94→
    95→  const handleScrollTo = useCallback(
    96→    (i: number) => {
    97→      if (!containerRef) return
    98→
    99→      containerRef.scrollTo({
   100→        left: memoedChildContainerWidthRef.current * i,
   101→        behavior: 'smooth',
   102→      })
   103→    },
   104→    [containerRef],
   105→  )
   106→
   107→  const autoplayTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null)
   108→  const isForward = useRef(true)
   109→  const autoplayRef = useRef(true)
   110→
   111→  const handleCancelAutoplay = useCallback(() => {
   112→    if (!autoplayRef.current) return
   113→
   114→    autoplayRef.current = false
   115→    if (autoplayTimerRef.current) {
   116→      clearInterval(autoplayTimerRef.current)
   117→    }
   118→  }, [])
   119→
   120→  const { ref } = useInView({
   121→    initialInView: false,
   122→    triggerOnce: images.length < 2,
   123→    onChange(inView) {
   124→      if (images.length < 2 || !autoplayRef.current) return
   125→
   126→      if (inView) {
   127→        autoplayTimerRef.current = setInterval(() => {
   128→          setCurrentIndex((prev) => {
   129→            if (prev + 1 > images.length - 1 && isForward.current) {
   130→              isForward.current = false
   131→            }
   132→            if (prev - 1 < 0 && !isForward.current) {
   133→              isForward.current = true
   134→            }
   135→
   136→            const index = prev + (isForward.current ? 1 : -1)
   137→            handleScrollTo(index)
   138→            return index
   139→          })
   140→        }, AUTOPLAY_DURATION)
   141→      } else {
   142→        if (autoplayTimerRef.current) {
   143→          clearInterval(autoplayTimerRef.current)
   144→        }
   145→      }
   146→    },
   147→  })
   148→
   149→  useEffect(
   150→    () => () => {
   151→      if (autoplayTimerRef.current) {
   152→        clearInterval(autoplayTimerRef.current)
   153→      }
   154→    },
   155→    [],
   156→  )
   157→
   158→  if (images.length === 0) return null
   159→
   160→  const layoutClass =
   161→    layout === 'masonry'
   162→      ? css.galleryMasonry
   163→      : layout === 'carousel'
   164→        ? css.galleryCarousel
   165→        : css.galleryGrid
   166→
   167→  if (images.length === 1 || layout === 'grid' || layout === 'masonry') {
   168→    return (
   169→      <PhotoProvider>
   170→        <div className={clsx(css.gallery, layoutClass)}>
   171→          {images.map((image, index) => (
   172→            <GalleryFigure key={index} image={image} />
   173→          ))}
   174→        </div>
   175→      </PhotoProvider>
   176→    )
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  return (
   180→    <PhotoProvider>
   181→      <div
   182→        className={clsx(css.gallery, css.galleryCarousel)}
   183→        ref={ref}
   184→        onTouchMove={handleCancelAutoplay}
   185→        onWheel={handleCancelAutoplay}
   186→      >
   187→        <div
   188→          className={css.galleryContainer}
   189→          onTouchStart={handleCancelAutoplay}
   190→          onScroll={handleOnScroll}
   191→          ref={setContainerRef}
   192→        >
   193→          {images.map((image, index) => (
   194→            <GalleryFigure
   195→              key={index}
   196→              image={image}
   197→              style={{
   198→                width: `calc(100% - ${IMAGE_CONTAINER_MARGIN_INSET}px)`,
   199→                marginRight: `${CHILD_GAP}px`,
   200→              }}
   201→            />
   202→          ))}
   203→        </div>
   204→
   205→        {currentIndex > 0 && (
   206→          <button
   207→            className={clsx(css.galleryNav, css.galleryNavPrev)}
   208→            onClick={() => handleScrollTo(currentIndex - 1)}
   209→          >
   210→            <ChevronLeft size={18} />
   211→          </button>
   212→        )}
   213→        {currentIndex < images.length - 1 && (
   214→          <button
   215→            className={clsx(css.galleryNav, css.galleryNavNext)}
   216→            onClick={() => handleScrollTo(currentIndex + 1)}
   217→          >
   218→            <ChevronRight size={18} />
   219→          </button>
   220→        )}
   221→
   222→        <div className={css.galleryIndicators}>
   223→          {images.map((_, i) => (
   224→            <div
   225→              className={clsx(
   226→                css.galleryIndicator,
   227→                currentIndex === i && css.galleryIndicatorActive,
   228→              )}
   229→              key={i}
   230→              onClick={() => handleScrollTo(i)}
   231→            />
   232→          ))}
   233→        </div>
   234→      </div>
   235→    </PhotoProvider>
   236→  )
   237→}
   238→
   239→const GalleryFigure = memo(
   240→  ({ image, style }: { image: GalleryImage; style?: React.CSSProperties }) => {
   241→    const thumbStyle = useThumbhashStyle(image)
   242→
   243→    return (
   244→      <PhotoView src={image.src}>
   245→        <figure className={css.galleryItem} style={{ ...thumbStyle, ...style }}>
   246→          <img
   247→            src={image.src}
   248→            alt={image.alt || ''}
   249→            width={image.width}
   250→            height={image.height}
   251→            loading="lazy"
   252→            style={{ maxWidth: '100%', height: 'auto' }}
   253→          />
   254→        </figure>
   255→      </PhotoView>
   256→    )
   257→  },
   258→)
   259→
   260→export default memo(GalleryRenderer)
   261→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-renderer-mermaid/src/MermaidRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { MermaidRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import type { FC } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import * as css from './styles.css'
     5→import { useMermaidRender } from './useMermaidRender'
     6→
     7→export const MermaidRenderer: FC<MermaidRendererProps> = ({ content }) => {
     8→  const { loading, error, imgSrc, width, height } = useMermaidRender(content)
     9→
    10→  if (loading) {
    11→    return <div className={css.mermaidLoading}>Mermaid Loading</div>
    12→  }
    13→
    14→  if (!imgSrc) {
    15→    return <div className={css.mermaidError}>{error || 'Render failed'}</div>
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <div className={css.mermaidContainer} style={{ cursor: 'default' }}>
    20→      <img src={imgSrc} alt="Mermaid diagram" width={width} height={height} />
    21→    </div>
    22→  )
    23→}
    24→
    25→export default MermaidRenderer
    26→
```

```text
## Complete Editor Instance Access Map

Based on thorough exploration of the transformer, node, and decorator files, here's the exact breakdown of all `__contentEditor` / `__cellEditors` usage:

**Storage:**
- Line 63: `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor`

**Creation:**

- Line 123: Constructor initializes: `this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()`

**Access Points:**

| Method | Line | Operation | Type |
|--------|------|-----------|------|
| `getContentEditor()` | 152-154 | Returns `__contentEditor` | **Read-only accessor** |
| `getTextContent()` | 157-159 | Calls `__contentEditor.getEditorState().read()` → `$getRoot().getTextContent()` | **Read-only** |
| `importJSON()` (static) | 165-168 | `parseEditorState()` + `setEditorState()` | **Write** (loads state) |
| `exportJSON()` | 178 | `getEditorState().toJSON()` | **Read-only** |
| `clone()` (static) | 111 | Passes `__contentEditor` to constructor | **Reference copy** |
| `decorate()` | 186 | Passes `__contentEditor` to `AlertReadOnlyDecorator` | **Reference** |

**Transformer Usage** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/alert.ts`):

| Line | Pattern | Operation |
|------|---------|-----------|
| 52 | `alertNode.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)` | **Write** - parses serialized state |
| 53 | `alertNode.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)` | **Write** - loads state into editor |

### **AlertQuoteEditNode** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode.ts`)

| 55 | `<LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={contentEditor}>` | Mounts editor in UI | **Reference mount** |

### **GridEditDecorator** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx`)

**Props:**
- Line 19: `cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]`

**Access Points:**

| Line | Operation | Type |
|------|-----------|------|
| 34 | `editor.registerUpdateListener()` (parent editor, monitors node changes) | **Listen to parent** |
| 70 | `node.getCellEditors()` inside `editor.update()` callback | **Read** (get current cell editors) |

---

## Summary: What Breaks When Changing to SerializedEditorState

**Current Flow:**
```
Node.__contentEditor / __cellEditors (LexicalEditor instances)
  ↓
  stored in node properties throughout lifetime
  ↓
  accessed via getContentEditor() / getCellEditors()
  ↓
  mounted in LexicalNestedComposer (decorators)
  ↓
  read via .getEditorState().read()
  ↓
  written via .parseEditorState() + .setEditorState()
  ↓
  exported via .getEditorState().toJSON()
```

**Critical Break Points if Changed to SerializedEditorState:**

1. **LexicalNestedComposer mounts** (AlertEditDecorator L55, BannerEditDecorator L55, GridEditDecorator L129-146)
   - Expects `initialEditor: LexicalEditor`
   - Would need to create editor from `SerializedEditorState` first

2. **GridEditDecorator read operations** (L74-77)
   - `cellEditor.getEditorState()` assumes live editor instance
   - Would need editor instance to read current state

3. **Import paths** (AlertQuoteEditNode L22-25, BannerEditNode L36-39, GridEditNode L57-60, L67-81)
   - All call `editor.parseEditorState()` + `editor.setEditorState()`
   - Would need to create editors before hydrating

4. **Runtime editor creation** (GridContainerNode L124, L145)
   - `setCols()` and `addCells()` create new editors
   - Would need to create empty editors or deserialize from empty state

5. **Clone operations** (AlertQuoteEditNode L12, BannerEditNode L25, GridEditNode L44)
   - Copy editor references
   - Would need to serialize/deserialize or create fresh editors

**Alternative: Editor Instance Factory**
Instead of storing `SerializedEditorState`, store a **factory/provider** that creates editors on demand:
- Decorators create editors lazily from stored serialized state
- Nodes avoid lifetime editor storage
- Serialization becomes trivial (just store `SerializedEditorState`)
- Still supports all current operations

duration_ms: 39024</usage>
```

- The exact code patterns and line numbers
- Any createEditor() / createContentEditor() / createCellEditor() calls

This is critical - we need a complete map of every place that touches these editor instances.

```text
     1→import { GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
     2→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     3→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     4→
     5→import {
     6→  $createAlertQuoteNode,
     7→  AlertQuoteNode,
     8→  type AlertType,
     9→} from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    10→
    11→const ALERT_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, AlertType> = {
    12→  NOTE: 'note',
    13→  TIP: 'tip',
    14→  IMPORTANT: 'important',
    15→  WARNING: 'warning',
    16→  CAUTION: 'caution',
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    20→  ...BASE,
    21→  dependencies: [AlertQuoteNode],
    22→  regExp: /^>\s*\[!(NOTE|TIP|IMPORTANT|WARNING|CAUTION)\]\s*$/,
    23→  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    24→    const typeKey = match[1]
    25→    const alertType = ALERT_TYPE_MAP[typeKey] || 'note'
    26→
    27→    const alertNode = $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType)
    28→
    29→    const serializedChildren = children.map((child) => child.exportJSON())
    30→    const content = {
    31→      root: {
    32→        children: [
    33→          {
    34→            type: 'paragraph',
    35→            children: serializedChildren,
    36→            direction: null,
    37→            format: '',
    38→            indent: 0,
    39→            textFormat: 0,
    40→            textStyle: '',
    41→            version: 1,
    42→          },
    43→        ],
    44→        direction: null,
    45→        format: '',
    46→        indent: 0,
    47→        type: 'root',
    48→        version: 1,
    49→      },
    50→    } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    51→
    52→    const editorState = alertNode.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)
    53→    alertNode.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)
    54→
    55→    parentNode.replace(alertNode)
    56→  },
    57→}
    58→
```

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/container.ts`

```text
     1→import { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
     2→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     3→import type { LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     4→import { $createParagraphNode, $createTextNode } from 'lexical'
     5→
     6→import type { BannerType } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
     7→import { $createBannerNode, BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
     8→import { $createDetailsNode, DetailsNode } from '../nodes/DetailsNode'
     9→
    10→const BANNER_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
    11→  note: 'note',
    12→  info: 'note',
    13→  tip: 'tip',
    14→  success: 'tip',
    15→  important: 'important',
    16→  warning: 'warning',
    17→  warn: 'warning',
    18→  error: 'caution',
    19→  danger: 'caution',
    20→  caution: 'caution',
    21→}
    22→
    23→export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    24→  ...BASE,
    25→  dependencies: [BannerNode, DetailsNode],
    26→  regExp: /^:::\s*(\w+)(?:\{([^}]*)\})?\s*$/,
    27→  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    28→    const type = match[1]
    29→    const params = match[2]
    30→
    31→    if (type in BANNER_TYPE_MAP) {
    32→      const bannerType = BANNER_TYPE_MAP[type]
    33→      const banner = $createBannerNode(bannerType)
    34→
    35→      const serializedChildren = children.map((child: LexicalNode) =>
    36→        child.exportJSON(),
    37→      )
    38→      const content = {
    39→        root: {
    40→          children: [
    41→            {
    42→              type: 'paragraph',
    43→              children: serializedChildren,
    44→              direction: null,
    45→              format: '',
    46→              indent: 0,
    47→              textFormat: 0,
    48→              textStyle: '',
    49→              version: 1,
    50→            },
    51→          ],
    52→          direction: null,
    53→          format: '',
    54→          indent: 0,
    55→          type: 'root',
    56→          version: 1,
    57→        },
    58→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    59→
    60→      const editorState = banner.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)
    61→      banner.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)
    62→
    63→      parentNode.replace(banner)
    64→      return
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    if (type === 'details') {
    68→      const summaryMatch = params?.match(/summary="([^"]*)"/)
    69→      const summary = summaryMatch ? summaryMatch[1] : 'Details'
    70→
    71→      const details = $createDetailsNode(summary)
    72→
    73→      children.forEach((child) => {
    74→        details.append(child)
    75→      })
    76→
    77→      parentNode.replace(details)
    78→      return
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    82→    paragraph.append($createTextNode(`::: ${type}`))
    83→    children.forEach((child) => {
    84→      paragraph.append(child)
    85→    })
    86→    parentNode.replace(paragraph)
    87→  },
    88→}
    89→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/grid-container.ts`

```text
     1→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     2→import { $getRoot, type LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
     3→
     4→import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../nodes/GridContainerNode'
     5→
     6→function quoteAttr(value: string): string {
     7→  return value.replaceAll('"', '\\"')
     8→}
     9→
    10→export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    11→  dependencies: [],
    12→  export: (node: LexicalNode) => {
    13→    if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return null
    14→    const cells = node.getCellEditors().map((editor) =>
    15→      editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
    16→        return $getRoot().getTextContent()
    17→      }),
    18→    )
    19→    const body = cells.map((content) => `::: cell\n${content}\n:::`).join('\n')
    20→    return `::: grid{cols=${node.getCols()} gap="${quoteAttr(node.getGap())}"}\n${body}\n:::`
    21→  },
    22→  regExp: /a^/,
    23→  replace: () => {},
    24→  type: 'element',
    25→}
    26→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    24→export type AlertType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'

    28→  'tip',

    30→  'warning',

    33→
    34→export const ALERT_LABELS: Record<AlertType, string> = {

    36→  tip: 'Tip',
    37→  important: 'Important',
    38→  warning: 'Warning',
    39→  caution: 'Caution',
    40→}
    41→
    42→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    43→  return createEditor({
    44→    namespace: 'AlertContent',
    45→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    46→    theme: editorTheme,
    47→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    48→      console.error('[AlertContent]', error)
    49→    },
    50→  })
    51→}
    52→
    53→export type SerializedAlertQuoteNode = Spread<
    54→  {
    55→    alertType: AlertType
    56→    content: SerializedEditorState
    57→  },
    58→  SerializedLexicalNode
    59→>
    60→
    61→export class AlertQuoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    62→  __alertType: AlertType
    63→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    64→
    65→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    66→    {
    67→      title: 'Callout',
    68→      icon: createElement(Info, { size: 20 }),
    69→      description: 'Info callout block',
    70→      keywords: ['alert', 'note', 'info', 'callout'],
    71→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    72→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    73→        editor.update(() => {
    74→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('note')])
    75→        })
    76→      },
    77→    },
    78→    {
    79→      title: 'Tip',
    80→      icon: createElement(Lightbulb, { size: 20 }),
    81→      description: 'Highlight a useful tip',
    82→      keywords: ['alert', 'tip', 'hint'],
    83→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    84→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    85→        editor.update(() => {
    86→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('tip')])
    87→        })
    88→      },
    89→    },
    90→    {
    91→      title: 'Warning',
    92→      icon: createElement(TriangleAlertIcon, { size: 20 }),
    93→      description: 'Warn about something',
    94→      keywords: ['alert', 'warning', 'caution'],
    95→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    96→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    97→        editor.update(() => {
    98→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('warning')])
    99→        })
   100→      },
   101→    },
   102→  ]
   103→
   104→  static getType(): string {
   105→    return 'alert-quote'
   106→  }
   107→
   108→  static clone(node: AlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   109→    return new AlertQuoteNode(
   110→      node.__alertType,
   111→      node.__contentEditor,
   112→      node.__key,
   113→    )
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  constructor(
   117→    alertType: AlertType,
   118→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   119→    key?: NodeKey,
   120→  ) {
   121→    super(key)
   122→    this.__alertType = alertType
   123→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   127→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   128→    div.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   129→    return div
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  updateDOM(prevNode: AlertQuoteNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   133→    if (prevNode.__alertType !== this.__alertType) {
   134→      dom.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   135→    }
   136→    return false
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  isInline(): boolean {
   140→    return false
   141→  }
   142→
   143→  getAlertType(): AlertType {
   144→    return this.__alertType
   145→  }
   146→
   147→  setAlertType(alertType: AlertType): void {
   148→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   149→    writable.__alertType = alertType
   150→  }
   151→
   152→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   153→    return this.__contentEditor
   154→  }
   155→
   156→  getTextContent(): string {
   157→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   158→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   159→    })
   160→  }
   161→
   162→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedAlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   163→    const node = new AlertQuoteNode(serializedNode.alertType)
   164→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   165→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   166→        serializedNode.content,
   167→      )
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→    return node
   171→  }
   172→
   173→  exportJSON(): SerializedAlertQuoteNode {
   174→    return {
   175→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   176→      type: 'alert-quote',
   177→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   178→      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   179→      version: 1,
   180→    }
   181→  }
   182→
   183→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   184→    return createElement(AlertReadOnlyDecorator, {
   185→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   186→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   187→    })
   188→  }
   189→}
   190→
   191→export function $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType: AlertType): AlertQuoteNode {
   192→  return new AlertQuoteNode(alertType)
   193→}
   194→
   195→export function $isAlertQuoteNode(
   196→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   197→): node is AlertQuoteNode {

   199→}
```

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { Flag } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { BannerReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/BannerReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type BannerType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'
    21→
    22→const LEGACY_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
    23→  info: 'note',
    24→  success: 'tip',
    25→  error: 'caution',
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function normalizeBannerType(type: string): BannerType {
    29→  if (type in LEGACY_TYPE_MAP) return LEGACY_TYPE_MAP[type]
    30→  return (type as BannerType) || 'note'
    31→}
    32→
    33→export const BANNER_TYPES: BannerType[] = [
    34→  'note',
    35→  'tip',
    36→  'important',
    37→  'warning',
    38→  'caution',
    39→]
    40→
    41→export const BANNER_LABELS: Record<BannerType, string> = {
    42→  note: 'Note',
    43→  tip: 'Tip',
    44→  important: 'Important',
    45→  warning: 'Warning',
    46→  caution: 'Caution',
    47→}
    48→
    49→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    50→  return createEditor({
    51→    namespace: 'BannerContent',
    52→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    53→    theme: editorTheme,
    54→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    55→      console.error('[BannerContent]', error)
    56→    },
    57→  })
    58→}
    59→
    60→export type SerializedBannerNode = Spread<
    61→  {
    62→    bannerType: BannerType
    63→    content: SerializedEditorState
    64→  },
    65→  SerializedLexicalNode
    66→>
    67→
    68→interface LegacySerializedBannerNode extends SerializedBannerNode {
    69→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    70→}
    71→
    72→export class BannerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    73→  __bannerType: BannerType
    74→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    75→
    76→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    77→    {
    78→      title: 'Banner',
    79→      icon: createElement(Flag, { size: 20 }),
    80→      description: 'Highlighted banner block',
    81→      keywords: ['banner', 'notice', 'announcement'],
    82→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    83→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    84→        editor.update(() => {
    85→          $insertNodes([$createBannerNode('note')])
    86→        })
    87→      },
    88→    },
    89→  ]
    90→
    91→  static getType(): string {
    92→    return 'banner'
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  static clone(node: BannerNode): BannerNode {
    96→    return new BannerNode(node.__bannerType, node.__contentEditor, node.__key)
    97→  }
    98→
    99→  constructor(
   100→    bannerType: BannerType,
   101→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   102→    key?: NodeKey,
   103→  ) {
   104→    super(key)
   105→    this.__bannerType = bannerType
   106→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   110→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   111→    div.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   112→    return div
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  updateDOM(prevNode: BannerNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   116→    if (prevNode.__bannerType !== this.__bannerType) {
   117→      dom.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   118→    }
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  isInline(): boolean {
   123→    return false
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  getBannerType(): BannerType {
   127→    return this.__bannerType
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  setBannerType(bannerType: BannerType): void {
   131→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   132→    writable.__bannerType = bannerType
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   136→    return this.__contentEditor
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  getTextContent(): string {
   140→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   141→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   142→    })
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedBannerNode): BannerNode {
   146→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedBannerNode
   147→    const bannerType = normalizeBannerType(serializedNode.bannerType)
   148→    const node = new BannerNode(bannerType)
   149→
   150→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   151→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   152→        serializedNode.content,
   153→      )
   154→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   155→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   156→      // Legacy ElementNode format: wrap children into editor state
   157→      const content = {
   158→        root: {
   159→          children: legacy.children,
   160→          direction: null,
   161→          format: '',
   162→          indent: 0,
   163→          type: 'root',
   164→          version: 1,
   165→        },
   166→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   167→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(content)
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→
   171→    return node
   172→  }
   173→
   174→  exportJSON(): SerializedBannerNode {
   175→    return {
   176→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   177→      type: 'banner',
   178→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,

   184→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   185→    return createElement(BannerReadOnlyDecorator, {

   187→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   188→    })
   189→  }
   190→}

   196→export function $isBannerNode(
   197→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
```

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { LayoutGrid } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { GridReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/GridReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type SerializedGridContainerNode = Spread<
    21→  {
    22→    cols: number
    23→    gap?: string
    24→    cells: SerializedEditorState[]
    25→  },
    26→  SerializedLexicalNode
    27→>
    28→
    29→interface LegacySerializedGridNode {
    30→  type?: string
    31→  version?: number
    32→  cols?: number
    33→  gap?: string | number
    34→  cells?: SerializedEditorState[]
    35→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    36→}
    37→
    38→function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    39→  return createEditor({
    40→    namespace: 'GridCell',
    41→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    42→    theme: editorTheme,
    43→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    44→      console.error('[GridCell]', error)
    45→    },
    46→  })
    47→}
    48→
    49→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    50→  __cols: number
    51→  __gap: string
    52→  __cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    53→
    54→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    55→    {
    56→      title: 'Grid',
    57→      icon: createElement(LayoutGrid, { size: 20 }),
    58→      description: 'Grid layout container',
    59→      keywords: ['grid', 'columns', 'layout'],
    60→      section: 'LAYOUT',
    61→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    62→        editor.update(() => {
    63→          $insertNodes([$createGridContainerNode(2)])
    64→        })
    65→      },
    66→    },
    67→  ]
    68→
    69→  static getType(): string {
    70→    return 'grid-container'
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
    74→    return new GridContainerNode(
    75→      node.__cols,
    76→      node.__gap,
    77→      [...node.__cellEditors],
    78→      node.__key,
    79→    )
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  constructor(
    83→    cols = 2,
    84→    gap?: string,
    85→    cellEditors?: LexicalEditor[],
    86→    key?: NodeKey,
    87→  ) {
    88→    super(key)
    89→    this.__cols = cols
    90→    this.__gap = gap || '16px'
    91→    if (cellEditors) {
    92→      this.__cellEditors = cellEditors
    93→    } else {
    94→      this.__cellEditors = Array.from({ length: cols }, () =>
    95→        createCellEditor(),
    96→      )
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   101→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   102→    div.className = 'rich-grid-container'
   103→    return div
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   107→    return false
   108→  }
   109→
   110→  isInline(): boolean {
   111→    return false
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getCols(): number {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__cols
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setCols(cols: number): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    const prev = writable.__cellEditors.length
   121→    writable.__cols = cols
   122→    if (cols > prev) {
   123→      for (let i = prev; i < cols; i++) {
   124→        writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  getGap(): string {
   130→    return this.getLatest().__gap
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  setGap(gap: string): void {
   134→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   135→    writable.__gap = gap
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  getCellEditors(): LexicalEditor[] {
   139→    return this.getLatest().__cellEditors
   140→  }
   141→
   142→  addCells(count: number): void {
   143→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   144→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   145→      writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   146→    }
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  removeCells(count: number): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    const editors = writable.__cellEditors
   152→    const toRemove = Math.min(count, editors.length)
   153→    for (let i = 0; i < toRemove; i++) {
   154→      const editor = editors.at(-1)
   155→      if (!editor) break
   156→      const isEmpty = editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   157→        return $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0
   158→      })
   159→      if (!isEmpty) break
   160→      editors.pop()
   161→    }
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  getTextContent(): string {
   165→    return this.__cellEditors
   166→      .map((editor) =>
   167→        editor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContent()),
   168→      )
   169→      .join('\n')
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  static importJSON(
   173→    serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode,
   174→  ): GridContainerNode {
   175→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridNode
   176→    const cols = legacy.cols || 2
   177→    const rawGap = legacy.gap
   178→    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
   179→    const node = new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   180→
   181→    if (legacy.cells && legacy.cells.length > 0) {
   182→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = legacy.cells.map((cellState) => {
   183→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   184→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
   185→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   186→        return editor
   187→      })
   188→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   189→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   190→      // Legacy ElementNode format: each child becomes a cell
   191→      const { children } = legacy
   192→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
   193→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   194→        const content = {
   195→          root: {
   196→            children: [child],
   197→            direction: null,
   198→            format: '',
   199→            indent: 0,
   200→            type: 'root',
   201→            version: 1,
   202→          },
   203→        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   204→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(content)
   205→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   206→        return editor
   207→      })
   208→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    return node
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  exportJSON(): SerializedGridContainerNode {
   215→    return {
   216→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   217→      type: 'grid-container',
   218→      cols: this.__cols,
   219→      gap: this.__gap,
   220→      cells: this.__cellEditors.map((editor) =>
   221→        editor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   222→      ),
   223→      version: 1,
   224→    }
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   228→    return createElement(GridReadOnlyDecorator, {
   229→      cols: this.__cols,
   230→      gap: this.__gap,
   231→      cellEditors: this.__cellEditors,
   232→    })
   233→  }
   234→}
   235→
   236→export function $createGridContainerNode(
   237→  cols = 2,
   238→  gap?: string,
   239→): GridContainerNode {
   240→  return new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   241→}
   242→
   243→export function $isGridContainerNode(
   244→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   245→): node is GridContainerNode {
   246→  return node instanceof GridContainerNode
   247→}
   248→
```

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     3→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     4→import { LinkPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalLinkPlugin'
     5→import { ListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalListPlugin'
     6→import { LexicalNestedComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalNestedComposer'
     7→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     8→import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     9→import { $getNodeByKey, $getRoot } from 'lexical'
    10→import { LayoutGrid, Minus, Plus } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../../nodes/GridContainerNode'
    14→
    15→interface GridEditDecoratorProps {
    16→  nodeKey: string
    17→  cols: number
    18→  gap: string
    19→  cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    20→}
    21→
    22→const COL_OPTIONS = [1, 2, 3, 4] as const
    23→
    24→export function GridEditDecorator({
    25→  nodeKey,
    26→  cols: initialCols,
    27→  gap,
    28→  cellEditors,
    29→}: GridEditDecoratorProps) {
    30→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    31→  const [currentCols, setCurrentCols] = useState(initialCols)
    32→
    33→  useEffect(() => {
    34→    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    35→      editorState.read(() => {
    36→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    37→        if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    38→          setCurrentCols(node.getCols())
    39→        }
    40→      })
    41→    })
    42→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    43→
    44→  const handleSetCols = useCallback(
    45→    (cols: number) => {
    46→      editor.update(() => {
    47→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    48→        if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    49→          node.setCols(cols)
    50→        }
    51→      })
    52→    },
    53→    [editor, nodeKey],
    54→  )
    55→
    56→  const handleAddRow = useCallback(() => {
    57→    editor.update(() => {
    58→      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    59→      if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    60→        node.addCells(node.getCols())
    61→      }
    62→    })
    63→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    64→
    65→  const handleRemoveRow = useCallback(() => {
    66→    editor.update(() => {
    67→      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    68→      if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return
    69→      const cols = node.getCols()
    70→      const editors = node.getCellEditors()
    71→      if (editors.length <= cols) return
    72→
    73→      const lastRow = editors.slice(-cols)
    74→      const allEmpty = lastRow.every((cellEditor) =>
    75→        cellEditor
    76→          .getEditorState()
    77→          .read(() => $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0),
    78→      )
    79→      if (!allEmpty) return
    80→      node.removeCells(cols)
    81→    })
    82→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    83→
    84→  return (
    85→    <>
    86→      <div
    87→        className="rich-grid-toolbar"
    88→        onMouseDown={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
    89→      >
    90→        <span className="rich-grid-toolbar-icon">
    91→          <LayoutGrid size={14} />
    92→        </span>
    93→        {COL_OPTIONS.map((n) => (
    94→          <button
    95→            key={n}
    96→            type="button"
    97→            className={`rich-grid-col-btn${n === currentCols ? ' rich-grid-col-btn-active' : ''}`}
    98→            onClick={() => handleSetCols(n)}
    99→            aria-label={`${n} columns`}
   100→          >
   101→            {n}
   102→          </button>
   103→        ))}
   104→        <div className="rich-grid-toolbar-divider" />
   105→        <button
   106→          type="button"
   107→          className="rich-grid-action-btn"
   108→          onClick={handleAddRow}
   109→          aria-label="Add row"
   110→        >
   111→          <Plus size={14} />
   112→        </button>
   113→        <button
   114→          type="button"
   115→          className="rich-grid-action-btn"
   116→          onClick={handleRemoveRow}
   117→          aria-label="Remove row"
   118→        >
   119→          <Minus size={14} />
   120→        </button>
   121→      </div>
   122→      <div
   123→        className="rich-grid-inner"
   124→        style={{
   125→          gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${currentCols}, 1fr)`,
   126→          gap,
   127→        }}
   128→      >
   129→        {cellEditors.map((cellEditor, i) => (
   130→          <div key={i} className="rich-grid-cell">
   131→            <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={cellEditor}>
   132→              <RichTextPlugin
   133→                contentEditable={
   134→                  <ContentEditable
   135→                    className="rich-grid-cell-editable"
   136→                    aria-placeholder=""
   137→                    placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
   138→                  />
   139→                }
   140→                ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
   141→              />
   142→              <ListPlugin />
   143→              <LinkPlugin />
   144→            </LexicalNestedComposer>
   145→          </div>
   146→        ))}
   147→      </div>
   148→    </>
   149→  )
   150→}
   151→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     3→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     4→import { LinkPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalLinkPlugin'
     5→import { ListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalListPlugin'
     6→import { LexicalNestedComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalNestedComposer'
     7→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     8→import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     9→import { $getNodeByKey } from 'lexical'
    10→import { useCallback } from 'react'
    11→
    12→import type { AlertType } from '../../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    13→import { $isAlertQuoteNode } from '../../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    14→import { AlertRenderer } from '../renderers/AlertRenderer'
    15→import { RendererWrapper } from '../RendererWrapper'
    16→
    17→interface AlertEditDecoratorProps {
    18→  nodeKey: string
    19→  alertType: AlertType
    20→  contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    21→}
    22→
    23→export function AlertEditDecorator({
    24→  nodeKey,
    25→  alertType,
    26→  contentEditor,
    27→}: AlertEditDecoratorProps) {
    28→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    29→  const editable = editor.isEditable()
    30→
    31→  const handleTypeChange = useCallback(
    32→    (newType: AlertType) => {
    33→      editor.update(() => {
    34→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    35→        if ($isAlertQuoteNode(node)) {
    36→          node.setAlertType(newType)
    37→        }
    38→      })
    39→    },
    40→    [editor, nodeKey],
    41→  )
    42→
    43→  return (
    44→    <>
    45→      <RendererWrapper
    46→        rendererKey="Alert"
    47→        defaultRenderer={AlertRenderer}
    48→        props={{
    49→          type: alertType,
    50→          editable,
    51→          onTypeChange: editable ? handleTypeChange : undefined,
    52→        }}
    53→      />
    54→      <div className="rich-alert-content">
    55→        <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={contentEditor}>
    56→          <RichTextPlugin
    57→            contentEditable={
    58→              <ContentEditable
    59→                className="rich-alert-content-editable"
    60→                style={{ outline: 'none' }}
    61→                aria-placeholder=""
    62→                placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
    63→              />
    64→            }
    65→            ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
    66→          />
    67→          <ListPlugin />
    68→          <LinkPlugin />
    69→        </LexicalNestedComposer>
    70→      </div>
    71→    </>
    72→  )
    73→}
    74→
```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-25 11:36:27Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Maximize2, ScanSearch, X, ZoomIn, ZoomOut } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import { Component, type FC, type ReactNode } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    10→
    11→export interface TldrawStaticRendererProps {
    12→  snapshot: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export const TldrawStaticRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
    16→  snapshot,
    17→}) => {
    18→  const theme = useColorScheme()
    19→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    20→  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    if (hasEnteredView) return
    24→    const target = containerRef.current
    25→    if (!target) return
    26→
    27→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    28→      (entries) => {
    29→        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
    30→          setHasEnteredView(true)
    31→          observer.disconnect()
    32→        }
    33→      },
    34→      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    35→    )
    36→    observer.observe(target)
    37→    return () => observer.disconnect()
    38→  }, [hasEnteredView])
    39→
    40→  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    41→    return (
    42→      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
    43→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
    44→      </div>
    45→    )
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  return (
    49→    <div ref={containerRef}>
    50→      <TldrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    51→    </div>
    52→  )
    53→}
    54→
    55→// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---
    56→
    57→const TldrawExpandContent: FC<{
    58→  dismiss: () => void
    59→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    60→  data: Record<string, any>
    61→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    62→}> = ({ dismiss, TldrawComponent, data, theme }) => (
    63→  <>
    64→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
    65→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Whiteboard</span>
    66→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
    67→      <button type="button" className={css.tldrawHeaderClose} onClick={dismiss}>
    68→        <X size={18} />
    69→      </button>
    70→    </div>
    71→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
    72→      <TldrawComponent
    73→        snapshot={data}
    74→        hideUi
    75→        onMount={(editor: any) => {
    76→          editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
    77→          editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
    78→          editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
    79→          setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
    80→        }}
    81→      />
    82→    </div>
    83→  </>
    84→)
    85→
    86→// --- Main Canvas ---
    87→
    88→const TldrawStaticCanvas: FC<{
    89→  snapshot: string
    90→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    91→}> = ({ snapshot, theme }) => {
    92→  const {
    93→    snapshot: data,
    94→    loading: dataLoading,
    95→    error: dataError,
    96→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
    97→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
    98→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
    99→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   100→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   101→
   102→  useEffect(() => {
   103→    import('tldraw')
   104→      .then((mod) => {
   105→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   106→        setLibLoading(false)
   107→      })
   108→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   109→  }, [])
   110→
   111→  useEffect(() => {
   112→    if (editorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   113→      editorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   114→    }
   115→  }, [theme])
   116→
   117→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   118→    (editor: any) => {
   119→      editorRef.current = editor
   120→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   121→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   122→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   123→      setTimeout(() => {
   124→        editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false })
   125→      }, 100)
   126→    },
   127→    [theme],
   128→  )
   129→
   130→  const handleExpand = useCallback(() => {
   131→    if (!TldrawComponent || !data) return
   132→    presentDialog({
   133→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   134→        <TldrawExpandContent
   135→          dismiss={dismiss}
   136→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   137→          data={data}
   138→          theme={theme}
   139→        />
   140→      ),
   141→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   142→      portalClassName,
   143→      showCloseButton: false,
   144→      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
   145→    })
   146→  }, [TldrawComponent, data, theme, portalClassName])
   147→
   148→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   149→
   150→  if (loading) {
   151→    return (
   152→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   153→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
   154→      </div>
   155→    )
   156→  }
   157→
   158→  if (dataError || !data) {
   159→    return (
   160→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   161→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError || 'No data'}</div>
   162→      </div>
   163→    )
   164→  }
   165→
   166→  if (!TldrawComponent) {
   167→    return (
   168→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   169→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to load tldraw</div>
   170→      </div>
   171→    )
   172→  }
   173→
   174→  return (
   175→    <div
   176→      className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}
   177→      data-theme={theme}
   178→      data-color-scheme={theme}
   179→    >
   180→      <TldrawErrorBoundary
   181→        fallback={
   182→          <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to render tldraw</div>
   183→        }
   184→      >
   185→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={data} hideUi onMount={handleMount} />
   186→      </TldrawErrorBoundary>
   187→
   188→      <div className={css.tldrawActionGroup}>
   189→        <button
   190→          type="button"
   191→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   192→          title="Zoom In"
   193→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomIn()}
   194→        >
   195→          <ZoomIn size={20} />
   196→        </button>
   197→        <button
   198→          type="button"
   199→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   200→          title="Zoom Out"
   201→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomOut()}
   202→        >
   203→          <ZoomOut size={20} />
   204→        </button>
   205→        <button
   206→          type="button"
   207→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   208→          title="Fit to Content"
   209→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomToFit()}
   210→        >
   211→          <ScanSearch size={20} />
   212→        </button>
   213→        <button
   214→          type="button"
   215→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   216→          title="Expand"
   217→          onClick={handleExpand}
   218→        >
   219→          <Maximize2 size={20} />
   220→        </button>
   221→      </div>
   222→    </div>
   223→  )
   224→}
   225→
   226→class TldrawErrorBoundary extends Component<
   227→  { fallback: ReactNode; children: ReactNode },
   228→  { hasError: boolean }
   229→> {
   230→  state = { hasError: false }
   231→  static getDerivedStateFromError() {
   232→    return { hasError: true }
   233→  }
   234→  render() {
   235→    return this.state.hasError ? this.props.fallback : this.props.children
   236→  }
   237→}
   238→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,

     5→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'

     9→
    10→import { BannerEditDecorator } from '../components/decorators/BannerEditDecorator'
    11→import {
    12→  BannerNode,
    13→  normalizeBannerType,
    14→  type SerializedBannerNode,
    15→} from './BannerNode'
    16→
    17→interface LegacySerializedBannerEditNode extends SerializedBannerNode {
    18→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    19→}
    20→
    21→export class BannerEditNode extends BannerNode {
    22→  static clone(node: BannerEditNode): BannerEditNode {
    23→    return new BannerEditNode(
    24→      node.__bannerType,
    25→      node.__contentEditor,
    26→      node.__key,
    27→    )
    28→  }
    29→
    30→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedBannerNode): BannerEditNode {
    31→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedBannerEditNode
    32→    const bannerType = normalizeBannerType(serializedNode.bannerType)
    33→    const node = new BannerEditNode(bannerType)
    34→
    35→    if (serializedNode.content) {
    36→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
    37→        serializedNode.content,
    38→      )
    39→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    40→    } else if (legacy.children) {
    41→      const content = {
    42→        root: {
    43→          children: legacy.children,
    44→          direction: null,
    45→          format: '',
    46→          indent: 0,
    47→          type: 'root',
    48→          version: 1,
    49→        },
    50→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    51→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(content)
    52→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    return node
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    59→    return createElement(BannerEditDecorator, {
    60→      nodeKey: this.__key,
    61→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
    62→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
    63→    })
    64→  }
    65→}
```

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  SerializedEditorState,
     5→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import { createEditor } from 'lexical'
     8→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
     9→import { createElement } from 'react'
    10→
    11→import { GridEditDecorator } from '../components/decorators/GridEditDecorator'
    12→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    13→import {
    14→  GridContainerNode,
    15→  type SerializedGridContainerNode,
    16→} from './GridContainerNode'
    17→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    18→
    19→interface LegacySerializedGridEditNode {
    20→  type?: string
    21→  version?: number
    22→  cols?: number
    23→  gap?: string | number
    24→  cells?: SerializedEditorState[]
    25→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    26→}
    27→
    28→function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    29→  return createEditor({
    30→    namespace: 'GridCell',
    31→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    32→    theme: editorTheme,
    33→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    34→      console.error('[GridCell]', error)
    35→    },
    36→  })
    37→}
    38→
    39→export class GridEditNode extends GridContainerNode {
    40→  static clone(node: GridEditNode): GridEditNode {
    41→    return new GridEditNode(
    42→      node.__cols,
    43→      node.__gap,
    44→      [...node.__cellEditors],
    45→      node.__key,
    46→    )
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode): GridEditNode {
    50→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridEditNode
    51→    const cols = legacy.cols || 2
    52→    const rawGap = legacy.gap
    53→    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
    54→    const node = new GridEditNode(cols, gap)
    55→
    56→    if (legacy.cells && legacy.cells.length > 0) {
    57→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = legacy.cells.map((cellState) => {
    58→        const editor = createCellEditor()
    59→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
    60→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
    61→        return editor
    62→      })
    63→      node.__cellEditors = editors
    64→    } else if (legacy.children) {
    65→      const { children } = legacy
    66→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
    67→        const editor = createCellEditor()
    68→        const content = {
    69→          root: {
    70→            children: [child],
    71→            direction: null,
    72→            format: '',
    73→            indent: 0,
    74→            type: 'root',
    75→            version: 1,
    76→          },
    77→        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    78→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(content)
    79→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
    80→        return editor
    81→      })
    82→      node.__cellEditors = editors
    83→    }
    84→
    85→    return node
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    89→    return createElement(GridEditDecorator, {
    90→      nodeKey: this.__key,
    91→      cols: this.__cols,
    92→      gap: this.__gap,
    93→      cellEditors: this.__cellEditors,
    94→    })
    95→  }
    96→}
    97→
```
</details></tool-use>
