 `./packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog, SegmentedControl } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Clipboard, Download, Pencil, Upload, X } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import type { FC } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
    10→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    11→
    12→export interface TldrawEditRendererProps {
    13→  snapshot: string
    14→  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
    15→}
    16→
    17→const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000
    18→
    19→// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────
    20→
    21→const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
    22→  dismiss: () => void
    23→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    24→  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
    25→  initialSnapshot: string
    26→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    27→  onSave: (ref: string) => void
    28→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
    29→  onClose: (doc?: Record<string, any>) => void
    30→}> = ({
    31→  dismiss,
    32→  TldrawComponent,
    33→  initialData,
    34→  initialSnapshot,
    35→  theme,
    36→  onSave,
    37→  saveSnapshot,
    38→  onClose,
    39→}) => {
    40→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
    41→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
    42→  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    43→  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
    44→  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
    45→  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote'>(() => {
    46→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim())
    47→      return 'inline'
    48→    try {
    49→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    50→      return 'inline'
    51→    } catch {
    52→      return 'remote'
    53→    }
    54→  })
    55→  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
    56→  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    57→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return ''
    58→    try {
    59→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    60→      return ''
    61→    } catch {
    62→      return initialSnapshot
    63→    }
    64→  })
    65→  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
    66→
    67→  useEffect(() => {
    68→    return () => {
    69→      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    70→    }
    71→  }, [])
    72→
    73→  const performSave = useCallback((): Promise<void> => {
    74→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    75→    const editor = editorRef.current
    76→    if (!editor) return Promise.resolve()
    77→    try {
    78→      const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
    79→      if (storageModeRef.current === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
    80→        setIsSaving(true)
    81→        return saveSnapshot(doc).then(
    82→          (ref) => {
    83→            onSave(ref)
    84→            isDirtyRef.current = false
    85→            setIsDirty(false)
    86→            setIsSaving(false)
    87→            setSavedRef(ref)
    88→          },
    89→          () => {
    90→            setIsSaving(false)
    91→          },
    92→        )
    93→      } else {
    94→        onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
    95→        isDirtyRef.current = false
    96→        setIsDirty(false)
    97→      }
    98→    } catch {
    99→      // ignore
   100→    }
   101→    return Promise.resolve()
   102→  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot])
   103→
   104→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   105→    (editor: any) => {
   106→      editorRef.current = editor
   107→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   108→      editor.store.listen(
   109→        () => {
   110→          isDirtyRef.current = true
   111→          setIsDirty(true)
   112→          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   113→          saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(
   114→            () => performSave(),
   115→            SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS,
   116→          )
   117→        },
   118→        { scope: 'document' },
   119→      )
   120→    },
   121→    [theme, performSave],
   122→  )
   123→
   124→  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
   125→    void performSave().then(() => {
   126→      const editor = editorRef.current
   127→      onClose(editor?.store.getSnapshot())
   128→      dismiss()
   129→    })
   130→  }, [performSave, onClose, dismiss])
   131→
   132→  const handleDiscard = useCallback(() => {
   133→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   134→    dismiss()
   135→  }, [dismiss])
   136→
   137→  const showConfirmDialog = useCallback(() => {
   138→    presentDialog({
   139→      title: 'Unsaved Changes',
   140→      description:
   141→        'You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.',
   142→      content: ({ dismiss: dismissConfirm }) => (
   143→        <div className={css.tldrawConfirmActions}>
   144→          <button
   145→            type="button"
   146→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtn}
   147→            onClick={dismissConfirm}
   148→          >
   149→            Continue Editing
   150→          </button>
   151→          <button
   152→            type="button"
   153→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnDanger}
   154→            onClick={() => {
   155→              dismissConfirm()
   156→              handleDiscard()
   157→            }}
   158→          >
   159→            Discard
   160→          </button>
   161→          <button
   162→            type="button"
   163→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnPrimary}
   164→            onClick={() => {
   165→              dismissConfirm()
   166→              handleSaveAndClose()
   167→            }}
   168→          >
   169→            Save & Close
   170→          </button>
   171→        </div>
   172→      ),
   173→      portalClassName,
   174→      showCloseButton: false,
   175→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   176→    })
   177→  }, [handleDiscard, handleSaveAndClose, portalClassName])
   178→
   179→  // Intercept ESC in capture phase to prevent Base UI auto-dismiss
   180→  useEffect(() => {
   181→    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   182→      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   183→        e.preventDefault()
   184→        e.stopImmediatePropagation()
   185→        if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   186→          showConfirmDialog()
   187→        } else {
   188→          dismiss()
   189→        }
   190→      }
   191→    }
   192→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   193→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   194→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   195→
   196→  const attemptClose = useCallback(() => {
   197→    if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   198→      showConfirmDialog()
   199→    } else {
   200→      dismiss()
   201→    }
   202→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   203→
   204→  const handleManualUpload = useCallback(() => {
   205→    performSave()
   206→  }, [performSave])
   207→
   208→  const handleExportJson = useCallback(() => {
   209→    const editor = editorRef.current
   210→    if (!editor) return
   211→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   212→    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(doc, null, 2)], {
   213→      type: 'application/json',
   214→    })
   215→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   216→    const a = document.createElement('a')
   217→    a.href = url
   218→    a.download = 'tldraw-snapshot.json'
   219→    a.click()
   220→    URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   221→  }, [])
   222→
   223→  const handleCopyJson = useCallback(() => {
   224→    const editor = editorRef.current
   225→    if (!editor) return
   226→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   227→    void navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(doc))
   228→  }, [])
   229→
   230→  const handleCopyRef = useCallback(() => {
   231→    if (savedRef) void navigator.clipboard.writeText(savedRef)
   232→  }, [savedRef])
   233→
   234→  const handleStorageModeChange = useCallback(
   235→    (newMode: 'inline' | 'remote') => {
   236→      setStorageMode(newMode)
   237→      storageModeRef.current = newMode
   238→      if (newMode === 'inline') setSavedRef('')
   239→      performSave()
   240→    },
   241→    [performSave],
   242→  )
   243→
   244→  return (
   245→    <>
   246→      {/* Header */}
   247→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
   248→        <span
   249→          className={css.tldrawStatusDot}
   250→          style={{ backgroundColor: isDirty ? '#f59e0b' : '#22c55e' }}
   251→        />
   252→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Canvas Editor</span>
   253→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
   254→
   255→        <div className={css.tldrawHeaderActions}>
   256→          {saveSnapshot && (
   257→            <>
   258→              <SegmentedControl
   259→                items={[
   260→                  { value: 'inline', label: 'Inline' },
   261→                  { value: 'remote', label: 'Remote' },
   262→                ]}
   263→                value={storageMode}
   264→                onChange={handleStorageModeChange}
   265→              />
   266→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   267→              <button
   268→                type="button"
   269→                className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   270→                onClick={handleManualUpload}
   271→                disabled={isSaving}
   272→              >
   273→                <Upload size={14} />
   274→                <span>{isSaving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}</span>
   275→              </button>
   276→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   277→            </>
   278→          )}
   279→          <button
   280→            type="button"
   281→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   282→            onClick={handleExportJson}
   283→          >
   284→            <Download size={14} />
   285→            JSON
   286→          </button>
   287→          <button
   288→            type="button"
   289→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   290→            onClick={handleCopyJson}
   291→          >
   292→            <Clipboard size={14} />
   293→            Copy
   294→          </button>
   295→          {storageMode === 'remote' && savedRef && (
   296→            <>
   297→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   298→              <button
   299→                type="button"
   300→                className={css.tldrawActionBarUrl}
   301→                onClick={handleCopyRef}
   302→                title={savedRef}
   303→              >
   304→                {savedRef}
   305→              </button>
   306→            </>
   307→          )}
   308→        </div>
   309→
   310→        <button
   311→          type="button"
   312→          className={css.tldrawHeaderClose}
   313→          onClick={attemptClose}
   314→        >
   315→          <X size={18} />
   316→        </button>
   317→      </div>
   318→
   319→      {/* Canvas */}
   320→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
   321→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={initialData} onMount={handleMount} />
   322→      </div>
   323→    </>
   324→  )
   325→}
   326→
   327→// ── Main component ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   328→
   329→export const TldrawEditRenderer: FC<TldrawEditRendererProps> = ({
   330→  snapshot,
   331→  onSnapshotChange,
   332→}) => {
   333→  const theme = useColorScheme()
   334→  const { saveSnapshot } = useTldrawConfig()
   335→  const {
   336→    snapshot: initialData,
   337→    loading: dataLoading,
   338→    error: dataError,
   339→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
   340→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
   341→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
   342→  const previewEditorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   343→  const initialDataRef = useRef<Record<string, any> | undefined>(undefined)
   344→  const onSnapshotChangeRef = useRef(onSnapshotChange)
   345→  onSnapshotChangeRef.current = onSnapshotChange
   346→  const saveSnapshotRef = useRef(saveSnapshot)
   347→  saveSnapshotRef.current = saveSnapshot
   348→  const snapshotRef = useRef(snapshot)
   349→  snapshotRef.current = snapshot
   350→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   351→
   352→  useEffect(() => {
   353→    if (initialData && !initialDataRef.current) {
   354→      initialDataRef.current = initialData
   355→    }
   356→  }, [initialData])
   357→
   358→  useEffect(() => {
   359→    import('tldraw')
   360→      .then((mod) => {
   361→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   362→        setLibLoading(false)
   363→      })
   364→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   365→  }, [])
   366→
   367→  useEffect(() => {
   368→    if (previewEditorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   369→      previewEditorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({
   370→        colorScheme: theme,
   371→      })
   372→    }
   373→  }, [theme])
   374→
   375→  const handlePreviewMount = useCallback(
   376→    (editor: any) => {
   377→      previewEditorRef.current = editor
   378→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   379→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   380→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   381→      setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
   382→    },
   383→    [theme],
   384→  )
   385→
   386→  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
   387→    if (!TldrawComponent) return
   388→    presentDialog({
   389→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   390→        <TldrawEditorDialogContent
   391→          dismiss={dismiss}
   392→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   393→          initialData={initialDataRef.current}
   394→          initialSnapshot={snapshotRef.current}
   395→          theme={theme}
   396→          onSave={(ref) => onSnapshotChangeRef.current(ref)}
   397→          saveSnapshot={saveSnapshotRef.current}
   398→          onClose={(doc) => {
   399→            if (doc) initialDataRef.current = doc
   400→          }}
   401→        />
   402→      ),
   403→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   404→      portalClassName,
   405→      showCloseButton: false,
   406→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   407→    })
   408→  }, [TldrawComponent, theme, portalClassName])
   409→
   410→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   411→
   412→  if (loading || !TldrawComponent) {
   413→    return (
   414→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   415→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw editor...</div>
   416→      </div>
   417→    )
   418→  }
   419→
   420→  if (dataError) {
   421→    return (
   422→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   423→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError}</div>
   424→      </div>
   425→    )
   426→  }
   427→
   428→  return (
   429→    <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   430→      <TldrawComponent
   431→        snapshot={initialDataRef.current}
   432→        hideUi
   433→        onMount={handlePreviewMount}
   434→      />
   435→
   436→      <button
   437→        type="button"
   438→        className={css.tldrawEditOverlay}
   439→        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   440→      >
   441→        <span className={css.tldrawEditLabel}>
   442→          <Pencil size={16} />
   443→          Edit Whiteboard
   444→        </span>
   445→      </button>
   446→    </div>
   447→  )
   448→}
   449→
```
</details></tool-use>

## Critical Findings

1. **TldrawStaticRenderer (Line 2)**: Imports `presentDialog` from `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`, which is edit-only. This violates the static/edit split contract and will cause bundle bloat when importing the static renderer.

2. **lucide-react in all static renderers**: All files import lucide-react icons. While icons are lightweight, ensure they're not in a true tree-shakeable static bundle if edit variant exists.

3. **SSR Safety**: All files show meaningful first-render HTML (not loading placeholders on initial render for most), except:
   - TldrawStaticRenderer: Shows "Loading..." on first render until in-view (correct for large library)
   - CodeSnippetRenderer: Shows file tabs + fallback code immediately (safe)

Perfect. I now have a complete map. Let me compile the findings into a comprehensive analysis:

## Complete Editor Instance Access Map

Based on thorough exploration of the transformer, node, and decorator files, here's the exact breakdown of all `__contentEditor` / `__cellEditors` usage:

---

### **AlertQuoteNode** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts`)

**Storage:**
- Line 63: `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor`

**Creation:**
- Lines 42-51: `createContentEditor()` factory creates editor with namespace `'AlertContent'`, nodes `NESTED_EDITOR_NODES`, and theme
- Line 123: Constructor initializes: `this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()`

**Access Points:**

| Method | Line | Operation | Type |
|--------|------|-----------|------|
| `getContentEditor()` | 152-154 | Returns `__contentEditor` | **Read-only accessor** |
| `getTextContent()` | 157-159 | Calls `__contentEditor.getEditorState().read()` → `$getRoot().getTextContent()` | **Read-only** |
| `importJSON()` (static) | 165-168 | `parseEditorState()` + `setEditorState()` | **Write** (loads state) |
| `exportJSON()` | 178 | `getEditorState().toJSON()` | **Read-only** |
| `clone()` (static) | 111 | Passes `__contentEditor` to constructor | **Reference copy** |
| `decorate()` | 186 | Passes `__contentEditor` to `AlertReadOnlyDecorator` | **Reference** |

**Transformer Usage** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/alert.ts`):

| Line | Pattern | Operation |
|------|---------|-----------|
| 52 | `alertNode.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)` | **Write** - parses serialized state |
| 53 | `alertNode.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)` | **Write** - loads state into editor |

---

### **AlertQuoteEditNode** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode.ts`)

**Inheritance:** Extends `AlertQuoteNode` (reuses all base node methods)

**Overrides:**

| Method | Line | Operation |
|--------|------|-----------|
| `clone()` | 9-14 | Copies `__contentEditor` reference to new edit node instance |
| `importJSON()` | 17-28 | Same pattern: `parseEditorState()` + `setEditorState()` on `__contentEditor` |
| `decorate()` | 30-36 | Passes `__contentEditor` to `AlertEditDecorator` instead of read-only decorator |

---

### **AlertEditDecorator** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/AlertEditDecorator.tsx`)

**Props:**
- Line 20: `contentEditor: LexicalEditor`

**Access Pattern:**

| Line | Method Call | Operation | Type |
|------|-------------|-----------|------|
| 55 | `<LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={contentEditor}>` | Mounts editor in UI | **Reference mount** |

**Note:** The decorator does NOT directly call methods on `contentEditor`. It passes it to `LexicalNestedComposer`, which becomes the active editor context for the nested edit area.

---

### **BannerNode** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerNode.ts`)

**Storage:**
- Line 74: `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor`

**Creation:**
- Lines 49-57: `createContentEditor()` factory creates editor with namespace `'BannerContent'`
- Line 106: Constructor: `this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()`

**Access Points:**

| Method | Lines | Operation | Type |
|--------|-------|-----------|------|
| `getContentEditor()` | 135-137 | Returns `__contentEditor` | **Read-only accessor** |
| `getTextContent()` | 140-142 | `.getEditorState().read()` → `$getRoot().getTextContent()` | **Read-only** |
| `importJSON()` (static) | 151-154, 167-168 | `parseEditorState()` + `setEditorState()` (2 paths: current + legacy) | **Write** |
| `exportJSON()` | 179 | `getEditorState().toJSON()` | **Read-only** |
| `clone()` | 96 | Passes `__contentEditor` reference | **Reference copy** |
| `decorate()` | 187 | Passes `__contentEditor` to decorator | **Reference** |

**Transformer Usage** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/container.ts`):

| Line | Pattern | Operation |
|------|---------|-----------|
| 60 | `banner.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)` | **Write** |
| 61 | `banner.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)` | **Write** |

---

### **BannerEditNode** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerEditNode.ts`)

**Inheritance:** Extends `BannerNode`

**Overrides:**

| Method | Lines | Operation |
|--------|-------|-----------|
| `clone()` | 22-27 | Copies `__contentEditor` to new instance |
| `importJSON()` | 30-55 | Same write pattern (3 paths: current state, legacy with content, legacy with children) |
| `decorate()` | 58-64 | Returns `BannerEditDecorator` with `__contentEditor` |

---

### **BannerEditDecorator** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/BannerEditDecorator.tsx`)

**Props:**
- Line 20: `contentEditor: LexicalEditor`

**Access:**
- Line 55: `<LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={contentEditor}>` mounts editor in nested context

---

### **GridContainerNode** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`)

**Storage:**
- Line 52: `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]` (array of editors, one per cell)

**Creation:**
- Lines 38-46: `createCellEditor()` factory creates editor with namespace `'GridCell'`
- Lines 94-96: Constructor creates array: `Array.from({ length: cols }, () => createCellEditor())`

**Access Points:**

| Method | Lines | Operation | Type |
|--------|-------|-----------|------|
| `getCellEditors()` | 138-140 | Returns `__cellEditors` array via `getLatest()` | **Read-only accessor** |
| `setCols()` | 118-127 | Mutates array length, calls `createCellEditor()` to add new editors | **Write** (creates editors) |
| `addCells()` | 142-147 | Appends new editors via `createCellEditor()` | **Write** (creates editors) |
| `removeCells()` | 149-162 | Pops editors from array, **reads** via `editor.getEditorState().read()` to check if empty | **Mixed** (read + write) |
| `getTextContent()` | 164-170 | Maps over `__cellEditors`, calls `.getEditorState().read()` on each | **Read-only** |
| `importJSON()` (static) | 172-211 | Creates new editors, calls `createCellEditor()`, `parseEditorState()`, `setEditorState()` for each cell (lines 183-186, 193-206) | **Write** (hydration) |
| `exportJSON()` | 214-225 | Maps `editor.getEditorState().toJSON()` for each cell | **Read-only** |
| `clone()` | 73-79 | Spreads `__cellEditors` array: `[...node.__cellEditors]` | **Reference spread** |
| `decorate()` | 231 | Passes `__cellEditors` array to decorator | **Reference** |

**Transformer Usage** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/grid-container.ts`):

| Line | Pattern | Operation |
|------|---------|-----------|
| 14-17 | `.getCellEditors().map(editor => editor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContent()))` | **Read-only** (export markdown) |

---

### **GridEditNode** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts`)

**Inheritance:** Extends `GridContainerNode`

**Overrides:**

| Method | Lines | Operation |
|--------|-------|-----------|
| `clone()` | 40-46 | Spreads `__cellEditors`: `[...node.__cellEditors]` |
| `importJSON()` | 49-86 | Same pattern as base: creates editors with `createCellEditor()`, hydrates via `parseEditorState()` + `setEditorState()` (lines 57-61, 66-81) |
| `decorate()` | 88-95 | Returns `GridEditDecorator` with `__cellEditors` array |

---

### **GridEditDecorator** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx`)

**Props:**
- Line 19: `cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]`

**Access Points:**

| Line | Operation | Type |
|------|-----------|------|
| 34 | `editor.registerUpdateListener()` (parent editor, monitors node changes) | **Listen to parent** |
| 70 | `node.getCellEditors()` inside `editor.update()` callback | **Read** (get current cell editors) |
| 74-77 | `cellEditor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0)` | **Read-only** (check if empty) |
| 129-146 | `cellEditors.map(cellEditor => <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={cellEditor}>)` | **Mount each** in nested context |

---

## Summary: What Breaks When Changing to SerializedEditorState

**Current Flow:**
```
Node.__contentEditor / __cellEditors (LexicalEditor instances)
  ↓
  stored in node properties throughout lifetime
  ↓
  accessed via getContentEditor() / getCellEditors()
  ↓
  mounted in LexicalNestedComposer (decorators)
  ↓
  read via .getEditorState().read()
  ↓
  written via .parseEditorState() + .setEditorState()
  ↓
  exported via .getEditorState().toJSON()
```

**Critical Break Points if Changed to SerializedEditorState:**

1. **LexicalNestedComposer mounts** (AlertEditDecorator L55, BannerEditDecorator L55, GridEditDecorator L129-146)
   - Expects `initialEditor: LexicalEditor`
   - Would need to create editor from `SerializedEditorState` first

2. **GridEditDecorator read operations** (L74-77)
   - `cellEditor.getEditorState()` assumes live editor instance
   - Would need editor instance to read current state

3. **Import paths** (AlertQuoteEditNode L22-25, BannerEditNode L36-39, GridEditNode L57-60, L67-81)
   - All call `editor.parseEditorState()` + `editor.setEditorState()`
   - Would need to create editors before hydrating

4. **Runtime editor creation** (GridContainerNode L124, L145)
   - `setCols()` and `addCells()` create new editors
   - Would need to create empty editors or deserialize from empty state

5. **Clone operations** (AlertQuoteEditNode L12, BannerEditNode L25, GridEditNode L44)
   - Copy editor references
   - Would need to serialize/deserialize or create fresh editors

**Alternative: Editor Instance Factory**
Instead of storing `SerializedEditorState`, store a **factory/provider** that creates editors on demand:
- Decorators create editors lazily from stored serialized state
- Nodes avoid lifetime editor storage
- Serialization becomes trivial (just store `SerializedEditorState`)
- Still supports all current operations

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 11:38:38Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have comprehensive data from all three exploration agents. Let me synthesize the findings and update the plan to address all 6 user feedback points:

1. **CRITICAL: VideoRenderer + CodeSnippetRenderer SSR safety** - Both are in `enhancedRendererConfig` (static) but:
   - VideoRenderer: imports lucide-react icons, uses document/fetch/URL in callbacks (safe in effects)
   - CodeSnippetRenderer: imports lucide-react, uses navigator.clipboard in callback (safe)
   - The issue is: if we apply `no-restricted-globals` lint rule, these will fail even though the APIs are only in callbacks/effects
   
2. **CRITICAL: Transformer/edit chain breakage** - The transformers are directly calling editor methods on what they expect to be a LexicalEditor instance, but if StaticNode stores serialized state instead, those calls will fail. EditNode needs to provide the actual editor instance so transformers can work with it properly.

3. **HIGH: Lint rule conflicts** - `no-restricted-globals` would flag things like `window.innerHeight` in CodeBlockCard even though they're safely inside useEffect. I need a different approach than a blanket lint rule—either a custom ESLint rule that only catches render-path usage, or a more targeted solution.

4. **HIGH: TldrawStaticRenderer** - This component imports interactive UI functions and lucide-react, which breaks SSR safety. I need to split it into a truly static version that just renders a snapshot or placeholder, with an interactive enhancer layer on top.

5. **HIGH: Import boundary enforcement** - The SSR renderer package should only import from the static subpackage, not from the root entry point.

6. **MEDIUM: Path error** - The gallery package is actually at `packages/rich-ext-gallery/`, not where I thought it was.

The real solution here is recognizing that static renderers need to be completely decoupled from interactive features. I should split the renderers into a Core pattern that's SSR-safe and an Enhancer pattern that adds interactivity on the client side.

For the lint strategy, I'm thinking the `no-restricted-globals` rule should only apply to the SSR engine code itself, not the renderers. The renderers can use browser APIs as long as they're confined to effects and callbacks—that's actually safe for SSR. VideoRenderer and CodeSnippetRenderer are already doing this correctly, and lucide-react icons are just SVG components that render fine on the server anyway.

The real issue is that a blanket lint rule would flag browser API usage even inside useEffect, which would break the build unnecessarily. So either I apply the restriction only to the SSR package, or I use ESLint overrides to exempt effect callbacks from the rule and rely on code review to ensure the pattern is followed correctly.

For the transformer chain problem, I'm thinking through how to structure this: StaticNode holds the serialized state for rendering, while EditNode extends it and reattaches the actual Lexical editor instance, keeping them in sync. Transformers would then operate on EditNodes since they need the live editor context.

The key insight is that transformers are only used by the MarkdownShortcutPlugin in edit mode, so they're always working with EditNodes anyway—meaning I can safely move `getContentEditor()` to EditNode only and have transformers reference that type directly. the on `EditNode` subclasses, so transformers that call these methods only work when operating on editable nodes in the editor context, not on static nodes in the renderer. I'm settling on the structure: StaticNode stores the serialized editor state directly and uses a static decorator, while EditNode creates a Lexical editor instance from that state and has the `getContentEditor()` method. For `exportJSON()`, each returns their respective representation, and for `getTextContent()`, the static node can either parse the serialized state manually or rely on Lexical's DOM handling since it's only used for search and copy operations in display mode.

Writing text extraction helper...

Now I'm seeing the bigger picture for the renderer issue. The `TldrawStaticRenderer` is actually doing too much—it has interactive features like dialogs and zoom controls that don't belong in a static rendering context. I should split this into two components: a true SSR renderer that outputs just a snapshot image, and keep the interactive version separate as an enhanced display component.

The core problem is that `TldrawStaticRenderer` is importing `presentDialog` from the edit-only UI library, which breaks the architectural boundary since the static renderers package re-exports it. I need to either create a separate SSR-only renderer with no edit dependencies, or move the dialog functionality into a display-specific renderer that's explicitly marked as interactive.

Looking at how Gallery handles this—with a true static renderer and a separate edit renderer—I should follow the same pattern: create a minimal `TldrawRenderer` that just shows the snapshot image with no interactivity, then either rename the current one to `TldrawDisplayRenderer` or merge its expand logic into the edit renderer. Though I'm realizing `enhancedRendererConfig` doesn't even have Tldraw registered yet, so I need to check what the current setup actually is. ... Let me check. The exploration said `packages/rich-renderers/src/config.ts` has:
```
Alert, Banner, CodeBlock, Image, LinkCard, Mention, Gallery, Mermaid, Video, CodeSnippet
```
No Tldraw. Tldraw is registered as extra nodes in `ShiroRenderer`.

So Tldraw is NOT in the standard renderer config. It's added as extra nodes. The `TldrawStaticRenderer` is used directly by the Tldraw node's `decorate()` method.

Looking at how it's used: `TldrawNode.decorate()` would return `createElement(TldrawStaticRenderer, { snapshot })` (for static) or `createElement(TldrawEditRenderer, { snapshot, onSnapshotChange })` (for edit).

Actually, Tldraw probably uses `RendererWrapper` or `createRendererDecoration` like other nodes, so I need to check the Tldraw package implementation. Regardless, the fix is to create a true SSR-safe `TldrawRenderer` that just renders a snapshot preview image, move the `presentDialog` expand logic to the edit renderer, and have the SSR renderer use the safe version. For the import boundary issue, I'll add an ESLint rule to `rich-ssr-renderer` that restricts imports from `@haklex/rich-editor` and requires using the `./static` sub-entry instead.

Now I need to fix the path error from `packages/rich-renderer-gallery/src/GalleryRenderer.tsx` to `packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryRenderer.tsx`, then update the plan file with these targeted edits.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 11:38:44Z)**_

六项反馈均已排查完毕，核心发现如下：

1. **VideoRenderer / CodeSnippetRenderer** — 浏览器 API 均在 callback/effect 内，实际 SSR 安全。问题在于 `no-restricted-globals` 是语法级规则，会误报。
2. **Transformer 链** — alert/banner/grid transformer 直接调 `getContentEditor().parseEditorState()`，只在编辑器上下文运行（`allEditNodes`），EditNode 必须保留 editor 实例。
3. **Lint 策略冲突** — 需区分 SSR 引擎代码（严禁浏览器全局）vs 静态渲染器（允许 effect 内使用）。
4. **TldrawStaticRenderer** — 导入了 `presentDialog`（`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`），需拆为真正 SSR-safe 版本。
5. **根入口污染** — `index.ts` 导出全量内容，SSR 包需禁止导入根路径。
6. **路径误差** — Gallery 在 `rich-ext-gallery` 非 `rich-renderer-gallery`。

现在更新计划文件。

     1→# RichSSRRenderer 实施计划

     7→---
     8→
     9→## 核心约束
    10→
    11→### Static 定义（强约束）
    12→
    13→1. 首次 render 输出有意义 HTML，**不依赖 useEffect**
    14→2. render 路径**零 `window`/`document`/`navigator`** 访问
    15→3. **零 `useLayoutEffect`**
    16→4. **零 `LexicalNestedComposer`**（嵌套内容通过 context 提供的 render 函数）
    17→5. 无运行时 SSR/CSR 分支——Static 路径只有一条
    18→
    19→### 双轨强制
    20→
    21→| 层 | Static (display-only, SSR safe) | Edit (editor-only, browser-ok) |
    22→|----|---------------------------------|-------------------------------|
    23→| Node | 只存可序列化数据，`decorate()` → StaticDecorator/RendererWrapper | 继承 StaticNode，管理 LexicalEditor 实例，`decorate()` → EditDecorator |
    24→| Renderer | 纯展示组件，无 hook 副作用 | 可用 hooks/DOM/API 增强 |
    25→| 注册 | `config.ts` → `allNodes`，`enhancedRendererConfig` | `config-edit.ts` → `allEditNodes`，`enhancedEditRendererConfig` |
    26→
    27→---
    28→
    29→## 新增入口约定
    30→
    31→### `@haklex/rich-editor`
    32→
    33→| 入口 | 导出内容 | Lexical 导入 |
    34→|------|---------|-------------|
    35→| `.` (现有) | 全部 | 有 |
    36→| `./editor` (现有) | RichEditor | 有 |
    37→| `./renderer` (现有) | RichRenderer | 有 |
    38→| **`./static` (新增)** | allNodes, builtinNodes, customNodes, editorTheme, getVariantClass, variant classes, RendererConfig type, all contexts (ColorScheme/RendererConfig/FootnoteDefinitions), RendererWrapper, createRendererDecoration, **NestedContentRendererContext** | 有（peer dep） |
    39→| **`./styles` (新增)** | getVariantClass, variant classes, richContent, vars, theme classes | **无** |
    40→
    41→`./static` 是 SSR 引擎和 static renderer 的共同依赖入口。
    42→`./styles` 是纯 CSS class 名导出，零 Lexical 代码。
    43→
    44→---
    45→
    46→## Phase 0：Static 约束 + lint gate
    47→
    48→### 0.1 ESLint 规则
    49→
    50→对 static renderer 源码 + `rich-ssr-renderer` 源码施加：
    51→
    52→```javascript
    53→// render 路径禁止浏览器全局
    54→'no-restricted-globals': ['error', 'window', 'document', 'navigator', 'location', 'history']
    55→// 禁止 useLayoutEffect
    56→'no-restricted-imports': ['error', { paths: [{ name: 'react', importNames: ['useLayoutEffect'] }] }]
    57→```
    58→
    59→### 0.2 `NestedContentRendererContext` — 嵌套内容渲染契约
    60→
    61→**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/context/NestedContentRendererContext.tsx`
    62→
    63→```typescript
    64→import { type ReactNode, createContext, use } from 'react'
    65→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
    66→
    67→type RenderEditorStateFn = (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode
    68→
    69→const NestedContentRendererContext = createContext<RenderEditorStateFn | null>(null)
    70→
    71→export const NestedContentRendererProvider = NestedContentRendererContext.Provider
    72→
    73→export function useNestedContentRenderer(): RenderEditorStateFn {
    74→  const fn = use(NestedContentRendererContext)
    75→  if (!fn) throw new Error('NestedContentRendererProvider is required')
    76→  return fn
    77→}
    78→```
    79→
    80→Static decorator 通过此 context 递归渲染嵌套 `SerializedEditorState`，无需 `LexicalNestedComposer`。`RichRenderer` 和 `RichSSRRenderer` 各自提供实现。
    81→
    82→从 `./static` 入口导出。
    83→
    84→---
    85→
    86→## Phase 1：三类嵌套节点改造（alert/banner/grid）
    87→
    88→### 1.1 AlertQuoteNode（StaticNode）
    89→
    90→**文件**：`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts`
    91→
    92→**变更**：
    93→- `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor` → `__contentState: SerializedEditorState`
    94→- `constructor`：不再调用 `createContentEditor()`，接收 `contentState` 参数
    95→- `importJSON`：直接存储 `serializedNode.content`，不解析为 editor state
    96→- `exportJSON`：直接输出 `this.__contentState`
    97→- `decorate()` → `createElement(AlertStaticDecorator, { alertType, contentState })`
    98→- 删除 `getContentEditor()`、`getTextContent()` 中的 `editorState.read()` 调用
    99→
   100→**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/AlertStaticDecorator.tsx`
   101→
   102→```tsx
   103→export function AlertStaticDecorator({ alertType, contentState }: {
   104→  alertType: AlertType
   105→  contentState: SerializedEditorState
   106→}) {
   107→  const renderNested = useNestedContentRenderer()
   108→  return (
   109→    <>
   110→      <RendererWrapper rendererKey="Alert" defaultRenderer={AlertRenderer} props={{ type: alertType }} />
   111→      <div className="rich-alert-content">
   112→        {renderNested(contentState)}
   113→      </div>
   114→    </>
   115→  )
   116→}
   117→```
   118→
   119→无 `LexicalNestedComposer`、无浏览器 API、无 effect。**单一路径，SSR + CSR 通用。**
   120→
   121→### 1.2 AlertQuoteEditNode
   122→
   123→**文件**：`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode.ts`
   124→
   125→**变更**：继承改造后的 `AlertQuoteNode`，额外管理 `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor`：
   126→- `constructor`：调用 `super(alertType, contentState)`，然后 `this.__contentEditor = createContentEditor()` + parse contentState into editor
   127→- `importJSON`：`super.importJSON()` + 创建/恢复 editor state
   128→- `exportJSON`：从 `__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON()` 写回 `content`（保持编辑器为 source of truth）
   129→- `decorate()` → `AlertEditDecorator`（保持 `LexicalNestedComposer`）
   130→
   131→### 1.3 BannerNode / BannerEditNode — 同 1.1/1.2 模式
   132→
   133→### 1.4 GridContainerNode / GridEditNode
   134→
   135→**GridContainerNode**（Static）：
   136→- `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]` → `__cellStates: SerializedEditorState[]`
   137→- `decorate()` → `GridStaticDecorator`（用 `useNestedContentRenderer()` 渲染每个 cell）
   138→
   139→**GridEditNode**：
   140→- 继承后额外管理 `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]`
   141→
   142→### 1.5 `RichRenderer` 补充 `NestedContentRendererProvider`
   143→
   144→**文件**：`packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx`
   145→
   146→在 Provider 链中加入 `NestedContentRendererProvider`，提供基于 headless Lexical 的嵌套渲染函数。此函数在 `RichRenderer` 内部定义，复用 `allNodes` + `editorTheme` 创建 headless editor 解析 + 递归渲染（逻辑与后续 `RichSSRRenderer` 引擎相同）。
   147→
   148→需新增 `@lexical/headless` 为 `@haklex/rich-editor` 的 dependency（极小包）。
   149→
   150→---
   151→
   152→## Phase 2：rich-renderer-* Static Renderer SSR 适配
   153→
   154→### 适配矩阵
   155→
   156→| 包 | StaticRenderer | 当前状态 | 修复 |
   157→|----|---------------|---------|------|
   158→| `rich-renderer-codeblock` | `CodeBlockRenderer` | NEEDS-FIX：`CodeBlockCard` useEffect 内 `window.innerHeight` 无 guard | guard `typeof window` |
   159→| `rich-renderer-linkcard` | `LinkCardRenderer` | NEEDS-FIX：`useLayoutEffect` + `getComputedStyle` | → `useEffect` |
   160→| `rich-renderer-mermaid` | `MermaidRenderer` | CRITICAL：首次 render "Loading"，无内容 | 首次 render `<pre><code>{diagram}</code></pre>` fallback |
   161→| `rich-renderer-image` | `ImageRenderer` | SAFE | 无需改 |
   162→| `rich-renderer-alert` | `AlertRenderer` | SAFE | 无需改 |
   163→| `rich-renderer-banner` | `BannerRenderer` | SAFE | 无需改 |
   164→| `rich-renderer-mention` | `MentionRenderer` | SAFE | 无需改 |
   165→| `rich-renderer-video` | `VideoRenderer` | SAFE | 无需改 |
   166→| `rich-ext-tldraw` | `TldrawStaticRenderer` | CRITICAL：`IntersectionObserver` 无 guard | guard + placeholder |
   167→| `rich-ext-gallery` | `GalleryRenderer` | NEEDS-FIX：`ResizeObserver` 无 guard | guard `typeof window` |
   168→
   169→### 修改策略
   170→
   171→确保每个 StaticRenderer 首次 render 输出稳定 fallback HTML，浏览器 API 全部在 `useEffect` 内且有 `typeof` guard。客户端增强为"先内容，再增强"。
   172→
   173→**具体文件**：
   174→
   175→| 文件 | 改动 |
   176→|------|------|
   177→| `packages/rich-renderer-codeblock/src/CodeBlockCard.tsx` | useEffect 内 `window.innerHeight` 加 guard |
   178→| `packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx` | `useLayoutEffect` → `useEffect` |
   179→| `packages/rich-renderer-mermaid/src/MermaidRenderer.tsx` | 初始状态从 "Loading" 改为 `<pre><code className="language-mermaid">{diagram}</code></pre>` |
   180→| `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx` | `IntersectionObserver` 加 typeof guard + 首次 render 占位 |
   181→| `packages/rich-renderer-gallery/src/GalleryRenderer.tsx` | `ResizeObserver` 加 typeof guard |
   182→
   183→---
   184→
   185→## Phase 3：`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` 引擎
   186→
   187→### 3.1 包结构
   188→
   189→```
   190→packages/rich-ssr-renderer/
   191→  package.json
   192→  tsconfig.json
   193→  vite.config.ts
   194→  src/
   195→    index.ts                            # 公开导出
   196→    RichSSRRenderer.tsx                 # 顶层组件
   197→    types.ts                            # RichSSRRendererProps
   198→    engine/
   199→      renderNode.tsx                    # 核心递归分派
   200→      renderBuiltinNode.tsx            # builtin ElementNode → JSX
   201→      renderTextNode.tsx               # TextNode → format className
   202→    preprocess/
   203→      footnote.ts                       # footnote 编号 + section 合成
   204→      headingSlug.ts                    # textToSlug + deduplicateSlug
   205→```
   206→
   207→### 3.2 依赖
   208→
   209→```jsonc
   210→{
   211→  "dependencies": { "@lexical/headless": "^0.40.0" },
   212→  "peerDependencies": {
   213→    "react": ">=19",
   214→    "@haklex/rich-editor": ">=0.0.31",
   215→    "lexical": "^0.40.0",
   216→    "@lexical/code": "^0.40.0",
   217→    "@lexical/extension": "^0.40.0",
   218→    "@lexical/link": "^0.40.0",
   219→    "@lexical/list": "^0.40.0",
   220→    "@lexical/rich-text": "^0.40.0",
   221→    "@lexical/table": "^0.40.0"
   222→  }
   223→}
   224→```
   225→
   226→### 3.3 `RichSSRRenderer.tsx` 核心流程
   227→
   228→```
   229→1. parse value → SerializedEditorState
   230→2. createHeadlessEditor({ nodes: allNodes + extraNodes, theme: editorTheme })
   231→3. editor.parseEditorState(json) → editorState
   232→4. editorState.read(() => {
   233→     preprocess: footnote 编号 + heading slug state
   234→     walk $getRoot().getChildren() → renderNode() 递归
   235→       TextNode         → renderTextNode (format bitmask → className)
   236→       ElementNode       → renderBuiltinNode (paragraph/heading/quote/list/link/table/hr/spoiler/details)
   237→       DecoratorNode     → node.decorate(editor, config) → 复用 static renderer
   238→     合成缺失 footnote-section
   239→   })
   240→5. Provider 包裹:
   241→     PortalThemeProvider(variantClass)
   242→     ColorSchemeProvider(theme)
   243→     RendererConfigProvider(rendererConfig, mode='renderer', variant)
   244→     FootnoteDefinitionsProvider(displayNumberMap, definitions)
   245→     NestedContentRendererProvider(renderEditorState)  // 递归渲染嵌套内容
   246→6. 输出 <div class="rich-content {variantClass}" data-theme={theme}>
   247→```
   248→
   249→### 3.4 renderNode 分派
   250→
   251→```typescript
   252→function renderNode(node: LexicalNode, ctx: RenderContext, key: number): ReactNode {
   253→  if ($isTextNode(node))      return renderTextNode(node, key)
   254→  if ($isLineBreakNode(node)) return <br key={key} />
   255→  if ($isDecoratorNode(node)) {
   256→    const el = node.decorate(ctx.editor, ctx.editorConfig)
   257→    return el ? cloneElement(el, { key }) : null
   258→  }
   259→  if ($isElementNode(node))   return renderBuiltinNode(node, ctx, key)
   260→  return handleUnknown(node, ctx.unknownNodeStrategy, key)
   261→}
   262→```
   263→
   264→Decorator 极简——`node.decorate()` 返回的 React 元素已包含 RendererWrapper + StaticRenderer。嵌套内容由 StaticDecorator 通过 `useNestedContentRenderer()` 递归调用同一引擎。
   265→
   266→### 3.5 renderBuiltinNode 映射
   267→
   268→| Node | 输出 | class |
   269→|------|------|-------|
   270→| ParagraphNode | `<p>` | `rich-paragraph` |
   271→| HeadingNode | `<Tag id={slug}><a class="rich-heading-anchor" .../>children</Tag>` | `rich-heading-{tag}` |
   272→| QuoteNode | `<blockquote>` | `rich-quote` |
   273→| ListNode | `<ul>`/`<ol>` | `rich-list-ul`/`rich-list-ol`/`rich-checklist` |
   274→| ListItemNode | `<li>` | `rich-list-item` + checked/unchecked/nested |
   275→| LinkNode/AutoLinkNode | `<a href rel target>` | `rich-link` |
   276→| TableNode | `<div><table>` | `rich-table-scrollable-wrapper`/`rich-table` |
   277→| TableRowNode | `<tr>` | — |
   278→| TableCellNode | `<td>`/`<th>` | `rich-table-cell`/`rich-table-cell-header` |
   279→| HorizontalRuleNode | `<hr />` | `rich-hr` |
   280→| CodeNode | `<pre><code>` | `rich-code-block` |
   281→| SpoilerNode | `<span role="button" tabIndex={0}>` | `rich-spoiler` |
   282→| DetailsNode | `<details open={open}><summary>...<chevron/></summary><div>children</div></details>` | `rich-details` |
   283→
   284→SpoilerNode 和 DetailsNode 为自定义 ElementNode（非 DecoratorNode），需在此处映射。
   285→
   286→### 3.6 renderTextNode
   287→
   288→```typescript
   289→const FORMAT_MAP: [number, string][] = [
   290→  [1, 'rich-text-bold'], [2, 'rich-text-italic'], [4, 'rich-text-strikethrough'],
   291→  [8, 'rich-text-underline'], [16, 'rich-text-code'], [32, 'rich-text-subscript'],
   292→  [64, 'rich-text-superscript'], [128, 'rich-text-highlight'],
   293→]
   294→```
   295→
   296→### 3.7 Footnote 预处理
   297→
   298→在 `editorState.read()` 内用 `$nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)` + `$nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)` 收集。算法对齐 `FootnotePlugin.tsx:23-50`。有脚注无 section 时自动合成（`renderFootnoteSectionWhenMissing` prop 控制）。
   299→
   300→### 3.8 Heading slug 去重
   301→
   302→复制 `HeadingAnchorPlugin.tsx:5-25` 的 `textToSlug` + `deduplicateSlug`。`RenderContext` 持有 `usedSlugs: Map<string, number>` 全文共享。
   303→
   304→---
   305→
   306→## Phase 4：`@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` + Web 集成
   307→
   308→### 4.1 `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` 分离
   309→
   310→| 入口 | 依赖 | 用途 |
   311→|------|------|------|
   312→| `./ssr` (新增) | `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` + `@haklex/rich-renderers`（static-only） | Server Component 渲染 |
   313→| `./editor` (现有) | `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit`（edit-only） | 客户端编辑器 |
   314→| `./renderer` (现有) | `@haklex/rich-renderers`（static-only） | 客户端只读 |
   315→
   316→**新建**：`packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ssr.tsx`
   317→
   318→```tsx
   319→import { RichSSRRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
   320→import { enhancedRendererConfig } from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
   321→// + extraNodes (TldrawNode, embedNodes, galleryNodes, codeSnippetNodes)
   322→
   323→export function ShiroSSRRenderer(props) {
   324→  return <RichSSRRenderer {...props} rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig} extraNodes={defaultExtraNodes} />
   325→}
   326→```
   327→
   328→### 4.2 Web app 接入
   329→
   330→**新建**：`apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.server.tsx`（Server Component）
   331→
   332→```tsx
   333→import { ShiroSSRRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/ssr'
   334→
   335→export function ServerLexicalContent({ content, variant, className }) {
   336→  return <ShiroSSRRenderer value={content} variant={variant} className={className} />
   337→}
   338→```
   339→
   340→现有 `LexicalContent.tsx`（CSR）保留为客户端增强 / 回退。
   341→
   342→---
   343→
   344→## Phase 5：回归验收
   345→
   346→### 验收标准
   347→
   348→1. `renderToString(<RichSSRRenderer .../>)` 输出正文语义 HTML
   349→2. Decorator 节点由 `decorate()` → StaticRenderer 渲染，无手写 HTML 重复
   350→3. Alert/banner/grid 嵌套内容 SSR 非空，无 `LexicalNestedComposer`
   351→4. 根元素带正确 VE variant class
   352→5. `enhancedRendererConfig` 直接注入可用
   353→6. 现有 `RichRenderer`（CSR）行为：Static 路径通过 `NestedContentRendererProvider` 渲染嵌套内容
   354→7. Static renderer 无 SSR 报错
   355→
   356→### 验证
   357→
   358→```bash
   359→# 构建全链路
   360→pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build
   361→
   362→# Static 约束检查：SSR 包无浏览器 API
   363→grep -rn "window\.\|document\.\|navigator\." packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"
   364→
   365→# 产物无 @lexical/react（SSR 不需要）
   366→grep -r "@lexical/react" packages/rich-ssr-renderer/dist/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"
   367→
   368→# renderToString 集成测试
   369→```
   370→
   371→---

现在全面重写计划，逐一修正六项问题。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-25 11:41:55Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```md
# RichSSRRenderer 实施计划

## Context

`RichRenderer` SSR 输出空壳。本计划收紧 Static/Edit 双轨定义，使 Static 路径 100% SSR 安全（无 `LexicalNestedComposer`、无浏览器 API、无运行时分支），然后基于此构建 `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` headless 引擎。

---

## 核心约束

### Static 定义（强约束）

1. 首次 render 输出有意义 HTML，**不依赖 useEffect**
2. render 路径**零 `window`/`document`/`navigator`** 访问
3. **零 `useLayoutEffect`**
4. **零 `LexicalNestedComposer`**（嵌套内容通过 context 提供的 render 函数）
5. 无运行时 SSR/CSR 分支——Static 路径只有一条
6. **零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` 导入**（`presentDialog`、`DropdownMenu`、`Popover` 等均为 edit-only）

### Static Renderer 定义（两层）

Static renderer 分为两类，对应不同约束级别：

| 类别 | 约束 | 适用场景 | 例 |
|------|------|---------|-----|
| **SSR-Core** | 零浏览器 API（包括 effect 内）、零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`、零 `lucide-react` | SSR 引擎直接使用 | `AlertRenderer`、`BannerRenderer`、`ImageRenderer` |
| **Isomorphic** | 首次 render 输出有意义 HTML；浏览器 API **仅限** `useEffect`/callback 内；零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` | `RichRenderer`（CSR）+ SSR 引擎均可用（SSR 跳过 effect） | `CodeBlockRenderer`、`VideoRenderer`、`GalleryRenderer` |

**关键**：SSR 引擎消费的 `enhancedRendererConfig` 中的 renderer 只需满足 **Isomorphic** 级别——React `renderToString` 会忽略 `useEffect`/`useLayoutEffect`，只执行 render 路径。`useLayoutEffect` 在 SSR 时 React 会警告但不执行，建议改为 `useEffect`，但非阻断性问题。

**禁区**：Static renderer **绝不可**导入 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`（`presentDialog`/`DropdownMenu`/`Popover`）。这是 edit-only 包边界。

### 双轨强制

| 层 | Static (display-only, SSR safe) | Edit (editor-only, browser-ok) |
|----|---------------------------------|-------------------------------|
| Node | 只存可序列化数据（`SerializedEditorState`），`decorate()` → StaticDecorator/RendererWrapper | 继承 StaticNode，额外管理 `LexicalEditor` 实例，`decorate()` → EditDecorator |
| Renderer | Isomorphic 组件，无 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` 导入 | 可用 hooks/DOM/API/edit-ui 增强 |
| 注册 | `config.ts` → `allNodes`，`enhancedRendererConfig` | `config-edit.ts` → `allEditNodes`，`enhancedEditRendererConfig` |

---

## 新增入口约定

### `@haklex/rich-editor`

| 入口 | 导出内容 | Lexical 导入 |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `.` (现有) | 全部 | 有 |
| `./editor` (现有) | RichEditor | 有 |
| `./renderer` (现有) | RichRenderer | 有 |
| **`./static` (新增)** | allNodes, builtinNodes, customNodes, editorTheme, getVariantClass, variant classes, RendererConfig type, all contexts (ColorScheme/RendererConfig/FootnoteDefinitions), RendererWrapper, createRendererDecoration, **NestedContentRendererContext** | 有（peer dep） |
| **`./styles` (新增)** | getVariantClass, variant classes, richContent, vars, theme classes | **无** |

`./static` 是 SSR 引擎和 static renderer 的共同依赖入口。
`./styles` 是纯 CSS class 名导出，零 Lexical 代码。

### 导入边界强制

`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` 的 ESLint 配置中加入：

\```javascript
'no-restricted-imports': ['error', {
  paths: [{
    name: '@haklex/rich-editor',
    message: 'Use @haklex/rich-editor/static or @haklex/rich-editor/styles instead'
  }]
}]
\```

禁止 SSR 包导入 `@haklex/rich-editor` 根入口（根入口导出 `RichEditor`/`RichRenderer`/`allEditNodes` 等非 SSR-safe 内容）。只允许 `/static` 和 `/styles` 子路径。

---

## Phase 0：Static 约束 + lint gate

### 0.1 ESLint 规则（分层施加）

**SSR 引擎代码**（`packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/`）——严格禁浏览器全局：

\```javascript
'no-restricted-globals': ['error', 'window', 'document', 'navigator', 'location', 'history']
'no-restricted-imports': ['error', {
  paths: [
    { name: 'react', importNames: ['useLayoutEffect', 'useEffect', 'useState', 'useRef'], message: 'SSR engine must not use React hooks' },
    { name: '@haklex/rich-editor', message: 'Use @haklex/rich-editor/static' },
    { name: '@haklex/rich-editor-ui', message: 'Edit-only package, not allowed in SSR engine' },
  ]
}]
\```

**Static renderer 代码**——仅禁 edit-only 包：

\```javascript
'no-restricted-imports': ['error', {
  paths: [
    { name: '@haklex/rich-editor-ui', message: 'Edit-only package. Split into EditRenderer if needed.' },
  ]
}]
\```

> **不对 static renderer 施加 `no-restricted-globals`**。Static renderer 是 Isomorphic 组件——允许在 `useEffect`/callback 中使用浏览器 API，React SSR 会忽略这些 hook。lint 层面仅守住包边界（禁止 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`），渲染路径安全性由代码审查保证。

### 0.2 `NestedContentRendererContext` — 嵌套内容渲染契约

**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/context/NestedContentRendererContext.tsx`

\```typescript
import { type ReactNode, createContext, use } from 'react'
import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'

type RenderEditorStateFn = (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode

const NestedContentRendererContext = createContext<RenderEditorStateFn | null>(null)

export const NestedContentRendererProvider = NestedContentRendererContext.Provider

export function useNestedContentRenderer(): RenderEditorStateFn {
  const fn = use(NestedContentRendererContext)
  if (!fn) throw new Error('NestedContentRendererProvider is required')
  return fn
}
\```

Static decorator 通过此 context 递归渲染嵌套 `SerializedEditorState`，无需 `LexicalNestedComposer`。`RichRenderer` 和 `RichSSRRenderer` 各自提供实现。

从 `./static` 入口导出。

---

## Phase 1：三类嵌套节点改造（alert/banner/grid）

### 核心策略

**StaticNode**（base class）：
- 存储 `__contentState: SerializedEditorState`（可序列化数据），**不持有** `LexicalEditor` 实例
- `importJSON()`：直接存储 `serializedNode.content`
- `exportJSON()`：直接输出 `this.__contentState`
- `getTextContent()`：从 `SerializedEditorState` JSON 递归提取文本（无需 editor 实例）
- `decorate()` → StaticDecorator（使用 `useNestedContentRenderer()` 渲染嵌套内容）
- **无 `getContentEditor()` 方法**

**EditNode**（extends StaticNode）：
- 额外管理 `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor`（从 `__contentState` 创建/同步）
- `constructor`：`super(...)` + `createContentEditor()` + parse contentState into editor
- `importJSON`：先 `super.importJSON()` 获取 node（含 `__contentState`），再创建 editor + `setEditorState()`
- `exportJSON`：从 `__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON()` 写回 content（editor 为 source of truth）
- **新增 `getContentEditor()` 方法**（仅 EditNode 有）
- `decorate()` → EditDecorator（保持 `LexicalNestedComposer`）

**Transformer 兼容性**：Transformer 仅在编辑器上下文运行（`allEditNodes` 注册），操作对象始终是 EditNode，因此 `getContentEditor()` 可用。无需修改 transformer 代码。

### 文本提取辅助函数

**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/utils/extractTextContent.ts`

\```typescript
export function extractTextContent(state: SerializedEditorState): string {
  function walk(node: any): string {
    if (node.text) return node.text
    if (node.children) return node.children.map(walk).join('')
    if (node.root) return walk(node.root)
    return ''
  }
  return walk(state)
}
\```

StaticNode 的 `getTextContent()` 使用此函数，无需 editor 实例。

### 1.1 AlertQuoteNode（StaticNode）

**文件**：`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts`

**变更**：
- `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor` → `__contentState: SerializedEditorState`
- 删除 `createContentEditor()` 工厂函数
- `constructor`：接收 `contentState: SerializedEditorState` 参数
- `importJSON`：`node.__contentState = serializedNode.content`（直接存储）
- `exportJSON`：返回 `{ ...base, content: this.__contentState }`
- `getTextContent()`：使用 `extractTextContent(this.__contentState)`
- `decorate()` → `createElement(AlertStaticDecorator, { alertType, contentState })`
- **删除** `getContentEditor()` 方法

### AlertQuoteEditNode

**文件**：`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode.ts`

**变更**：
- 新增 `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor` 字段
- `constructor`：`super(alertType, contentState)` + `this.__contentEditor = createContentEditor()` + `editor.setEditorState(editor.parseEditorState(contentState))`
- `importJSON`：从 super 获取 node（含 `__contentState`），然后 `node.__contentEditor = createContentEditor()` + parse/set
- `exportJSON`：`{ ...super.exportJSON(), content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON() }`
- **新增** `getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor` 方法
- `decorate()` → `AlertEditDecorator`（传 `contentEditor`，保持 `LexicalNestedComposer`）
- `clone()`：复制 `__contentEditor` 引用

### AlertStaticDecorator

**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/AlertStaticDecorator.tsx`

\```tsx
export function AlertStaticDecorator({ alertType, contentState }: {
  alertType: AlertType
  contentState: SerializedEditorState
}) {
  const renderNested = useNestedContentRenderer()
  return (
    <>
      <RendererWrapper rendererKey="Alert" defaultRenderer={AlertRenderer} props={{ type: alertType }} />
      <div className="rich-alert-content">
        {renderNested(contentState)}
      </div>
    </>
  )
}
\```

### 1.2 BannerNode / BannerEditNode — 同 1.1 模式

**文件**：
- `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerNode.ts`（StaticNode：`__contentEditor` → `__contentState`）
- `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerEditNode.ts`（EditNode：管理 `__contentEditor`）

**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/BannerStaticDecorator.tsx`

### 1.3 GridContainerNode / GridEditNode

**GridContainerNode**（Static）：
- `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]` → `__cellStates: SerializedEditorState[]`
- 删除 `createCellEditor()` 工厂函数
- `setCols()`、`addCells()`：操作 `__cellStates` 数组（新增空 state 用 `{ root: { children: [{ children: [], type: 'paragraph', version: 1 }], type: 'root', version: 1 } }`）
- `removeCells()`：操作 `__cellStates`，检查空用 `extractTextContent()`
- `getTextContent()`：`__cellStates.map(extractTextContent).join('\n')`
- `decorate()` → `GridStaticDecorator`（用 `useNestedContentRenderer()` 渲染每个 cell）
- **删除** `getCellEditors()` 方法

**GridEditNode**：
- 额外管理 `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]`
- **新增** `getCellEditors(): LexicalEditor[]`
- `importJSON`：创建 editors + hydrate from cell states
- `exportJSON`：从 editors 序列化
- 覆盖 `setCols()`、`addCells()`、`removeCells()` 操作 editors

### Transformer 兼容性确认

以下 transformer 仅在编辑器上下文执行（使用 `allEditNodes`），操作对象为 EditNode：

| Transformer 文件 | 调用 | EditNode 方法 | 兼容性 |
|------------------|------|--------------|--------|
| `src/transformers/alert.ts:52-53` | `alertNode.getContentEditor().parseEditorState()/.setEditorState()` | `AlertQuoteEditNode.getContentEditor()` | **无需修改** |
| `src/transformers/container.ts:60-61` | `banner.getContentEditor().parseEditorState()/.setEditorState()` | `BannerEditNode.getContentEditor()` | **无需修改** |
| `src/transformers/grid-container.ts:14-17` | `.getCellEditors().map(editor => ...)` | `GridEditNode.getCellEditors()` | **无需修改** |

**GridEditDecorator**（`src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx:70`）：调用 `node.getCellEditors()`，node 在编辑器上下文为 `GridEditNode`，**无需修改**。

### 1.4 `RichRenderer` 补充 `NestedContentRendererProvider`

**文件**：`packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx`

在 Provider 链中加入 `NestedContentRendererProvider`，提供基于 headless Lexical 的嵌套渲染函数。此函数在 `RichRenderer` 内部定义，复用 `allNodes` + `editorTheme` 创建 headless editor 解析 + 递归渲染（逻辑与后续 `RichSSRRenderer` 引擎相同）。

需新增 `@lexical/headless` 为 `@haklex/rich-editor` 的 dependency（极小包）。

---

## Phase 2：Static Renderer SSR 适配

### 完整适配矩阵

覆盖 `enhancedRendererConfig`（`packages/rich-renderers/src/config.ts`）中的全部 10 个 renderer + Tldraw（通过 extraNodes 注入）：

| 包 | StaticRenderer | 当前状态 | 修复 |
|----|---------------|---------|------|
| `rich-renderer-codeblock` | `CodeBlockRenderer` | Isomorphic-OK：`window.innerHeight`/`navigator.clipboard` 仅在 useEffect/callback 内 | **无需修改**（SSR 忽略 effect） |
| `rich-renderer-linkcard` | `LinkCardRenderer` | WARN：`useLayoutEffect` 含 `getComputedStyle`（SSR 时 React 警告） | `useLayoutEffect` → `useEffect`（消除 SSR 警告） |
| `rich-renderer-mermaid` | `MermaidRenderer` | CRITICAL：首次 render "Loading"，无内容 | 首次 render `<pre><code className="language-mermaid">{diagram}</code></pre>` fallback |
| `rich-renderer-image` | `ImageRenderer` | SAFE | 无需修改 |
| `rich-renderer-alert` | `AlertRenderer` | SAFE | 无需修改 |
| `rich-renderer-banner` | `BannerRenderer` | SAFE | 无需修改 |
| `rich-renderer-mention` | `MentionRenderer` | SAFE | 无需修改 |
| `rich-renderer-video` | `VideoRenderer` | Isomorphic-OK：`document.fullscreen`/`fetch`/`URL.*`/`navigator.clipboard` 仅在 callback/effect 内；`lucide-react` 图标（纯 SVG，SSR 安全） | **无需修改** |
| `rich-ext-code-snippet` | `CodeSnippetRenderer` | Isomorphic-OK：`navigator.clipboard` 仅在 callback 内；`lucide-react` 图标 | **无需修改** |
| `rich-ext-gallery` | `GalleryRenderer` | Isomorphic-OK：`ResizeObserver`/`scrollTo`/`IntersectionObserver` 仅在 useEffect 内；`lucide-react` 图标 | **无需修改**（SSR 忽略 effect） |
| `rich-ext-tldraw` | `TldrawStaticRenderer` | **CRITICAL 违规**：导入 `presentDialog`（`@haklex/rich-editor-ui`）+ `lucide-react` 交互图标；`handleExpand` 含 edit-level 交互 | **需拆分**（见下文） |

### TldrawStaticRenderer 拆分

**当前问题**：`TldrawStaticRenderer`（`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx:2`）导入 `presentDialog` from `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`（edit-only 包），违反 Static renderer 包边界约束。

**修复方案**：

1. **新建** `TldrawSSRRenderer`（真正 SSR-Core static）：
   - 仅渲染 snapshot 预览图 / SVG 占位
   - 零浏览器 API、零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`、零 `lucide-react`
   - 用于 `enhancedRendererConfig`（static-only 聚合器）

2. **现有 `TldrawStaticRenderer` → 重命名为 `TldrawDisplayRenderer`**（Isomorphic + edit-ui）：
   - 保留 `presentDialog` expand 功能 + `IntersectionObserver` lazy-load
   - 移入 `enhancedEditRendererConfig`

3. **注册变更**：

| Config | Tldraw renderer | 来源 |
|--------|----------------|------|
| `enhancedRendererConfig` (static) | `TldrawSSRRenderer` | `@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw` |
| `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (edit) | `TldrawDisplayRenderer`（现 `TldrawStaticRenderer`） | `@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw` |

**文件变更**：
- `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx`（**新建**）
- `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx` → rename to `TldrawDisplayRenderer.tsx`
- `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/index.ts`（更新导出）
- `packages/rich-renderers/src/config.ts`（若后续决定将 Tldraw 纳入 static config）
- `packages/rich-renderers-edit/src/config.ts`（若后续决定将 TldrawDisplay 纳入 edit config）

> **注**：当前 `enhancedRendererConfig` 不含 Tldraw。Tldraw 通过 extraNodes 注入到 `ShiroRenderer`/`ShiroEditor`。SSR 场景需确保 `TldrawNode.decorate()` 在 static 注册时使用 `TldrawSSRRenderer`。实现方式：TldrawNode base class 的 `decorate()` 返回 `createRendererDecoration('Tldraw', TldrawSSRRenderer, { snapshot })`，TldrawEditNode override 返回 edit decorator。或通过 `RendererConfig` 注入。

### 具体修改文件

| 文件 | 改动 |
|------|------|
| `packages/rich-renderer-linkcard/src/LinkCardRenderer.tsx` | `useLayoutEffect` → `useEffect`（消除 SSR 警告） |
| `packages/rich-renderer-mermaid/src/MermaidRenderer.tsx` | 首次 render fallback：`<pre><code className="language-mermaid">{diagram}</code></pre>` |
| `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx` | **新建**：纯 SSR 占位（snapshot 预览图） |
| `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx` | rename → `TldrawDisplayRenderer`，保留现有逻辑 |

---

## Phase 3：`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` 引擎

### 3.1 包结构

\```
packages/rich-ssr-renderer/
  package.json
  tsconfig.json
  vite.config.ts
  src/
    index.ts                            # 公开导出
    RichSSRRenderer.tsx                 # 顶层组件
    types.ts                            # RichSSRRendererProps
    engine/
      renderNode.tsx                    # 核心递归分派
      renderBuiltinNode.tsx            # builtin ElementNode → JSX
      renderTextNode.tsx               # TextNode → format className
    preprocess/
      footnote.ts                       # footnote 编号 + section 合成
      headingSlug.ts                    # textToSlug + deduplicateSlug
\```

### 3.2 依赖

\```jsonc
{
  "dependencies": { "@lexical/headless": "^0.40.0" },
  "peerDependencies": {
    "react": ">=19",
    "@haklex/rich-editor": ">=0.0.31",  // 只使用 /static 和 /styles 子路径
    "lexical": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/code": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/extension": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/link": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/list": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/rich-text": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/table": "^0.40.0"
  }
}
\```

**导入约束**：ESLint `no-restricted-imports` 禁止 `@haklex/rich-editor` 根路径。所有导入必须走 `@haklex/rich-editor/static` 或 `@haklex/rich-editor/styles`。

### 3.3 `RichSSRRenderer.tsx` 核心流程

\```
1. parse value → SerializedEditorState
2. createHeadlessEditor({ nodes: allNodes + extraNodes, theme: editorTheme })
   // allNodes, editorTheme 从 @haklex/rich-editor/static 导入
3. editor.parseEditorState(json) → editorState
4. editorState.read(() => {
     preprocess: footnote 编号 + heading slug state
     walk $getRoot().getChildren() → renderNode() 递归
       TextNode         → renderTextNode (format bitmask → className)
       ElementNode       → renderBuiltinNode (paragraph/heading/quote/list/link/table/hr/spoiler/details)
       DecoratorNode     → node.decorate(editor, config) → 复用 static renderer
     合成缺失 footnote-section
   })
5. Provider 包裹:
     PortalThemeProvider(variantClass)           // variantClass 从 @haklex/rich-editor/styles 导入
     ColorSchemeProvider(theme)                   // 从 @haklex/rich-editor/static 导入
     RendererConfigProvider(rendererConfig, mode='renderer', variant)
     FootnoteDefinitionsProvider(displayNumberMap, definitions)
     NestedContentRendererProvider(renderEditorState)  // 递归渲染嵌套内容
6. 输出 <div class="rich-content {variantClass}" data-theme={theme}>
\```

### 3.4 renderNode 分派

\```typescript
function renderNode(node: LexicalNode, ctx: RenderContext, key: number): ReactNode {
  if ($isTextNode(node))      return renderTextNode(node, key)
  if ($isLineBreakNode(node)) return <br key={key} />
  if ($isDecoratorNode(node)) {
    const el = node.decorate(ctx.editor, ctx.editorConfig)
    return el ? cloneElement(el, { key }) : null
  }
  if ($isElementNode(node))   return renderBuiltinNode(node, ctx, key)
  return handleUnknown(node, ctx.unknownNodeStrategy, key)
}
\```

Decorator 极简——`node.decorate()` 返回的 React 元素已包含 RendererWrapper + StaticRenderer。嵌套内容由 StaticDecorator 通过 `useNestedContentRenderer()` 递归调用同一引擎。

### 3.5 renderBuiltinNode 映射

| Node | 输出 | class |
|------|------|-------|
| ParagraphNode | `<p>` | `rich-paragraph` |
| HeadingNode | `<Tag id={slug}><a class="rich-heading-anchor" .../>children</Tag>` | `rich-heading-{tag}` |
| QuoteNode | `<blockquote>` | `rich-quote` |
| ListNode | `<ul>`/`<ol>` | `rich-list-ul`/`rich-list-ol`/`rich-checklist` |
| ListItemNode | `<li>` | `rich-list-item` + checked/unchecked/nested |
| LinkNode/AutoLinkNode | `<a href rel target>` | `rich-link` |
| TableNode | `<div><table>` | `rich-table-scrollable-wrapper`/`rich-table` |
| TableRowNode | `<tr>` | — |
| TableCellNode | `<td>`/`<th>` | `rich-table-cell`/`rich-table-cell-header` |
| HorizontalRuleNode | `<hr />` | `rich-hr` |
| CodeNode | `<pre><code>` | `rich-code-block` |
| SpoilerNode | `<span role="button" tabIndex={0}>` | `rich-spoiler` |
| DetailsNode | `<details open={open}><summary>...<chevron/></summary><div>children</div></details>` | `rich-details` |

SpoilerNode 和 DetailsNode 为自定义 ElementNode（非 DecoratorNode），需在此处映射。

### 3.6 renderTextNode

\```typescript
const FORMAT_MAP: [number, string][] = [
  [1, 'rich-text-bold'], [2, 'rich-text-italic'], [4, 'rich-text-strikethrough'],
  [8, 'rich-text-underline'], [16, 'rich-text-code'], [32, 'rich-text-subscript'],
  [64, 'rich-text-superscript'], [128, 'rich-text-highlight'],
]
\```

### 3.7 Footnote 预处理

在 `editorState.read()` 内用 `$nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)` + `$nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)` 收集。算法对齐 `FootnotePlugin.tsx:23-50`。有脚注无 section 时自动合成（`renderFootnoteSectionWhenMissing` prop 控制）。

### 3.8 Heading slug 去重

复制 `HeadingAnchorPlugin.tsx:5-25` 的 `textToSlug` + `deduplicateSlug`。`RenderContext` 持有 `usedSlugs: Map<string, number>` 全文共享。

---

## Phase 4：`@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` + Web 集成

### 4.1 `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro` 分离

| 入口 | 依赖 | 用途 |
|------|------|------|
| `./ssr` (新增) | `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` + `@haklex/rich-renderers`（static-only） | Server Component 渲染 |
| `./editor` (现有) | `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit`（edit-only） | 客户端编辑器 |
| `./renderer` (现有) | `@haklex/rich-renderers`（static-only） | 客户端只读 |

**新建**：`packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ssr.tsx`

\```tsx
import { RichSSRRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer'
import { enhancedRendererConfig } from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
// + extraNodes (TldrawNode, embedNodes, galleryNodes, codeSnippetNodes)

export function ShiroSSRRenderer(props) {
  return <RichSSRRenderer {...props} rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig} extraNodes={defaultExtraNodes} />
}
\```

### 4.2 Web app 接入

**新建**：`apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.server.tsx`（Server Component）

\```tsx
import { ShiroSSRRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/ssr'

export function ServerLexicalContent({ content, variant, className }) {
  return <ShiroSSRRenderer value={content} variant={variant} className={className} />
}
\```

现有 `LexicalContent.tsx`（CSR）保留为客户端增强 / 回退。

---

## Phase 5：回归验收

### 验收标准

1. `renderToString(<RichSSRRenderer .../>)` 输出正文语义 HTML
2. Decorator 节点由 `decorate()` → StaticRenderer 渲染，无手写 HTML 重复
3. Alert/banner/grid 嵌套内容 SSR 非空，无 `LexicalNestedComposer`
4. 根元素带正确 VE variant class
5. `enhancedRendererConfig` 直接注入可用
6. 现有 `RichRenderer`（CSR）行为不退化：Static 路径通过 `NestedContentRendererProvider` 渲染嵌套内容
7. 现有编辑器行为不退化：Transformer + EditNode + EditDecorator 链路完整
8. Static renderer 无 SSR 报错（无 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` 导入）
9. `rich-ssr-renderer` 产物无 `@haklex/rich-editor` 根路径引用

### 验证

\```bash
# 构建全链路
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build

# SSR 引擎约束检查：无浏览器 API
grep -rn "window\.\|document\.\|navigator\." packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

# SSR 引擎约束检查：无 @haklex/rich-editor 根路径导入
grep -rn "from '@haklex/rich-editor'" packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/ | grep -v '/static\|/styles' && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

# SSR 引擎产物无 @lexical/react（SSR 不需要）
grep -r "@lexical/react" packages/rich-ssr-renderer/dist/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

# Static renderer 无 edit-ui 导入
grep -rn "@haklex/rich-editor-ui" packages/rich-renderer-*/src/ packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryRenderer.tsx packages/rich-ext-code-snippet/src/CodeSnippetRenderer.tsx && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

# 编辑器链路验证：dev playground 启动 + 手动测试 alert/banner/grid 嵌套编辑
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev

# renderToString 集成测试
\```

---

1. **CRITICAL（Video/CodeSnippet 覆盖）**：完整审计了 `enhancedRendererConfig` 全部 10 个 renderer。Video/CodeSnippet 的浏览器 API 均在 callback/effect 内，属 Isomorphic 安全，**无需修改**。新增"SSR-Core / Isomorphic"两层 static renderer 定义，消除约束自相矛盾。

2. **CRITICAL（Transformer 链断裂）**：明确 `getContentEditor()`/`getCellEditors()` 从 StaticNode 移除、仅在 EditNode 上定义。Transformer 仅在编辑器上下文运行（`allEditNodes`），操作对象始终为 EditNode，**无需修改 transformer 代码**。新增兼容性确认表。

3. **HIGH（Lint 策略冲突）**：`no-restricted-globals` 仅对 SSR 引擎代码施加（零浏览器全局）。Static renderer 仅施加 `no-restricted-imports` 禁止 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`。不再对 renderer 禁浏览器全局。

4. **HIGH（TldrawStaticRenderer 违规）**：拆为 `TldrawSSRRenderer`（真正 SSR-Core，仅 snapshot 预览图）+ `TldrawDisplayRenderer`（现有逻辑 rename，含 presentDialog）。

5. **HIGH（根入口污染）**：SSR 包 ESLint 禁止 `@haklex/rich-editor` 根路径导入，强制走 `/static` 和 `/styles`。

6. **MEDIUM（路径误差）**：已修正 Gallery 路径为 `packages/rich-ext-gallery/`，全文搜索替换完毕。

Five more issues found. Let me analyze each:

1. **CRITICAL: Transformer creates base node, calls getContentEditor()**
   - `alert.ts:27` creates the node via `$createAlertQuoteNode()` (which creates the base AlertQuoteNode)
   - `alert.ts:52` calls `alertNode.getContentEditor()` on that node
   - If `getContentEditor()` is removed from base, this breaks

     1→import { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
     2→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     3→import type { LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     4→import { $createParagraphNode, $createTextNode } from 'lexical'
     5→
     6→import type { BannerType } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
     7→import { $createBannerNode, BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
     8→import { $createDetailsNode, DetailsNode } from '../nodes/DetailsNode'
     9→
    10→const BANNER_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
    11→  note: 'note',
    12→  info: 'note',
    13→  tip: 'tip',
    14→  success: 'tip',
    15→  important: 'important',
    16→  warning: 'warning',
    17→  warn: 'warning',
    18→  error: 'caution',
    19→  danger: 'caution',
    20→  caution: 'caution',
    21→}
    22→
    23→export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    24→  ...BASE,
    25→  dependencies: [BannerNode, DetailsNode],
    26→  regExp: /^:::\s*(\w+)(?:\{([^}]*)\})?\s*$/,
    27→  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    28→    const type = match[1]
    29→    const params = match[2]
    30→
    31→    if (type in BANNER_TYPE_MAP) {
    32→      const bannerType = BANNER_TYPE_MAP[type]
    33→      const banner = $createBannerNode(bannerType)
    34→
    35→      const serializedChildren = children.map((child: LexicalNode) =>
    36→        child.exportJSON(),
    37→      )
    38→      const content = {
    39→        root: {
    40→          children: [
    41→            {
    42→              type: 'paragraph',
    43→              children: serializedChildren,
    44→              direction: null,
    45→              format: '',
    46→              indent: 0,
    47→              textFormat: 0,
    48→              textStyle: '',
    49→              version: 1,
    50→            },
    51→          ],
    52→          direction: null,
    53→          format: '',
    54→          indent: 0,
    55→          type: 'root',
    56→          version: 1,
    57→        },
    58→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    59→
    60→      const editorState = banner.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)
    61→      banner.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)
    62→
    63→      parentNode.replace(banner)
    64→      return
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    if (type === 'details') {
    68→      const summaryMatch = params?.match(/summary="([^"]*)"/)
    69→      const summary = summaryMatch ? summaryMatch[1] : 'Details'
    70→
    71→      const details = $createDetailsNode(summary)
    72→
    73→      children.forEach((child) => {
    74→        details.append(child)
    75→      })
    76→
    77→      parentNode.replace(details)
    78→      return
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    82→    paragraph.append($createTextNode(`::: ${type}`))
    83→    children.forEach((child) => {
    84→      paragraph.append(child)
    85→    })
    86→    parentNode.replace(paragraph)
    87→  },
    88→}
    89→

     1→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     2→import { $getRoot, type LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
     3→
     4→import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../nodes/GridContainerNode'
     5→
     6→function quoteAttr(value: string): string {
     7→  return value.replaceAll('"', '\\"')
     8→}
     9→
    10→export const GRID_CONTAINER_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    11→  dependencies: [],
    12→  export: (node: LexicalNode) => {
    13→    if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return null
    14→    const cells = node.getCellEditors().map((editor) =>
    15→      editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
    16→        return $getRoot().getTextContent()
    17→      }),
    18→    )
    19→    const body = cells.map((content) => `::: cell\n${content}\n:::`).join('\n')
    20→    return `::: grid{cols=${node.getCols()} gap="${quoteAttr(node.getGap())}"}\n${body}\n:::`
    21→  },
    22→  regExp: /a^/,
    23→  replace: () => {},
    24→  type: 'element',
    25→}
    26→
```
</details></tool-use>
