<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { ContentEditable } from '@lexical/react/LexicalContentEditable'
     3→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     4→import { LinkPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalLinkPlugin'
     5→import { ListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalListPlugin'
     6→import { LexicalNestedComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalNestedComposer'
     7→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     8→import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     9→import { $getNodeByKey, $getRoot } from 'lexical'
    10→import { LayoutGrid, Minus, Plus } from 'lucide-react'
    11→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { $isGridContainerNode } from '../../nodes/GridContainerNode'
    14→
    15→interface GridEditDecoratorProps {
    16→  nodeKey: string
    17→  cols: number
    18→  gap: string
    19→  cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    20→}
    21→
    22→const COL_OPTIONS = [1, 2, 3, 4] as const
    23→
    24→export function GridEditDecorator({
    25→  nodeKey,
    26→  cols: initialCols,
    27→  gap,
    28→  cellEditors,
    29→}: GridEditDecoratorProps) {
    30→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    31→  const [currentCols, setCurrentCols] = useState(initialCols)
    32→
    33→  useEffect(() => {
    34→    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    35→      editorState.read(() => {
    36→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    37→        if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    38→          setCurrentCols(node.getCols())
    39→        }
    40→      })
    41→    })
    42→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    43→
    44→  const handleSetCols = useCallback(
    45→    (cols: number) => {
    46→      editor.update(() => {
    47→        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    48→        if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    49→          node.setCols(cols)
    50→        }
    51→      })
    52→    },
    53→    [editor, nodeKey],
    54→  )
    55→
    56→  const handleAddRow = useCallback(() => {
    57→    editor.update(() => {
    58→      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    59→      if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    60→        node.addCells(node.getCols())
    61→      }
    62→    })
    63→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    64→
    65→  const handleRemoveRow = useCallback(() => {
    66→    editor.update(() => {
    67→      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    68→      if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return
    69→      const cols = node.getCols()
    70→      const editors = node.getCellEditors()
    71→      if (editors.length <= cols) return
    72→
    73→      const lastRow = editors.slice(-cols)
    74→      const allEmpty = lastRow.every((cellEditor) =>
    75→        cellEditor
    76→          .getEditorState()
    77→          .read(() => $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0),
    78→      )
    79→      if (!allEmpty) return
    80→      node.removeCells(cols)
    81→    })
    82→  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    83→
    84→  return (
    85→    <>
    86→      <div
    87→        className="rich-grid-toolbar"
    88→        onMouseDown={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
    89→      >
    90→        <span className="rich-grid-toolbar-icon">
    91→          <LayoutGrid size={14} />
    92→        </span>
    93→        {COL_OPTIONS.map((n) => (
    94→          <button
    95→            key={n}
    96→            type="button"
    97→            className={`rich-grid-col-btn${n === currentCols ? ' rich-grid-col-btn-active' : ''}`}
    98→            onClick={() => handleSetCols(n)}
    99→            aria-label={`${n} columns`}
   100→          >
   101→            {n}
   102→          </button>
   103→        ))}
   104→        <div className="rich-grid-toolbar-divider" />
   105→        <button
   106→          type="button"
   107→          className="rich-grid-action-btn"
   108→          onClick={handleAddRow}
   109→          aria-label="Add row"
   110→        >
   111→          <Plus size={14} />
   112→        </button>
   113→        <button
   114→          type="button"
   115→          className="rich-grid-action-btn"
   116→          onClick={handleRemoveRow}
   117→          aria-label="Remove row"
   118→        >
   119→          <Minus size={14} />
   120→        </button>
   121→      </div>
   122→      <div
   123→        className="rich-grid-inner"
   124→        style={{
   125→          gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${currentCols}, 1fr)`,
   126→          gap,
   127→        }}
   128→      >
   129→        {cellEditors.map((cellEditor, i) => (
   130→          <div key={i} className="rich-grid-cell">
   131→            <LexicalNestedComposer initialEditor={cellEditor}>
   132→              <RichTextPlugin
   133→                contentEditable={
   134→                  <ContentEditable
   135→                    className="rich-grid-cell-editable"
   136→                    aria-placeholder=""
   137→                    placeholder={<span style={{ display: 'none' }} />}
   138→                  />
   139→                }
   140→                ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
   141→              />
   142→              <ListPlugin />
   143→              <LinkPlugin />
   144→            </LexicalNestedComposer>
   145→          </div>
   146→        ))}
   147→      </div>
   148→    </>
   149→  )
   150→}
   151→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import type {
     3→  EditorConfig,
     4→  LexicalEditor,
     5→  LexicalNode,
     6→  NodeKey,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { PenTool } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement, lazy, Suspense } from 'react'
    14→
    15→const LazyStaticRenderer = lazy(() =>
    16→  import('./TldrawStaticRenderer').then((m) => ({
    17→    default: m.TldrawStaticRenderer,
    18→  })),
    19→)
    20→const LazyEditRenderer = lazy(() =>
    21→  import('./TldrawEditRenderer').then((m) => ({
    22→    default: m.TldrawEditRenderer,
    23→  })),
    24→)
    25→
    26→export type SerializedTldrawNode = Spread<
    27→  { snapshot: string },
    28→  SerializedLexicalNode
    29→>
    30→
    31→export class TldrawNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    32→  __snapshot: string
    33→
    34→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    35→    {
    36→      title: 'Whiteboard',
    37→      icon: createElement(PenTool, { size: 20 }),
    38→      description: 'Tldraw whiteboard canvas',
    39→      keywords: ['tldraw', 'whiteboard', 'draw', 'canvas'],
    40→      section: 'MEDIA',
    41→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    42→        editor.update(() => {
    43→          $insertNodes([$createTldrawNode('{}')])
    44→        })
    45→      },
    46→    },
    47→  ]
    48→
    49→  static getType(): string {
    50→    return 'tldraw'
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  static clone(node: TldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    54→    return new TldrawNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
    55→  }
    56→
    57→  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    58→    super(key)
    59→    this.__snapshot = snapshot
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    63→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    64→    div.className = 'rich-tldraw-wrapper'
    65→    return div
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    69→    return false
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  isInline(): boolean {
    73→    return false
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    77→    return $createTldrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  exportJSON(): SerializedTldrawNode {
    81→    return {
    82→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    83→      type: 'tldraw',
    84→      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    85→      version: 1,
    86→    }
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  getSnapshot(): string {
    90→    return this.__snapshot
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  setSnapshot(snapshot: string): void {
    94→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    95→    writable.__snapshot = snapshot
    96→  }
    97→
    98→  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    99→    const nodeKey = this.__key
   100→    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
   101→
   102→    const fallback = createElement('div', {
   103→      className: 'rich-tldraw-loading',
   104→      style: {
   105→        position: 'relative',
   106→        width: '100%',
   107→        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
   108→        margin: '1rem 0',
   109→      },
   110→    })
   111→
   112→    if (isEditable) {
   113→      return createElement(
   114→        Suspense,
   115→        { fallback },
   116→        createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {
   117→          snapshot: this.__snapshot,
   118→          onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
   119→            editor.update(() => {
   120→              const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as TldrawNode | null
   121→              if (node) {
   122→                node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)
   123→              }
   124→            })
   125→          },
   126→        }),
   127→      )
   128→    }
   129→
   130→    return createElement(
   131→      Suspense,
   132→      { fallback },
   133→      createElement(LazyStaticRenderer, { snapshot: this.__snapshot }),
   134→    )
   135→  }
   136→}
   137→
   138→export function $createTldrawNode(snapshot: string): TldrawNode {
   139→  return new TldrawNode(snapshot)
   140→}
   141→
   142→export function $isTldrawNode(
   143→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   144→): node is TldrawNode {
   145→  return node instanceof TldrawNode
   146→}
   147→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  GalleryImage,
     3→  GalleryRendererProps,
     4→  SlashMenuItemConfig,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     6→import { createRendererDecoration } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     7→import type {
     8→  EditorConfig,
     9→  LexicalEditor,
    10→  LexicalNode,
    11→  NodeKey,
    12→  SerializedLexicalNode,
    13→  Spread,
    14→} from 'lexical'
    15→import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    16→import { Images } from 'lucide-react'
    17→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    18→import { createElement } from 'react'
    19→
    20→import { GalleryRenderer } from './GalleryRenderer'
    21→
    22→export type SerializedGalleryNode = Spread<
    23→  {
    24→    images: GalleryImage[]
    25→    layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    26→  },
    27→  SerializedLexicalNode
    28→>
    29→
    30→export interface GalleryNodePayload {
    31→  images: GalleryImage[]
    32→  layout?: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    33→}
    34→
    35→export class GalleryNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    36→  __images: GalleryImage[]
    37→  __layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'
    38→
    39→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    40→    {
    41→      title: 'Gallery',
    42→      icon: createElement(Images, { size: 20 }),
    43→      description: 'Image gallery grid',
    44→      keywords: ['gallery', 'images', 'grid'],
    45→      section: 'MEDIA',
    46→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    47→        editor.update(() => {
    48→          $insertNodes([$createGalleryNode({ images: [] })])
    49→        })
    50→      },
    51→    },
    52→  ]
    53→
    54→  static getType(): string {
    55→    return 'gallery'
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  static clone(node: GalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    59→    return new GalleryNode(
    60→      {
    61→        images: node.__images.map((img) => ({ ...img })),
    62→        layout: node.__layout,
    63→      },
    64→      node.__key,
    65→    )
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  constructor(payload: GalleryNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    69→    super(key)
    70→    this.__images = payload.images
    71→    this.__layout = payload.layout || 'grid'
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    75→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    76→    div.className = `rich-gallery rich-gallery-${this.__layout}`
    77→    return div
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    81→    return false
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  isInline(): boolean {
    85→    return false
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedGalleryNode): GalleryNode {
    89→    return $createGalleryNode({
    90→      images: serializedNode.images,
    91→      layout: serializedNode.layout,
    92→    })
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  exportJSON(): SerializedGalleryNode {
    96→    return {
    97→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    98→      type: 'gallery',
    99→      images: this.__images,
   100→      layout: this.__layout,
   101→      version: 1,
   102→    }
   103→  }
   104→
   105→  getImages(): GalleryImage[] {
   106→    return this.getLatest().__images
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  setImages(images: GalleryImage[]): void {
   110→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   111→    writable.__images = images
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getLayout(): 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel' {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__layout
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setLayout(layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel'): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    writable.__layout = layout
   121→  }
   122→
   123→  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   124→    const nodeKey = this.__key
   125→    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
   126→    const props: GalleryRendererProps = {
   127→      images: this.__images,
   128→      layout: this.__layout,
   129→      ...(isEditable && {
   130→        onImagesChange: (images: GalleryImage[]) => {
   131→          editor.update(() => {
   132→            const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
   133→            if (node) node.setImages(images)
   134→          })
   135→        },
   136→        onLayoutChange: (layout: 'grid' | 'masonry' | 'carousel') => {
   137→          editor.update(() => {
   138→            const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as GalleryNode | null
   139→            if (node) node.setLayout(layout)
   140→          })
   141→        },
   142→      }),
   143→    }
   144→    return createRendererDecoration('Gallery', GalleryRenderer, props)
   145→  }
   146→}
   147→
   148→export function $createGalleryNode(payload: GalleryNodePayload): GalleryNode {
   149→  return new GalleryNode(payload)
   150→}
   151→
   152→export function $isGalleryNode(
   153→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   154→): node is GalleryNode {
   155→  return node instanceof GalleryNode
   156→}
   157→
```

Setting up the transformer to instantiate... The headless package has its own separate transformers, so it's safe for the editor transformers to depend on EditNode classes. For the grid-container transformer specifically, the issue is that it calls `getCellEditors()` on a node during export, which works in the editor context where the node is actually a `GridEditNode`, but the type guard only checks the base `GridContainerNode` type.

The cleanest solution is to extract text content directly from the serialized state instead of relying on editor-specific methods, avoiding the type mismatch entirely.

Writing the export function... I'm working through the transformer changes needed for these node types - updating `alert.ts`, `container.ts`, and `grid-container.ts` to pass content directly to constructors instead of relying on editor callbacks, which simplifies the logic for both static and editable contexts. Now I need to address the SSR issue where the gallery node needs to check if the editor is editable before spreading edit callbacks, since the SSR engine runs with `editable: false`. ldrawNode.ts:100`: `const isEditable = editor.isEditable()` then returns edit vs static renderer

In the SSR engine, `createHeadlessEditor()` should be called with `editable: false`. This ensures all `node.decorate()` calls see `editor.isEditable() === false` and choose the static path.

This is a one-line fix but critical to document.

Now looking at the `TldrawNode` decorate method—it branches on `isEditable` to pick between `LazyEditRenderer` and `LazyStaticRenderer`. With `editable: false` in SSR, it would use the static renderer, but that still has edit-only imports which breaks the build. The real solution is to split this into two separate nodes: `TldrawNode` for the base static case that always returns an SSR-safe renderer, and `TldrawEditNode` that handles the branching logic for edit vs display modes. That way the static config only registers the safe version. So we actually need three separate renderers: one for pure SSR that's just a snapshot placeholder, one for client-side display with lazy loading and expand features, and one for editing. The node's `decorate()` method would then branch to return the appropriate renderer based on the context.

But looking at how `TldrawNode` currently works, it doesn't follow the same pattern as other nodes—it directly returns the renderer instead of using `createRendererDecoration`. To align with the rest of the system, I could make `TldrawNode.decorate()` use `createRendererDecoration` with the SSR renderer as the default, then let the renderer configs handle mapping to the display and edit versions. The tradeoff is that this changes how `TldrawNode` currently manages its own edit/static branching logic.

A simpler alternative would be to split this into separate `TldrawNode` and `TldrawEditNode` classes following the same pattern as Alert and CodeBlock—the static version returns just the SSR renderer, while the edit version handles the full branching logic for lazy-loaded edit and display renderers. This way the static config registers the base node with its safe renderer, and the edit config registers the edit node with all the interactive features.

Now looking at the GridEditDecorator issue—it's calling `getCellEditors()` on a node that TypeScript doesn't recognize as having that method. Since this decorator only runs in the editor context where the node is always a `GridEditNode`, I should change the type guard to check for `GridEditNode` specifically instead of the base `GridContainerNode`, which makes the method call type-safe.

Alternatively, I could keep the base type guard but cast the node to `GridEditNode` afterward. The first approach is cleaner since it avoids the cast. I'll need to make sure `GridEditNode` has a proper type guard function exported.

For the `getCols()` call in the same file, that's fine since `getCols()` stays on the base class, so the existing `$isGridContainerNode` check works there.

The trickier part is that `setCols()`, `addCells()`, and `removeCells()` all modify `__cellStates` on the base, but the edit node overrides them to also sync `__cellEditors`. Since the node in the editor context is actually a `GridEditNode`, those overridden methods will handle both state and editor management automatically.

The real issue is `getCellEditors()` — that method only exists on `GridEditNode`, not the base class, so I need to guard that specific call with `$isGridEditNode` instead of the broader `$isGridContainerNode` check.

Looking at the decorator implementation, lines 37, 48, and 59 all use base methods that are properly inherited or overridden, so they're fine. But line 70 calls `getCellEditors()` which will fail at runtime since the type guard doesn't guarantee that method exists.

The fix is straightforward: import the edit node type guard and use it for that one problematic call. Then I need to go back and address the remaining issues in the plan, starting with the transformer changes and the path error.
</details></think>

1. **Transformer 调 base node 工厂 + `getContentEditor()`**：`$createAlertQuoteNode()` 直接 `new AlertQuoteNode()`，然后立即调 `getContentEditor()`。删除此方法则断。
2. **`editor.isEditable()` 分支**：GalleryNode/TldrawNode 的 `decorate()` 内部分支走 edit/static。SSR 未设 `editable: false`。
3. **TldrawNode 单类分支**：base class 内 `decorate()` 直接 lazy import `TldrawStaticRenderer`（含 `presentDialog`），无 Static/Edit node split。
4. **GridEditDecorator 类型断裂**：`$isGridContainerNode` 窄化为 base 类型后调 `getCellEditors()`，base 删除此方法则类型+实现双断。
5. **路径误差遗留**。

```md
# RichSSRRenderer 实施计划

## Context

`RichRenderer` SSR 输出空壳。本计划收紧 Static/Edit 双轨定义，使 Static 路径 100% SSR 安全（无 `LexicalNestedComposer`、无浏览器 API、无运行时分支），然后基于此构建 `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` headless 引擎。

---

## 核心约束

### Static 定义（强约束）

1. 首次 render 输出有意义 HTML，**不依赖 useEffect**
2. render 路径**零 `window`/`document`/`navigator`** 访问
3. **零 `useLayoutEffect`**
4. **零 `LexicalNestedComposer`**（嵌套内容通过 context 提供的 render 函数）
5. 无运行时 SSR/CSR 分支——Static 路径只有一条
6. **零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` 导入**（`presentDialog`、`DropdownMenu`、`Popover` 等均为 edit-only）

### Static Renderer 定义（两层）

| 类别 | 约束 | 适用场景 | 例 |
|------|------|---------|-----|
| **SSR-Core** | 零浏览器 API（包括 effect 内）、零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`、零 `lucide-react` | SSR 引擎直接使用 | `AlertRenderer`、`BannerRenderer`、`ImageRenderer` |
| **Isomorphic** | 首次 render 输出有意义 HTML；浏览器 API **仅限** `useEffect`/callback 内；零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` | `RichRenderer`（CSR）+ SSR 引擎均可用（SSR 跳过 effect） | `CodeBlockRenderer`、`VideoRenderer`、`GalleryRenderer` |

**关键**：SSR 引擎消费的 `enhancedRendererConfig` 中的 renderer 只需满足 **Isomorphic** 级别——React `renderToString` 忽略 `useEffect`/`useLayoutEffect`，只执行 render 路径。

**禁区**：Static renderer **绝不可**导入 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`。这是 edit-only 包边界。

### 双轨强制

| 层 | Static (display-only, SSR safe) | Edit (editor-only, browser-ok) |
|----|---------------------------------|-------------------------------|
| Node | 只存可序列化数据（`SerializedEditorState`），`decorate()` → StaticDecorator/RendererWrapper。**无** `getContentEditor()`/`getCellEditors()` 方法 | 继承 StaticNode，额外管理 `LexicalEditor` 实例，**新增** `getContentEditor()`/`getCellEditors()`，`decorate()` → EditDecorator |
| Renderer | Isomorphic 组件，无 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` 导入 | 可用 hooks/DOM/API/edit-ui 增强 |
| 注册 | `config.ts` → `allNodes`，`enhancedRendererConfig` | `config-edit.ts` → `allEditNodes`，`enhancedEditRendererConfig` |

---

## 新增入口约定

### `@haklex/rich-editor`

| 入口 | 导出内容 | Lexical 导入 |
|------|---------|-------------|
| `.` (现有) | 全部 | 有 |
| `./editor` (现有) | RichEditor | 有 |
| `./renderer` (现有) | RichRenderer | 有 |
| **`./static` (新增)** | allNodes, builtinNodes, customNodes, editorTheme, getVariantClass, variant classes, RendererConfig type, all contexts (ColorScheme/RendererConfig/FootnoteDefinitions), RendererWrapper, createRendererDecoration, **NestedContentRendererContext** | 有（peer dep） |
| **`./styles` (新增)** | getVariantClass, variant classes, richContent, vars, theme classes | **无** |

### 导入边界强制

`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` ESLint：

\```javascript
'no-restricted-imports': ['error', {
  paths: [
    { name: '@haklex/rich-editor', message: 'Use @haklex/rich-editor/static or /styles' },
    { name: '@haklex/rich-editor-ui', message: 'Edit-only package' },
  ]
}]
\```

---

## Phase 0：Static 约束 + lint gate

### 0.1 ESLint 规则（分层）

**SSR 引擎**（`packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/`）——严格：

\```javascript
'no-restricted-globals': ['error', 'window', 'document', 'navigator', 'location', 'history']
'no-restricted-imports': ['error', {
  paths: [
    { name: 'react', importNames: ['useLayoutEffect', 'useEffect', 'useState', 'useRef'], message: 'SSR engine: no hooks' },
    { name: '@haklex/rich-editor', message: 'Use /static or /styles' },
    { name: '@haklex/rich-editor-ui', message: 'Edit-only' },
  ]
}]
\```

**Static renderer**——仅禁 edit-only 包：

\```javascript
'no-restricted-imports': ['error', {
  paths: [{ name: '@haklex/rich-editor-ui', message: 'Split into EditRenderer' }]
}]
\```

### 0.2 `NestedContentRendererContext`

**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/context/NestedContentRendererContext.tsx`

\```typescript
import { type ReactNode, createContext, use } from 'react'
import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'

type RenderEditorStateFn = (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode

const NestedContentRendererContext = createContext<RenderEditorStateFn | null>(null)

export const NestedContentRendererProvider = NestedContentRendererContext.Provider

export function useNestedContentRenderer(): RenderEditorStateFn {
  const fn = use(NestedContentRendererContext)
  if (!fn) throw new Error('NestedContentRendererProvider is required')
  return fn
}
\```

从 `./static` 入口导出。

---

## Phase 1：嵌套节点改造 + Transformer 适配 + Tldraw split

### 核心策略

**StaticNode**：
- 存储 `__contentState: SerializedEditorState`，**不持有** `LexicalEditor` 实例
- **无** `getContentEditor()` / `getCellEditors()` 方法
- `importJSON()`：直接存 `serializedNode.content`
- `exportJSON()`：直接输出 `this.__contentState`
- `getTextContent()`：用 `extractTextContent()` 从 JSON 递归提取
- `decorate()` → StaticDecorator

**EditNode**：
- 额外管理 `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor`
- **新增** `getContentEditor()` / `getCellEditors()`
- `importJSON`：创建 editor + hydrate
- `exportJSON`：从 editor 序列化
- `decorate()` → EditDecorator

### 文本提取辅助

**新建**：`packages/rich-editor/src/utils/extractTextContent.ts`

\```typescript
export function extractTextContent(state: SerializedEditorState): string {
  function walk(node: any): string {
    if (node.text) return node.text
    if (node.children) return node.children.map(walk).join('')
    if (node.root) return walk(node.root)
    return ''
  }
  return walk(state)
}
\```

### 1.1 AlertQuoteNode / AlertQuoteEditNode

**AlertQuoteNode**（`src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts`）：

| 变更 | 详情 |
|------|------|
| `__contentEditor` → `__contentState: SerializedEditorState` | 仅存序列化数据 |
| 删除 `createContentEditor()` | 工厂函数移入 EditNode |
| 删除 `getContentEditor()` | 仅 EditNode 提供 |
| `constructor(alertType, contentState?)` | 接受可选 contentState |
| `importJSON` | `node.__contentState = serializedNode.content` |
| `exportJSON` | `{ ...base, content: this.__contentState }` |
| `getTextContent()` | `extractTextContent(this.__contentState)` |
| `decorate()` | `createElement(AlertStaticDecorator, { alertType, contentState })` |

**AlertQuoteEditNode**（`src/nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode.ts`）：

| 变更 | 详情 |
|------|------|
| 新增 `__contentEditor: LexicalEditor` | `createContentEditor()` 在此定义 |
| 新增 `getContentEditor()` | 返回 `this.__contentEditor` |
| `constructor` | `super(alertType, contentState)` + 创建 editor + parse contentState |
| `importJSON` | 创建 EditNode + 创建/恢复 editor state |
| `exportJSON` | `{ ...super.exportJSON(), content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON() }` |
| `decorate()` | `AlertEditDecorator`（保持 `LexicalNestedComposer`） |

**新增 `$createAlertQuoteEditNode(alertType, contentState?)`** 工厂函数，导出供 transformer 使用。

**AlertStaticDecorator**（**新建** `src/components/renderers/AlertStaticDecorator.tsx`）：

\```tsx
export function AlertStaticDecorator({ alertType, contentState }) {
  const renderNested = useNestedContentRenderer()
  return (
    <>
      <RendererWrapper rendererKey="Alert" defaultRenderer={AlertRenderer} props={{ type: alertType }} />
      <div className="rich-alert-content">{renderNested(contentState)}</div>
    </>
  )
}
\```

### 1.2 BannerNode / BannerEditNode — 同 1.1 模式

新增 `$createBannerEditNode(bannerType, contentState?)` 工厂函数。

**新建** `BannerStaticDecorator.tsx`。

### 1.3 GridContainerNode / GridEditNode

**GridContainerNode**（`src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`）：

| 变更 | 详情 |
|------|------|
| `__cellEditors` → `__cellStates: SerializedEditorState[]` | 仅存序列化数据 |
| 删除 `createCellEditor()` | 移入 EditNode |
| 删除 `getCellEditors()` | 仅 EditNode 提供 |
| 新增 `getCellStates()` | 返回 `this.__cellStates` |
| `setCols()` | 操作 `__cellStates`（新增空 state） |
| `addCells()` | 操作 `__cellStates` |
| `removeCells()` | 操作 `__cellStates`，用 `extractTextContent()` 检查空 |
| `getTextContent()` | `__cellStates.map(extractTextContent).join('\n')` |
| `importJSON` | 直接存 cell states |
| `exportJSON` | 直接输出 `__cellStates` |
| `decorate()` | `GridStaticDecorator`（用 `useNestedContentRenderer()` 渲染每个 cell） |

**GridEditNode**（`src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts`）：

| 变更 | 详情 |
|------|------|
| 新增 `__cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]` | `createCellEditor()` 在此定义 |
| 新增 `getCellEditors()` | 返回 `this.__cellEditors` |
| 覆盖 `setCols()` | 同步操作 `__cellStates` + `__cellEditors` |
| 覆盖 `addCells()` | 同上 |
| 覆盖 `removeCells()` | 同上 |
| `importJSON` | 创建 editors + hydrate |
| `exportJSON` | 从 editors 序列化 |
| `decorate()` | `GridEditDecorator`（传 `cellEditors`） |

新增 `$createGridEditNode(payload)` 和 `$isGridEditNode()` 类型守卫。

**GridStaticDecorator**（**新建** `src/components/renderers/GridStaticDecorator.tsx`）。

### 1.4 GridEditDecorator 修改

**文件**：`src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx`

**变更**：
- Line 68-70：`$isGridContainerNode(node)` → `$isGridEditNode(node)` + `node.getCellEditors()`
- 导入 `$isGridEditNode` from `../../nodes/GridEditNode`
- 其余 `$isGridContainerNode` 调用保留（`getCols()`、`setCols()`、`addCells()` 等方法仍在 base class 上）

**具体改动**：

\```typescript
// 现有 (line 68-70):
if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return
const cols = node.getCols()
const editors = node.getCellEditors()  // ← base 无此方法

// 改为:
if (!$isGridEditNode(node)) return
const cols = node.getCols()
const editors = node.getCellEditors()  // ← GridEditNode 上有此方法
\```

### 1.5 Transformer 适配（显式 EditNode 工厂）

Transformer 仅在编辑器上下文运行，直接创建 EditNode。

**`src/transformers/alert.ts`**：

\```typescript
// 现有:
import { $createAlertQuoteNode, AlertQuoteNode } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
// ...
const alertNode = $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType)            // line 27: 创建 base
const editorState = alertNode.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)  // line 52
alertNode.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)      // line 53

// 改为:
import { AlertQuoteNode } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
import { $createAlertQuoteEditNode } from '../nodes/AlertQuoteEditNode'
// ...
const alertNode = $createAlertQuoteEditNode(alertType, content)  // 直接传 contentState
// 删除 line 52-53（EditNode constructor 内部已 hydrate）
\```

**`src/transformers/container.ts`**：

\```typescript
// 现有:
import { $createBannerNode, BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
// ...
const banner = $createBannerNode(bannerType)                  // line 33
const editorState = banner.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)  // line 60
banner.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)         // line 61

// 改为:
import { BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
import { $createBannerEditNode } from '../nodes/BannerEditNode'
// ...
const banner = $createBannerEditNode(bannerType, content)     // 直接传 contentState
// 删除 line 60-61
\```

**`src/transformers/grid-container.ts`**：

\```typescript
// 现有 (line 14-17):
const cells = node.getCellEditors().map((editor) =>
  editor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContent())
)

// 改为:
import { extractTextContent } from '../utils/extractTextContent'
// ...
const cells = node.getCellStates().map((state) => extractTextContent(state))
\```

> `getCellStates()` 在 base `GridContainerNode` 上，`$isGridContainerNode` 类型守卫可用。

### 1.6 TldrawNode / TldrawEditNode split

**当前问题**（`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts:98-134`）：

\```typescript
decorate(editor, _config) {
  const isEditable = editor.isEditable()  // line 100: 分支
  if (isEditable) {
    return createElement(Suspense, {}, createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {...}))   // line 112-127
  }
  return createElement(Suspense, {}, createElement(LazyStaticRenderer, {...}))   // line 130-134
  // LazyStaticRenderer → TldrawStaticRenderer → 导入 presentDialog 💥
}
\```

**修复**：

**TldrawNode**（base，static-only）：
- 删除 `LazyStaticRenderer` / `LazyEditRenderer` lazy import
- `decorate()` → 返回 `TldrawSSRRenderer`（纯 SSR 占位，snapshot 预览图），**无分支**
- 注册在 `allNodes`（static config）

**TldrawEditNode**（**新建** `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditNode.ts`）：
- extends `TldrawNode`
- 覆盖 `decorate()`：
  - `isEditable` → `LazyEditRenderer`
  - `!isEditable` → `LazyDisplayRenderer`（现有 `TldrawStaticRenderer` rename 为 `TldrawDisplayRenderer`）
- 注册在 `allEditNodes`（edit config，通过 `rich-renderers-edit`）

**TldrawSSRRenderer**（**新建** `packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx`）：
- 纯 SSR 占位：`<div className="rich-tldraw-wrapper" style={{ aspectRatio: '16/10' }}><div className="rich-tldraw-placeholder">Whiteboard</div></div>`
- 零浏览器 API、零 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui`、零 `lucide-react`

**TldrawStaticRenderer.tsx → rename to TldrawDisplayRenderer.tsx**：
- 保留现有逻辑（`presentDialog` + `IntersectionObserver` lazy load）
- 仅用于编辑器 CSR 路径

**导出更新**（`packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/index.ts`）：
- 新增 `TldrawEditNode`、`$createTldrawEditNode`、`$isTldrawEditNode`
- 新增 `TldrawSSRRenderer`
- rename `TldrawStaticRenderer` → `TldrawDisplayRenderer`
- 保留向后兼容别名（若需要）

### 1.7 SSR 引擎 `editable: false`

**CRITICAL**：`createHeadlessEditor` 必须设置 `editable: false`。多个 node 的 `decorate()` 根据 `editor.isEditable()` 分支：

| Node | 分支代码 | `editable: false` 时行为 |
|------|---------|------------------------|
| `GalleryNode` (line 125) | `isEditable` → 传 `onImagesChange`/`onLayoutChange` callbacks | 不传 edit callbacks → static props |
| `TldrawNode` (改造后) | 无分支，始终返回 `TldrawSSRRenderer` | SSR 安全 ✓ |
| `TldrawEditNode` (改造后) | `isEditable` → edit renderer; else → display renderer | display renderer（CSR 场景） |

SSR 引擎代码：

\```typescript
const editor = createHeadlessEditor({
  nodes: allNodes,
  theme: editorTheme,
  editable: false,  // ← CRITICAL：确保 decorate() 走 static 路径
})
\```

### 1.8 `RichRenderer` 补充 `NestedContentRendererProvider`

**文件**：`packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichRenderer.tsx`

在 Provider 链中加入 `NestedContentRendererProvider`，提供基于 headless Lexical 的嵌套渲染函数。

需新增 `@lexical/headless` 为 `@haklex/rich-editor` 的 dependency。

## Phase 3：`@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` 引擎

### 3.1 包结构

\```
packages/rich-ssr-renderer/
  package.json
  tsconfig.json
  vite.config.ts
  src/
    index.ts
    RichSSRRenderer.tsx
    types.ts
    engine/
      renderNode.tsx
      renderBuiltinNode.tsx
      renderTextNode.tsx
    preprocess/
      footnote.ts
      headingSlug.ts
\```

### 3.2 依赖

\```jsonc
{
  "dependencies": { "@lexical/headless": "^0.40.0" },
  "peerDependencies": {
    "react": ">=19",
    "@haklex/rich-editor": ">=0.0.31",  // 只用 /static 和 /styles
    "lexical": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/code": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/extension": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/link": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/list": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/rich-text": "^0.40.0",
    "@lexical/table": "^0.40.0"
  }
}
\```

### 3.3 核心流程

\```
1. parse value → SerializedEditorState
2. createHeadlessEditor({
     nodes: allNodes + extraNodes,   // from @haklex/rich-editor/static
     theme: editorTheme,              // from @haklex/rich-editor/static
     editable: false,                 // ← CRITICAL
   })
3. editor.parseEditorState(json) → editorState
4. editorState.read(() => {
     preprocess: footnote 编号 + heading slug
     walk $getRoot().getChildren() → renderNode() 递归
     合成缺失 footnote-section
   })
5. Provider 包裹:
     PortalThemeProvider(variantClass)
     ColorSchemeProvider(theme)
     RendererConfigProvider(rendererConfig, mode='renderer', variant)
     FootnoteDefinitionsProvider(displayNumberMap, definitions)
     NestedContentRendererProvider(renderEditorState)
6. 输出 <div class="rich-content {variantClass}" data-theme={theme}>
\```

### 3.4 renderNode 分派

\```typescript
function renderNode(node: LexicalNode, ctx: RenderContext, key: number): ReactNode {
  if ($isTextNode(node))      return renderTextNode(node, key)
  if ($isLineBreakNode(node)) return <br key={key} />
  if ($isDecoratorNode(node)) {
    const el = node.decorate(ctx.editor, ctx.editorConfig)
    return el ? cloneElement(el, { key }) : null
  }
  if ($isElementNode(node))   return renderBuiltinNode(node, ctx, key)
  return handleUnknown(node, ctx.unknownNodeStrategy, key)
}
\```

### 3.5 renderBuiltinNode 映射

| Node | 输出 | class |
|------|------|-------|
| ParagraphNode | `<p>` | `rich-paragraph` |
| HeadingNode | `<Tag id={slug}><a class="rich-heading-anchor"/>children</Tag>` | `rich-heading-{tag}` |
| QuoteNode | `<blockquote>` | `rich-quote` |
| ListNode | `<ul>`/`<ol>` | `rich-list-ul`/`rich-list-ol`/`rich-checklist` |
| ListItemNode | `<li>` | `rich-list-item` + checked/unchecked/nested |
| LinkNode/AutoLinkNode | `<a href rel target>` | `rich-link` |
| TableNode | `<div><table>` | `rich-table-scrollable-wrapper`/`rich-table` |
| TableRowNode | `<tr>` | — |
| TableCellNode | `<td>`/`<th>` | `rich-table-cell`/`rich-table-cell-header` |
| HorizontalRuleNode | `<hr />` | `rich-hr` |
| CodeNode | `<pre><code>` | `rich-code-block` |
| SpoilerNode | `<span role="button" tabIndex={0}>` | `rich-spoiler` |
| DetailsNode | `<details open={open}><summary/><div>children</div></details>` | `rich-details` |

### 3.6 renderTextNode

\```typescript
const FORMAT_MAP: [number, string][] = [
  [1, 'rich-text-bold'], [2, 'rich-text-italic'], [4, 'rich-text-strikethrough'],
  [8, 'rich-text-underline'], [16, 'rich-text-code'], [32, 'rich-text-subscript'],
  [64, 'rich-text-superscript'], [128, 'rich-text-highlight'],
]
\```

### 3.7 Footnote 预处理

`$nodesOfType(FootnoteNode)` + `$nodesOfType(FootnoteSectionNode)`。算法对齐 `FootnotePlugin.tsx:23-50`。有脚注无 section 时自动合成。

### 3.8 Heading slug 去重

复制 `HeadingAnchorPlugin.tsx:5-25` 的 `textToSlug` + `deduplicateSlug`。`RenderContext` 持有 `usedSlugs: Map<string, number>`。

### 4.1 入口

| 入口 | 依赖 | 用途 |
|------|------|------|
| `./ssr` (新增) | `@haklex/rich-ssr-renderer` + `@haklex/rich-renderers`（static-only） | Server Component |
| `./editor` (现有) | `@haklex/rich-renderers-edit`（edit-only） | 客户端编辑器 |
| `./renderer` (现有) | `@haklex/rich-renderers`（static-only） | 客户端只读 |

### 4.2 Web app 接入

**新建** `apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.server.tsx`（Server Component）。

现有 `LexicalContent.tsx`（CSR）保留为客户端增强 / 回退。

---

## Phase 5：回归验收

### 验收标准

1. `renderToString(<RichSSRRenderer .../>)` 输出正文语义 HTML
2. Decorator 节点由 `decorate()` → StaticRenderer，无手写 HTML 重复
3. Alert/banner/grid 嵌套内容 SSR 非空，无 `LexicalNestedComposer`
4. 根元素带正确 VE variant class
5. `enhancedRendererConfig` 直接注入可用
6. 现有 `RichRenderer`（CSR）行为不退化
7. 现有编辑器链路不退化：Transformer → EditNode 工厂 → EditDecorator
8. Static renderer 无 `@haklex/rich-editor-ui` 导入
9. `rich-ssr-renderer` 无 `@haklex/rich-editor` 根路径引用
10. headless editor `editable: false`：`node.decorate()` 不输出编辑 UI

### 验证

\```bash
# 构建全链路
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-ssr-renderer build && pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-kit-shiro build

# SSR 引擎约束
grep -rn "window\.\|document\.\|navigator\." packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"
grep -rn "from '@haklex/rich-editor'" packages/rich-ssr-renderer/src/ | grep -v '/static\|/styles' && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"
grep -r "@lexical/react" packages/rich-ssr-renderer/dist/ && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

# Static renderer 无 edit-ui 导入
grep -rn "@haklex/rich-editor-ui" packages/rich-renderer-*/src/ packages/rich-ext-gallery/src/GalleryRenderer.tsx packages/rich-ext-code-snippet/src/CodeSnippetRenderer.tsx packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx && echo "FAIL" || echo "PASS"

# 编辑器链路
pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev
# 手动验证：alert/banner/grid 嵌套编辑 + markdown shortcut 触发
\```

---

     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'

    10→export function AlertPlugin() {

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import {
     2→  TooltipContent,
     3→  TooltipRoot,
     4→  TooltipTrigger,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     6→import type { HTMLAttributes, MouseEvent } from 'react'
     7→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import {
    10→  useFootnoteContent,
    11→  useFootnoteDisplayNumber,
    12→} from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
    13→
    14→export interface FootnoteRendererProps {
    15→  identifier: string
    16→}
    17→
    18→export function FootnoteRenderer({ identifier }: FootnoteRendererProps) {
    19→  const content = useFootnoteContent(identifier)
    20→  const displayNumber = useFootnoteDisplayNumber(identifier)
    21→
    22→  const referenceId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    23→  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    24→
    25→  const handleClick = useCallback(
    26→    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    27→      const target =
    28→        document.getElementById(targetId) ||
    29→        document.getElementById(`fn-${identifier}`)
    30→      if (!target) return
    31→
    32→      e.preventDefault()
    33→      target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    34→      target.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    35→
    36→      window.setTimeout(() => {
    37→        target.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    38→      }, 1200)
    39→    },
    40→    [identifier, targetId],
    41→  )
    42→
    43→  const label = displayNumber ?? identifier
    44→
    45→  return (
    46→    <span className="rich-footnote-ref-wrapper">
    47→      <TooltipRoot>
    48→        <TooltipTrigger
    49→          render={(props: HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>) => (
    50→            <a
    51→              {...props}
    52→              className="rich-footnote-ref"
    53→              href={`#${targetId}`}
    54→              id={referenceId}
    55→              role="doc-noteref"
    56→              aria-label={
    57→                content ? `Footnote ${label}: ${content}` : `Footnote ${label}`
    58→              }
    59→              onClick={handleClick}
    60→              data-footnote-ref={identifier}
    61→            >
    62→              {label}
    63→            </a>
    64→          )}
    65→        />
    66→        {content ? <TooltipContent>{content}</TooltipContent> : null}
    67→      </TooltipRoot>
    68→    </span>
    69→  )
    70→}
    71→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroEditor.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { RichEditorProps } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     3→import { BlockHandlePlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-block-handle'
     4→import { FloatingToolbarPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar'
     5→import { FloatingLinkEditorPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-link-edit'
     6→import { SlashMenuPlugin } from '@haklex/rich-plugin-slash-menu'
     7→import {
     8→  TableCellResizerPlugin,
     9→  TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin,
    10→} from '@haklex/rich-plugin-table'
    11→import { galleryNodes, TldrawNode } from '@haklex/rich-renderers'
    12→import {
    13→  codeSnippetEditNodes,
    14→  ConvertToLinkCardAction,
    15→  embedEditNodes,
    16→  EmbedPlugin,
    17→  enhancedEditRendererConfig,
    18→  katexEditNodes,
    19→  linkCardEditNodes,
    20→  PasteLinkCardPlugin,
    21→  TldrawPlugin,
    22→} from '@haklex/rich-renderers-edit'
    23→import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    24→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
    25→import { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
    26→
    27→const defaultExtraNodes = [
    28→  TldrawNode,
    29→  ...embedEditNodes,
    30→  ...linkCardEditNodes,
    31→  ...katexEditNodes,
    32→  ...galleryNodes,
    33→  ...codeSnippetEditNodes,
    34→]
    35→
    36→export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<
    37→  RichEditorProps,
    38→  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'
    39→> {
    40→  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    41→  actions?: ReactNode
    42→  selfHostnames?: string[]
    43→}
    44→
    45→export function ShiroEditor({
    46→  extraNodes,
    47→  actions,
    48→  children,
    49→  selfHostnames,
    50→  ...props
    51→}: ShiroEditorProps) {
    52→  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    53→    () =>
    54→      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    55→    [extraNodes],
    56→  )
    57→
    58→  const renderLinkExtraActions = useCallback(
    59→    ({
    60→      url,
    61→      linkKey,
    62→      actionButtonClassName,
    63→    }: {
    64→      url: string
    65→      linkKey: string
    66→      actionButtonClassName: string
    67→    }) => (
    68→      <ConvertToLinkCardAction
    69→        url={url}
    70→        linkKey={linkKey}
    71→        className={actionButtonClassName}
    72→      />
    73→    ),
    74→    [],
    75→  )
    76→
    77→  return (
    78→    <RichEditor
    79→      {...props}
    80→      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    81→      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
    82→      actions={
    83→        <>
    84→          <SlashMenuPlugin />
    85→          {actions}
    86→        </>
    87→      }
    88→    >
    89→      <BlockHandlePlugin />
    90→      <FloatingToolbarPlugin />
    91→      <FloatingLinkEditorPlugin renderExtraActions={renderLinkExtraActions} />
    92→      <TldrawPlugin />
    93→      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />
    94→      <PasteLinkCardPlugin />
    95→      <TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin />
    96→      <TableCellResizerPlugin />
    97→      {children}
    98→    </RichEditor>
    99→  )
   100→}
   101→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/FootnoteSectionRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { MouseEvent } from 'react'
     2→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useFootnoteDefinitions } from '../../context/FootnoteDefinitionsContext'
     5→
     6→export interface FootnoteSectionRendererProps {
     7→  definitions: Record<string, string>
     8→  nodeKey: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function FootnoteSectionRenderer({
    12→  definitions,
    13→}: FootnoteSectionRendererProps) {
    14→  const { displayNumberMap } = useFootnoteDefinitions()
    15→
    16→  const sortedEntries = Object.entries(definitions).sort(
    17→    ([a], [b]) => (displayNumberMap[a] ?? 0) - (displayNumberMap[b] ?? 0),
    18→  )
    19→
    20→  if (sortedEntries.length === 0) return null
    21→
    22→  return (
    23→    <div className="rich-footnote-section-content" role="doc-endnotes">
    24→      <hr className="rich-footnote-section-divider" />
    25→      <ol className="rich-footnote-section-list">
    26→        {sortedEntries.map(([identifier, content]) => {
    27→          const displayNum = displayNumberMap[identifier] ?? identifier
    28→          return (
    29→            <FootnoteSectionItem
    30→              key={identifier}
    31→              identifier={identifier}
    32→              content={content}
    33→              displayNum={displayNum}
    34→            />
    35→          )
    36→        })}
    37→      </ol>
    38→    </div>
    39→  )
    40→}
    41→
    42→function FootnoteSectionItem({
    43→  identifier,
    44→  content,
    45→  displayNum,
    46→}: {
    47→  identifier: string
    48→  content: string
    49→  displayNum: number | string
    50→}) {
    51→  const targetId = `footnote-${identifier}`
    52→  const refId = `footnote-ref-${identifier}`
    53→
    54→  const handleBackClick = useCallback(
    55→    (e: MouseEvent<HTMLAnchorElement>) => {
    56→      e.preventDefault()
    57→      const refElement = document.getElementById(refId)
    58→      if (!refElement) return
    59→      refElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' })
    60→      refElement.classList.add('rich-footnote-highlight')
    61→      window.setTimeout(() => {
    62→        refElement.classList.remove('rich-footnote-highlight')
    63→      }, 1200)
    64→    },
    65→    [refId],
    66→  )
    67→
    68→  return (
    69→    <li
    70→      id={targetId}
    71→      className="rich-footnote-section-item"
    72→      value={typeof displayNum === 'number' ? displayNum : undefined}
    73→    >
    74→      <span className="rich-footnote-section-item-content">{content}</span>
    75→      <a
    76→        href={`#${refId}`}
    77→        onClick={handleBackClick}
    78→        className="rich-footnote-back-ref"
    79→        role="doc-backlink"
    80→        aria-label={`Back to reference ${displayNum}`}
    81→      >
    82→        ↩
    83→      </a>
    84→    </li>
    85→  )
    86→}
    87→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import { GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
     2→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     3→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     4→
     5→import {
     6→  $createAlertQuoteNode,
     7→  AlertQuoteNode,
     8→  type AlertType,
     9→} from '../nodes/AlertQuoteNode'
    10→
    11→const ALERT_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, AlertType> = {
    12→  NOTE: 'note',
    13→  TIP: 'tip',
    14→  IMPORTANT: 'important',
    15→  WARNING: 'warning',
    16→  CAUTION: 'caution',
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const GIT_ALERT_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    20→  ...BASE,
    21→  dependencies: [AlertQuoteNode],
    22→  regExp: /^>\s*\[!(NOTE|TIP|IMPORTANT|WARNING|CAUTION)\]\s*$/,
    23→  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    24→    const typeKey = match[1]
    25→    const alertType = ALERT_TYPE_MAP[typeKey] || 'note'
    26→
    27→    const alertNode = $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType)
    28→
    29→    const serializedChildren = children.map((child) => child.exportJSON())
    30→    const content = {
    31→      root: {
    32→        children: [
    33→          {
    34→            type: 'paragraph',
    35→            children: serializedChildren,
    36→            direction: null,
    37→            format: '',
    38→            indent: 0,
    39→            textFormat: 0,
    40→            textStyle: '',
    41→            version: 1,
    42→          },
    43→        ],
    44→        direction: null,
    45→        format: '',
    46→        indent: 0,
    47→        type: 'root',
    48→        version: 1,
    49→      },
    50→    } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    51→
    52→    const editorState = alertNode.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)
    53→    alertNode.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)
    54→
    55→    parentNode.replace(alertNode)
    56→  },
    57→}
    58→
```

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/transformers/container.ts`

```text
     1→import { CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER as BASE } from '@haklex/rich-headless/transformers'
     2→import type { ElementTransformer } from '@lexical/markdown'
     3→import type { LexicalNode, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     4→import { $createParagraphNode, $createTextNode } from 'lexical'
     5→
     6→import type { BannerType } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
     7→import { $createBannerNode, BannerNode } from '../nodes/BannerNode'
     8→import { $createDetailsNode, DetailsNode } from '../nodes/DetailsNode'
     9→
    10→const BANNER_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
    11→  note: 'note',
    12→  info: 'note',
    13→  tip: 'tip',
    14→  success: 'tip',
    15→  important: 'important',
    16→  warning: 'warning',
    17→  warn: 'warning',
    18→  error: 'caution',
    19→  danger: 'caution',
    20→  caution: 'caution',
    21→}
    22→
    23→export const CONTAINER_TRANSFORMER: ElementTransformer = {
    24→  ...BASE,
    25→  dependencies: [BannerNode, DetailsNode],
    26→  regExp: /^:::\s*(\w+)(?:\{([^}]*)\})?\s*$/,
    27→  replace: (parentNode, children, match) => {
    28→    const type = match[1]
    29→    const params = match[2]
    30→
    31→    if (type in BANNER_TYPE_MAP) {
    32→      const bannerType = BANNER_TYPE_MAP[type]
    33→      const banner = $createBannerNode(bannerType)
    34→
    35→      const serializedChildren = children.map((child: LexicalNode) =>
    36→        child.exportJSON(),
    37→      )
    38→      const content = {
    39→        root: {
    40→          children: [
    41→            {
    42→              type: 'paragraph',
    43→              children: serializedChildren,
    44→              direction: null,
    45→              format: '',
    46→              indent: 0,
    47→              textFormat: 0,
    48→              textStyle: '',
    49→              version: 1,
    50→            },
    51→          ],
    52→          direction: null,
    53→          format: '',
    54→          indent: 0,
    55→          type: 'root',
    56→          version: 1,
    57→        },
    58→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
    59→
    60→      const editorState = banner.getContentEditor().parseEditorState(content)
    61→      banner.getContentEditor().setEditorState(editorState)
    62→
    63→      parentNode.replace(banner)
    64→      return
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    if (type === 'details') {
    68→      const summaryMatch = params?.match(/summary="([^"]*)"/)
    69→      const summary = summaryMatch ? summaryMatch[1] : 'Details'
    70→
    71→      const details = $createDetailsNode(summary)
    72→
    73→      children.forEach((child) => {
    74→        details.append(child)
    75→      })
    76→
    77→      parentNode.replace(details)
    78→      return
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    const paragraph = $createParagraphNode()
    82→    paragraph.append($createTextNode(`::: ${type}`))
    83→    children.forEach((child) => {
    84→      paragraph.append(child)
    85→    })
    86→    parentNode.replace(paragraph)
    87→  },
    88→}
    89→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { $insertNodes, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR, createCommand } from 'lexical'
     3→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { $createTldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'
     6→
     7→export const INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND = createCommand<string>('INSERT_TLDRAW')
     8→
     9→export function TldrawPlugin() {
    10→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    11→
    12→  useEffect(() => {
    13→    return editor.registerCommand(
    14→      INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND,
    15→      (snapshot) => {
    16→        const node = $createTldrawNode(snapshot)
    17→        $insertNodes([node])
    18→        return true
    19→      },
    20→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    21→    )
    22→  }, [editor])
    23→
    24→  return null
    25→}
    26→
```
</details></tool-use>

    24→export type AlertType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'

    38→  warning: 'Warning',
    39→  caution: 'Caution',
    40→}
    41→
    42→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    43→  return createEditor({
    44→    namespace: 'AlertContent',

    46→    theme: editorTheme,

    53→export type SerializedAlertQuoteNode = Spread<
    54→  {

    56→    content: SerializedEditorState

    58→  SerializedLexicalNode
    59→>
    60→
    61→export class AlertQuoteNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    62→  __alertType: AlertType
    63→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    64→
    65→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    66→    {
    67→      title: 'Callout',
    68→      icon: createElement(Info, { size: 20 }),
    69→      description: 'Info callout block',
    70→      keywords: ['alert', 'note', 'info', 'callout'],
    71→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    72→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    73→        editor.update(() => {
    74→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('note')])
    75→        })
    76→      },
    77→    },
    78→    {
    79→      title: 'Tip',
    80→      icon: createElement(Lightbulb, { size: 20 }),
    81→      description: 'Highlight a useful tip',
    82→      keywords: ['alert', 'tip', 'hint'],
    83→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    84→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    85→        editor.update(() => {
    86→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('tip')])
    87→        })
    88→      },
    89→    },
    90→    {
    91→      title: 'Warning',
    92→      icon: createElement(TriangleAlertIcon, { size: 20 }),
    93→      description: 'Warn about something',
    94→      keywords: ['alert', 'warning', 'caution'],
    95→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    96→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    97→        editor.update(() => {
    98→          $insertNodes([$createAlertQuoteNode('warning')])
    99→        })
   100→      },
   101→    },
   102→  ]
   103→
   104→  static getType(): string {
   105→    return 'alert-quote'
   106→  }
   107→
   108→  static clone(node: AlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   109→    return new AlertQuoteNode(
   110→      node.__alertType,
   111→      node.__contentEditor,
   112→      node.__key,
   113→    )
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  constructor(
   117→    alertType: AlertType,
   118→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   119→    key?: NodeKey,
   120→  ) {
   121→    super(key)
   122→    this.__alertType = alertType
   123→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   127→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   128→    div.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   129→    return div
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  updateDOM(prevNode: AlertQuoteNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   133→    if (prevNode.__alertType !== this.__alertType) {
   134→      dom.className = `rich-alert rich-alert-${this.__alertType}`
   135→    }
   136→    return false
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  isInline(): boolean {
   140→    return false
   141→  }
   142→
   143→  getAlertType(): AlertType {
   144→    return this.__alertType
   145→  }
   146→
   147→  setAlertType(alertType: AlertType): void {
   148→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   149→    writable.__alertType = alertType
   150→  }
   151→
   152→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   153→    return this.__contentEditor
   154→  }
   155→
   156→  getTextContent(): string {
   157→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   158→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   159→    })
   160→  }
   161→
   162→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedAlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   163→    const node = new AlertQuoteNode(serializedNode.alertType)
   164→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   165→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   166→        serializedNode.content,
   167→      )
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→    return node
   171→  }
   172→
   173→  exportJSON(): SerializedAlertQuoteNode {
   174→    return {
   175→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   176→      type: 'alert-quote',
   177→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   178→      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   179→      version: 1,
   180→    }
   181→  }
   182→
   183→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   184→    return createElement(AlertReadOnlyDecorator, {
   185→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   186→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   187→    })
   188→  }
   189→}
   190→
   191→export function $createAlertQuoteNode(alertType: AlertType): AlertQuoteNode {
   192→  return new AlertQuoteNode(alertType)
   193→}
   194→
   195→export function $isAlertQuoteNode(
   196→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   197→): node is AlertQuoteNode {
   198→  return node instanceof AlertQuoteNode
   199→}
   200→

     1→import type {

     5→  NodeKey,

     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,

     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { Flag } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { BannerReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/BannerReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type BannerType = 'note' | 'tip' | 'important' | 'warning' | 'caution'
    21→
    22→const LEGACY_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, BannerType> = {
    23→  info: 'note',
    24→  success: 'tip',
    25→  error: 'caution',
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function normalizeBannerType(type: string): BannerType {
    29→  if (type in LEGACY_TYPE_MAP) return LEGACY_TYPE_MAP[type]
    30→  return (type as BannerType) || 'note'
    31→}
    32→
    33→export const BANNER_TYPES: BannerType[] = [
    34→  'note',
    35→  'tip',
    36→  'important',
    37→  'warning',
    38→  'caution',
    39→]
    40→
    41→export const BANNER_LABELS: Record<BannerType, string> = {
    42→  note: 'Note',
    43→  tip: 'Tip',
    44→  important: 'Important',
    45→  warning: 'Warning',
    46→  caution: 'Caution',
    47→}
    48→
    49→function createContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    50→  return createEditor({
    51→    namespace: 'BannerContent',
    52→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    53→    theme: editorTheme,
    54→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    55→      console.error('[BannerContent]', error)
    56→    },
    57→  })
    58→}
    59→
    60→export type SerializedBannerNode = Spread<
    61→  {
    62→    bannerType: BannerType
    63→    content: SerializedEditorState
    64→  },
    65→  SerializedLexicalNode
    66→>
    67→
    68→interface LegacySerializedBannerNode extends SerializedBannerNode {
    69→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    70→}
    71→
    72→export class BannerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    73→  __bannerType: BannerType
    74→  __contentEditor: LexicalEditor
    75→
    76→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    77→    {
    78→      title: 'Banner',
    79→      icon: createElement(Flag, { size: 20 }),
    80→      description: 'Highlighted banner block',
    81→      keywords: ['banner', 'notice', 'announcement'],
    82→      section: 'ADVANCED',
    83→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    84→        editor.update(() => {
    85→          $insertNodes([$createBannerNode('note')])
    86→        })
    87→      },
    88→    },
    89→  ]
    90→
    91→  static getType(): string {
    92→    return 'banner'
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  static clone(node: BannerNode): BannerNode {
    96→    return new BannerNode(node.__bannerType, node.__contentEditor, node.__key)
    97→  }
    98→
    99→  constructor(
   100→    bannerType: BannerType,
   101→    contentEditor?: LexicalEditor,
   102→    key?: NodeKey,
   103→  ) {
   104→    super(key)
   105→    this.__bannerType = bannerType
   106→    this.__contentEditor = contentEditor || createContentEditor()
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   110→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   111→    div.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   112→    return div
   113→  }
   114→
   115→  updateDOM(prevNode: BannerNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
   116→    if (prevNode.__bannerType !== this.__bannerType) {
   117→      dom.className = `rich-banner rich-banner-${this.__bannerType}`
   118→    }
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  isInline(): boolean {
   123→    return false
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  getBannerType(): BannerType {
   127→    return this.__bannerType
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  setBannerType(bannerType: BannerType): void {
   131→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   132→    writable.__bannerType = bannerType
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  getContentEditor(): LexicalEditor {
   136→    return this.__contentEditor
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  getTextContent(): string {
   140→    return this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   141→      return $getRoot().getTextContent()
   142→    })
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedBannerNode): BannerNode {
   146→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedBannerNode
   147→    const bannerType = normalizeBannerType(serializedNode.bannerType)
   148→    const node = new BannerNode(bannerType)
   149→
   150→    if (serializedNode.content) {
   151→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(
   152→        serializedNode.content,
   153→      )
   154→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   155→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   156→      // Legacy ElementNode format: wrap children into editor state
   157→      const content = {
   158→        root: {
   159→          children: legacy.children,
   160→          direction: null,
   161→          format: '',
   162→          indent: 0,
   163→          type: 'root',
   164→          version: 1,
   165→        },
   166→      } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   167→      const editorState = node.__contentEditor.parseEditorState(content)
   168→      node.__contentEditor.setEditorState(editorState)
   169→    }
   170→
   171→    return node
   172→  }
   173→
   174→  exportJSON(): SerializedBannerNode {
   175→    return {
   176→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   177→      type: 'banner',
   178→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   179→      content: this.__contentEditor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   180→      version: 1,
   181→    }
   182→  }
   183→
   184→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   185→    return createElement(BannerReadOnlyDecorator, {
   186→      bannerType: this.__bannerType,
   187→      contentEditor: this.__contentEditor,
   188→    })
   189→  }
   190→}
   191→
   192→export function $createBannerNode(bannerType: BannerType): BannerNode {
   193→  return new BannerNode(bannerType)
   194→}
   195→
   196→export function $isBannerNode(
   197→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   198→): node is BannerNode {
   199→  return node instanceof BannerNode
   200→}
   201→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedEditorState,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getRoot, $insertNodes, createEditor, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { LayoutGrid } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { GridReadOnlyDecorator } from '../components/renderers/GridReadOnlyDecorator'
    16→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    17→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '../types/slash-menu'
    18→import { NESTED_EDITOR_NODES } from './shared'
    19→
    20→export type SerializedGridContainerNode = Spread<
    21→  {
    22→    cols: number
    23→    gap?: string
    24→    cells: SerializedEditorState[]
    25→  },
    26→  SerializedLexicalNode
    27→>
    28→
    29→interface LegacySerializedGridNode {
    30→  type?: string
    31→  version?: number
    32→  cols?: number
    33→  gap?: string | number
    34→  cells?: SerializedEditorState[]
    35→  children?: SerializedLexicalNode[]
    36→}
    37→
    38→function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
    39→  return createEditor({
    40→    namespace: 'GridCell',
    41→    nodes: NESTED_EDITOR_NODES,
    42→    theme: editorTheme,
    43→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    44→      console.error('[GridCell]', error)
    45→    },
    46→  })
    47→}
    48→
    49→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    50→  __cols: number
    51→  __gap: string
    52→  __cellEditors: LexicalEditor[]
    53→
    54→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    55→    {
    56→      title: 'Grid',
    57→      icon: createElement(LayoutGrid, { size: 20 }),
    58→      description: 'Grid layout container',
    59→      keywords: ['grid', 'columns', 'layout'],
    60→      section: 'LAYOUT',
    61→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    62→        editor.update(() => {
    63→          $insertNodes([$createGridContainerNode(2)])
    64→        })
    65→      },
    66→    },
    67→  ]
    68→
    69→  static getType(): string {
    70→    return 'grid-container'
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
    74→    return new GridContainerNode(
    75→      node.__cols,
    76→      node.__gap,
    77→      [...node.__cellEditors],
    78→      node.__key,
    79→    )
    80→  }
    81→
    82→  constructor(
    83→    cols = 2,
    84→    gap?: string,
    85→    cellEditors?: LexicalEditor[],
    86→    key?: NodeKey,
    87→  ) {
    88→    super(key)
    89→    this.__cols = cols
    90→    this.__gap = gap || '16px'
    91→    if (cellEditors) {
    92→      this.__cellEditors = cellEditors
    93→    } else {
    94→      this.__cellEditors = Array.from({ length: cols }, () =>
    95→        createCellEditor(),
    96→      )
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   101→    const div = document.createElement('div')
   102→    div.className = 'rich-grid-container'
   103→    return div
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   107→    return false
   108→  }
   109→
   110→  isInline(): boolean {
   111→    return false
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  getCols(): number {
   115→    return this.getLatest().__cols
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  setCols(cols: number): void {
   119→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   120→    const prev = writable.__cellEditors.length
   121→    writable.__cols = cols
   122→    if (cols > prev) {
   123→      for (let i = prev; i < cols; i++) {
   124→        writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   125→      }
   126→    }
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  getGap(): string {
   130→    return this.getLatest().__gap
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  setGap(gap: string): void {
   134→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   135→    writable.__gap = gap
   136→  }
   137→
   138→  getCellEditors(): LexicalEditor[] {
   139→    return this.getLatest().__cellEditors
   140→  }
   141→
   142→  addCells(count: number): void {
   143→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   144→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   145→      writable.__cellEditors.push(createCellEditor())
   146→    }
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  removeCells(count: number): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    const editors = writable.__cellEditors
   152→    const toRemove = Math.min(count, editors.length)
   153→    for (let i = 0; i < toRemove; i++) {
   154→      const editor = editors.at(-1)
   155→      if (!editor) break
   156→      const isEmpty = editor.getEditorState().read(() => {
   157→        return $getRoot().getTextContentSize() === 0
   158→      })
   159→      if (!isEmpty) break
   160→      editors.pop()
   161→    }
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  getTextContent(): string {
   165→    return this.__cellEditors
   166→      .map((editor) =>
   167→        editor.getEditorState().read(() => $getRoot().getTextContent()),
   168→      )
   169→      .join('\n')
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  static importJSON(
   173→    serializedNode: SerializedGridContainerNode,
   174→  ): GridContainerNode {
   175→    const legacy = serializedNode as LegacySerializedGridNode
   176→    const cols = legacy.cols || 2
   177→    const rawGap = legacy.gap
   178→    const gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : rawGap
   179→    const node = new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   180→
   181→    if (legacy.cells && legacy.cells.length > 0) {
   182→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = legacy.cells.map((cellState) => {
   183→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   184→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(cellState)
   185→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   186→        return editor
   187→      })
   188→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   189→    } else if (legacy.children) {
   190→      // Legacy ElementNode format: each child becomes a cell
   191→      const { children } = legacy
   192→      const editors: LexicalEditor[] = children.map((child) => {
   193→        const editor = createCellEditor()
   194→        const content = {
   195→          root: {
   196→            children: [child],
   197→            direction: null,
   198→            format: '',
   199→            indent: 0,
   200→            type: 'root',
   201→            version: 1,
   202→          },
   203→        } as unknown as SerializedEditorState
   204→        const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(content)
   205→        editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   206→        return editor
   207→      })
   208→      node.__cellEditors = editors
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    return node
   212→  }
   213→
   214→  exportJSON(): SerializedGridContainerNode {
   215→    return {
   216→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   217→      type: 'grid-container',
   218→      cols: this.__cols,
   219→      gap: this.__gap,
   220→      cells: this.__cellEditors.map((editor) =>
   221→        editor.getEditorState().toJSON(),
   222→      ),
   223→      version: 1,
   224→    }
   225→  }
   226→
   227→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   228→    return createElement(GridReadOnlyDecorator, {
   229→      cols: this.__cols,
   230→      gap: this.__gap,
   231→      cellEditors: this.__cellEditors,
   232→    })
   233→  }
   234→}
   235→
   236→export function $createGridContainerNode(
   237→  cols = 2,
   238→  gap?: string,
   239→): GridContainerNode {
   240→  return new GridContainerNode(cols, gap)
   241→}
   242→
   243→export function $isGridContainerNode(
   244→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   245→): node is GridContainerNode {
   246→  return node instanceof GridContainerNode
   247→}
   248→
```

 `./packages/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import type {
     3→  EditorConfig,
     4→  LexicalEditor,
     5→  LexicalNode,
     6→  NodeKey,
     7→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     8→  Spread,
     9→} from 'lexical'
    10→import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes, DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    11→import { PenTool } from 'lucide-react'
    12→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    13→import { createElement, lazy, Suspense } from 'react'
    14→
    15→const LazyStaticRenderer = lazy(() =>
    16→  import('./TldrawStaticRenderer').then((m) => ({
    17→    default: m.TldrawStaticRenderer,
    18→  })),
    19→)
    20→const LazyEditRenderer = lazy(() =>
    21→  import('./TldrawEditRenderer').then((m) => ({
    22→    default: m.TldrawEditRenderer,
    23→  })),
    24→)
    25→
    26→export type SerializedTldrawNode = Spread<
    27→  { snapshot: string },
    28→  SerializedLexicalNode
    29→>
    30→
    31→export class TldrawNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    32→  __snapshot: string
    33→
    34→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    35→    {
    36→      title: 'Whiteboard',
    37→      icon: createElement(PenTool, { size: 20 }),
    38→      description: 'Tldraw whiteboard canvas',
    39→      keywords: ['tldraw', 'whiteboard', 'draw', 'canvas'],
    40→      section: 'MEDIA',
    41→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    42→        editor.update(() => {
    43→          $insertNodes([$createTldrawNode('{}')])
    44→        })
    45→      },
    46→    },
    47→  ]
    48→
    49→  static getType(): string {
    50→    return 'tldraw'
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  static clone(node: TldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    54→    return new TldrawNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
    55→  }
    56→
    57→  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    58→    super(key)
    59→    this.__snapshot = snapshot
    60→  }
    61→
    62→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    63→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    64→    div.className = 'rich-tldraw-wrapper'
    65→    return div
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    69→    return false
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  isInline(): boolean {
    73→    return false
    74→  }
    75→
    76→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    77→    return $createTldrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
    78→  }
    79→
    80→  exportJSON(): SerializedTldrawNode {
    81→    return {
    82→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    83→      type: 'tldraw',
    84→      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    85→      version: 1,
    86→    }
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  getSnapshot(): string {
    90→    return this.__snapshot
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  setSnapshot(snapshot: string): void {
    94→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    95→    writable.__snapshot = snapshot
    96→  }
    97→
    98→  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    99→    const nodeKey = this.__key
   100→    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
   101→
   102→    const fallback = createElement('div', {
   103→      className: 'rich-tldraw-loading',
   104→      style: {
   105→        position: 'relative',
   106→        width: '100%',
   107→        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
   108→        margin: '1rem 0',
   109→      },
   110→    })
   111→
   112→    if (isEditable) {
   113→      return createElement(
   114→        Suspense,
   115→        { fallback },
   116→        createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {
   117→          snapshot: this.__snapshot,
   118→          onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
   119→            editor.update(() => {
   120→              const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as TldrawNode | null
   121→              if (node) {
   122→                node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)
   123→              }
   124→            })
   125→          },
   126→        }),
   127→      )
   128→    }
   129→
   130→    return createElement(
   131→      Suspense,
   132→      { fallback },
   133→      createElement(LazyStaticRenderer, { snapshot: this.__snapshot }),
   134→    )
   135→  }
   136→}
   137→
   138→export function $createTldrawNode(snapshot: string): TldrawNode {
   139→  return new TldrawNode(snapshot)
   140→}
   141→
   142→export function $isTldrawNode(
   143→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   144→): node is TldrawNode {
   145→  return node instanceof TldrawNode
   146→}
   147→
```
</details></tool-use>
